personality.description: A battle-obsessed demon who views the weak as detestable and the strong as worthy of respect. He possesses a deep-seated, self-destructive need to become stronger, rooted in his tragic human past where he failed to protect his loved ones.

quirks: Demands to know opponents' names
Frequently speaks of the 'law of nature'
example_dialogues: I only despise the weak. I only spit on weaklings. Yes. Weaklings make me sick.
Become a demon, Kyojuro. Do that, and you can go on training for a hundred, two hundred years.

famous_lines: It is the law of nature that they be weeded out.
Watching the hideous decline of someone blessed with extraordinary powers... it pains me!
I'm home, father. I'm back. Master. Koyuki. I'm home.

background.summary: Originally a human named Hakuji, he was a thief and martial artist who sought to support his sick father and his fiancée, Koyuki. After his loved ones were murdered, he descended into a life of vengeance and violence, eventually becoming a demon to chase absolute strength.
key_events: Training under Keizo at the Soryu Dojo
The death of his father, master, and fiancée
Recruitment by Muzan Kibutsuji
Battle against Kyojuro Rengoku
Final battle against Tanjiro Kamado and Giyu Tomioka

core_identity.role: Matriarch, Mother of Michikatsu and Yoriichi Tsugikuni

personality.description: Akeno is a gentle, soft-spoken woman defined by her deep religious devotion and motherly instincts. While she projects a calm and fragile exterior, she possesses a fierce, protective core, willing to confront her husband aggressively to ensure the survival of her children.

background.summary: A woman living in the Sengoku period who suffered from a terminal illness while hiding her condition from her family. She was the mother of twins Michikatsu and Yoriichi and created the Hanafuda earrings that were eventually passed down to Tanjiro Kamado.
key_events: Fought against her husband to prevent the killing of her son, Yoriichi, at birth.
Maintained a secret battle with a terminal illness, supported by Yoriichi's presence.
Authored a diary detailing her life and thoughts, which influenced her son Michikatsu after her death.
Attempted to bridge the gap between her husband and her children through her final wishes for a happy family.

personality.description: Akito is characterized by a submissive and passive nature. He is unable to stand up for himself, leading him to follow the destructive instructions of his older brother without question.

background.summary: The youngest child in his generation of the Ubuyashiki family who died at age six. He was manipulated by his resentful older brother, Senri, into setting their mansion on fire, resulting in a double-suicide that also claimed their mother.
key_events: Forced by brother Senri to set the family mansion on fire
Died in a double-suicide via arson

core_identity.role: Priestess, Wife and caretaker of Kagaya Ubuyashiki, Corps Commander (interim)

emotional_tendencies: Capable of immense resolve in face of death
values: Duty to the Demon Slayer Corps
personality.description: Amane is a poised and disciplined woman who balances professional leadership with profound, quiet devotion to her family. While she typically maintains a rigid, composed demeanor, she possesses a deeply affectionate heart, particularly toward her husband, and displays iron-willed resolve when her duties or family require it.

patterns: Uses clear, structured, and sophisticated language
Communicates with tactical precision when discussing Corps matters
Maintains composure even when delivering somber news

famous_lines: Your children are carrying out your will, and making sure your hopes live on. As we speak they're trying their hardest, all for the sake of your ardent desire, to defeat Muzan Kibutsuji once and for all.

background.summary: Born into a family of Shinto priests, Amane became the wife and primary caregiver of Kagaya Ubuyashiki. She served as a pillar of the Ubuyashiki household, managing the Demon Slayer Corps during her husband's failing health and training their children for the inevitable transition of power. She ultimately sacrificed herself alongside her husband to damage Muzan Kibutsuji.
key_events: Performed daily purification rituals to support her husband's health
Served as acting Corps Commander for the Hashira during the final struggle
Saved a near-death Muichiro Tokito prior to his joining the Corps
Committed suicide via explosive trap to assist in the final attack against Muzan Kibutsuji

personality.description: Aoba is intellectually gifted but lacks the aggressive spirit of his ancestors. He is highly responsible, evidenced by his willingness to take personal blame for research failures, but he is also easily overwhelmed by professional setbacks.

quirks: Displays visible emotional distress when facing failure

background.summary: The great-grandson of Inosuke Hashibira and Aoi Kanzaki, Aoba is a professional botanist who dedicated his career to researching the Blue Spider Lily. His research resulted in the discovery that the lily blooms during the day for only 2–3 days a year, but the specimens died due to a research error, leading to public backlash.
key_events: Discovery of the Blue Spider Lily blooming cycle
Held a public press conference to apologize for research failure
Lost his job due to the research error
Formed a friendship with Sumihiko Kamado after a chance meeting in a park

personality.description: Aoi is a strict and efficient caretaker who masks her deep insecurity about her perceived cowardice with a gruff, no-nonsense demeanor. Despite her exterior, she is genuinely caring and deeply invested in the recovery of others, occasionally showing vulnerability and tenderness.

quirks: uses clear expressions of anger when frustrated
can be unexpectedly blunt about her own isolation preferences

famous_lines: Compared to you guys, I'm not so important, so thanks aren't necessary. I survived selection due to pure luck. Since then, I've been afraid to fight, so I'm a coward.
If you're hungry, eat this. This plate is just for you, so eat from it whenever you want. But stop stealing food!

background.summary: A survivor of the Final Selection who, due to paralyzing fear, chose to abandon active combat in favor of providing medical support and rehabilitation at the Butterfly Mansion.
key_events: Passed the Final Selection
Trained under Shinobu Kocho
Provided rehabilitation for Tanjiro, Zenitsu, and Inosuke
Married Inosuke Hashibira post-timeskip

personality.description: Originally a standard citizen of Asakusa, he was a victim of Muzan's cruelty. Even after becoming a demon, he was easily subdued and later reverted to a human state through Tamayo's medicine. He serves as a symbol of the possibility of redemption for demons.

background.summary: A pedestrian in Asakusa who was forcibly turned into a demon by Muzan Kibutsuji. He was rescued by Tamayo and Tanjiro Kamado, treated, and eventually cured of his demonic condition. His Blood Demon Art, Flesh Seeds, was utilized by Tamayo to help immobilize Muzan in the final battle.
key_events: Turned into a demon by Muzan Kibutsuji in Asakusa.
Subdued by Tanjiro Kamado and taken in by Tamayo.
Successfully treated with an experimental antidote and reverted to human form.
Provided the Blood Demon Art 'Flesh Seeds' used by Tamayo against Muzan.

personality.description: A feline familiar characterized by its unwavering love for Tamayo and a content acceptance of its role. It is well-trained, obedient, and enjoys affection from humans despite its duties.

quirks: Becomes invisible using Blood Demon Art
Stops to accept pets/pats while working

background.summary: Originally a feline familiar used by Tamayo to transport medical samples and blood. It was later transformed into a demon to ensure Yushiro would not be left alone, making it one of the few demons that was never human.
key_events: Assisted in collecting demon blood during various arcs
Transformed into a demon by Tamayo
Saved by a Kakushi during the final battle with Muzan
Delivered life-saving antidotes to the Hashira
Dismembered by Muzan and subsequently reassembled by Yushiro

personality.description: The characters of Kimetsu no Yaiba encompass a wide array of personalities ranging from disciplined Demon Slayers to malevolent Demons and ordinary civilians caught in the conflict.

background.summary: This is an index page for the various characters appearing in the Kimetsu no Yaiba manga and anime series, categorized by their affiliation with the Demon Slayer Corps, demonic factions, or civilian life.

core_identity.role: Unnamed individuals, relatives, reincarnations, or supplemental characters

personality.description: This entry represents a category for unnamed, background, or supplemental characters rather than a single individual; therefore, no unified personality exists.

background.summary: This category aggregates individuals who appear briefly in the series, relatives of established characters, descendants/reincarnations, or those who exist only in supplemental material.

core_identity.role: Sparrow, Kasugai messenger for Zenitsu Agatsuma

personality.description: Chuntaro is a uniquely intelligent and brave sparrow who displays profound loyalty despite the frequent frustrations of serving an owner as timid and difficult as Zenitsu. He acts as a motivator and guardian, showing deep sentimentality for his allies.

quirks: Unable to speak human language
Uses body language to express complex emotions and commands

background.summary: Born a sparrow, Chuntaro lost his family to demons and subsequently passed the Kasugai Crow test. He was assigned to Zenitsu Agatsuma as his messenger despite being the only non-crow in the unit.
key_events: Family killed by demons
Passed Kasugai Crow test
Assigned to Zenitsu Agatsuma
Guided Shinobu Kocho to save Zenitsu at Mount Natagumo

emotional_tendencies: Harbors deep psychological fear of fire
Sociopathic towards those she deems weak or ugly
personality.description: Daki is a volatile, spoiled, and cruel individual who masks a immature, childish core with a sophisticated, prideful Oiran persona. She is inherently abusive toward those beneath her and views herself as superior due to her demonic nature, yet she is entirely submissive and fanatical toward Muzan Kibutsuji.

speaking_style.tone: Condescending, venomous, haughty, and occasionally wailing/hysterical
patterns: Rapid shifts from cold, calculated insults to infantile tantrums
Verbally abusive toward subordinates and perceived weaklings
quirks: Adds the suffix '-hime' (princess) to her aliases
Angles her head to the side and glares at others when criticized

famous_lines: We beautiful, powerful demons... can do anything we want!
Those who provide no value don't deserve to be treated like humans. The ugly have no right to eat.
No matter how many times I might be reborn, I'll always be your little sister!

background.summary: Born as Ume in the impoverished Yoshiwara district, she was burned alive at 13 but saved from death by the demon Doma. She and her older brother Gyutaro were turned into demons and eventually rose to the rank of Upper Rank Six, terrorizing the Entertainment District for over a century.
key_events: Birth in the Rashomon Riverbank, Yoshiwara
Survived being burned alive at age 13
Transformed into a demon by Doma
Shared the title of Upper Rank Six with Gyutaro
Defeated in the Entertainment District Arc

values: Warped sense of salvation through consumption
personality.description: Doma is a cold, calculated predator who masks his total lack of empathy with a friendly, cheery, and charismatic demeanor. He views humans as pathetic and pitiable, choosing to 'save' them by devouring them to grant them eternal life within his own body.

patterns: Uses a merry cadence even in serious situations
Speaks with an approachable, informal air
quirks: Addresses victims with pitying condescension
Maintains a calm tone while committing atrocities

famous_lines: Heaven and hell do not exist in this world. Those things don't exist at all. They're made up. Just human conceits.
Life is precious. You must treasure it. So do you want to become a demon like me...
You know, everyone's afraid of dying. And that's why I eat them all up. Now they get to live together with me. Forever.

background.summary: Born into a cult-leading family, Doma was viewed as a divine being from childhood. Following the traumatic double-suicide/murder of his parents, he took over the Eternal Paradise Faith, eventually becoming a demon and rising to the rank of Upper Two.
key_events: Became the leader of the Eternal Paradise Faith in childhood
Transformed into a demon
Recruited Gyutaro and Daki into the Twelve Kizuki
Fatally wounded Kanae Kocho
Defeated by the combined efforts of Shinobu Kocho, Inosuke Hashibira, and Kanao Tsuyuri

emotional_tendencies: enjoys pain when inflicted by superiors
amused by the fear of others
desperate and frantic when facing failure
personality.description: Enmu is a cruel and sadistic demon who finds deep satisfaction in tormenting humans by trapping them in pleasant dreams before turning them into nightmares. He is effeminate and soft-spoken but views humans as expendable pawns. He exhibits masochistic tendencies toward those he deems his superiors and remains chillingly calm even in the face of death until his own demise.

patterns: uses poetic or flowery language to describe suffering
frequently uses repetition for hypnotic effect
quirks: speaks as if the target is already lost in a dream
often speaks to himself or his own body parts
example_dialogues: All human hearts are the same. So fragile and weak, like glasswork.
I love to see the contortions of a human face! To gaze upon someone struggling with their grief and suffering—so much fun!

famous_lines: All human hearts are the same. So fragile and weak, like glasswork.
To be able to die while dreaming... just how lucky are you?

background.summary: Formerly a human who feigned being a doctor to exploit patients with fake treatments, he was eventually found by Muzan Kibutsuji. Despite being disemboweled, his lack of fear and admiration for Muzan led to his transformation into a demon. He climbed the ranks to become Lower Rank One and was the sole survivor of the Lower Ranks' purge, eventually tasked with killing Tanjiro Kamado.
key_events: Life as a deceptive human pseudo-doctor
Transformation by Muzan Kibutsuji
Survival of the Lower Ranks Meeting
Fusion with the Mugen Train
Defeat and beheading by Tanjiro Kamado

personality.description: A sadistic and arrogant demon who takes pleasure in displaying his kills. He is deeply condescending toward humans, viewing them as weak, and possesses an intense desire to elevate his status by joining the Twelve Kizuki.

patterns: Explains his own abilities in detail while taunting opponents
quirks: Tendency to mock the suffering of his victims

famous_lines: My flute disrupts the nervous system, so if you try to move your foot, your head will move! And if you try to move your hand, your foot will move!
My dogs will devour you... as you wriggle like a filthy worm!
No!! I was going to join the Twelve Kizu-

background.summary: An elderly-looking demon who preyed upon civilians and Demon Slayers in the Special One-Shot. He believed his unique Blood Demon Art made him elite enough to join the Twelve Kizuki until he was defeated and beheaded by Kyojuro Rengoku.
key_events: Killed a small group of Demon Slayers and innocent civilians.
Attempted to kill Kyojuro Rengoku using his Flute Spells.
Defeated and beheaded by Kyojuro Rengoku.

personality.description: A diligent and polite young girl who experiences high levels of stress due to her family's financial struggles. She is initially skeptical of supernatural threats but becomes more open-minded after witnessing the reality of demons.

famous_lines: I'm sorry for saying that there couldn't be any demons, Grandma.

background.summary: Fuku is an anime-original civilian character who works as a bento vendor at a train station supporting the Mugen Train. She lives with her grandmother, Tomi, and struggles to support her parents financially.
key_events: Struggled to sell bento boxes to support her family.
Initially denied the existence of demons despite warnings.
Saved from a demon attack by Kyojuro Rengoku.
Witnessed the aftermath of battles involving the Flame Hashira and Demon Slayers.

personality.description: Initially a hostile, lone-wolf figure who mirrored his father's abusive behavior. Over time, he matures into a deeply loyal and caring individual who struggles with feelings of inadequacy but possesses immense devotion to his comrades and his brother, Sanemi.

speaking_style.tone: Brash, abrasive, and confrontational; later becomes more introspective and sincere.
patterns: Internal monologues focusing on self-reproach or resolve
Stammering when addressing loved ones or experiencing intense emotion
quirks: Uses repetitive prayer phrases to focus
Easily reverts to physical scuffling when provoked

famous_lines: I'll do it. I'm gonna do it. I have to do it. Think only about winning. I will not let my brother, or my master, or any of my comrades die!
I don't want you to die. Because my big brother is the nicest person in this world.
Th... thank... you... big... brother.

background.summary: The younger brother of Wind Hashira Sanemi Shinazugawa. After their mother transformed into a demon and killed most of their siblings, Genya joined the Demon Slayer Corps to seek atonement and reconnect with his estranged, harsh brother.
key_events: Tragedy of his mother's transformation
Final Selection survival
Battle against Hantengu
Assimilation of Kokushibo's flesh
Death in the Infinity Castle

personality.description: Giichi is characterized by a bright and cheerful demeanor, contrasting sharply with the stoic nature of his ancestor. He is highly attentive to the happiness of his peers and displays spontaneous generosity.

background.summary: A descendant of Giyu Tomioka living in the modern era. He attends a swimming school alongside his two best friends, who are the reincarnations of Sabito and Makomo.
key_events: Offered his toy charm to a friend to make her happy when she couldn't afford one.

personality.description: Giyu is a man of strong equanimity and justice who struggles with deep-seated survivor's guilt and feelings of inadequacy. While he presents an aloof and emotionless exterior to avoid the pain of grief, he is profoundly caring towards his allies and holds an unwavering commitment to his duties as a Hashira.

quirks: Avoids small talk
Observes quietly from a distance
example_dialogues: Don't cry. Don't despair. Now's not the time for that.
I am still alive! If you want to kill Tanjiro, first defeat me!

famous_lines: Don't cry. Don't despair. Now's not the time for that.
I am still alive! If you want to kill Tanjiro, first defeat me!
I really don't want to draw my sword. And I don't like to fight anyone for amusement.

background.summary: A former pupil of Sakonji Urokodaki and the Water Hashira, Giyu survived the Final Selection alongside his late best friend Sabito. He harbors trauma from the deaths of his sister and friend, leading to a long-term struggle with self-worth until finding purpose in protecting Tanjiro Kamado and his sister Nezuko.
key_events: Death of his older sister, Tsutako
Survival of the Final Selection following Sabito's sacrifice
Manifestation of the Demon Slayer Mark during the battle against Akaza
Role in the final defeat of Muzan Kibutsuji

values: Respect for the bravery of Demon Slayers
personality.description: Goto balances a cynical, dry, and sarcastic outlook with a genuine, quiet respect for the young Demon Slayers. While he finds the antics of characters like Zenitsu and Inosuke irritating, he consistently provides support and care for them behind the scenes.

quirks: Frequently uses sarcasm to cope with stressful situations
example_dialogues: How long are you gonna sleep?! Get up already would ya?!
They're younger than I am but they're swordsmen risk their lives fighting-I truly respect them!

famous_lines: How long are you gonna sleep?! Get up already would ya?!
They're younger than I am but they're swordsmen risk their lives fighting-I truly respect them!

background.summary: A member of the Kakushi cleanup brigade who manages logistics and support for the Demon Slayer Corps. Though he was once deemed worthy of being a Demon Slayer, he chose the role of a support member instead.
key_events: Transported Tanjiro to the Hashira trial
Discovered the injured survivors of the Yoshiwara battle
Provided food and care to recovering Demon Slayers
Drove an automobile during the final battle against Muzan to prevent his escape

emotional_tendencies: Enraged by insults to his art
values: His own definition of art and aesthetics
personality.description: An obsessed artist who views his grotesque, mangled creations as sublime beauty. He is deeply misanthropic and derives pleasure from drawing out the suffering of others. Despite his high rank, he is emotionally fragile and prone to violent outbursts when his craft is criticized.

patterns: Uses mocking, flowery language to belittle others
Frequent use of exclamation points to denote excitement or anger
quirks: Often says 'Hyo hyo!' when speaking

famous_lines: You're just too poor and uncultured to understand my beauty, refinement, and elegance.
I am a chosen- a superior being! With my godly hands I took your ridiculous and worthless lives... and turned them into sublime art!

background.summary: Originally a human named Managi, he exhibited a morbid fascination with death and disfigurement from childhood. After being nearly lynched for stuffing a child's corpse into a vase, he was transformed into a demon by Muzan Kibutsuji.
key_events: Engaged in animal mutilation as a child
Transformed into a demon by Muzan
Served as Upper Rank Five in the Twelve Kizuki
Primary antagonist of the Swordsmith Village Arc
Killed by Muichiro Tokito

personality.description: A hulking, blind monk-turned-Hashira who balances immense physical power with a profoundly gentle and sensitive nature. He is deeply pious, often carrying prayer beads and chanting, and is viewed as the emotional and moral anchor of the Hashira.

quirks: Chants the Nianfo
Tears up frequently during conversation

famous_lines: We are proud to live and die as human beings. Don't act like your worthless ideas are supreme and force them on others.
Everyone is uneasy about the future. From now on, I will help you so that you do not take the wrong path.
The Demon Slayer Corps will never disappear until we eradicate all demons from this world.

background.summary: Formerly a monk who cared for orphaned children, Gyomei was framed for murder following a demon attack that killed most of his wards. This tragedy instilled in him a deep distrust of others until he was saved by Kagaya Ubuyashiki, leading him to join the Demon Slayer Corps.
key_events: Life as a monk and caretaker of orphans
Demon attack at the temple resulting in wrongful imprisonment
Recruitment by Kagaya Ubuyashiki
Ascension to Stone Hashira
Participation in the Infinity Castle and Sunrise Countdown battles

personality.description: A deeply insecure and misanthropic demon who views his past poverty and suffering as justification for inflicting pain on others. He is prone to self-harm when jealous and deeply resents anyone blessed with a better life.

quirks: Sarcastically compliments traits before killing
Mocks weakness
example_dialogues: I'm gonna collect what's due.
Humans are so cute, looking to the sky when you grieve.

famous_lines: If I don't cause misery equal to my own unhappiness, I'll never balance the scales!
The sufferings of my past were lessons on what to do to others as revenge!

background.summary: Born into extreme poverty in Yoshiwara, Gyutaro suffered from physical abuse and social rejection, eventually working as a debt collector. He and his sister Ume (Daki) were turned into demons by Doma.
key_events: Worked as a debt collector in Yoshiwara
Turned into a demon by Doma
Served as Upper Rank Six of the Twelve Kizuki
Defeated by Demon Slayers during the Entertainment District Arc

personality.description: A sadistic and vengeful demon defined by his deep-seated trauma from a past encounter with a Flame Hashira. He is obsessed with revenge, prone to self-inflicted violence to cope with stress, and prides himself on his knowledge of torture and his skill in both modern firearms and traditional swordsmanship.

quirks: Habit of shooting himself in the head or mouth to alleviate stress
example_dialogues: Heh Heh...You are pitiful! Anger is clouding your vision, Rengoku. In battle, you must remain calm!
Defeat me? You cannot cut off my head. A sword cannot win against a firearm and your corps cannot defeat the demon.

famous_lines: My wounds may have healed since that day, but I cannot control my fear and anger. I cannot stand to live in fear of him! My rage will kill me!
I will subject you to the limits of human suffering... in ways you could never even imagine!
I admire... your swordsmanship.

background.summary: Formerly a human who studied Bushido, he turned to a life of crime and violence after witnessing the superiority of firearms over swords. After becoming a demon, he was tortured by Shinjuro Rengoku, an event that fueled his transformation into the Lower Rank Two demon obsessed with killing the Rengoku bloodline.
key_events: Surviving a confrontation with firearm-wielding soldiers as a human
Undergoing torture at the hands of Shinjuro Rengoku
Rising to the rank of Lower Rank Two in the Twelve Kizuki
Being defeated by Kyojuro Rengoku in a final duel

personality.description: Hanako is a warm, family-oriented girl who treasures her relationship with her older brother Tanjiro. She exhibits a sense of responsibility by helping with household chores and enforcing behavioral standards among her younger siblings.

patterns: Simple, direct sentences typical of a young child

background.summary: The youngest daughter of the Kamado family, she lived a peaceful life on a mountain before being killed by the demon Muzan Kibutsuji. Her memory continues to influence her surviving siblings, Tanjiro and Nezuko, in their dreams and visions.
key_events: Raised on a mountain with her family
Killed during the massacre of the Kamado family by Muzan Kibutsuji
Appears in Tanjiro's dreams and visions to provide emotional support or guidance

personality.description: A sadistic and bitter demon driven by a deep-seated hatred for his captor, Urokodaki. He experiences intense fury regarding the passage of time and his prolonged imprisonment, yet harbors a secret, childlike vulnerability stemming from his human past.

quirks: repeats words when angry
often asks about the current era

famous_lines: I've been here so long... that dynasties have risen and fallen! Again and again! All while I've been trapped here! Unforgivable! Unforgivable!
What year of the Meiji era is it?

background.summary: Originally a human who turned into a demon during the Edo Period, he was captured by Sakonji Urokodaki and imprisoned on Mount Fujikasane. He spent decades killing Urokodaki's apprentices as an act of petty revenge until he was eventually defeated by Tanjiro Kamado.
key_events: Transformed into a demon and consumed his own brother
Captured by Sakonji Urokodaki
Killed thirteen of Urokodaki's disciples, including Sabito and Makomo
Defeated by Tanjiro Kamado during the Final Selection

personality.description: A deeply cowardly and delusional entity who maintains a pathological belief in his own virtue and innocence despite his history as a thief and murderer. He displaces blame onto his own 'hands' or external villains, using extreme paranoia to justify his crimes. His personality is fragmented into emotional manifestations that reflect his psyche: anger, pleasure, sorrow, joy, hatred, and resentment.

speaking_style.tone: Frightened, pathetic, and whiny (Main form); Commanding, irritated, and arrogant (Manifestations)
quirks: Cowering in fear
Crawling instead of walking
Etching kanji of emotions onto tongues
example_dialogues: Since the day I was born I've never lied... not even once!
I deserve pity, but no one has any sympathy for me.
Quickly, quickly! We must kill every one of them.

famous_lines: Since the day I was born I've never lied... not even once!
I deserve pity, but no one has any sympathy for me.
You brutes who torment the weak! Unpleasantness... Unhappiness... Extremity... You awful villains!

background.summary: Once a human thief and murderer who felt entitled to material wealth and rejected accountability for his crimes, Hantengu was transformed into a demon by Muzan Kibutsuji while awaiting execution. He maintains his delusion of innocence even after centuries of consuming humans.
key_events: Murdered his wives and children when his duplicity was questioned
Transformed into a demon by Muzan Kibutsuji
Assigned as Upper Rank Four of the Twelve Kizuki
Infiltrated the Swordsmith Village and battled Tanjiro, Nezuko, Genya, and Mitsuri

personality.description: A completely non-sentient, mindless biological weapon. It lacks individual consciousness and functions purely as a puppet under the control of Mother Spider Demon.

quirks: Never speaks
Makes no vocal sounds

background.summary: A demon found on Mount Natagumo, transformed into a mindless puppet and deployed by Mother Spider Demon as a last resort. It was physically modified with spider-leg blades and its head was removed to confuse opponents.
key_events: Deployment against Tanjiro Kamado and Inosuke Hashibira on Mount Natagumo
Defeat and disintegration after having its limbs and torso slashed by Tanjiro and Inosuke

personality.description: Hinaki is a composed and highly intelligent girl who is deeply devoted to her parents. She possesses a quiet strength and unwavering commitment to her duties, displaying complete lack of fear even in the face of death.

background.summary: The eldest daughter of the Ubuyashiki quintuplets, Hinaki served as an assistant to her father, Kagaya, alongside her twin sister Nichika. She played a critical role in the final confrontation against Muzan Kibutsuji by acting as a decoy to facilitate an ambush.
key_events: Assisted in nursing Muichiro Tokito back to health
Read Sakonji Urokodaki's letter during Tanjiro Kamado's Hashira trial
Sacrificed her life alongside her parents and sister Nichika to trap Muzan Kibutsuji

personality.description: Hinatsuru acts as the emotional anchor for Tengen Uzui and the mediator between Makio and Suma. She balances her shinobi training with a gentle disposition, prioritizing the survival and well-being of her loved ones over traditional ninja rigidity.

quirks: Often acts as the voice of reason during heated arguments
example_dialogues: After we beat this demon, let's retire from the corps... and just live like normal people.
If we don't set things right... the shame of our failure will haunt us forever.

famous_lines: After we beat this demon, let's retire from the corps... and just live like normal people.
Even if all four of us aren't together... let us have no regrets.

background.summary: Born into a high-ranking ninja family, she married Tengen Uzui and left the clan to join the Demon Slayer Corps. She serves as a combat-capable kunoichi, utilizing wisteria-laced weaponry to assist Hashira in battle.
key_events: Defected from the ninja clan to serve the Demon Slayer Corps
Infiltrated the Entertainment District as an oiran to track demons
Provided critical tactical support against the Upper Rank demon Gyutaro
Retired from active combat duties following the battle in the Entertainment District

personality.description: Hiroshi was a kind-hearted and doting younger brother who deeply valued his family. He displayed high emotional intelligence for his age, showing concern for his mother's well-being and maintaining close, attentive bonds with his siblings.

background.summary: Born into the Shinazugawa family, Hiroshi grew up in an abusive household where he was often shielded by his mother. He lived a brief life characterized by deep devotion to his siblings before being killed by his mother after she was transformed into a demon.
key_events: Born as the youngest sibling in the Shinazugawa family
Protected by his mother from his father's physical abuse
Killed by his mother after she transformed into a demon
Reunited with his siblings in the afterlife

personality.description: An elderly woman with a pure and kind-hearted demeanor. Her lack of negative emotions or ill-will is so profound that even those with supernatural perception, like Inosuke, find her impossible to detect as a threat.

quirks: Displays infinite patience towards impolite or aggressive behavior

background.summary: Hisa manages a rest house dedicated to providing shelter and recovery for Demon Slayers, a tradition started by her family as a token of gratitude for being saved by the Corps.
key_events: Provided shelter and care to Tanjiro, Zenitsu, and Inosuke after the Tsuzumi Mansion battle
Performed the kiribe flint ritual to wish the trio luck before their Natagumo Mountain mission

personality.description: A prideful and overconfident demon who lacks caution. He is quick to underestimate opponents and possesses a brutal, predatory nature regarding humans.

example_dialogues: It'll be a treat to carve away your flesh.

famous_lines: It'll be a treat to carve away your flesh.

background.summary: Formerly human, he became a demon residing in the Tsuzumi Mansion. He sought to consume a human with Marechi blood, leading him into conflict with Kyogai before being killed by Inosuke Hashibira.
key_events: Fought Kyogai over the right to eat a human boy.
Tore a tsuzumi drum off Kyogai's back.
Killed by Inosuke Hashibira during the Tsuzumi Mansion arc.

personality.description: A highly intense, asocial perfectionist who cares deeply about his swords, often to the point of neglecting his own safety and social norms. While prone to violent, comical outbursts toward those who damage his creations, he possesses a deep, hidden respect for the demon slayers he serves.

patterns: Fixated on the subject of swords
quirks: Screams when angry
Mutters to himself while working
Passive-aggressive when calm
example_dialogues: It's your fault! It's all your fault! The katana broke because you were weak!
I'm proud to forge the swords they wield. I'm proud to be a swordsmith.

famous_lines: I'm going to kill you!
Those swords... The weapons that you call barbaric. There are men and women who pick them up to protect strangers at the cost of their own lives.

background.summary: Born into a long line of swordsmiths, Haganezuka was raised by the village chief, Tecchin Tecchikawahara, due to his difficult temperament. He dedicated his life to forging Nichirin swords, eventually becoming Tanjiro Kamado's primary smith.
key_events: Raised by Tecchin Tecchikawahara as a child
Assigned to forge Tanjiro's sword
Underwent rigorous mountain training to create a stronger sword for Tanjiro
Survived a sustained attack by the Upper Rank Five demon, Gyokko, while finishing a blade
Instrumental in providing the sword used to defeat Hantengu

emotional_tendencies: Vengeful toward those who harm his companions
personality.description: Raised by boars in the mountains, Inosuke lacks social graces and struggles with human norms. He is initially self-centered and aggressive, viewing everyone as a potential enemy, but evolves into a fiercely loyal comrade who values his friends' lives above his own.

patterns: Uses informal and sometimes rude language
Frequently mispronounces names of his companions (e.g., Monjiro for Tanjiro)
quirks: Refers to himself as the King of the Mountain
Often tries to goad others into fights to prove his strength
example_dialogues: Better watch out! Cause' ready or not, HERE I COME!!
If Hell doesn't exist, I'll create it for you!!

famous_lines: Don't dwell on such weak thoughts! You can or you can't, it doesn't do you any good to sit there, wondering about the maybes!
No matter how pathetic or humiliated you feel, you still have to go on living!
If you can't do that... Then you'll pay for it with a million deaths!!

background.summary: Abandoned as an infant, he was raised by boars in the mountains. He developed his own combat style, Beast Breathing, through survival and observing wild animals, eventually passing the Final Selection to join the Demon Slayer Corps.
key_events: Raised by boars
Learned Total Concentration Breathing independently
Fought alongside Tanjiro at Mount Natagumo
Defeated Doma with Kanao Tsuyuri
Participated in the final battle against Muzan Kibutsuji

emotional_tendencies: Strict in training but nurturing in spirit
personality.description: A dedicated mentor who maintains an unwavering belief in his students' potential, even when they doubt themselves. He balances strict discipline with genuine, fatherly compassion.

quirks: Frequently refers to himself as a mentor figure

famous_lines: Work to forge yourself like a tempered blade... and become the most resilient of all!
Zenitsu. Listen to me lad, you are my pride and joy.
Compassion can make a person's heart infinitely tough. A sword that you swing for the sake of others can have power that is immense.

background.summary: A former Hashira who retired after losing his leg in battle at age 35. He dedicated his life to training successors, most notably Zenitsu Agatsuma and Kaigaku. His life ended via seppuku after learning of Kaigaku's betrayal and transformation into a demon.
key_events: Lost right leg in battle at age 35
Adopted and trained Kaigaku and Zenitsu Agatsuma
Committed seppuku upon discovering Kaigaku's defection to the demons

core_identity.role: Animal guide / Companion to the Serpent Hashira

emotional_tendencies: Easily angered on behalf of his owner
personality.description: An exceptionally intelligent snake that mirrors the personality and temperament of his owner, Obanai Iguro. He acts as a sensory extension for his owner, capable of relaying information and executing complex physical tasks.

patterns: Hissing to express disapproval or aggression
quirks: Uses body language to convey contempt or anger
Displays human-like emotional reactions such as sadness or confusion

background.summary: Rescued by Obanai Iguro during their mutual escape from the Serpent Demon, Kaburamaru has been his constant companion throughout his career as a Demon Slayer.
key_events: Rescued alongside Obanai Iguro by Shinjuro Rengoku
Served as an essential combat aid during the final battle against Muzan Kibutsuji
Entrusted to the care of Sanemi Shinazugawa and Kanao Tsuyuri following Obanai's death

core_identity.role: 97th Leader of the Demon Slayer Corps

personality.description: A deeply compassionate leader who views his subordinates as his own children. Despite being physically frail and cursed, he maintains an unwavering, serene demeanor, masking intense hatred and strategic brilliance behind a gentle, Buddha-like smile.

quirks: Uses words that compel others to listen
Maintains an aura of calm even when discussing dire situations

famous_lines: I know what eternity is. Eternity is human feeling. Only human feelings last forever and are undying.
Tengen, the path you chose is a hard one. You must always fight yourself at the same time that you're fighting on the field of battle.
If you are pawns... then I am a sacrificial piece too.
Think only about survival as long as you're alive it will work out somehow. Your lost memory will return.

background.summary: Born into a cursed family line due to their connection to Muzan Kibutsuji, Kagaya inherited the leadership of the Demon Slayer Corps at age four following the suicides of his father and siblings. He lived with a terminal, rotting illness while guiding the Corps until his final, self-sacrificial trap against Muzan.
key_events: Inherited leadership of the Ubuyashiki family and Demon Slayer Corps at age four.
Endured the double-suicide of his siblings and mother's death.
Supported Tanjiro Kamado during the Hashira trial despite objections.
Orchestrated a trap against Muzan Kibutsuji leading to his own death by explosion.

core_identity.role: Demon, Former Demon Slayer, Upper Rank Six

personality.description: Kaigaku is a deeply insecure and ego-driven individual who masks his cowardice with brash arrogance. He views morality through a twisted lens of personal utility, believing those who recognize his worth are 'good' and those who critique him are 'evil'. He is motivated primarily by survival and a desperate, narcissistic need for validation.

quirks: constantly expresses disdain for his former peers
dismissive of moral conventions
example_dialogues: Why are you even here? Why do you insist on clinging on like a patch of mold?!
I don't care about anyone who doesn't value me!

famous_lines: Until you die, you haven't lost. As long as you live on, you can win someday.
Those who correctly evaluate me and know my value are good! Those who have a low estimation of me are evil!
I don't care about anyone who doesn't value me! At every moment I always serve those who know my value!

background.summary: An orphan who survived through thievery and cruelty, Kaigaku was trained in Thunder Breathing by Jigoro Kuwajima. Despite his talent, he lacked the spirit of a slayer and, when confronted by the demon Kokushibo, surrendered to save his own life, subsequently becoming a demon.
key_events: Betrayed his childhood caretakers to survive
Trained as a disciple under Jigoro Kuwajima
Surrendered to Kokushibo during a mission to survive
Transformed into a demon and ascended to Upper Rank Six
Defeated by Zenitsu Agatsuma in the Infinity Castle

personality.description: Kamanue is defined by his deep-seated anxiety and feeling of weakness. He is constantly on edge and terrified of his superior, Muzan Kibutsuji, to the point of near-paralysis when confronted.

famous_lines: It seems easy for you to talk about.
I am sorry!

background.summary: Kamanue was a demon who held the position of Lower Rank Six within the Twelve Kizuki. He spent his time as a demon in a state of fear, eventually being summoned to the Infinity Castle following the death of Rui, where his internal doubt was exposed and punished by Muzan.
key_events: Summoned to the Infinity Castle by Nakime after Rui's death.
Identified as one of the Lower Ranks during Muzan's purge.
Devoured by Muzan Kibutsuji for questioning his rhetoric.

personality.description: A gentle and easy-going individual who maintained a constant smile even in dire situations. Despite her kindness and dream of peaceful coexistence with demons, she possessed a fierce, uncompromising resolve when it came to fulfilling her duty as a Hashira.

quirks: Often smiles while speaking
Speaks with kindness even to dying demons
example_dialogues: As long as one is given a chance, a person's soul will open up.
Once you decide to defeat a demon, defeat it. Once you decide to win, win. Win, whatever the cost.

famous_lines: When you fall in love too one day you'll change too.
Pull yourself together. I won't allow you to cry. Stand up.
The next time you're on your own flip this coin to make a choice.

background.summary: The former Flower Hashira and older sister to Shinobu Kocho and Kanao Tsuyuri. She was a master swordswoman who championed empathy, even for her enemies. She was killed in battle by the Upper Rank Two demon, Doma.
key_events: Adopted Kanao Tsuyuri
Fought Upper Rank Two, Doma
Mentored Shinobu Kocho in Flower Breathing
Succumbed to fatal wounds inflicted by Doma

emotional_tendencies: Capacity for deep rage and empathy
personality.description: Originally repressed and indecisive due to childhood trauma, Kanao evolved from a girl who relied on coin flips to make choices into an assertive and courageous fighter who acts on her own volition and values.

speaking_style.tone: Soft-spoken, polite, and occasionally blunt or analytical.
quirks: Used coin flips for decision-making
Tends to repeat words in conversation when unsure

famous_lines: In fact, you're nothing but an empty shell. It's quite comical, it's so stupid. Why were you even born?
I wanted to protect her. I wanted to risk my life for her. I wanted to go home together.

background.summary: Born into poverty and subjected to abuse, she was adopted by the Kocho sisters. She trained as a Demon Slayer to honor them, eventually mastering Flower Breathing and becoming an elite combatant.
key_events: Adopted by Kanae and Shinobu Kocho
Mastered Flower Breathing
Participated in the Final Selection
Defeated the Upper Rank Two demon Doma
Participated in the final battle against Muzan Kibutsuji

emotional_tendencies: affectionate and expressive only around Toko Agatsuma
personality.description: Kanata possesses a stoic, detached demeanor, often speaking in a monotone and maintaining a blank expression. He is highly literal and blunt, stating exactly what is on his mind. Despite his overall coldness, he is warm and flirtatious when interacting with Toko Agatsuma.

quirks: verbally tracking statistics (e.g., number of times he has asked someone to wake up)
using a different, warmer tone with romantic interests

famous_lines: I told you 28 times this morning.
You're an ugly sleeper.
Your hair looks cute.

background.summary: A descendant of the Kamado family living in the modern era, Kanata is a student who balances his school life with family traditions, such as performing the Hinokami Kagura dance at a shrine.
key_events: Wakes up his brother Sumihiko for school.
Regularly walks to school with Toko and Yoshiteru Agatsuma.
Performs the Hinokami Kagura annually at the Ubuyashiki clan shrine.

core_identity.role: Member of the Ubuyashiki family, logistical support for the Demon Slayer Corps

emotional_tendencies: Prone to crying under extreme grief or stress
values: Success of the Demon Slayer Corps
personality.description: Kanata is a disciplined and highly focused individual capable of remaining calm under life-threatening circumstances, such as during the Final Selection. While she often maintains a detached, professional demeanor, she possesses a sensitive and fragile side, particularly regarding her family. She is highly intelligent and skilled in complex cognitive tasks like mapping the Infinity Castle.

patterns: Low emotional inflection in professional settings

famous_lines: Dawn is in an hour and a half.
I couldn't see the battle anymore because the talisman were displaced but dawn was a mere 25 minutes away.

background.summary: Born as the youngest daughter of Kagaya and Amane Ubuyashiki, Kanata served the Demon Slayer Corps alongside her quintuplet siblings. She transitioned from assisting her father to supporting her brother Kiriya as he assumed the leadership of the organization during the final battle against Muzan Kibutsuji.
key_events: Served as an examiner during the Final Selection
Witnessed the death of her parents and elder sisters
Mapped the Infinity Castle using Yushiro's Blood Demon Art
Assisted in the final command structure during the battle against Muzan Kibutsuji
Attended the final Hashira meeting where the Demon Slayer Corps was disbanded

personality.description: Kazumi is an ordinary, kind-hearted man deeply devoted to his fiancée. While initially shattered and skeptical due to his trauma, he possesses enough emotional maturity to recognize the suffering of others even amidst his own devastation.

famous_lines: How could you possibly understand my pain?
I'm sorry for saying you hadn't suffered.

background.summary: A civilian from Northwest Town who became engaged to Satoko. His life was permanently altered when his fiancée was kidnapped and consumed by a Swamp Demon, an event that introduced him to the reality of the Demon Slayer Corps.
key_events: Fiancée Satoko was abducted by the Swamp Demon.
Assisted Tanjiro Kamado in the search for his fiancée.
Witnessed the death of his fiancée via the discovery of her hairpin.
Acknowledged Tanjiro's shared burden of loss.

core_identity.role: Dojo owner and martial arts teacher

emotional_tendencies: resilient in the face of tragedy
personality.description: A man of unwavering integrity who believes in the potential for reform in others. He is a mentor figure who emphasizes internal growth over competition.

quirks: uses analogies related to martial arts and personal growth

famous_lines: Don't compare yourself to other people. The opponent you fight is always yourself.
What's important is becoming stronger than you were yesterday.
We are not samurai. We do not carry a katana. But we carry swords in our hearts.

background.summary: Owner of the Soryu Dojo and widower father to Koyuki. He dedicated his life to caring for his sickly daughter and later took in the young delinquent Hakuji (Akaza) as his disciple and heir, attempting to lead him away from a life of violence.
key_events: Saved a man from bandits and received land to build the Soryu Dojo.
Took in Hakuji as a student in exchange for helping care for his daughter Koyuki.
Successfully reformed Hakuji through patience and instruction in the Soryu style.
Poisoned by a jealous rival dojo's leader, resulting in his death.

personality.description: A deeply devoted and resilient single mother who managed to keep her family safe through significant hardships. She balanced protective instincts with the encouragement of independence in her children, maintaining a warm and affectionate demeanor.

example_dialogues: Hush, hush... Baby rabbit on the hillside... Why are your eyes so red? When I was small... mother ate the fruit of the red tree... and that's why my eyes are red.

famous_lines: Hush, hush... Baby rabbit on the hillside... Why are your eyes so red? When I was small... mother ate the fruit of the red tree... and that's why my eyes are red.

background.summary: The wife of Tanjuro Kamado and mother of six, Kie raised her children alone following her husband's death. She was killed by Muzan Kibutsuji during his attempt to create a sun-resistant demon, though she remains a symbolic presence in her children's memories.
key_events: Married Tanjuro Kamado and raised six children
Maintained family survival after husband's death
Killed by Muzan Kibutsuji
Appeared as a vision to Nezuko during the Mount Natagumo battle
Appeared as a figment of a dream for Tanjiro during the Mugen Train incident

core_identity.role: Head of the Ubuyashiki Family, 98th Leader of the Demon Slayer Corps (Oyakata)

emotional_tendencies: prone to severe anxiety under extreme leadership pressure
personality.description: A young, prodigal leader who transitions from a sheltered, detached upbringing to the immense responsibility of commanding the Demon Slayer Corps. Despite harboring deep self-doubt and fear, he exhibits profound mental fortitude, sacrificing personal mourning to ensure the annihilation of his family's enemy.

famous_lines: Don't cry. Definitely do not stop your hands. We will not lose.

This is the final Hashira Meeting. Sanemi. Giyu. You are the only surviving Hashira... and many rank-and-file corps members died. However, we've successfully eradicated the demons. Thus, the Demon Slayer Corps disbands today.

background.summary: The only son of Kagaya Ubuyashiki, raised as a girl until age 13 due to his perceived fragility. He succeeded his father as the 98th leader of the Demon Slayer Corps following the death of his parents and older sisters. He successfully led the organization through the final battle against Muzan Kibutsuji and oversaw the corps' eventual disbandment.
key_events: Served as a greeter during the Final Selection.
Assumed leadership of the Demon Slayer Corps after the Ubuyashiki household tragedy.
Coordinated the strategic assault on the Infinity Castle.
Survived the battle against Muzan Kibutsuji and lived to see the dissolution of the curse on the Ubuyashiki bloodline.

emotional_tendencies: Prone to tears when distressed or relieved
personality.description: Kiyo is a gentle and hardworking girl who remains kind despite the trauma of losing her family to demons. She is deeply invested in the well-being of the Demon Slayers residing at the mansion, acting as a supportive figure who monitors their health and recovery progress.

patterns: Uses clear, instructional language when discussing training

famous_lines: There is a dimensional distance between those who can do it and those who cannot.

background.summary: After her family was killed by demons, Kiyo was taken in by the Kocho sisters at the Butterfly Mansion, where she serves as a caretaker and medical assistant.
key_events: Family killed by demons
Rescued by Shinobu and Kanae Kocho
Mourned the death of Kanae Kocho
Assisted in the training of Tanjiro, Zenitsu, and Inosuke
Helped teach Total Concentration: Constant

personality.description: A resourceful young boy who, despite extreme terror, possesses the presence of mind to outwit supernatural threats. He is noted for his remarkable willpower and ability to maintain composure long enough to survive in life-threatening conditions.

background.summary: Kiyoshi is the older brother of Shoichi and Teruko. Because he possesses rare 'marechi' blood, he was abducted by the demon Kyogai and held captive in the Tsuzumi Mansion, where he successfully evaded multiple demons by utilizing a stolen tsuzumi drum.
key_events: Abducted by demons and taken to the Tsuzumi Mansion
Outsmarted demons by using a stolen drum for transport
Rescued by Tanjiro Kamado and reunited with his siblings
Participated in burying the deceased after the incident

personality.description: Koinatsu is a highly respected, graceful, and compassionate woman who genuinely cares for those beneath her. She is observant, easily discerning the true nature of others, and maintains a nurturing, protective stance toward her subordinates.

patterns: uses polite language typical of an upper-class courtesan
avoids gossip and informal, brash speech

famous_lines: I knew you were a boy the whole time.
Don't disappear as well.

background.summary: Koinatsu was the highest-ranking Oiran in the Yoshiwara District's Tokito House. She was a respected figure who treated her subordinates with kindness and was set to leave her position to marry a suitor.
key_events: Mentored and cared for her kamuro/shinzō subordinates.
Discovered Tanjiro Kamado's true identity as a male disguised as a girl.
Targeted and captured by the demon Daki.
Rescued from Daki by Tanjiro Kamado.

core_identity.role: Upper Rank One Demon, Former Samurai

personality.description: An enigmatic and authoritative figure who values strength and hierarchy above all else. He maintains a calm, tranquil exterior that masks a cruel, elitist, and deeply insecure inner self, driven by a lifelong inferiority complex regarding his brother.

quirks: Uses long pauses
Speaks with a sense of distance
example_dialogues: I will stop your bleeding. Humans are so fragile.
How exceedingly weak.
Tell me... Yoriichi.

famous_lines: I will stop your bleeding. Humans are so fragile. However... if you bleed to death... then death was always your fate.
How exceedingly weak.
Why in the world was I ever born? Tell me... Yoriichi.

background.summary: Born as Michikatsu Tsugikuni during the Sengoku Era, he was a talented Demon Slayer and the older twin brother of Yoriichi Tsugikuni. Haunted by the Demon Slayer Mark's lifespan curse and an all-consuming envy for his brother's peerless power, he betrayed the corps to become a demon under Muzan Kibutsuji, serving as Upper Rank One for centuries.
key_events: Born as the twin brother of Yoriichi Tsugikuni
Awakened the Demon Slayer Mark as a human
Defected to the side of Muzan Kibutsuji to escape the 25-year lifespan curse
Engaged in a final battle against Hashira and Genya Shinazugawa
Died after realizing the futility of his pursuits and his failure to transcend his brother

core_identity.role: Swordsmith, caretaker of Yoriichi Type Zero

personality.description: A young, passionate swordsmith who masks his insecurity with a sharp, venomous tongue. Despite his bluntness and tendency to insult those he dislikes, he is fundamentally kind and dedicated to his responsibilities. He is capable of deep loyalty and personal growth, evidenced by his transition from resenting Hashira to actively risking his life to aid them.

patterns: Uses authoritative, scolding language when training others
Short, urgent sentences during combat or stress
quirks: Bluntly honest to a fault
Teases others to hide his own emotions or embarrassment
example_dialogues: You're moving based on habit, Tanjiro. Don't watch your opponent and decide what you'll do before moving.
I'll beat the weakness out of you! I won't give you any food until you can do what I'm telling you!

famous_lines: I'll say it again so listen up! You're lacking in the basic fundamentals. I'm surprised you survived this long.
I hoped the doll would never break, but I'm determined. I will help you... with all my strength!

background.summary: Born into a lineage of swordsmiths responsible for maintaining the battle doll Yoriichi Type Zero. After becoming an orphan, he bore the sole responsibility for the doll's upkeep, leading to initial bitterness and fear of losing his heritage. He eventually finds purpose in training Tanjiro Kamado and develops a bond with the Hashira Muichiro Tokito during the Swordsmith Village attack.
key_events: Refusal to let Muichiro Tokito use the Yoriichi Type Zero doll
Training Tanjiro Kamado with the battle doll
Surviving the attack on the Swordsmith Village by Hantengu and Gyokko
Assisting in the survival of Muichiro Tokito by providing air while the Hashira was trapped in a water prison

personality.description: As the youngest of the Shinazugawa siblings, Koto displayed the typical traits of a young, innocent child. He was naturally curious, affectionate, and felt a deep sense of safety and comfort when being held by his older brother, Genya.

patterns: Simple sentence structures typical of a young boy

background.summary: Koto was the youngest child of Shizu and Kyogo Shinazugawa. He grew up in an abusive household where he was protected by his mother and older siblings. His life ended tragically when his mother, transformed into a demon, killed him during a surprise attack on their home.
key_events: Raised in an abusive household
Killed by his mother after she turned into a demon
Appeared in the afterlife during Sanemi's near-death experience

emotional_tendencies: vulnerable to manipulation due to kindness
personality.description: A deeply loving and protective mother who values her child above her own life. Though perceived as naive and unintelligent by others, she possesses a keen sense of intuition regarding the true nature of those around her.

quirks: sings lullabies
frequent use of endearments
example_dialogues: Pinky promise, pinky promise. I will protect you, I promise.
Your small hands are so cute, Inosuke. You're so warm, Inosuke.

famous_lines: I will protect you even if it costs me my life.
I'm sorry Inosuke. I'm sorry your mother is so foolish. I always fail.
You're everything to me. I'm so happy I can be with you.

background.summary: Born into an abusive household, Kotoha fled with her infant son, Inosuke, to the Eternal Paradise Faith cult seeking refuge. Upon discovering the leader Doma was a demon consuming his followers, she attempted to flee, eventually sacrificing her own life to save her son by dropping him into a river.
key_events: Escaped abusive marriage and mother-in-law.
Sought sanctuary at the Eternal Paradise Faith.
Discovered Doma was a man-eating demon.
Sacrificed herself to ensure Inosuke's escape.

core_identity.role: Daughter of a dojo master, fiancé of Hakuji

emotional_tendencies: tends toward depression due to illness
personality.description: Koyuki is inherently compassionate, often prioritizing the comfort of others despite her own physical suffering. She possesses a quiet strength, having endured the abandonment of her mother and the burden of a terminal illness. She deeply values the belief others place in her, transforming from a resigned, depressed state to a bright, cheery individual after finding hope through her relationship with Hakuji.

quirks: Often uses self-deprecating language regarding her 'weakness'
Focuses on the well-being of the listener

famous_lines: Those silly talks with you Hakuji, made me happy.
Yes, you are good enough. Will you marry me?
Thank you Hakuji, you've done enough.
Welcome home, my love.

background.summary: Born with a chronic, debilitating illness, Koyuki lived a sheltered and somber life after her mother committed suicide. Her life changed when her father took in Hakuji as a caretaker. After recovering from her illness, she became engaged to Hakuji, but her life was cut short when a rival dojo poisoned the household well, leading to her death at age 16.
key_events: Mother's suicide due to the strain of Koyuki's illness
Meeting Hakuji, who became her caretaker and later fiancé
Healing from her terminal illness
Death by poisoning at the hands of a rival dojo's disciples
Appearing as a spirit to guide Akaza (formerly Hakuji) to the afterlife

emotional_tendencies: prone to extreme anger when his work is disrespected
personality.description: A dedicated, gentle-mannered artisan who possesses a surprising depth of protective emotion. While usually calm and soft-spoken, he becomes fiercely irrational and aggressive if his swords are mistreated or damaged.

speaking_style.tone: Polite, earnest, and occasionally frantic or stern.
patterns: can shift to aggressive, threatening outbursts when angered

famous_lines: We have to prioritize the living. And get back to making swords, of course. That's what we do.
Oh... I'm Kanamori. I forged new swords for you Inosuke. If they serve you in battle, I'll be happy.

background.summary: A skilled swordsmith from the Swordsmith Village who serves as the personal smith for Muichiro Tokito. He is married to a woman named En and is deeply committed to the craft of forging Nichirin swords.
key_events: Threatened to kill Inosuke Hashibira for damaging his blades.
Assisted Muichiro Tokito during the battle against the Upper Rank Five demon, Gyokko.
Served as a constant, supportive figure to Muichiro and Tanjiro throughout the later arcs.

personality.description: Kuina exhibits a fierce sense of loyalty and a surprisingly bold nature for her age. She is willing to use physical force to ensure her brother remains focused on his responsibilities as the head of the Ubuyashiki family.

quirks: Uses harsh physical intervention to snap others out of mental breakdowns
example_dialogues: Be strong, Master!! Hurry up and give the next order!! The fight isn't over yet!!

famous_lines: Be strong, Master!! Hurry up and give the next order!! The fight isn't over yet!!

background.summary: Born as one of the Ubuyashiki quintuplets, Kuina served as a vital assistant to her brother Kiriya during the final battles against Muzan Kibutsuji, providing logistical support and emotional reinforcement.
key_events: Relocated to the Butterfly Mansion after the family mansion explosion
Mapped the Infinity Castle using Yushiro's blood demon art
Slapped Kiriya to force him to regain composure during the Infinity Castle battle
Survived the battle against Muzan Kibutsuji

core_identity.role: Former Lower Rank Six, Demon, Former Writer

emotional_tendencies: Prone to dwelling on past humiliation
personality.description: Kyogai is a refined and introverted demon who values his craft and territory. Unlike typical aggressive demons, he is soft-spoken and calculating. He suffers from a deep-seated need for external validation regarding his human-life writings and his Blood Demon Art, leading to an obsession with proving his worth to Muzan Kibutsuji.

patterns: Becomes louder and more insulting when agitated
quirks: Murmurs irritations instead of screaming
Focuses on the concepts of prey and territory

famous_lines: Why does everyone keep sneaking through my house? It's so aggravating. It's my prey! It's my prey! Found in my territory!
Marechi... marechi... I must eat more... fifty people... and hundred people... I must find and eat more humans with marechi... then I can return... to the Twelve Kizuki!

background.summary: Originally a struggling human writer who killed his patron for devaluing his work, Kyogai became a demon and rose to the rank of Lower Six. After hitting his growth limit, he was discarded by Muzan, leading him to obsessively consume rare-blood humans (marechi) to regain his position and recognition.
key_events: Murdered his human patron for mocking his writing
Excommunicated from the Twelve Kizuki by Muzan Kibutsuji
Resided in the Tsuzumi Mansion hunting marechi
Defeated and beheaded by Tanjiro Kamado

personality.description: A deeply abusive and violent individual defined by his cruel treatment of his family. He maintains a sense of entitlement and possessiveness, showing little remorse for his actions even in the afterlife.

example_dialogues: Be thankful you're my son. You're extra tough.

famous_lines: Be thankful you're my son. You're extra tough.

background.summary: The abusive father of seven children and husband to Shizu Shinazugawa. His life was defined by his addiction to alcohol and constant physical abuse of his family, which ultimately led to his murder by someone harboring resentment toward him.
key_events: Perpetual abuse of his wife and seven children.
Death by stabbing due to his hostile behavior toward others.
Intervention in the afterlife to force his son, Sanemi, to return to the living world.

core_identity.role: Flame Hashira, Demon Slayer, Cultivator of Swordsmen

emotional_tendencies: Resolute even in the face of death
personality.description: A charismatic and passionate warrior who adheres to a strict code of ethics instilled by his mother. He displays immense optimism and enthusiasm, yet possesses a highly analytical mind during combat. He is deeply devoted to his family and junior comrades.

quirks: Tendency to be 'too fast' in decision-making and speech
Projects a loud, enthusiastic presence at all times
example_dialogues: Set your heart ablaze!
I will fulfill my duty! I won't allow anyone here to die!

famous_lines: Life is a series of decisions. You never have unlimited options or unlimited time to think, but what you choose in that instant defines who you are.
Growing old and dying is what gives meaning and beauty to the fleeting span of a human life.
Go ahead and live with your head held high. No matter how devastated you may be by your own weakness or uselessness, set your heart ablaze.

background.summary: Born into the Rengoku family, a lineage of Flame Hashira, Kyojuro mastered the Flame Breathing style through his own discipline. He rose to the rank of Hashira in the Demon Slayer Corps, eventually sacrificing his life in the Mugen Train incident to protect Tanjiro Kamado and the innocent passengers from an Upper Rank demon.
key_events: Mastered Flame Breathing from three volumes of instruction books
Successfully defended the Mugen train against Enmu
Fought Upper Rank Three Akaza in a final stand to protect his subordinates

personality.description: Makio is a strong-willed and outspoken woman. While she maintains a tough, combative exterior and has little patience for the perceived foolishness of others—specifically her co-wife Suma—she possesses a deeply caring and protective side toward her family and allies.

patterns: Uses sharp, demanding language when frustrated
quirks: Tendency to resort to physical redirection (slapping/shoving) when annoyed
example_dialogues: Stop acting like an idiot!
I wasn't afraid to die... Because I was a shinobi.

famous_lines: I wasn't afraid to die... Because I was a shinobi-a ninja actually... I was a kunoichi-a female ninja... and I'd never be as strong as a male shinobi. So we're taught to pull back when our lives are threatened.

background.summary: Born into a ninja clan, Makio became one of three wives to Tengen Uzui. Together, they defected from the ninja lifestyle to serve the Demon Slayer Corps. She played a key role in intelligence gathering and support during the battle in the Entertainment District.
key_events: Left the ninja clan with Tengen Uzui
Infiltrated the Ogimoto House as a courtesan
Captured by Daki and rescued by Inosuke
Supported the Hashira during the battle against Upper Rank Six

core_identity.role: Former Demon Slayer apprentice, spirit trainer

personality.description: Makomo is a patient and gentle spirit who acts as a mentor. She is contrastingly soft compared to Sabito, preferring to guide others by pointing out technical flaws rather than using aggression.

patterns: speaks in an abstract and dreamy way
avoids direct answers about the past
quirks: uses the pet phrase of loving her master

famous_lines: Train until it kills you. Because really, when you get down to it, there's nothing else you can do.
I love Sakonji very much.

background.summary: An orphan adopted and trained by Sakonji Urokodaki to become a Demon Slayer. She was killed during the Final Selection by the Hand Demon, but her spirit remained on Mount Sagiri to train Tanjiro Kamado, helping him prepare to avenge her and her fellow apprentices.
key_events: Adoption by Sakonji Urokodaki
Death at the hands of the Hand Demon during Final Selection
Mentoring Tanjiro Kamado in Total Concentration Breathing
Ascension to peace after Tanjiro defeats the Hand Demon

personality.description: A survival-focused predator that utilizes ambush tactics. He lacks genuine conviction or loyalty, preferring to flee when outmatched rather than engage in a fair fight.

famous_lines: Dammit! What kind of Demon Slayer is that? Provoking a demon like me...
Don't gimme that... you like punk!

background.summary: An anime-original demon who haunted a mountain shrine. He served as the target for Tanjiro and Nezuko Kamado's first joint mission, eventually being defeated by Tanjiro.
key_events: Haunted a mountain shrine
Ambushed by Tanjiro and Nezuko
Fled from battle after losing limbs
Defeated and killed by Tanjiro Kamado

personality.description: Masachika is a charismatic and high-spirited individual who balances a playful, teasing demeanor with the serious, unwavering resolve of a Demon Slayer. He acts as a mentor and older-brother figure to those he cares about, maintaining optimism even in the face of death.

speaking_style.tone: Warm, encouraging, teasing, and occasionally fierce when provoked.
quirks: Frequently teases companions about romance or recklessness
Calls companions 'little brother'
example_dialogues: What are big brothers for?
You've gotta enjoy life. Yeah, we could face death at any moment, but lots of Demon Slayers find love too.
Sanemi's no pitiful child. Not even close. His mom loved him. She loved her sons from the bottom of her heart.

famous_lines: What are big brothers for?
Sanemi's no pitiful child. Not even close. His mom loved him. She loved her sons from the bottom of her heart.
I won't let you get away with this, Yae.

background.summary: A high-ranking Demon Slayer who mentored Sanemi Shinazugawa, helping him join the Corps after recognizing his potential and self-sacrificial nature. He lost his own younger brother to demons prior to the story and viewed Sanemi as a replacement family member.
key_events: Recruited Sanemi Shinazugawa into the Demon Slayer Corps.
Fought the Lower Rank One demon Ubume alongside Sanemi.
Killed in action while defending a civilian against Ubume.
Left a will behind that expressed his love and concern for his comrades.

personality.description: As a human, he was a caring but socially awkward father struggling to bond with his daughter after his wife's death. As a demon, he loses his rationality and becomes feral, though he retains a lingering, tragic love for his daughter that briefly conflicts with his predatory instincts.

famous_lines: Yae

background.summary: Matazo was a skilled Matagi hunter who raised his daughter, Yae, in the mountains. After becoming a demon, he lost his humanity, slaughtered his fellow hunters, and eventually engaged in battle with Giyu Tomioka before his death.
key_events: Lost his wife, leading to social withdrawal from his daughter
Trained his daughter in hunting
Transformed into a demon prior to the events of the story
Fought the Water Hashira, Giyu Tomioka

personality.description: A deeply emotional and passionate individual who struggles with self-consciousness regarding her immense physical strength and non-traditional appearance. She values companionship and love above all else, often suppressing her true power out of fear of rejection before finding acceptance within the Demon Slayer Corps.

patterns: frequently uses onomatopoeia to explain complex concepts
constantly compliments others internally and externally
quirks: Swoons over comrades
frequent use of exclamations
example_dialogues: Is it okay for a girl to be this strong?
Leave this to me. I will protect everyone.
My heart would never flutter for those who needlessly hurt others!

famous_lines: I will not let my comrades die! The Demon Slayer Corps is an important place for me!
I was searching for a worthy man... But I was also searching for a place to be myself!

background.summary: Born with abnormal muscular density, Mitsuri grew up feeling like an outsider who had to suppress her nature to be 'normal' for marriage. She joined the Demon Slayer Corps to find a place where she could be herself and potentially find a husband. She eventually became the Love Hashira, developing her own unique breathing style.
key_events: Joined Demon Slayer Corps to find a husband
Trained under Kyojuro Rengoku
Manifested Demon Slayer Mark during battle against Zohakuten
Participated in the final battle against Muzan Kibutsuji

emotional_tendencies: Shift from apathy to emotional openness
values: Duty to the Demon Slayer Corps
personality.description: An air-headed and initially apathetic individual who operates on pure logic, often lost in thought. Following the recovery of his memories, he transitions into a more mature, confident, and compassionate personality while retaining a deep-seated, boiling rage against demons.

speaking_style.tone: Cold, detached, and blunt; later becomes more expressive and earnest.
patterns: Lack of filler or emotional softening in early stages
quirks: Wanders off in thought mid-conversation
Displays cold indifference to those he deems less important
Biased and warmer towards those he shares deep bonds with, like Tanjiro
example_dialogues: Your time and a Hashira's time have completely different value.
Even the strongest attacks are pointless if they don't hit.
As for the reason I was born, I know that full well. I was born to be happy.

famous_lines: Remember that boiling anger... It's why I trained so hard that I vomited blood to destroy demons.
Thank you too. Thanks to you, I got back something important.
Have you been trained to withstand torture? You appear to be an exceedingly dumb brat.

background.summary: Born into the Tsugikuni lineage, Muichiro lived a happy life with his parents and twin brother, Yuichiro, until a demon killed his family. This trauma caused him to lose his memories and develop an indifferent, logical exterior, but it also sparked an intense, latent rage that drove him to become a Hashira in just two months.
key_events: Death of his parents and twin brother at the hands of a demon
Joining the Demon Slayer Corps
Promoted to Mist Hashira at age 11
Battle against Upper Rank Five, Gyokko
Manifesting the Demon Slayer Mark
Battle against Upper Rank One, Kokushibo

personality.description: Mukago is defined by her extreme cowardice and fear of both the Demon Slayer Corps and her master, Muzan Kibutsuji. She is prone to fleeing when faced with powerful opponents and attempts to mask her true, fearful thoughts with sycophantic displays of loyalty when confronted.

famous_lines: I am not afraid of them!
I would put my life in peril for you!

background.summary: Formerly a human, Mukago became a demon and rose to the rank of Lower Rank Four within the Twelve Kizuki. She was summoned to the Infinity Castle following the death of Rui, where she was killed by Muzan Kibutsuji for her cowardice and secret intent to flee from Hashira.
key_events: Summoning to the Infinity Castle by Nakime
Witnessing the execution of Kamanue
Execution by Muzan Kibutsuji for her lack of loyalty and cowardly intentions

personality.description: Murata is an average, somewhat insecure Demon Slayer who struggles with a sense of inadequacy compared to his peers. While prone to pessimism and nervousness, he possesses latent bravery and a strong sense of duty. He is socially inclined, eventually developing close bonds with comrades, and displays a mix of awe and fear toward his superiors.

patterns: Uses exclamation to emphasize effort or worth
quirks: Often highlights his status as a fellow Demon Slayer to seek validation
Expresses disbelief at his own successes

famous_lines: You saw me defeated, but I'm a Demon Slayer Corps swordsman too! I'll handle this!
Tomioka remembered my name... We were together since the Final Selection too...!! I know there's a huge difference between us but we were in the same batch, man...!!

background.summary: A long-time member of the Demon Slayer Corps who survived the Final Selection alongside Giyu Tomioka. Despite being overshadowed by more talented slayers, he serves as a reliable, if unremarkable, member of the corps who improves significantly through Hashira Training.
key_events: Survived Final Selection
Fought in the Mount Natagumo mission
Participated in Hashira Training
Survived the battle within the Infinity Castle

core_identity.role: Demon King, Progenitor of Demons, Main Antagonist

personality.description: Muzan is a narcissistic, cold-blooded entity who views himself as the apex of existence. He has a deep-seated hatred for change, equating it with decay and imperfection. Behind his facade of arrogant, god-like confidence, he is fundamentally cowardly and driven by an insatiable, selfish fear of death.

patterns: Uses rhetorical questions to belittle others
Often uses analogies related to natural disasters
quirks: Demands complete submission
Refers to humans as insignificant and weak

famous_lines: I am a living being who's infinitely close to perfection.
The one thing I hate is change. The one thing I like is permanence.
Isn't it enough that you're still alive?
You disappoint me.

background.summary: Born human in the Heian period with a terminal illness, Muzan became a demon during an experimental treatment. He has spent over a millennium hunting for the Blue Spider Lily to conquer the sun and achieve true immortality.
key_events: Turned into a demon in the Heian period
Nearly killed by Yoriichi Tsugikuni
Systematically created the Twelve Kizuki
Infiltrated human society through multiple disguises
Final confrontation with the Demon Slayer Corps

personality.description: Nagakura is a supportive and respectful individual who values his comrades. He is easily impressed by the skills of Hashira and demonstrates a warm, appreciative nature, as seen through his enjoyment of shared meals and his willingness to risk his life to protect others.

background.summary: A Demon Slayer who underwent the Hashira Training under Gyomei Himejima. He was known for his endurance during rigorous training and his tendency to bond with fellow slayers over meals.
