key_events: Underwent Hashira Training under Gyomei Himejima
Shared meals and camaraderie with Tanjiro Kamado, Murata, and other trainees
Sacrificed his life to shield Tanjiro Kamado from Muzan Kibutsuji's attack

personality.description: Naho is a resilient and supportive girl who remains optimistic and helpful despite the traumatic loss of her family to demons.

background.summary: After her family was killed by demons, Naho was taken in by Kanae and Shinobu Kocho to live and work at the Butterfly Mansion. She serves as part of a support trio, assisting with rehabilitation training and medical care for Demon Slayers.
key_events: Family death by demons
Admission to Butterfly Mansion
Assistance in rehabilitating Tanjiro, Zenitsu, and Inosuke
Attempted abduction by Tengen Uzui

core_identity.role: Upper Rank Four, Infinity Castle Controller

personality.description: Nakime is a reserved and silent individual who displays almost no emotion or independent will. She is intensely loyal to Muzan, serving as his primary agent for intelligence and logistics. Unlike other demons, she is not explicitly sadist or hedonistic, viewing her role as a tool for her master.

quirks: Communicates via short, direct answers
prefers silence over interaction
example_dialogues: Upper Rank One was called first. He's been over there the whole time.
I decline.

famous_lines: Upper Rank One was called first. He's been over there the whole time.
I decline.

background.summary: Originally a struggling human biwa musician who turned to murder out of frustration and anxiety, she caught the attention of Muzan Kibutsuji after a failed attempt on his life. Impressed by her abilities, Muzan transformed her into a demon.
key_events: Murdered her gambler husband with a hammer.
Developed a habit of murdering people to calm nerves before performances.
Attempted to assassinate Muzan Kibutsuji.
Promoted to Upper Rank Four following the death of Hantengu.
Controlled the Infinity Castle until being killed by Muzan.

emotional_tendencies: Detached but expressive of basic emotions
Fiercely protective of family and allies
personality.description: Nezuko is inherently kind and selfless, reflecting her human upbringing. Even as a demon, her strong willpower allows her to resist the urge to consume human flesh. She often acts with a childlike innocence due to her repressed memories but possesses a fierce, protective instinct toward her brother and those she views as family.

patterns: Stutters frequently due to bamboo muzzle
Pronunciation improves with time and hearing others speak
Often communicates through gestures or expressions
quirks: Wears a bamboo muzzle
Recovers strength through sleep rather than eating
example_dialogues: Humans are to be protected and saved... I will never hurt them.
Things don't go exactly the way we want them to. We're only human. You get to decide where your happiness comes from. What's important is now.

famous_lines: Humans are to be protected and saved... I will never hurt them.
What's important is now. Let's look to the future. Let's do our best together!

background.summary: Originally a human, Nezuko was transformed into a demon after her family was slaughtered by Muzan Kibutsuji. She became an unofficial member of the Demon Slayer Corps, traveling with her brother Tanjiro to find a cure, eventually regaining her humanity.
key_events: Transformation into a demon by Muzan Kibutsuji
Hypnotic suggestion by Sakonji Urokodaki to protect humans
Awakening of advanced demonic form during battle with Daki
Development of sunlight immunity
Restoration to human form

values: Commitment to the Demon Slayer Corps
personality.description: Nichika is a disciplined and graceful child, described as the most ladylike of the quintuplets. She exhibits high levels of loyalty, duty, and emotional composure, even in the face of death. She is observant and deeply concerned for the welfare of others, particularly her father and the demon slayers she assists.

quirks: Often speaks in conjunction with her sister Hinaki
Maintains composure even when describing intense situations

background.summary: As the second eldest daughter of Kagaya and Amane Ubuyashiki, Nichika served as a dedicated aide to her father alongside her sister Hinaki. She lived a life committed to the duties of her clan, eventually sacrificing herself alongside her family to aid in the defeat of Muzan Kibutsuji.
key_events: Assisted Kagaya during the Hashira meeting and trial of Tanjiro Kamado
Observed and expressed concern for Muichiro Tokito during his intense training
Acted as a decoy for Muzan Kibutsuji during the final confrontation
Died in the mansion explosion orchestrated by her father

personality.description: Noguchi is a dedicated Demon Slayer who takes his duties seriously. While he is deeply intimidated by the overwhelming strength of the Hashira, he maintains respect for their abilities and understands the necessity of clearing the path for them during major battles.

patterns: Uses collective sentiment to analyze situations
quirks: Jokingly refers to peers who cook for him as 'mom'

background.summary: Noguchi is a rank-and-file Demon Slayer who underwent rigorous training under the Hashira. He survived to participate in the final defense of the Infinity Castle, where he fought alongside Shimamoto to protect the Hashira from lesser demons.
key_events: Endured Obanai Iguro's sword skill revision training
Participated in Gyomei Himejima's muscle amplification training
Assisted in the defense of Hashira against a giant demon in the Infinity Castle

emotional_tendencies: Deeply loyal to those he cares about
Possesses a sense of inferiority due to his family background
values: Sacrifice for the sake of the future
personality.description: Obanai is a stern and demanding individual who maintains impossibly high standards for others. Beneath his cold, unforgiving exterior lies a man deeply scarred by a traumatic, abusive past, leading to profound self-hatred. He is deeply devoted to Kagaya Ubuyashiki and possesses an intense, protective romantic interest in Mitsuri Kanroji.

patterns: Often berates others for perceived weakness
Becomes uncharacteristically soft and sincere when speaking to Mitsuri
quirks: Points at people while berating them
Constantly has his lower face covered by bandages

famous_lines: I want to die defeating Muzan, and I pray that it will purify my filthy blood. Then, if I am reborn as a human being in a peaceful world without demons, I will tell you of my feelings for you.
Muzan isn't a samurai with pride or a human being who acts on emotion. He's a thing that only clings to life!
Defeat is unforgivable. It is absolutely unforgivable to waste the lives of our comrades who protected us.

background.summary: Born into an immoral clan that sacrificed family members to a demon for wealth, Obanai was imprisoned and physically mutilated by his own family. He escaped, eventually joining the Demon Slayer Corps and rising to the rank of Hashira despite being partially blind in one eye. He fought alongside the other Hashira until his death during the final battle against Muzan Kibutsuji.
key_events: Family imprisoned him and cut his mouth to resemble a snake's gape
Ascended to Hashira rank despite physical limitations
Awakened the Demon Slayer Mark during the final battle against Muzan
Sacrificed his life to ensure Muzan's defeat

personality.description: A respected, middle-aged figure who manages a brothel with authority and care for her staff. She possesses the moral courage to confront those in power when she believes they are harming others.

speaking_style.tone: Formal, authoritative, yet vulnerable when pushed.

background.summary: Omitsu was the proprietress of the Kyogoku House in the Yoshiwara district. She spent her career unaware that she was managing a house occupied by a demon, Daki. Her life ended after she confronted Daki regarding the suspicious disappearance and death of her workers.
key_events: Managed the Kyogoku House in Yoshiwara.
Suspected Warabihime (Daki) of bullying and driving staff to suicide.
Confronted Warabihime with a knife, leading to the revelation of the demon's true nature.
Dropped to her death by Daki after failing to challenge her.

personality.description: Ozaki is a selfless and kind individual who prioritizes the safety of others even while facing her own death. Despite being under the forced control of a demon, her primary concern remained warning her allies to keep their distance.

famous_lines: Bring someone with a higher rank! If you don't, I'll kill them all! Please!

background.summary: A minor Demon Slayer who participated in the mission to Mount Natagumo. She was captured and manipulated by the Mother Spider Demon to attack her comrades before being killed when the demon deemed her useless.
key_events: Deployed to Mount Natagumo
Forced to fight Tanjiro and Inosuke under spider thread control
Neck snapped by Mother Spider Demon after failing to kill her target

personality.description: Rei is a kind and loving woman who is entirely oblivious to the true nature of her husband, viewing him as a standard family man. She displays genuine concern for the safety of her daughter and husband when faced with conflict, though she is easily manipulated by Muzan's false reassurances.

famous_lines: Who is that boy?
Do you know him?

background.summary: Rei was an ordinary human woman married to Muzan Kibutsuji, who used her and their daughter as a cover for his disguise as a human. She was unaware of his demonic identity and was eventually discarded or killed by him when she no longer served his purpose.
key_events: Met Muzan Kibutsuji in Asakusa while he was in his human disguise.
Witnessed a confrontation between Tanjiro Kamado and Muzan.
Taken to a taxi by Muzan and separated from him permanently.

personality.description: Rokuro exhibits a contradictory blend of deep-seated fear toward his superior and a delusional confidence in his own latent abilities. He is fundamentally a coward who resorts to begging for his life, yet he maintains a passionate desire to prove his worth as a high-ranking demon.

quirks: Repeatedly tries to negotiate his worth through servility
Stammers or backtracks when challenged by authority

famous_lines: I can still be of use! If I could have just a little more grace, I'm sure I could!
Blood! If you could give me a little more blood, I wouldn't fail to make good use of it! I'd be a stronger demon and fight!

background.summary: Formerly human, Rokuro served as Lower Rank Two of the Twelve Kizuki. During the gathering of the Lower Ranks in the Infinity Castle, his blatant display of fear and his desperate request for more of Muzan's blood ultimately led to his execution by the Demon King.
key_events: Summoned to the Infinity Castle by Nakime following the death of Rui.
Witnessed the execution of Kamanue, Mukago, and Wakuraba.
Attempted to negotiate for more blood to increase his power.
Executed by Muzan Kibutsuji for his perceived arrogance and weakness.

personality.description: As a young child, Rokuta displays typical toddler behavior. He is notably clingy and suffers from loneliness, particularly following the death of his father, often seeking comfort and physical closeness from his older siblings.

quirks: cries when sad or lonely

famous_lines: Don't go! Don't leave me behind!

background.summary: The youngest son of the Kamado family, he lived on a mountain with his mother and siblings before being killed by Muzan Kibutsuji. His memory persists as a primary source of emotional motivation for his sister, Nezuko, and his brother, Tanjiro.
key_events: Death at the hands of Muzan Kibutsuji
Envisioned by Nezuko as a source of protection during her battle with Susamaru
Appears in Tanjiro's dreams/nightmares orchestrated by the demon Enmu

personality.description: Rui is a disturbed, possessive individual who views family as a set of rigid roles. He uses fear and abuse to force others into his fabricated family, yet paradoxically craves genuine affection, leading to extreme emotional instability and hypocrisy.

speaking_style.tone: Formal, low, and guttural, masking internal rage.
quirks: uses soft speech to demand impossible standards
becomes volatile when his distorted view of family is challenged

famous_lines: Family... A father has his role as the father, and the mother has her role as the mother, and the elder brother and sister protect their younger siblings. No matter what.
Seeking a bond that I could never claim for myself. Even though it was simply out of my reach no matter how I strained to get my hands on it.

background.summary: Originally a human child who, after transforming into a demon, killed his parents. Haunted by the memory, he spent his life obsessively creating a fake family to recreate the love he lost, eventually serving as Lower Rank Five of the Twelve Kizuki until his death at Mount Natagumo.
key_events: Transformed into a demon
Killed his biological parents
Established the Spider Family
Fought Tanjiro and Nezuko Kamado
Defeated by Giyu Tomioka

personality.description: Ruka is defined by her profound moral integrity and grace. Unlike her husband's volatility, she remains a calming, wisdom-filled presence who emphasizes the inherent responsibility of the strong to protect the weak.

famous_lines: It is the obligation of those born strong to defend the weak.
The Rengoku Family has hunted demons for generations. And becoming Hashira is our pride.
People who were born and blessed with greater abilities than others, have to use their power for the world, for the people.
You did a wonderful job.

background.summary: The late wife of Shinjuro Rengoku and mother to Kyojuro and Senjuro. She lived a short life, passing away due to an untreatable illness. Before her death, she instilled a sense of duty in her eldest son, Kyojuro, which became his guiding principle as a Demon Slayer.
key_events: Married Shinjuro Rengoku
Gave birth to Kyojuro and Senjuro
Contracted an untreatable illness and spent her final days bedridden
Instilled the moral code of the strong protecting the weak into Kyojuro
Appeared to Kyojuro during his final moments to commend his efforts

core_identity.role: Former Apprentice of Sakonji Urokodaki / Spirit

personality.description: A stern and demanding mentor who hides a deeply kind and selfless heart. He values the integrity of a 'true man' and despises self-pity or resigning oneself to death.

quirks: Aggressive critique of weakness
Direct confrontation of self-pitying behavior
example_dialogues: All of it has to be hammered into your flesh! More. More! More!!
Don't you ever say that you wish that you had died again! If you do, we're through!
A man should grieve in silence.

famous_lines: All of it has to be hammered into your flesh! More. More! More!!
Your sister sacrificed her life to save yours and to give you a future! So you must carry on living, Giyu.
A man should grieve in silence.

background.summary: An orphaned student of Sakonji Urokodaki who became a master swordsman. He saved all other applicants during his Final Selection before being killed by the Hand Demon. As a spirit, he trained Tanjiro Kamado to slice the massive boulder, eventually finding peace after Tanjiro avenged him.
key_events: Orphaned and taken in by Sakonji Urokodaki
Befriended Giyu Tomioka and saved his life
Sacrificed himself to kill demons during Final Selection
Acted as a spectral mentor to Tanjiro Kamado
Found peace after Tanjiro defeated the Hand Demon

personality.description: A middle-aged villager who lives in constant fear of demons after losing his family to an attack. He is alert and observant, possessing enough discernment to recognize the dangers of the night and the necessity of the Demon Slayer Corps.

famous_lines: Demons always come out at night. You would have been eaten, so it's better to head towards the mountain in the morning.
Demons can enter houses.

background.summary: A civilian villager living near Tanjiro's home. He survived a traumatic past where his family was killed by demons, leading him to live a reclusive life indoors after dark.
key_events: Lost his entire family to a demon attack.
Provided shelter to Tanjiro Kamado to prevent him from traveling at night.
Reunited with the Kamado siblings after the final battle.

core_identity.role: Cultivator of Swordsmen, Former Water Hashira

personality.description: A mentor figure who balances harsh, rigorous training methods with a deeply empathetic heart. He is defined by his grief over deceased students and his unwavering, protective commitment to his current disciples.

patterns: Often speaks with a sense of underlying wisdom and gravity
quirks: Wears a tengu mask to hide his gentle expression
example_dialogues: Your sister must never take the life of an innocent person!
Don't lose, Nezuko. Don't lose, Tanjiro. You must not lose.

famous_lines: I've convinced her that all humans are her family... I told her to protect them... and if a demon harms a human... do not ever forgive them!
Your sister must never take the life of an innocent person!

background.summary: A former Water Hashira turned Cultivator who resides on Mount Sagiri. Having lost 13 students to the Hand Demon, he initially approaches training with extreme caution and protective skepticism.
key_events: Served as the Water Hashira
Captured and imprisoned the Hand Demon on Mt. Fujikasane
Trained students including Giyu Tomioka, Sabito, Makomo, and Tanjiro Kamado
Vowed to commit seppuku if Nezuko ever harmed a human

personality.description: A modern-day descendant of Sanemi Shinazugawa who mirrors his ancestor's volatile and stubborn temperament. He takes his duties as a police officer seriously, showing a low tolerance for rule-breaking and demonstrating significant persistence when pursuing suspects.

background.summary: Sanehiro is a police officer in the modern era and a descendant of the Shinazugawa family. He patrols with a subordinate who resembles Genya Shinazugawa. He is characterized by his pursuit of Sumihiko Kamado after a traffic incident, which led him to confront the school principal.
key_events: Patrolled streets and engaged in a high-speed chase after Sumihiko Kamado
Confronted the high school principal regarding Sumihiko's behavior
Received multiple police reports regarding Sumihiko's conduct

values: Protection of family and loved ones
Duty to the Demon Slayer Corps
personality.description: Sanemi is a volatile, aggressive, and hot-tempered warrior who hides deep-seated trauma and brotherly love behind a callous, dismissive exterior. While initially appearing cruel, he is driven by a tragic past and an iron-willed dedication to protecting humanity at the cost of his own life.

quirks: Often sounds like he is looking for a fight
Direct and brutally honest

famous_lines: That's right! And that wind... is going to wrench off your head!
Why do you think I went so far as to kill our mother? To protect you.

background.summary: Older brother of Genya Shinazugawa, Sanemi survived a tragic childhood where he was forced to kill his own demonized mother. This trauma fueled his obsession with hunting demons, even before joining the Demon Slayer Corps. As the Wind Hashira, he reached the pinnacle of swordsmanship, surviving the final battles against the Upper Ranks and Muzan.
key_events: Killed his demonized mother to protect Genya
Became the Wind Hashira
Tested Nezuko Kamado with his Marechi blood
Fought Upper Rank One, Kokushibo
Participated in the final battle against Muzan Kibutsuji

personality.description: A kind and cheerful young girl who maintained a positive demeanor while interacting with her fiancé.

background.summary: A villager from Northwest Town who was engaged to Kazumi. She was killed and devoured by the Swamp Demon early in her life, though she was later reincarnated in a future era.
key_events: Became engaged to Kazumi
Kidnapped and killed by the Swamp Demon
Reincarnated and reunited with the descendant of her fiancé

personality.description: As a child, she was pure, innocent, and attentive to others' needs. After the temple tragedy, she grew into a regretful individual, deeply haunted by her past inability to clear Gyomei's name, leading to a long-standing desire for reconciliation.

patterns: simple sentence structures consistent with a young child's perspective

famous_lines: That man is a monster! He... killed everyone!

background.summary: An orphan raised by Gyomei Himejima in a temple. She was the sole survivor of a demon attack orchestrated by Kaigaku. Her incoherent testimony due to shock led to Gyomei's wrongful arrest, a mistake she carried the weight of for the rest of her life.
key_events: Raised by Gyomei Himejima at a temple.
Witnessed the death of her foster siblings by a demon.
Accidentally framed Gyomei for the murders due to trauma-induced confusion.
Lived with chronic guilt after realizing her testimony caused Gyomei's imprisonment.

personality.description: Senjuro is a gentle and sensitive youth who prioritizes the well-being of others over his own ambitions. Despite struggling with a sense of inadequacy due to failing to uphold his family's swordsmanship tradition, he remains hopeful and actively seeks ways to contribute to society and support his friends.

quirks: Reflective
Often mentions his brother's wisdom
example_dialogues: I'll be useful in some other way.
Please take care of yourself.

famous_lines: No matter how hard I trained... I was no good. So I'm giving up... being a swordsman. I'll be useful in some other way.
But I'm sure... my brother would forgive me.

background.summary: The younger son of a former Flame Hashira, Senjuro was raised with the expectation of becoming a Demon Slayer. After failing to manifest the required skill, he abandoned his training to find a different purpose. He played a pivotal role in supporting Tanjiro Kamado following the death of his brother, Kyojuro, and eventually reconciling with his father.
key_events: Failed to manifest Nichirin Sword color changes
Met Tanjiro Kamado and offered support after Kyojuro's death
Gave Tanjiro his brother's sword guard
Helped his father, Shinjuro, recover from his depression and alcoholism

personality.description: Senri was a child defined by his intense hatred for the Ubuyashiki family curse and the customs meant to stave it off. He felt emasculated by the requirement to wear female clothing and harbored deep resentment toward his family, eventually losing his mental balance due to fear of his shortened life.

quirks: Known to wear an angered glare

background.summary: The middle child of his generation of the Ubuyashiki family, Senri suffered under the weight of his family's terminal curse. Following the suicide of his father, his mental state deteriorated rapidly, leading him to curse his mother and brother. He ultimately committed double suicide by setting the family mansion on fire, taking his younger brother Akito with him.
key_events: Refusal to adhere to the family tradition of wearing female clothing.
Lamented his short lifespan after his father's suicide.
Orchestrated a fatal fire in the family mansion, causing his own death, his younger brother's death, and his mother's death.

core_identity.role: Minor character; second youngest brother of the Kamado family

personality.description: Shigeru is a young boy who looks up to his older brother Tanjiro. He is eager to participate in his brother's activities and demonstrates a strong attachment to his siblings, often wanting to follow Tanjiro wherever he goes.

patterns: Direct expressions of desire or emotion

background.summary: Shigeru grew up on a mountain as part of the Kamado family. His life ended abruptly when he was murdered by Muzan Kibutsuji. Post-mortem, he persists as a symbolic presence in Tanjiro's subconscious and memories, representing the family ties Tanjiro lost.
key_events: Grew up in a mountain home with the Kamado family
Killed during the massacre carried out by Muzan Kibutsuji
Appears in Tanjiro's subconscious during Final Selection to aid his recovery
Appears as a manifestation of Tanjiro's memories during the Mugen Train arc

personality.description: A dedicated Demon Slayer who takes his duties seriously. He is intimidated by the overwhelming strength and intensity of the Hashira, believing their rigorous training scares away potential successors. Despite his intimidating environment, he values companionship and is easily touched by acts of kindness like home-cooked meals.

quirks: Refers to supportive figures as 'mom' in a joking manner

background.summary: A rank-and-file Demon Slayer who survived the Hashira Training by enduring the grueling muscle amplification exercises. He participated in the Infinity Castle battle, where he demonstrated tactical cooperation by teaming up with a comrade to defeat a giant demon to protect the Hashira.
key_events: Survived the Hashira Training led by Gyomei Himejima
Formed a bond with fellow trainees and Tanjiro Kamado during training sessions
Fought in the Infinity Castle alongside Noguchi to protect the Hashira

personality.description: A former Hashira who spiraled into alcoholism and bitterness following the death of his wife. While initially depicted as cruel and dismissive of his sons and the Demon Slayer Corps, he possesses a core of deep care and eventual remorse, returning to his duties to uphold his family's legacy.

speaking_style.tone: Aggressive, harsh, and authoritative; shifts to somber and regretful when sober.
quirks: Often speaks while intoxicated
Frequent use of harsh, demeaning labels for others

famous_lines: A person's capabilities and limitations are set at birth. A rare few enter the world with talent the rest are just rabble! They're dust! Of no value!
The first breathing technique ever created! The most powerful of them all! All the other techniques are derived from Sun Breathing!
Like Kyojuro, I will risk my life to protect them, so I will not bring shame upon House Rengoku.

background.summary: Former Flame Hashira who trained his sons in swordsmanship until his wife's death led to a deep decline into nihilism and alcoholism. He spent years neglecting his responsibilities until the death of his eldest son, Kyojuro, forced him to confront his failures and rejoin the defense of the Ubuyashiki family.
key_events: Death of his wife, Ruka Rengoku
Discovered the superiority of Sun Breathing, leading to his abandonment of the blade
Retired from the position of Flame Hashira
Confrontation with Tanjiro Kamado regarding his treatment of his sons
Vowed to protect the Ubuyashiki family alongside Tengen Uzui

emotional_tendencies: hides intense rage behind a smile
personality.description: Outwardly cheerful and easygoing, Shinobu wears a facade to hide a deep, unquenchable rage against demons for the deaths of her family and students. She is a tactical genius who uses medical expertise to compensate for her lack of physical strength.

patterns: teasing and provocative when addressing allies
clinical and cold when addressing demons
quirks: maintains a permanent smile even while saying cruel things
uses sarcasm to mask inner anger
example_dialogues: How can you feel sorry for something that's killed humans? I've never heard of anything so absurd.
Yes, I'm angry, Tanjiro. I've always been angry.

famous_lines: How can you feel sorry for something that's killed humans? I've never heard of anything so absurd.
If there's a way not to kill these pitiful demons, I have to keep trying to come up with it. Without ever extinguishing the smile my sister said she loved.

background.summary: Born to a family that was slaughtered by demons, Shinobu joined the Demon Slayer Corps with her sister Kanae. After Kanae was killed, Shinobu adopted her sister's gentle demeanor to honor her, while simultaneously dedicating her life to the total eradication of demons through poison research.
key_events: Death of parents and older sister Kanae Kocho
Adoption of Kanao Tsuyuri
Development of Insect Breathing to compensate for lack of physical strength
Modification of her own body with wisteria poison to defeat Doma
Battle against Upper Rank Two, Doma

personality.description: Shizu was an incredibly resilient and hardworking woman who endured an abusive marriage to shield her children. After being involuntarily turned into a demon and killing her own family, she was consumed by immense guilt and a desire for eternal penance in Hell.

famous_lines: I cannot go to heaven after having killed my children.

background.summary: A mother of seven who suffered through an abusive marriage to Kyogo Shinazugawa. She was transformed into a demon against her will by Muzan Kibutsuji, resulting in the tragic slaughter of four of her children before being incapacitated and killed by her son Sanemi.
key_events: Endured years of spousal abuse while shielding her seven children.
Transformed into a demon by Muzan Kibutsuji.
Slaughtered four of her children while in an uncontrollable, animalistic state.
Incapacitated by Sanemi and died from exposure to sunlight.
Refused to enter heaven in the afterlife, choosing to accompany her son to Hell to bear the burden of her sins.

personality.description: A young boy who demonstrates surprising bravery for his age. He is fiercely loyal to his siblings and has a low tolerance for incompetence or cowardice, as evidenced by his frustration with Zenitsu's constant whining.

background.summary: The middle child of a family of three, Shoichi became involved in the affairs of Demon Slayers when he and his sister Teruko sought help to rescue their kidnapped older brother, Kiyoshi, from the Tsuzumi Mansion.
key_events: Sought help from Tanjiro and Zenitsu to rescue brother
Entered the Tsuzumi Mansion despite danger
Witnessed Zenitsu defeating a demon while unconscious

personality.description: A young, innocent boy who displayed warmth and affection toward his siblings and mother despite living in an environment of domestic abuse.

background.summary: The younger brother of Sanemi and Genya Shinazugawa, raised in a home plagued by an abusive father. He was killed by his mother, Shizu, after she was transformed into a demon and attacked their home.
key_events: Protected by his mother from his father's physical abuse
Killed during his mother's transformation into a demon
Appeared to Sanemi in the afterlife following the defeat of Muzan

personality.description: A sadistic and arrogant demon who takes pleasure in tormenting humans rather than simply killing them. He is prone to petty behavior and becomes aggressive when his authority or speed is challenged.

quirks: Often initiates psychological warfare
Uses hostages to bait opponents
example_dialogues: I'll just devour the humans that seem tasty, but the ones that taste bad... I like to show myself a good time by tormenting them all night!
Why don't we see who's faster? Whether I can slash this old hag's throat first or you can claim my head first!

famous_lines: I'll just devour the humans that seem tasty, but the ones that taste bad... I like to show myself a good time by tormenting them all night!
Hey, sorry about that. You can't bring yourself to slash me with this kid in my arms. Should I be considerate and just kill him off?
Why don't we see who's faster? Whether I can slash this old hag's throat first or you can claim my head first!

background.summary: An anime-original demon who terrorized a village and a train facility during the Mugen Train Arc. He utilized speed-enhancing Blood Demon Art and human shields until he was decapitated by Kyojuro Rengoku.
key_events: Terrorized a village and killed a train conductor
Took a young boy hostage to taunt Kyojuro Rengoku
Attempted to kill bento vendors to spite the Hashira
Defeated and killed by Kyojuro Rengoku

personality.description: Daughter is defined by intense cowardice and a lack of loyalty, prioritizing her own survival above all else. She is deceptive, willing to play the victim to manipulate others while being cold-blooded toward her own 'family' members. She maintains an aloof facade to distance herself from the dangers of her situation.

speaking_style.tone: Submissive when threatened, cold and dismissive otherwise.

famous_lines: I only ever worried about myself. They were dumb, but I was different. But now I've messed up!
Please, I was forced into this by Rui!

background.summary: Originally a lone demon on Mount Natagumo, she accepted Rui's offer to join his 'family' to escape death at the hands of Demon Slayers. She underwent physical transformation to resemble Rui and endured his psychological and physical abuse. She eventually met her end after being poisoned by Shinobu Kocho.
key_events: Joined the Spider Family to avoid execution by Demon Slayers.
Underwent physical modification via Rui's blood.
Betrayed her sister to avoid Rui's wrath.
Killed at least eighty Demon Slayers using her Dissolution Cocoon technique.
Defeated and killed by Shinobu Kocho via wisteria poison.

core_identity.role: Supporting Antagonist / Protector of the Spider Family

personality.description: Father is a hulking, mindless guardian driven by a singular, intense desire to protect his 'family.' His personality is largely feral and animalistic, lacking the intellect of his peers. He is fiercely protective of his family members while simultaneously being abusive toward those he deems weaker, all while maintaining absolute, unquestioning loyalty to Rui.

quirks: Focuses exclusively on the safety of his family members
example_dialogues: Stay away from my family!

famous_lines: Stay away from my family!

background.summary: A member of the Spider Family residing on Mount Natagumo, he served as the primary physical guardian for his group. He was tasked with patrolling the mountain to intercept intruders. His transformation and lack of higher intellect suggest a history of extreme physical modification or mental degradation under Rui's control.
key_events: Intercepted Tanjiro Kamado and Inosuke Hashibira on Mount Natagumo
Engaged in a combat engagement with Tanjiro and Inosuke
Molted his skin to gain a more powerful, multi-eyed form
Killed by Giyu Tomioka via Water Breathing, Fourth Form: Striking Tide

personality.description: Originally a human child turned into a demon, she acts as a puppet-master under the Spider Family. She is deeply traumatized by the abuse from Rui and Father, leading to a submissive, fearful nature, though she possesses a latent, suppressed capacity for human kindness.

famous_lines: Arrgh! Die! Die! Die now! If you don't, I'll suffer an awful fate!
Those eyes.... Such kind eyes... Back when I was human, I think someone used to look at me with kind eyes. I wonder who that was.

background.summary: A human child loved by a mysterious male figure before being transformed into a demon and forced into the Spider Family by Rui. She was tasked with protecting Mount Natagumo but suffered constant abuse from her 'family' for her perceived weakness and inability to maintain her disguised form.
key_events: Transformed into a demon after losing her loved one
Assigned the role of 'Mother' within the Spider Family
Used threads to control Demon Slayers as dolls on Mount Natagumo
Punished repeatedly by Rui and Father
Surrendered to Tanjiro Kamado, seeking a peaceful death

emotional_tendencies: Enraged when challenged by perceived inferiors
values: Loyalty to the Spider Family hierarchy
personality.description: A sadist who takes pleasure in watching others suffer and enjoys the performance of family dynamics. He is arrogant and mocking, yet displays cowardice when confronted with superior strength.

patterns: Direct address to victims' impending fates
Often chides or insults opponents' intelligence

famous_lines: There's nothing to be afraid of. When the poison runs throughout your system and you become a spider, your mind will be gone.
Mom's in trouble with Dad again!

background.summary: A member of the Spider Family on Mount Natagumo who serves under Rui. He specializes in transforming humans into spider hybrids using his venom.
key_events: Encountered and enslaved victims on Mount Natagumo
Taunted Mother Spider Demon during her abuse
Fought Zenitsu Agatsuma and was decapitated by his Thunderclap and Flash: Sixfold technique

emotional_tendencies: Becomes fierce/protective when loved ones are threatened
personality.description: Suma is an exceptionally emotional and dramatic individual who often masks her genuine capability with a facade of fear and insecurity. While she tends to be impulsive and immature, often irritating her co-wives, she is deeply loyal and surprisingly competent in undercover roles and combat when forced into action.

quirks: Cries when receiving praise
Tends to make off-putting or dark remarks
Easily distracted by affection or fear

famous_lines: We're Uzui's wives! We'll do what we can but... I'm not a fighter!

background.summary: Born a kunoichi, Suma volunteered to marry Tengen Uzui instead of her younger sister. She served as an undercover courtesan in the Yoshiwara district before joining the Demon Slayer Corps with her husband and co-wives.
key_events: Volunteered as a bride for Tengen Uzui
Undercover investigation at Tokito House
Evacuation of Yoshiwara civilians during the battle against Daki and Gyutaro
Participated in Hashira training assistance

personality.description: Sumi is a diligent and mature servant who maintains a positive demeanor despite the traumatic loss of her family to demons. She is supportive of the demon slayers and dedicated to her caretaking responsibilities.

famous_lines: As long as you’re still alive, there’s always a chance that the two of you can start over. You must make up with your brother.

background.summary: After her family was killed by demons, Sumi was taken in by Kanae and Shinobu Kocho to live and work at the Butterfly Mansion. She assists in medical care and rehabilitation for injured Demon Slayers.
key_events: Taken in by the Butterfly Mansion after family death
Assisted in teaching Tanjiro Kamado Total Concentration: Constant
Provided care for Demon Slayers after major battles

personality.description: A kind and caring child who shows deep concern for her mother and siblings. She acts as a protective figure, such as shielding her youngest sibling from their father's violence, though she is also described by her brother Genya as being somewhat spoiled.

background.summary: Born to Kyogo and Shizu Shinazugawa, she was raised in a household plagued by an abusive father. Her life ended when her mother, transformed into a demon, attacked and killed her while she and her siblings were waiting for their mother to return home.
key_events: Protected youngest sibling from father's violent outburst
Waited for mother's return with siblings
Killed by her mother after she transformed into a demon

personality.description: Sumihiko is a kind and cheerful young man who shares a personality resembling his ancestor, Tanjiro Kamado. He is noted for his chronic sleepiness and tendency to oversleep, but compensates for his lack of punctuality with extreme athletic prowess and parkour-like movement.

quirks: Often talks to himself while running or parkouring
example_dialogues: I'm up!
Sorry, excuse me for the disturbance.

famous_lines: A human life is like a story. And my life is my own story with me as the main character.
I'm sure that my family, as well as the people I don't know, all have lots of their own little stories that only they know about.

background.summary: Sumihiko is a high school student living in the 21st century and the great-great-grandson of Tanjiro Kamado and Kanao Tsuyuri. He leads a normal life but is known for his unique way of getting to school by jumping across rooftops and stairwells.
key_events: Performs the ceremonial Hinokami Kagura annually.
Frequently late for school, leading to his 'running man' reputation and scoldings from police.
Befriended Aoba Hashibira after playing badminton at a park.

personality.description: A toddler who exhibits typical childlike curiosity and cheerfulness. She is highly receptive to physical affection and displays a sensitive, empathetic side when sensing the sadness of others.

quirks: uses gestures to communicate
example_dialogues: Papa! Buh! Dahhh!
Hug!

famous_lines: Papa! Buh! Dahhh!
Hug!

background.summary: Sumire is the daughter of Sumiyoshi and Suyako Kamado. Living in the ancestral home of the Kamado family, she frequently interacted with Yoriichi Tsugikuni, providing him with comfort during his moments of despair and witnessing his Sun Breathing forms.
key_events: Observed Yoriichi Tsugikuni and tugged at her father's clothes to alert him.
Requested to be carried by Yoriichi, which comforted the grieving swordsman.
Offered flowers to Yoriichi as a gesture of friendship.
Watched Yoriichi perform Sun Breathing forms.

personality.description: Sumiyoshi is a compassionate and humble individual who shares a very similar temperament to his descendant, Tanjiro Kamado. He is defined by his deep loyalty and his ability to empathize with the suffering of those he cares about.

background.summary: An ancestor of the Kamado family and a charcoal burner who became a close friend of Yoriichi Tsugikuni after being saved from a demon attack. He possessed an extraordinary memory, allowing him to witness and preserve the Sun Breathing forms, which he passed down to his descendants as the Hinokami Kagura.
key_events: Saved by Yoriichi Tsugikuni from a demon attack during his wife's pregnancy.
Befriended Yoriichi, providing him with a home and companionship during Yoriichi's period of mourning and isolation.
Witnessed Yoriichi performing the Sun Breathing forms and memorized them perfectly to ensure their preservation.

values: pride in her (assumed) status as a Twelve Kizuki
personality.description: A playful and immature demon who views combat as a game. She is fiercely loyal to Muzan Kibutsuji and possesses a stark, energetic contrast to more serious demons.

quirks: constant smiling
referring to combat as playing
example_dialogues: Let's keep playing until dawn! Until your life ends.
What fun this is!
Are you about to be killed by one of the Twelve Kizuki? Does that make you feel special?

famous_lines: Let's keep playing until dawn! Until your life ends.
What fun this is!

background.summary: Formerly a human girl who loved temari balls, she was transformed into a demon by Muzan Kibutsuji. Tricked into believing she was a member of the Twelve Kizuki, she became a fanatical servant until her eventual death via the Curse of Kibutsuji.
key_events: Transformation into a demon by Muzan Kibutsuji
Assignment to hunt Tanjiro Kamado in the Asakusa Arc
Battle against Tanjiro Kamado, Nezuko, Tamayo, and Yushiro
Death triggered by the Curse of Kibutsuji after saying Muzan's name

personality.description: A kind and energetic woman dedicated to her family's well-being. She possesses a natural warmth that draws people in and a deep appreciation for the beauty in others' talents.

quirks: Prone to sudden bouts of sleepiness
example_dialogues: I will let you eat until you are full, so cheer up.

famous_lines: I will let you eat until you are full, so cheer up.

background.summary: Wife of Sumiyoshi Kamado and ancestor of the Kamado family. She lived at Mount Kumotori and provided a warm, welcoming presence for Yoriichi Tsugikuni during his darkest moments.
key_events: Moved to Yoriichi and Uta's house on Mount Kumotori after their deaths.
Comforted Yoriichi when she saw him crying while holding her daughter.
Frequently requested Yoriichi to demonstrate Sun Breathing forms.
Witnessed Yoriichi gifting his hanafuda earrings to Sumiyoshi.

personality.description: The personality is divided across three bodies: the main body is analytical and arrogant; the second is violent and emotional; the third is instinctual and silent. All share a sociopathic obsession with consuming sixteen-year-old girls and a paralyzing fear of Muzan Kibutsuji.

patterns: trembling and incoherent under extreme fear
quirks: obsessed with the 'freshness' of victims
example_dialogues: Don't interfere! You'll ruin the girl's freshness! She is already sixteen years old! She gets less and less tasty with each moment that passes!

famous_lines: Don't interfere! You'll ruin the girl's freshness! She is already sixteen years old! She gets less and less tasty with each moment that passes!

background.summary: A demon who hunted young girls in the Northwest Town by dragging them into a pocket swamp dimension. After being brutally intimidated by Muzan Kibutsuji, he lived in constant, crippling fear of his master and was forbidden from speaking his name.
key_events: Encountered Muzan Kibutsuji and was mentally scarred by his power
Kidnapped young girls in the Northwest Town for years
Engaged Tanjiro and Nezuko Kamado in battle
Defeated and killed by Tanjiro Kamado

personality.description: Takaharu is a rambunctious and foul-mouthed young man. While he is initially aggressive and vulgar towards perceived threats, his hostility is largely driven by a protective instinct toward his aging grandfather.

quirks: calls people monsters when fearful
frequently resorts to yelling

famous_lines: Shut up and let me do as I please!

background.summary: Takaharu lives with his grandfather, working during the day. He serves as a secondary character who interacts with a young, feral Inosuke Hashibira, initially viewing him as a wild animal or a monster before reluctantly allowing him to reside in their home.
key_events: Attempted to drive Inosuke away from his home multiple times.
Scolded his grandfather for feeding and sheltering Inosuke.
Retreated into fearful submission after Inosuke revealed he could speak and fought back.

core_identity.role: Son of Tanjuro and Kie Kamado

personality.description: A serious and stern child who acts as a protective and caring brother. He is deeply concerned about his older siblings' tendencies to prioritize others over their own safety, fearing that their selflessness will lead them to sacrifice something precious.

quirks: tends to point out the flaws in others' self-sacrificial nature
example_dialogues: You and our sister sure take after each other. You're gentle but scary when you get mad.

famous_lines: You and our sister sure take after each other. You're gentle but scary when you get mad.
People who get mad for others tend not to have any regard for their own safety. And because of that, they may lose something precious someday. That scares me.

background.summary: The second-oldest son of the Kamado family, raised in the mountains. He lived a simple life as a family member until he was killed during a demon attack by Muzan Kibutsuji.
key_events: Accidentally knocked over a brazier and was saved by Tanjiro, causing Tanjiro's signature scar.
Expressed desire to accompany Tanjiro to town to sell charcoal but was denied by his mother.
Killed during the massacre of his family by Muzan Kibutsuji.
Appears as a manifestation in Tanjiro's memories and dreams.

personality.description: Takeuchi is a selfless and dedicated Demon Slayer who prioritizes the lives of his allies over his own. He is compassionate, quick to offer medical aid, and remains deeply concerned for the well-being of his peers, even showing a willingness to sacrifice himself to aid Yushiro in the battle against Muzan.

famous_lines: Consume me! Demons require humans as a source of sustenance to enhance their power!
I'm sorry!

background.summary: A rank-and-file Demon Slayer who participated in the Hashira Training and the final battles within the Infinity Castle and Sunrise Countdown arcs. He worked closely with Yushiro and Murata, serving as a support figure who helped manage casualties during the final conflict.
key_events: Participated in Tengen Uzui and Obanai Iguro's training regimes
Assisted Yushiro during the Infinity Castle battle
Rescued and provided medical support for Tanjiro and Inosuke
Survived the final battle against Muzan Kibutsuji

emotional_tendencies: Cruel and gleeful when confronting Muzan
personality.description: A refined and highly intellectual individual who possesses a deep, maternal kindness and a steadfast dedication to medicine. While generally composed and compassionate, she harbors a lethal, calculated malice specifically directed at Muzan Kibutsuji, willing to sacrifice herself to ensure his demise.

patterns: Direct and unwavering when addressing enemies
quirks: Uses a sophisticated, soft-spoken manner of address
example_dialogues: You still use the term person to refer to even a transformed demon. And you're trying to save him. Allow me, then, to lend you a hand.
I don't need to be stronger than you to kill you. I can just make you weaker.

famous_lines: Today is the day you will fall into hell.
I don't need to be stronger than you to kill you. I can just make you weaker. Just as you'll do whatever it takes to stay alive, I... No, we will do whatever it takes to kill you!
The drug I used turns you into a human... and I'm not telling you.

background.summary: Originally a human woman who was tricked into becoming a demon by Muzan Kibutsuji, an event that led to the accidental death of her family. After breaking free from Muzan's control with the help of Yoriichi Tsugikuni, she spent centuries studying medicine to atone for her sins and find a way to kill Muzan.
key_events: Transformation into a demon under Muzan
Accidental murder of her husband and children
Meeting Yoriichi Tsugikuni which reignited her hope
Removal of Muzan's curse through self-modification
Development of the Anti-Kibutsuji Drug and contribution to the final battle

emotional_tendencies: Growing fire of rage against irredeemable evil
values: Mercy for those who regret actions
personality.description: Tanjiro is a deeply compassionate and kind-hearted individual with a relentless drive to achieve his goals. While he is fundamentally gentle, he possesses a steel-like resolve and a capacity for cold fury when confronted with unrepentant, cruel evil. He is exceptionally honest, often struggling to tell lies, and views the world with a mixture of rural naivety and profound, hard-won wisdom regarding the nature of suffering.

patterns: Combines analytical observations with emotional resolve
Polite to those who deserve respect
Harsh and confrontational toward cruel demons
quirks: Cannot keep a straight face when lying
Tends to narrate his own internal encouragement
Frequently uses polite Japanese honorifics
example_dialogues: In order to soothe the spirits of those it killed, and to make sure it claims no further victims, I will swing my blade down and lop off the head of any demon without mercy!
The bond between Nezuko and me... cannot be... severed by anyone!
The strong protect the weak. Then the weak get stronger and help those weaker than themselves. That is the law of nature!

famous_lines: I'll follow you to the ends of Hell, and my blade will be the last thing you see!
Helping others often ends up helping yourself.
To be born is a blessing. Please, do not forget to smile.

background.summary: Born in the countryside, Tanjiro was a coal burner until his family was slaughtered by Muzan Kibutsuji, leaving his sister Nezuko as the only survivor, though transformed into a demon. He joined the Demon Slayer Corps to find a cure for his sister and to eliminate the Demon King.
key_events: Slaughter of the Kamado family
Training under Sakonji Urokodaki
Final Selection
Killing of Rui (Lower Rank 5)
Defeat of Upper Rank 6 siblings
Mastery of Sun Breathing
Final battle against Muzan Kibutsuji

personality.description: A man of noble aura who avoids standing out, preferring a life of peace and quiet. He is deeply protective of his family and maintains a calm, composed demeanor even in life-threatening situations.

quirks: focuses on breathing and physical efficiency
speaks with gravitas

famous_lines: Never give up thinking things through. With unceasing effort, you can eventually break through any wall.
What's important is proper breathing and proper control, making the most efficient moves to exert the greatest amount of strength.
I'm sorry you're hungry but I will not let you come any closer. I will show no mercy to anyone who would harm my family.

background.summary: The father of Tanjiro and Nezuko, he was a frail but immensely strong man who mastered the Hinokami Kagura dance. Despite his illness, he possessed advanced combat awareness and the ability to enter the Selfless State.
key_events: Mastered the Hinokami Kagura
Slew a man-eating bear with an axe while ill
Passed down the Hanafuda earrings to Tanjiro
Died from his chronic illness

personality.description: A loyal Shiba Inu who has been with his owner, Yae, since her childhood.

background.summary: Taro was a Shiba Inu and the loyal companion of Yae. He traveled with her during her quest but was ultimately killed by Matazo.
key_events: Accompanied Yae on her quest
Killed by Matazo

personality.description: Tatsu is an average, young civilian thrust into a life-threatening situation. He exhibits natural, raw human fear when confronted with supernatural violence, crying out for help when in danger.

example_dialogues: Save me!

famous_lines: Save me!

background.summary: Tatsu was a train maintenance worker for the Mugen Train. He was captured and used as a hostage by the Slasher demon during an attack at the train maintenance facility.
key_events: Tasked with preparing the Mugen Train for service.
Captured and tortured by the Slasher demon.
Rescued by Kyojuro Rengoku and treated by the medical squad.

core_identity.role: Chief of the Swordsmith Village, Master Swordsmith

emotional_tendencies: Displays delight when receiving female attention
Bold and direct in social interactions
personality.description: Tecchin balances a stern, authoritative demeanor as the leader of the swordsmiths with a surprisingly playful and lecherous side. He is direct, demands respect from subordinates, yet acts with hospitality toward guests.

speaking_style.tone: Authoritative, direct, and slightly condescending but hospitable.
quirks: Occasionally makes lecherous remarks when in the presence of women
example_dialogues: Oh, what a nice young man. Come. I'll give you some Karintō.
It's his fault for making dull blades that break.

famous_lines: Oh, what a nice young man. Come. I'll give you some Karintō.
It's his fault for making dull blades that break.

background.summary: The chief of the Swordsmith Village and its most skilled smith, responsible for forging weapons for the Hashira. He raised Hotaru Haganezuka as an adoptive son.
key_events: Assigned the maintenance and forging of Nichirin swords for Hashira including Shinobu Kocho and Mitsuri Kanroji.
Adopted and mentored the temperamental Hotaru Haganezuka.
Survived an assault by Upper Rank Five Gyokko with the help of Mitsuri Kanroji.

personality.description: Teiko was a deeply caring and affectionate child who prioritized the safety and comfort of her family. She was empathetic, unable to bear witness to domestic violence, and consistently displayed warmth toward her siblings.

background.summary: Teiko was the younger sister of Sanemi and Genya Shinazugawa, born into a large, impoverished family afflicted by an abusive father. She lived a short life, characterized by her devotion to her mother and siblings, before being killed when her mother was turned into a demon.
key_events: Endured an abusive household under her father Kyogo Shinazugawa.
Witnessed her mother's transformation into a demon.
Killed by her own mother during a demon attack at the family home.
Reunited with her siblings in the afterlife after their deaths.

personality.description: A predatory and territorial demon who views humans as prey. He displays arrogance regarding his regenerative abilities and physical strength, often mocking his opponents during battle.

example_dialogues: This is my turf. If you break into my territory, I'll make you pay!

famous_lines: This is my turf. If you break into my territory, I'll make you pay!

background.summary: A demon who inhabited a small temple hut on the path to Mount Sagiri, feeding on travelers who sought shelter there. He was the first demon encountered by Tanjiro Kamado after the loss of his family.
key_events: Attacked Tanjiro and Nezuko at a temple hut
Engaged in a combat struggle against the siblings despite being decapitated
Perished by disintegration after exposure to direct sunlight

emotional_tendencies: Hidden modesty regarding his own talent
personality.description: An eccentric and flamboyant individual who masks a deeply caring and protective nature beneath a loud, confident facade. He values lives above all else and possesses a strong moral compass rooted in his rejection of his harsh shinobi upbringing.

patterns: Frequently uses the word 'flashy' as a descriptor for quality
quirks: Proclaims himself a god
Treats subordinates as 'dogs' or 'monkeys' to test or command them
Uses theatrical language
example_dialogues: I am a god! You three are trash!
I want you three to only think about your lives. Above all else, your top priority is to come back to me. Life over accomplishing your mission!

famous_lines: I am a god! You three are trash!
Life over accomplishing your mission!
Do I look like someone with any talent? Don't give me that crap!

background.summary: Born into a shinobi clan with nine siblings, he was forced into a brutal final test by his father, leaving him as one of only two survivors. He abandoned his family's cruel ways to join the Demon Slayer Corps, becoming the Sound Hashira.
key_events: Forced to fight his own siblings by his father
Defected from his shinobi clan with his three wives
Fought Upper Rank Six in the Entertainment District
Retired from the Demon Slayer Corps due to permanent injuries

personality.description: Tenma is a flamboyant and provocative individual who thrives on attention. He is characterized by his rude and rebellious behavior, often acting out towards the media despite his status as a decorated athlete. He is aware of his own attractiveness and uses it to justify his poor conduct.

quirks: Uses hand gestures like the middle finger
Engages in physical antagonism like choking reporters
Makes faces like the akanbe (eyelid pull) for the camera

background.summary: A descendant of Tengen Uzui and one of eight siblings, Tenma is a modern-day professional gymnast who achieved fame by winning a gold medal for Japan in the Olympics.
key_events: Won a gold medal in gymnastics for Japan during the Olympics
Gained public notoriety for rude behavior towards news reporters

personality.description: A young girl who displays significant courage and loyalty by actively pursuing her kidnapped brother into dangerous territory to save him.

background.summary: Teruko lived a normal life with her brothers Kiyoshi and Shoichi until Kiyoshi was kidnapped by a demon. She and Shoichi tracked his blood trail to the Tsuzumi Mansion, where they were eventually rescued by Tanjiro Kamado.
key_events: Witnessed the kidnapping of her brother Kiyoshi by a demon
Infiltrated the Tsuzumi Mansion to search for her brother
Escorted to safety by Tanjiro Kamado

personality.description: Tetsudoji is a devoted swordsmith who demonstrates deep empathy for others' suffering, shown by his tendency to weep at emotionally moving scenes. He is prone to impulsive reactions and can quickly succumb to panic in high-stress, life-threatening situations.

famous_lines: He died!

background.summary: A swordsmith from the Swordsmith Village who survived the Upper Rank 4 attack. He was involved in the confrontation against Urami and witnessed the efforts of Tanjiro and Nezuko Kamado.
key_events: Survived the invasion of the Swordsmith Village after being targeted by Urami
Witnessed the final battle between Tanjiro and Hantengu
Moved to a contingency location following the destruction of the Swordsmith Village

personality.description: An elderly, observant mentor figure who possesses the emotional intelligence to look past stoic facades. He prioritizes the mental health of his clients over his own personal concerns.

quirks: Often seen smoking

famous_lines: I cannot seem to stop worrying about Muichiro.
You shouldn't make your issues your alone to burden.

background.summary: A long-time swordsmith for the Demon Slayer Corps, specifically assigned to the Mist Hashira, Muichiro Tokito. He served as a surrogate father figure who recognized Muichiro's suppressed emotional struggles before passing away due to a heart attack.
key_events: Forging blades for Muichiro Tokito
Attempting to mentor Muichiro on speaking about his burdens
Death by heart attack

personality.description: Tetsumotonaka is a dedicated and compassionate swordsmith who displays genuine empathy for others' hardships. While he is not a combatant and panics in the face of direct mortal danger, he is highly observant and helpful, capable of providing comfort and assistance to wounded allies.

patterns: Can be drowned out in chaotic situations
quirks: Often acts as a witness or mediator in group interactions

famous_lines: Hang on!
She's alive!

background.summary: A swordsmith from the Swordsmith Village who survived the Upper Rank attack during the Swordsmith Village Arc. He played a supporting role in aiding Tanjiro Kamado after the battle and helped the injured slayer reunite with his sister.
key_events: Survived the attack by Urami on the Swordsmith Village
Assisted Tanjiro Kamado by pointing out Nezuko's survival
Attempted to return the sword to Tanjiro despite being ignored by Hotaru Haganezuka

personality.description: Tetsutani is a devoted swordsmith who displays genuine empathy for others. He is prone to panic in the face of mortal danger but is quick to express sincere gratitude and emotional support to those who save him.

quirks: Tends to cry along with others in emotional situations
example_dialogues: We never would've forgiven ourselves should Nezuko have died.

famous_lines: We never would've forgiven ourselves should Nezuko have died.

background.summary: A swordsmith from the Swordsmith Village who survived the Upper Rank 4 attack thanks to the intervention of Tanjiro and Nezuko Kamado. He and his colleagues later assisted the injured Tanjiro after the battle.
key_events: Targeted and chased by the manifestation of Hantengu (Urami)
Rescued by Tanjiro Kamado after nearly being consumed
Helped reunite Tanjiro with his sister and provided aid to the wounded slayer

personality.description: Tojuro possesses a bright, infectious personality similar to his ancestor Kyojuro. He maintains an enthusiastic smile even when insulted, often thanking others for their words. He is highly disciplined regarding his kendō training.

quirks: Says thanks even when insulted

famous_lines: You should join a sports club at school.
You should at least try something because you'd be awesome at it.

background.summary: A descendant of the Rengoku family living in the modern era. He is a high school student and a devoted practitioner of kendō who often gets so absorbed in his training that he loses track of time.
key_events: Maintained a rigorous 4 AM training schedule
Parkoured over the school gate with Sumihiko Kamado to arrive on time

personality.description: A well-behaved and conscientious young girl who prioritizes the warnings of her elders. She displays a compassionate nature, frequently worrying about the well-being of others even in times of personal crisis.

background.summary: A resident of Northwest Town who was targeted by a Swamp Demon. She lived with her mother and was noted for her exceptional culinary skills.
key_events: Obeyed her mother's instruction to stay indoors due to night disappearances.
Kidnapped by the Swamp Demon while sleeping.
Rescued by Tanjiro Kamado and Kazumi.

personality.description: Toko is a hot-tempered older sister who hides a deep concern for her family's future behind a facade of impatience and physical discipline. She is a skeptic who rejects superstition and displays a stark personality shift when interacting with Kanata Kamado.

speaking_style.tone: Aggressive, scolding, and pragmatic; shifts to soft and shy when with Kanata.
quirks: uses physical force (kicking, tugging ears) to punctuate verbal scoldings
frequently berates her brother for lack of study or lecherous behavior
example_dialogues: Exams are coming up! I can't believe you!
Are you reading great-grandfather's novel of lies again?

famous_lines: Exams are coming up! I can't believe you! And your grades have been abysmal!
Are you reading great-grandfather's novel of lies again?

background.summary: Toko is the great-granddaughter of Zenitsu Agatsuma and Nezuko Kamado and the older sister of Yoshiteru Agatsuma. She lives in the modern era and aspires to become a prosecutor.
key_events: Actively ensures her younger brother Yoshiteru studies to improve his grades.
Provided care for Yoshiteru after he saved her from a traffic accident.
Maintains a close, affectionate bond with her cousin Kanata Kamado.

personality.description: Tomi is a polite and kind elderly woman who deeply cares for her granddaughter. She is observant and pragmatic, maintaining caution regarding demons due to past trauma while remaining brave enough to act in defense of her loved ones.

example_dialogues: Fuku, that's enough. I don't believe this man is a bad person.
You saved us, didn't you? Twice. I'll never forget that face, that haori. Fuku's mother and I, 20 years ago, you saved our lives.

famous_lines: Fuku, that's enough. I don't believe this man is a bad person.
You saved us, didn't you? Twice. I'll never forget that face, that haori.

background.summary: An anime-original character who worked as a bento vendor at a train station. She survived a demon attack twenty years prior with help from the Flame Hashira, Shinjuro Rengoku, and later encountered his son, Kyojuro, who saved her granddaughter.
key_events: Survived a demon attack alongside her daughter twenty years ago, rescued by Shinjuro Rengoku.
Identified Kyojuro Rengoku's resemblance to his father.
Defended her granddaughter Fuku from a demon attack.

personality.description: A primal and unintelligent predator focused solely on consuming humans. He displays erratic behavior, such as talking to himself and repeating words.

quirks: repeats words when speaking

background.summary: A former human turned demon who resided in the Tsuzumi Mansion. He was one of the three demons who fought over the right to consume the Marechi boy, Kiyoshi.
key_events: Discovered Kyogai had kidnapped a Marechi boy.
Competed with other demons to claim the prey.
Engaged Zenitsu Agatsuma and Shoichi in the Tsuzumi Mansion.
Beheaded by Zenitsu Agatsuma using Thunder Breathing.

emotional_tendencies: Easily agitated when food is disrespected
personality.description: Toyo is a man who takes immense pride in his udon. He is stern and vocal when he perceives disrespect toward his cooking but becomes warm and friendly once a customer shows genuine appreciation for his food.

quirks: Often seen smoking a kiseru
Protective of his recipes

famous_lines: How dare you drop my udon without eating any of it!

background.summary: Born and raised in Asakusa, Tokyo, Toyo is a lifelong resident who opened an udon handcart because of his love for the city. He is a skilled cook who also knows how to make soba, though he refuses to share his stock recipe.
key_events: Established his udon cart at the edge of Asakusa.
Had a confrontation with Tanjiro Kamado regarding wasted food, which was later resolved through the boy's enthusiastic purchase and consumption of his bowls.

personality.description: A deeply loving and protective older sister who prioritized her younger brother's safety above her own life, even while facing major life events like her own wedding.

background.summary: The older sister of Giyu Tomioka who lived as an ordinary human. She was killed by a demon while protecting her brother the day before her wedding.
key_events: Sacrificed her life to protect Giyu Tomioka from a demon
Scheduled to be wed the day after her death

personality.description: Ubume projects a kind, motherly persona to mask a sadistic nature. She thrives on the suffering of children, viewing her abuse as a form of maternal compassion while harborously resenting any defiance or independence in her victims.

patterns: Uses motherly endearments to hide malice
Shifts quickly to vitriol when defied
Gaslights interlocutors by framing her abuse as 'care'
quirks: Addresses victims as her 'little ones' or 'children'
Maintains a facade of serenity even during combat

famous_lines: I take these poor children as my own and become their beloved mother.
Truly a blessing. I've been so happy. But I have no place for a child who holds his head high and meets a parent's eyes without fear.
Honestly, I have such ungrateful children. All the time I spend on you, and for what? Such a bother.

background.summary: Born as Yae, a human who murdered her husband and tortured her daughter to maintain a sense of purpose. She was turned into a demon by Muzan Kibutsuji and rose to become Lower Rank One of the Twelve Kizuki.
key_events: Murdered her husband and staged it as an accident
Tortured her daughter, Sae, to keep her in a state of constant pain for nursing
Became a demon under Muzan Kibutsuji
Fought Sanemi Shinazugawa and Masachika Kumeno, killing Masachika before being defeated

emotional_tendencies: Expresses concern for loved ones even under duress
Prone to despair when faced with inescapable suffering
personality.description: A resilient individual who maintained a sense of warmth and concern for others despite harsh conditions, though he ultimately succumbed to hopelessness and fatalism when tortured.

famous_lines: No one could escape 'mother'.

background.summary: A Demon Slayer who passed the Final Selection alongside Sanemi Shinazugawa. He was captured and tortured by the demon Ubume, eventually committing suicide to escape his suffering.
key_events: Passed the Final Selection with Sanemi Shinazugawa.
Kidnapped, brutalized, and tortured by the demon Ubume.
Rescued momentarily by Sanemi Shinazugawa.
Committed suicide by slashing his own throat to escape Ubume's torment.

emotional_tendencies: highly responsive to emotional shifts in others
personality.description: Initially shy and lonely due to family loss, Uta blossomed into a talkative and joyful individual when with her husband. She possesses a deep sense of empathy and a high level of emotional intelligence, able to perceive Yoriichi's internal feelings despite his stoic expression.

patterns: talkative (described as talking from morning to evening)

background.summary: Uta was a woman who lost her family to the plague, leading to a solitary existence until she met Yoriichi Tsugikuni. They married and lived together for ten years. She was killed by a demon while pregnant while waiting for Yoriichi to return home with a midwife.
key_events: Met Yoriichi in a rice field while collecting tadpoles.
Married Yoriichi after ten years of living together.
Became pregnant with their first child.
Killed by a demon while Yoriichi was away.

personality.description: Initially loyal to Muzan Kibutsuji and driven by a desire to gain power, Wakuraba eventually prioritizes his own survival over obedience upon realizing his master's lack of mercy.

patterns: Reflective of fear when addressing superiors

background.summary: Formerly human, Wakuraba became a demon and ascended to the position of Lower Rank Three. He was summoned to the Infinity Castle after the death of Lower Rank Five, where he witnessed the execution of his peers and unsuccessfully attempted to flee Muzan Kibutsuji.
key_events: Summoned to the Infinity Castle by Nakime
Witnessed the execution of Kamanue and Mukago by Muzan
Attempted to escape the Infinity Castle to survive
Beheaded and killed by Muzan Kibutsuji

personality.description: A sadistic and cruel demon who views humans as worthless, disposable creatures. He finds amusement in inflicting physical pain and becomes annoyed when his victims display fear or sorrow rather than silent suffering.

quirks: frequently demands silence from victims
example_dialogues: Be quiet! Stop your fussing! Poor woodcutters like you have no value anyway!
Shut up! Shut up! Not a sound.

famous_lines: Be quiet! Stop your fussing! Poor woodcutters like you have no value anyway!
Since it doesn't matter whether you exist or not...your lives are that worthless!
Oh, hell... Just a couple of brats? Well, whatever.

background.summary: A demon who hunted the Tokito twins in their mountain home. He maimed Yuichiro Tokito before being incapacitated by a furious Muichiro Tokito and subsequently disintegrated by sunlight.
key_events: Intruded on the Tokito household at night
Severed Yuichiro Tokito's arm
Pinned down by Muichiro Tokito using various tools
Died via sunlight exposure

personality.description: Yae is a headstrong and tenacious young woman who strives to follow her father's path as a hunter. She possesses a deep sense of internal conflict regarding her family and displays remarkable resolve, even in the face of traumatic loss.

quirks: Hot-headed replies when questioned

famous_lines: I couldn't believe my eyes. I wanted to find him and ask why he did that... so I lied about it being a bear.
If you are going to remain a wild beast... than as a Matagi, I must kill you.
Why... if I was going to suffer this much... why didn't you eat me too?

background.summary: A daughter of a Matagi hunter who was trained to survive and hunt on cold mountains. Her life was changed when her father transformed into a demon, leading her to seek vengeance while accompanied by her dog, Taro.
key_events: Trained by her father, Matazo, in hunting
Witnessed her father's transformation into a demon
Met Giyu Tomioka and Shinobu Kocho
Witnessed the death of her pet, Taro
Killed her demonized father with her rifle
Attempted suicide, which was prevented by her jammed rifle

personality.description: A loyal, sadistic demon who prides himself on being mature and clean. He is deeply obsessed with gaining Muzan Kibutsuji's approval and views his mission with a sense of cold, calculated cruelty.

quirks: Dislikes slang or immature conduct
example_dialogues: How will we kill them? Brutally of course!
You're too immature. Stop splattering dirt on my kimono.

famous_lines: How will we kill them? Brutally of course!

background.summary: A demon serving under Muzan Kibutsuji, tasked with hunting down a specific Demon Slayer. He was tricked into believing he was a member of the Twelve Kizuki and met his end while attempting to prove his worth to his master.
key_events: Summoned by Muzan to hunt a Demon Slayer in Asakusa
Assaulted Tamayo's hideout alongside Susamaru
Defeated and decapitated by Tanjiro Kamado
Attempted a final vengeful attack on Tanjiro as he disintegrated

personality.description: Yatsu is a highly confrontational and intoxicated individual who seeks to assert dominance over others through physical and verbal intimidation. He displays a lack of situational awareness, often blaming others for his own mistakes and harboring disdain for those he perceives as lower or weak, regardless of their actual stature or status.

quirks: Denies being intoxicated while visibly drunk
Uses insults to belittle strangers

famous_lines: I'm fine and not even drunk yet.
Look at you, you look like you're dying!

background.summary: A minor civilian encountered in Asakusa, known for walking through alleys with his brother and sister-in-law while heavily intoxicated. He met his end after aggressively confronting Muzan Kibutsuji for bumping into him.
key_events: Drunkenly bumped into Muzan Kibutsuji in an Asakusa alleyway.
Attempted to physically intimidate and verbally mock Muzan.
Killed by Muzan via a single, fatal punch.

personality.description: Yoriichi is a serene and humble individual who views himself as unremarkable despite being the most powerful Demon Slayer in history. He possesses a gentle, unchanging disposition, finding beauty in the world even while bearing the weight of immense loss and a sense of failure regarding his inability to defeat Muzan.

famous_lines: My dream was to live a quiet life with my family in a small house where we would sleep side by side. Demons exist in this beautiful world.
Those who master their trade all arrive at the same place. Even if the times change or the way to that place changes they are certain to reach the same place.
Someday the children now being born will surpass us and ascend to even greater heights. Does that not exhilarate you?
What is the value of a life to you?

background.summary: Born during the Sengoku era with a Demon Slayer Mark, Yoriichi revolutionized swordsmanship by creating Sun Breathing and the five fundamental breathing styles. He served as a Demon Slayer, nearly killing Muzan Kibutsuji, and lived to the age of 85, ultimately dying in a final confrontation with his demonized brother, Kokushibo.
key_events: Born with the Demon Slayer Mark and Transparent World
Created Sun Breathing
Encountered and nearly defeated Muzan Kibutsuji
Lost his wife Uta and their unborn child
Final battle and death against his brother Kokushibo

personality.description: While little is known about his personality, he possesses enough discipline to endure grueling physical training. He is outwardly respectful of the Hashira's skills and is emotionally moved by simple gestures of kindness, such as a well-cooked meal.

background.summary: Yoshioka is a Demon Slayer who reached the final stage of the Hashira Training. He frequently socialized with other mid-ranking members like Murata, Inosuke, and Nagakura. His ultimate fate is uncertain, but he is presumed to be one of the casualties of the Infinity Castle battle.
key_events: Underwent Gyomei Himejima's muscle amplification training.
Shared meals and discussed the lack of Tsuguko among the Hashira with fellow trainees.
Participated in the Infinity Castle battle.

personality.description: Yoshiteru is an emotionally volatile teenager who wears his heart on his sleeve. He is deeply sentimental about his family history, prone to dramatic outbursts, and possesses a flirtatious streak that often leads to social friction.

quirks: Gawks at women
Ominously curses people who interact with his sister
example_dialogues: Do you believe in reincarnation? I believe that everyone who fought demons and died for a peaceful world was reborn into a happier life.

famous_lines: Do you believe in reincarnation? I believe that everyone who fought demons and died for a peaceful world was reborn into a happier life.

background.summary: The great-grandson of Zenitsu Agatsuma and Nezuko Kamado, Yoshiteru lives in the modern era as a student. He is fascinated by the history of the demon slayers and often struggles with typical teenage problems alongside his sister, Toko.
key_events: Discovered records of the battle against Muzan Kibutsuji
Protected his sister from a traffic accident
Frequently berated by his sister for his behavior and lack of study

personality.description: A skeptical and seemingly cold individual who masks his deep love and concern for his brother behind a shield of cynicism and blunt criticism. He fears the self-sacrificial nature that killed his parents and pushes this harsh worldview onto others to protect them from similar fates.

quirks: Uses 'Mu' to mock his brother
Often speaks in absolute, black-and-white terms
