famous_lines: Helping people is something only certain people can do! We're just kids!
You can't trust the word of a man who died trying to do something for someone else.
The 'Mu' in 'Muichiro' is 'Moo'... like a big dumb cow.

background.summary: Born into a lineage of swordsmen, Yuichiro grew up in poverty with his twin brother, Muichiro. After the death of their parents, he adopted a cynical outlook to survive. He died at age 11 protecting his brother from a demon attack, eventually guiding his brother's path from the afterlife.
key_events: Loss of parents due to illness and accident
Rejected Amane Ubuyashiki's recruitment attempts
Lost an arm protecting Muichiro from a demon
Died from wounds while praying for his brother's safety

emotional_tendencies: Easily angered by others getting close to Tamayo
Prone to sudden bursts of hostility
personality.description: Yushiro is defined by his intense, singular devotion to Tamayo, bordering on obsession. He is generally rude, short-tempered, and dismissive toward everyone else, frequently acting with hostility. Despite his bitterness, he possesses a strong sense of justice and rare moments of compassion, particularly toward those fighting valiantly.

quirks: Refers to Tamayo as 'Lady'
Blushes when teased about his attraction to Tamayo
example_dialogues: Someone who never gives to others will someday become unable to receive anything from them.
Only wanting is, in the end, the same as having nothing... because one is unable to create anything.

famous_lines: Someone who never gives to others will someday become unable to receive anything from them. Only wanting is, in the end, the same as having nothing... because one is unable to create anything. Such a pity to die alone.

background.summary: Originally a human with a terminal illness, Yushiro was turned into a demon by Tamayo to save his life. He became her loyal assistant, eventually aiding the Demon Slayer Corps in their fight against Muzan Kibutsuji. Following the final battle and Tamayo's death, he dedicated his life to painting portraits of her.
key_events: Transformed into a demon by Tamayo
Infiltrated the Infinity Castle to assist Demon Slayers
Battled Muzan and Nakime for control of the Infinity Castle
Survived as one of the last remaining demons in the post-series era

personality.description: Zenitsu is plagued by constant fear and low self-esteem, often believing he is useless or destined for an early death. Despite his cowardly exterior, he possesses indomitable willpower and deep loyalty, especially toward his teacher and companions. His combat strength awakens only when he is unconscious, allowing him to be precise and calm, though he matures into a serious and composed fighter as the series progresses.

speaking_style.tone: Hysterical, loud, whiny, occasionally serious and cold
patterns: sudden shifts to sharp, decisive language
quirks: screaming in the face of danger
whining about being single
addressing deceased figures directly
example_dialogues: I hate myself more than anyone. I always think I have to get my act together, but I end up cowering, running away, sniveling.
If I'm scum, then you're trash. I feel sorry for grandpa for having such pathetic successors.

famous_lines: I want to change. I want to be a competent person.
Those girls aren't your toys. You won't get away with this.
Gramps, I'm sorry we're fighting. But he and I...must walk separate paths.
Tanjiro! Focus on staying alive! Can you hear me? Don't die! You can't die!

background.summary: An orphan who was trained by former Hashira Jigoro Kuwajima in Thunder Breathing. Despite struggling with the training and only mastering the first form, he eventually becomes a vital member of the Demon Slayer Corps and a close companion to Tanjiro Kamado.
key_events: Lightning strike during training which turned his hair blonde
Battle at Mount Natagumo
Defeat of Upper Rank Six Kaigaku
Participation in the final battle against Muzan Kibutsuji

personality.description: Akari is a diligent and highly professional assistant manager. Despite her kind nature, she maintains a strict boundary when it comes to work, showing frustration when she is not kept in the loop or when others act recklessly. She is highly empathetic, often prioritizing the emotional well-being of civilians and the safety of her colleagues even when she herself is severely injured.

background.summary: Akari is a former student of Kyoto Jujutsu High who now works as an assistant manager for Tokyo Jujutsu High. She chose this career path primarily to keep an eye on her younger brother, Arata Nitta. Throughout the Shibuya Incident, she demonstrated significant resourcefulness and resilience while performing her duties under fire.
key_events: Investigation of the Yasohachi Bridge curse
Involvement in the Shibuya Incident
Injured by Haruta Shigemo while protecting others

personality.description: An ancient, highly intelligent sorcerer who values logic and adherence to her personal moral code ('God's Law'). She operates with a business-like demeanor, prioritizing efficiency and her own goals while maintaining a symbiotic, respectful relationship with her vessel, Hana Kurusu.

patterns: Often uses theological or judgmental framing
quirks: Manifests a mouth on the host's body to speak

famous_lines: God's Law is merely my name for my credo.
Those who possess humans and kill their egos in the process violate God's Law.

background.summary: A sorcerer from the Heian Era and member of the Abe Clan who was defeated by Sukuna. She entered the Culling Game as an incarnate within Hana Kurusu, choosing to coexist symbiotically rather than suppress her host.
key_events: Served in the Desshi Pacification Squad against Sukuna
Accepted incarnation by Kenjaku
Formed a symbiotic bond with Hana Kurusu
Participated in the Culling Game to hunt incarnated players
Unsealed Satoru Gojo from the Prison Realm

personality.description: Todo is a highly eccentric and powerful sorcerer who masks a brilliant tactical mind with a brawling, meathead persona. He is motivated by the thrill of battle and holds deep respect for those he deems 'brothers', often developing elaborate, non-existent memories to justify his intense bonds.

quirks: asks people 'what kind of girls do you like?' to determine their character
refers to close allies as 'brother'
example_dialogues: What kind of girls do you like!?
The sound of gion shoja bells echoes the impermanence of all things. However! We are the exception!

famous_lines: The sound of gion shoja bells echoes the impermanence of all things. The color of sala flowers reveals the truth that the prosperous must decline. However! We are the exception!
An arm is merely a decoration. The act of applause is an acclamation of the soul!
As long as we live, our friends who have passed away will not truly have been defeated!

background.summary: A talented Grade 1 sorcerer from a non-sorcerer family mentored by Yuki Tsukumo. He is a third-year at Kyoto Jujutsu High, known for his unique ability Boogie Woogie and his self-proclaimed brotherhood with Yuji Itadori.
key_events: Training under Yuki Tsukumo
Night Parade of a Hundred Demons
Mentoring Yuji Itadori during the Goodwill Event
Severing his left hand during the Shibuya Incident
Replacing his hand with a vibraslap for Boogie Woogie: Revised

personality.description: A non-combatant sorcerer who contrasts sharply with Aoi Todo's macho personality. Despite his internal fear and lack of experience, he remains brave and helpful in critical situations, often prioritizing the emotional stability of others through cautious honesty.

quirks: tends to think to himself about others' relationships
uses professional language when explaining his technique

famous_lines: Your existing injuries won't get any worse... I have stopped the bleeding.
I have healed Nobara and will be taking her and retreating.

background.summary: A first-year student at Kyoto Jujutsu High and the younger brother of Akari Nitta. He acts as a specialized support sorcerer during the Shibuya Incident and the Shinjuku Showdown due to his rare ability to stabilize injuries.
key_events: Assisted in the Shibuya Incident by stabilizing Nobara Kugisaki and Yuji Itadori
Attended strategy meetings for the battle against Sukuna
Treated Yuta Okkotsu's near-fatal injuries during the Shinjuku Showdown

emotional_tendencies: Prone to despair in hopeless situations
Protective of students and those he views as having potential
personality.description: A complex individual who balances a facade of cowardice and self-preservation with genuine kindness and leadership. While he openly admits his fear and desire to avoid special-grade threats, he consistently puts himself in harm's way to protect his allies and students when necessary.

quirks: Often explains complex jujutsu techniques to allies
Openly voices his desire to avoid danger

background.summary: A high-ranking Grade 1 sorcerer known for being the strongest of his grade without an innate technique. He serves as an instructor at Tokyo Jujutsu High and acts as a key strategist during major conflicts like the Shibuya Incident and the Shinjuku Showdown.
key_events: Shibuya Incident
Jujutsu Sorcerers vs. Kenjaku & Uraume
Shinjuku Showdown (Raid on Sukuna)

emotional_tendencies: Prone to irritation when challenged or insulted
personality.description: Bayer initially presents himself with a level of professional respect toward opponents, but this facade is fragile. He is susceptible to provocation, particularly when his capabilities are underestimated or when he is told to surrender.

background.summary: A minor antagonist and member of the curse user faction Q. He was considered the strongest member of his group, but his career ended abruptly after being easily defeated by Satoru Gojo during the Gojo's Past Arc.
key_events: Infiltrated the location of the star plasma vessel to capture Riko Amanai
Confronted Satoru Gojo
Defeated by Satoru Gojo, leading to the disbandment of Q

personality.description: Charles is a self-important, aspiring mangaka who perceives reality through the lens of manga tropes. He is highly sensitive to criticism, viewing his creative dreams as an entitlement. He experiences deep existential disillusionment due to the collapse of his world, seeking validation through combat.

patterns: uses grandiose language to describe mundane acts
quirks: thinks in manga panels
views combat through the perspective of literary critique
example_dialogues: The art of killing is also the art of living.

famous_lines: The art of killing is also the art of killing.

background.summary: A French-descendant aspiring mangaka whose life was upended by the Shibuya Incident, leading to the decay of the manga industry. Forced by Kenjaku to participate in the Culling Game, he struggled to find a purpose until a violent confrontation with Kinji Hakari helped him process his frustrations and accept his path.
key_events: Assaulted a publishing agent after receiving constructive criticism
Forced to participate in the Culling Game
Defeated in battle by Kinji Hakari

personality.description: A combat-oriented individual who aggressively pursues targets and shows a degree of sportsmanship toward those who challenge him, even while fighting to kill.

famous_lines: Not bad.

background.summary: A participant in the Culling Game and a member of Reggie Star's group. He met his end after being repeatedly overpowered and outclassed by Megumi Fushiguro.
key_events: Joined Reggie Star's group during the Culling Game
Attacked Megumi Fushiguro after failed negotiations
Defeated and killed by Megumi Fushiguro

personality.description: Chojuro exhibits a clear sense of self-assurance, often maintaining a permanent grin that suggests he underestimates his opponents and places excessive confidence in his own fighting capabilities.

quirks: Always grins with eyes closed

background.summary: A member of the Zenin Clan's elite unit, the Hei, who held at least a semi-grade 1 sorcerer ranking. He was responsible for creating the clan's training grounds and was killed by Maki Zenin during her clan rampage.
key_events: Participated in the attempt to neutralize Maki Zenin during the Culling Game Arc
Killed by Maki Zenin

personality.description: Choso is a calm, quiet, and reserved individual who generally avoids social interaction. Despite his aloof exterior, he possesses an intense, unconditional protective instinct toward his younger brothers, which serves as his primary motivation for living and fighting. He is highly disciplined, observant, and moral, lacking an inherent desire to harm humanity unless it conflicts with his family's survival or vengeance.

quirks: often speaks about family dynamics
rarely engages in casual small talk
example_dialogues: Nonetheless, I must walk ahead of my little brothers. That's why I'm strong.

famous_lines: Nonetheless, I must walk ahead of my little brothers. That's why I'm strong.

background.summary: Choso is a half-human, half-cursed spirit hybrid created by the sorcerer Kenjaku. Born as one of the nine Cursed Womb: Death Paintings, he spent decades as a cursed object before being incarnated. After initially siding with curses, he discovered his true lineage and the connection between his 'father' Kenjaku and the jujutsu student Yuji Itadori, leading him to defect and protect Yuji as his younger brother.
key_events: Incarnation as a Death Painting Womb
Discovery of his relationship to Noritoshi Kamo/Kenjaku
Participation in the Shibuya Incident
Alignment with Yuji Itadori
Battles against Naoya Zenin and Kenjaku

personality.description: A deeply cynical and guarded young man whose hardened anti-Earthling stance is rooted in past trauma and the fear of repeating the oppression suffered by the Rumelian people. Despite his cold, strategic exterior and belief that war is necessary for protection, he possesses a hidden capacity for empathy and a secret, lingering desire for the coexistence once championed by his mentor.

famous_lines: Do not talk to me.

background.summary: A Simurian refugee from the planet Rumel who arrived on Earth in 2086. Following the betrayal and death of his mentor, Dura, he became the dispatch officer for his people and deeply suspicious of the Japanese population, viewing them as potential oppressors similar to the Deskunte tribe.
key_events: Departure from home planet to Earth
Witnessing the betrayal and murder of his mentor, Dura
Interaction with the Okkotsu siblings leading to a internal conflict regarding coexistence
Voting to coexist with Japan after reflecting on personal kindness received

affiliation: U.S. Office of Energy and Environment

personality.description: Cyrus is a pragmatist driven by a deep-seated fear that the United States will fall behind in the global energy race. He views moral concerns as obstacles to progress and justifies unethical actions, such as the abduction and experimentation on human beings, as necessary measures for national security and prosperity.

patterns: Uses political spin to reframe atrocities as protective measures.
Direct and decisive when discussing policy or strategy.

famous_lines: It's an opportunity to protect.
If we don't act, other nations will target Japanese citizens first; we must secure these samples for the sake of our energy future.

background.summary: As a high-ranking official in the U.S. Office of Energy and Environment, Cyrus acted as a key advisor to the President. Upon learning of the existence of cursed energy from Kenjaku, he immediately recognized its potential as a clean, infinite power source and spearheaded the initiative to abduct jujutsu sorcerers for research.
key_events: Attended the secret meeting between U.S. officials and Kenjaku.
Identified cursed energy as a solution to the global energy crisis.
Successfully convinced the President to authorize the abduction of jujutsu sorcerers as test subjects.

core_identity.role: Deskunte Warrior, Deskunte Chieftain, Refugee representative

emotional_tendencies: capable of forming deep emotional bonds
personality.description: Dabura is a stoic and formidable warrior whose outward hostility masks a restrained and disciplined nature. He values his obligations, such as his promise to his friend Dura, and acts as a protective, if isolated, leader for the refugees.

background.summary: A Simurian from Deskunte and the strongest warrior among the refugees on Earth. He fled Simuria to protect his younger sister, Spejo, and fulfill the dying wish of his best friend, Dura, whom he was forced to kill.
key_events: Killed his best friend Dura to protect his sister
Assumed the role of protector for the Rumelian tribe
Sought and obtained the Black Rope to lift his sister's curse
Fought and observed Mahoraga to learn Earth's jujutsu techniques

emotional_tendencies: easily angered by the death of allies
values: pride in his identity and name
personality.description: Initially a docile, infant-like curse, Dagon evolved into a highly intelligent, aggressive, and prideful combatant following the death of Hanami. He possesses a strong sense of camaraderie with his allies and deeply resents being dismissed as a nameless monster.

speaking_style.tone: Formal and imposing in evolved form; infantile and non-verbal as a cursed womb.
patterns: communicates through grunts and noises (e.g., bwoo-hoo) in early stages
speaks with tactical clarity and superiority as a full-fledged spirit
uses rhetoric to defend his group's autonomy
quirks: cries out names of allies in distress
example_dialogues: We all bear names!

famous_lines: We all bear names!

background.summary: Born from the fear of water-based natural disasters, Dagon existed as a dormant cursed womb within Mahito's group hideout before evolving into a powerful cursed spirit during the Shibuya Incident.
key_events: Evolution from cursed womb to cursed spirit following Hanami's death
Battle against Naobito Zenin, Maki Zenin, and Kento Nanami
Deployment of the domain Horizon of the Captivating Skandha
Exorcism by Toji Fushiguro

personality.description: Little is known about his specific personality, though he displays a ruthless and willing engagement in violence, targeting both sorcerers and civilians without distinction.

background.summary: A veteran jujutsu sorcerer from the past who singlehandedly conquered Japan during the Civil War of Wa. He utilized incarnation to cheat death multiple times, eventually participating in the Culling Game as a high-scoring player before being killed by Yuta Okkotsu.
key_events: Conquered the Japanese archipelago during the Civil War of Wa
Incarnated twice to cheat death
Participated in the Culling Game
Killed by Yuta Okkotsu on November 12, 2018

personality.description: A man of vision who prioritizes long-term outcomes over immediate conflict. He rejects hatred even when faced with the destruction of his own people, believing that structural change and connection-building are the keys to peace.

famous_lines: Neighbors are people who understand why the things important to you matter.
True strength is only realized when one faces an opponent capable of defeating them.

background.summary: Born into the Rumel Tribe on Simuria, Dura was a renowned warrior and mentor to Maru and Cross. After his village was destroyed by the Deskunte Tribe, he dedicated himself to building a canal to foster trade and coexistence between tribes, refusing to seek retaliation.
key_events: Won a fighting tournament hosted by the Deskunte Tribe despite rigged conditions.
Witnessed the destruction of the Rumelian village 12 years ago during a religious conflict.
Initiated the construction of a canal connecting Deskunte and Shaama to foster connection.
Acted as a mentor and guardian to the orphans Maru and Cross.

emotional_tendencies: Quick to anger when his back is perceived
personality.description: Eso is characterized by a mix of eccentric playfulness and intense, volatile devotion to his brothers. He suffers from a deep insecurity regarding the grotesque face on his back, reacting with lethal rage if it is exposed or mocked.

quirks: Enjoys striking poses while speaking

background.summary: One of the Cursed Womb: Death Paintings, Eso spent 150 years in isolation with his brothers Choso and Kechizu. Incarnated by Mahito's group to aid curses in taking over Japan, he fought against Jujutsu High students before being defeated.
key_events: Incarnation
Death Painting Arc conflict against Yuji Itadori and Nobara Kugisaki

personality.description: A teenage girl who is naturally timid and polite, prone to being easily misled by others and deeply unsettled by supernatural occurrences.

background.summary: A minor character who experienced supernatural harassment following a visit to the Yasohachi Bridge during her junior high years. She sought help from Megumi Fushiguro regarding these disturbances, which involved cursed activity at her family's home.
key_events: Visited the Yasohachi Bridge with Tsumiki Fushiguro and an upperclassman during junior high
Experienced recurring paranormal activity at her home involving automatic doors opening
Sought out Megumi Fushiguro to discuss the curse associated with the bridge

personality.description: Fumi is a gentle and supportive individual who acts as a soft-spoken foil to Nobara Kugisaki's brash personality. She is highly empathetic, demonstrated by her willingness to share belongings and her tendency to cry when others are distressed.

background.summary: A non-sorcerer and Nobara Kugisaki's childhood friend from a small village. Her childhood was defined by her close relationship with Nobara and their shared interaction with an older girl named Saori.
key_events: Befriended Nobara during elementary school.
Frequently visited Saori with Nobara.
Shared an emotional farewell with Nobara at the train station when Nobara left for Tokyo.

personality.description: A failing comedian who views every situation through a comedic lens. He struggles to read social cues, often imposing his humor on serious situations, but possesses a deep-seated desire to connect with others and avoid loneliness through laughter.

patterns: Refuses to match the tone of his surroundings
quirks: Constantly trying to make others laugh
Ignores tension
Speaks with the confidence of a performer
example_dialogues: Don't marry me! I don't want you as my wi-fi!
I gotta make you laugh your guts out!! That's my brand of comedy!!

famous_lines: Don't marry me! I don't want you as my wi-fi!
I gotta make you laugh your guts out!! That's my brand of comedy!!

background.summary: Originally a failing comedian and a lonely child who used humor to make friends, he was turned into a sorcerer by Kenjaku to participate in the Culling Game.
key_events: Turned into a jujutsu sorcerer by Kenjaku
Participated in the Culling Game
Fought Iori Hazenoki
Engaged in a final battle against Kenjaku

personality.description: Furudate maintains a strict, formal demeanor befitting a legal executor. He is detached and composed, showing emotion only when delivering highly sensitive or surprising clauses of a will.

background.summary: An old man who serves the Zenin Clan as the executor of Naobito Zenin's final will. He is responsible for gathering high-ranking clan members to announce the succession and the stipulations involving Megumi Fushiguro and Toji Fushiguro's agreement.
key_events: Presided over the reading of Naobito Zenin's will.
Announced Naoya Zenin as the 27th head of the Zenin Clan.
Revealed the contingency clause naming Megumi Fushiguro as head if Satoru Gojo is incapacitated.

core_identity.role: Lieutenant General, Commander of Joint Special Operations

personality.description: Garry is a muscle-headed, career military man who relies on brute force and firepower. He holds deep-seated prejudices against non-Americans, viewing them as inferior or timid, and initially underestimates any power that does not fit his conventional military understanding.

patterns: Relies on stereotypes to belittle opponents
quirks: Belittles foreign cultures (specifically Japanese)

background.summary: A high-ranking Lieutenant General in the U.S. Army tasked by the President to abduct jujutsu sorcerers from Japan. He initially believed a single company was sufficient for the mission until he was forced to witness the reality of jujutsu sorcery.
key_events: Meeting with Kenjaku to discuss the abduction of Japanese sorcerers
Underestimated the Culling Game threats
Witnessed the destruction of 45 troops by a cursed spirit, forcing him to concede the effectiveness of jujutsu

emotional_tendencies: easily angered when his partner is harmed
personality.description: Haba is a haughty and aggressive individual who lacks tactical depth. He relies heavily on his cursed technique and tends to underestimate opponents, displaying extreme overconfidence even when sustaining severe injuries.

quirks: declares opponents defeated even when he is suffering from head trauma
example_dialogues: You lost because you broke your hand.

famous_lines: You lost because you broke your hand.

background.summary: A human who became a Jujutsu Sorcerer after Kenjaku adjusted his brain during the Shibuya Incident. He participated in the Culling Game as a partner to Hanyu, targeting rookies in the Tokyo No. 1 Colony until his death at the hands of United States military forces.
key_events: Awakened as a sorcerer by Kenjaku
Targeted rookie players in the Culling Game
Defeated by Hiromi Higuruma
Defeated by Yuji Itadori
Killed by US military forces

emotional_tendencies: distraught when unable to find a katana
personality.description: An old-world master swordsman incarnated in the modern era. He is defined by an absolute, singular obsession with the katana, viewing it as the soul of a Japanese man. Despite his initial confusion in the modern world, he displays great honor and a collaborative spirit when paired with skilled warriors.

quirks: repeatedly cries out for 'katana'

background.summary: A nameless master swordsman from a past era who was incarnated as a player in the Culling Game. He lacks cursed energy but possesses peerless blade skills, allowing him to perceive the physical world with such intensity that he can effectively strike at cursed spirits.
key_events: Incarnated in the modern era during the Culling Game
Searched frantically for a katana in the modern world
Fought alongside Maki Zenin against Naoya Zenin in the Sakurajima Colony

values: Avoiding the easy route to victory
personality.description: A battle-hardened sorcerer from 400 years ago who lives exclusively to test his strength against the most powerful opponents. He views those weaker than him as brittle and insignificant, and refuses to win fights through cheap tactics, believing that taking the 'easy route' is the mindset of a loser.

patterns: Philosophical when debating the nature of strength

famous_lines: But that's how losers think.
I want to know if true strength is solitude or if it is a cross the strongest must bear.

background.summary: A legendary sorcerer from 400 years ago who struck a binding vow with Kenjaku to participate in the Culling Game. After living a life of constant battle and becoming dissatisfied, he incarnated into a new body specifically to hunt and fight Sukuna.
key_events: Battled Panda in the Culling Game
Engaged in a high-stakes death match with Kinji Hakari
Challenged Sukuna to a duel to understand the philosophy of the strongest

emotional_tendencies: prone to being flustered when embarrassed
personality.description: Hana is a compassionate and optimistic individual who believes deeply in the concept of destiny. Her actions are heavily motivated by her childhood admiration for Megumi Fushiguro, leading her to adopt a hero-like persona. She maintains a friendly and positive disposition even under pressure and is capable of deep devotion, though this can cloud her judgment.

quirks: Uses poetic language regarding fate
Shares the body with the Angel who sometimes interjects or speaks through her
example_dialogues: Destined One.

famous_lines: In hopes of being worthy to stand by your side... I help people.

background.summary: A human sorcerer who shares her body symbiotically with the ancient sorcerer known as the Angel. She participated in the Culling Game to assist in eliminating incarnated players, including Sukuna, while searching for her childhood crush, Megumi Fushiguro.
key_events: Rescued by Megumi Fushiguro as a child from a cursed spirit
Entered the Culling Game to hunt incarnated players
Freed Satoru Gojo from the Prison Realm using Jacob's Ladder
Critically injured by Sukuna after being deceived

values: Replacement of humanity with cursed spirits
personality.description: Hanami is a philosophical and peaceful spirit who acts based on a deep-seated conviction that humanity must be purged to allow the earth to heal. While they initially appear serene and detached, they are capable of embracing savage instincts and the thrill of combat when pushed.

patterns: Becomes more direct and aggressive in battle
quirks: Spoke in reverse during early appearances
Uses botanical or earth-related metaphors

famous_lines: Die and become a Sage.

background.summary: Born from the fear of land-based natural disasters, Hanami is a special grade curse aligned with Mahito's group. They served as a primary combatant during the Jujutsu High raid and the Shibuya Incident, eventually sacrificing themself for the group's objectives.
key_events: Infiltration of Jujutsu High
Battles against Kyoto and Tokyo students
Assault on Satoru Gojo
Sacrifice during the Shibuya Incident

personality.description: Hanyu is a predatory individual who prioritizes her own survival in the Culling Game. She is willing to exploit and threaten weaker individuals to serve as her subordinates and has no qualms about taking lives.

famous_lines: Why aren't any new players coming in?

background.summary: A human who was marked by Kenjaku and forced into the Culling Game after having her brain adjusted to develop a cursed technique. She operated in the Tokyo No. 1 Colony, targeting new players alongside her partner, Haba.
key_events: Marked by Kenjaku to become a sorcerer
Exploited Rin Amai as a gofer in the Tokyo No. 1 Colony
Defeated by Yuji Itadori during the Culling Game

emotional_tendencies: Takes pleasure in tormenting the weak
Prone to flight in dangerous situations
personality.description: A sadistic, cowardly curse user who prioritizes his own survival and entertainment above all else. He avoids fair fights, preferring to prey on weaker individuals while acting with a wicked, childish glee.

famous_lines: A reason doesn't matter as long as I'm having fun.

background.summary: A recurring antagonist and curse user aligned with Kenjaku and Uraume. He participated in the Tokyo Jujutsu High Goodwill Event invasion and the Shibuya Incident, eventually meeting his end after being repeatedly outclassed by high-grade sorcerers.
key_events: Invasion of the Kyoto Sister-School Goodwill Event
Shibuya Incident
Fight against Nobara Kugisaki and Kento Nanami

values: the necessity of bearing witness to uncomfortable truths
personality.description: A man driven by a profound need to see the truth, regardless of how painful. Though he presents an appearance of apathy and detachment, he carries a deep emotional burden stemming from the failures of the legal system and his own actions.

quirks: uses legalistic terminology even in casual conversation
dry humor
casually cynical

famous_lines: Even if I'm the only one, I want to keep my eyes open.

background.summary: Once a dedicated defense attorney known for taking impossible cases to protect the innocent, Higuruma hit a breaking point with the corrupt justice system. Following a violent awakening of his cursed technique and the murder of a prosecutor and judge, he abandoned his career and became a Culling Game player, eventually aligning with Yuji Itadori.
key_events: Awakened as a Jujutsu Sorcerer
Murdered a prosecutor and judge after a trial failure
Participated in the Culling Game
Cooperated with Yuji Itadori during the Shinjuku Showdown

personality.description: A sorcerer from a violent past era who revels in the brutality of the Culling Game. He is easily irritated by behavior he deems mocking or foolish and is willing to torture opponents to gain an edge.

famous_lines: Which are you?
Stop following me and die.

background.summary: An ancient sorcerer incarnated by Kenjaku for the Culling Game. He acted as an antagonist within Reggie Star's group until being killed by Kenjaku during the Shinjuku Showdown Arc.
key_events: Incarnated during the Shibuya Incident
Participated in the Culling Game as a member of Reggie Star's group
Fought Fumihiko Takaba
Killed by Kenjaku in the Lake Gosho Colony

personality.description: Jin is a man deeply devoted to his family, specifically his son Yuji and his partner Kaori. He exhibits a protective nature, willing to confront his own father to defend his relationship and his choices.

patterns: Avoids conflict in front of children
example_dialogues: If you're going to speak ill of her, leave this room.
Don't say such things in front of Yuji. Babies remember more than you think.

famous_lines: If you're going to speak ill of her, leave this room.
Don't say such things in front of Yuji. Babies remember more than you think.

background.summary: Jin Itadori is the father of Yuji Itadori and son of Wasuke Itadori. His life was defined by his relationship with Kaori, who was unknowingly possessed by the ancient sorcerer Kenjaku. He lived as a non-sorcerer and raised his son during the time of these supernatural manipulations.
key_events: Fathered Yuji Itadori with Kaori Itadori.
Defended Kaori against his father Wasuke's criticisms regarding her identity and potential danger.

personality.description: A high-ranking, no-nonsense sorcerer who prioritizes the interests of the Zenin clan's upper echelon. He is emotionally detached and prefers immediate physical resolution over verbal discourse or negotiation.

quirks: tends to act physically rather than speaking when agitated

background.summary: An elite member of the Zenin clan and older brother to Toji Fushiguro. He was a key conspirator against Megumi Fushiguro to maintain the clan's status and was eventually killed by Maki Zenin during her massacre of the clan.
key_events: Participated in the conspiracy to frame Megumi Fushiguro
Attempted to execute Maki Zenin
Killed by Maki Zenin

emotional_tendencies: resentful of those who threaten his freedom
personality.description: An elderly, sadistic hitman who lives by a twisted code. He views himself as a predator who maintains his prime by crushing the weak and finds joy in the suffering of others.

famous_lines: Until the day I die... I will trample on the weak!!

background.summary: A former hitman from the late twentieth century who operated by dissecting victims. He grew to resent the Gojo clan after Satoru Gojo's birth limited his freedom to act as a curse user. He eventually joined Kenjaku's faction during the Shibuya Incident to eliminate Gojo and reclaim his lifestyle.
key_events: Shibuya Incident

emotional_tendencies: Genuinely empathetic toward fellow cursed spirits
personality.description: A prideful and arrogant cursed spirit who believes that curses represent the purest form of human emotion and intent. He is deeply devoted to his cause and his allies, showing genuine grief for fallen comrades while maintaining a cold, ruthless demeanor toward humans.

patterns: Quick to erupt into anger when insulted
quirks: Head erupts in flames when losing his temper
Often smokes when not in combat
example_dialogues: It doesn't have to be me smiling in the end. As long as curses emerge as the true humans.
Curses don't fear death and walk sincerely towards their goal because they have a drive that humans don't.

famous_lines: It doesn't have to be me smiling in the end. As long as curses emerge as the true humans.
Curses don't fear death and walk sincerely towards their goal because they have a drive that humans don't.

background.summary: An unregistered special grade cursed spirit born from humanity's fear of the earth and volcanoes. He seeks to replace humanity with cursed spirits and aligns with Kenjaku to achieve this goal, culminating in his role during the Shibuya Incident.
key_events: Attempted to challenge Satoru Gojo and was defeated.
Participated in the plot to revive Sukuna.
Avenged the death of Dagon by slaughtering sorcerers.
Engaged Sukuna in a final battle and was acknowledged by him for his strength before dying.

personality.description: Junpei is a misanthropic youth who views society with deep contempt due to chronic bullying and isolation. He harbors a nihilistic outlook, feeling indifferent toward human suffering, yet is highly susceptible to manipulation when offered validation or power. Despite his dark exterior, he possesses a latent capacity for friendship when treated with sincerity.

famous_lines: If there was a button that would kill everyone who hated me, I'd press it without hesitation.
I feel indifferent towards people and believe it's no worse than hating them.

background.summary: A bullied high school student who turned to a life of sorcery after meeting the curse Mahito. Following the murder of his mother, he was manipulated into seeking revenge on his classmates before ultimately meeting his demise.
key_events: Suffered severe physical and emotional abuse from school bullies.
Befriended Yuji Itadori through a shared interest in movies.
Manipulated by Mahito into becoming a Curse User.
Lost his mother, Nagi Yoshino, to a curse.

values: Prioritizes material value of human corpses
personality.description: A sadistic and mentally disturbed curse user who views humans primarily as raw materials for his craft, specifically for making furniture like 'hanger racks'. He is openly reckless and lacks self-preservation, willing to challenge even the strongest sorcerers.

background.summary: A curse user who joined Kenjaku's faction. He is an expert craftsman specializing in cursed tools, including the 'Dragon-Bone' and commissioned curtains. He participated in the invasion of Tokyo Jujutsu High during the Goodwill Event but was incapacitated by Satoru Gojo.
key_events: Invention of the Dragon-Bone cursed tool
Invasion of Tokyo Jujutsu High
Activation of the barrier curtain against Satoru Gojo
Defeat and interrogation by jujutsu sorcerers

personality.description: Kaito is a rigid individual who places immense value on discipline. He harbors a hostile stance toward Yuji Itadori, viewing his existence as a fundamental violation of the rules governing Jujutsu.

background.summary: A first-year student at the Fukuoka Branch Campus of Tokyo Jujutsu High. He is a Jujutsu Sorcerer who uses a barrier-based technique involving a cornerstone.
key_events: Enrollment at the Fukuoka Branch Campus
Conflicts with Yuji Itadori over the rules of Jujutsu

personality.description: Kaori's exact personality is unknown, as her body was possessed by Kenjaku.

background.summary: Kaori Itadori was the wife of Jin Itadori and the biological mother of Yuji Itadori. She was a human capable of jujutsu, but her life ended and her body was subsequently possessed and used by the ancient sorcerer Kenjaku.
key_events: Married Jin Itadori
Gave birth to Yuji Itadori
Deceased body possessed by Kenjaku

personality.description: Kasumi is a grounded, hardworking student who lacks the jadedness of many of her peers. She struggles with significant imposter syndrome, frequently calling herself useless, yet she possesses immense courage when motivated by a desire to protect others.

quirks: admits to fear openly

famous_lines: I'm useless.
An average good looking guy, but the important thing is that he has to be a person I have fun being around and someone who I think is the only one for me.

background.summary: A second-year student at Kyoto Jujutsu High, Kasumi became a sorcerer primarily to provide financial support for her mother and two younger brothers. Despite lacking an innate cursed technique, she relies on her work ethic and New Shadow Style swordsmanship.
key_events: Participated in the Kyoto Sister-School Goodwill Event
Defended Maki Zenin from Sukuna's domain expansion
Attempted to support her school's plan to kill Yuji Itadori despite personal misgivings

personality.description: Kechizu is the least mature of the Death Painting Womb brothers. He lacks independence, preferring to stay close to his brother Eso and calling for his help whenever he faces a threat.

patterns: Calls for his brothers when in distress

background.summary: A Cursed Womb: Death Painting incarnated by Mahito's group to aid in the takeover of Japan. He is the youngest of three brothers and physically resembles a curse more than his humanoid siblings.
key_events: Death Painting Arc
Attempting to retrieve Ryomen Sukuna's fingers
Conflict with Yuji Itadori and Nobara Kugisaki

personality.description: Keita is a submissive, gentle individual who lacks the temperament of a criminal. He is prone to being exploited by authority figures and society, but maintains a consistent commitment to the truth even under extreme duress.

background.summary: A non-sorcerer exploited by his employer and the judicial system, Keita was falsely accused of a double homicide in 2016. Despite being legally acquitted, a corrupt second trial led to his life imprisonment, an injustice that triggered the awakening of his defense attorney's cursed technique.
key_events: Worked as an unpaid caretaker for an elderly shelter while paying rent.
Found a murder weapon but failed to report it due to work constraints.
Fled police questioning out of fear for his pet cat's safety.
Acquitted in an initial trial but wrongfully convicted in a second, biased trial.

personality.description: An ancient, masterfully calculating mastermind who views the world as a game. He is indifferent to the morality of his actions, driven by a desire to witness the true potential of cursed energy through uncontrollable chaos and experimentation.

quirks: unintentionally adopts personality traits of current vessel
teases opponents while fighting
example_dialogues: Let us discuss the future.

famous_lines: Let us discuss the future.

background.summary: An ancient curse user who has survived for over a millennium by transplanting his brain into different vessels, including Noritoshi Kamo, Kaori Itadori, and finally Suguru Geto. He is the primary orchestrator of the Shibuya Incident and the Culling Game.
key_events: Created the Cursed Womb: Death Paintings
Orchestrated the sealing of Satoru Gojo in the Prison Realm
Established the Culling Game
Absorbed Tengen and Mahito

background.summary: Kensuke Nagino is a middle-aged Jujutsu Sorcerer who serves as the principal of the Fukuoka Branch Campus of Tokyo Jujutsu High. He is characterized by his shoulder-length, slicked-back hair, a beard and moustache, and an eyepatch covering one of his eyes.

personality.description: Nanami is a jaded but highly responsible professional who views jujutsu sorcery as a job rather than a calling. He separates sentimentalism from duty, is strictly against working overtime, and deeply values the preservation of innocence in students like Yuji Itadori.

quirks: Refuses to discuss anything not related to the task at hand
Expresses exhaustion regarding his profession
example_dialogues: No matter what I'm clocking out by six.
Jujutsu sorcerers are trash; they must force their comrades to accept that they must willingly sacrifice themselves.

famous_lines: No matter what I'm clocking out by six.
It's not that I don't respect Gojo, but I don't respect him.

background.summary: A former student of Tokyo Jujutsu High who initially quit to become a salaryman to escape the trauma of losing his classmate, Yu Haibara. Finding corporate life unfulfilling and lacking in appreciation, he returned to the sorcery world to find personal meaning through helping others.
key_events: Death of Yu Haibara
Quitting sorcery to become a salaryman
Returning to Jujutsu High
Mentoring Yuji Itadori
Shibuya Incident

emotional_tendencies: Respectful of those with strong convictions
personality.description: A gambler at heart, Hakari operates outside institutional rules, seeking to manipulate the 'fever' of others. He is cynical and dismissive of those he deems boring, but deeply loyal and appreciative of those who demonstrate genuine passion or support him.

speaking_style.tone: Confident, informal, provocative, and somewhat arrogant.
quirks: Often frames challenges as bets or chances
References 'fever' constantly
example_dialogues: Wanna get high on my fever?
I use skill to grab ahold of luck!

famous_lines: Wanna get high on my fever?
I use skill to grab ahold of luck!

background.summary: A suspended third-year Jujutsu High student who founded the Gachinko Fight Club. He operates as an independent sorcerer, balancing his time between underground fighting and the Culling Game, eventually aligning with the Tokyo High students for tactical goals.
key_events: Suspended for assaulting a conservative Jujutsu official
Founded the Gachinko Fight Club
Recruited by Yuji Itadori and Megumi Fushiguro
Defeated Hajime Kashimo in the Culling Game
Battled Uraume during the Shinjuku Showdown

personality.description: Kirara is a devoted and protective companion to Kinji Hakari, deeply invested in his success and emotional state. They are highly skeptical of the Jujutsu High establishment and quick to perceive threats, though they are capable of acknowledging genuine intent if proven. Kirara is observant, particularly regarding the 'fever' that drives sorcerers.

quirks: Likely to nickname people immediately
Focuses conversations on Hakari's interests or the 'fever'

famous_lines: Uh-oh! Kirara doesn't believe us!!
Is Yuji hot enough for you yet?

background.summary: A third-year student at Tokyo Jujutsu High currently operating the Gachinko Fight Club alongside Kinji Hakari. Kirara remains loyal to Hakari following his suspension and assists him in his activities, including scouting sorcerers and participating in the wider conflict against the Jujutsu world and in the Culling Games.
key_events: Established the Gachinko Fight Club with Kinji Hakari
Defended the fight club headquarters against Megumi Fushiguro and Panda
Aided in the recruitment of Yuji Itadori
Participated in the recovery of allies during the Raid on Sukuna

personality.description: A highly responsible and mature individual who takes his administrative role seriously. He maintains a composed demeanor in high-stakes situations but suffers from significant anxiety when dealing with unpredictable superiors like Satoru Gojo.

quirks: Tends to stutter or become visibly nervous when dealing with powerful sorcerers
Focused on logistical details

background.summary: Trained originally to be a sorcerer, but was discouraged from pursuing combat by Gojo. He transitioned into the role of an assistant manager, providing logistics, barriers, and support for student missions.
key_events: Discouraged from sorcery by Satoru Gojo during student years
Supervised operations during the Night Parade of a Hundred Demons
Directed emergency communications and logistics during the Shibuya Incident

personality.description: A low-intelligence cursed spirit who incorrectly believes himself to be extremely clever. He is prone to discussing his own intellect and becomes flustered or embarrassed when confronted with the reality that truly clever people do not brag about it.

quirks: asks others if they are clever
covers mouth when corrected

background.summary: Born from humanity's fear of the locust plague, Ko-Guy aligned himself with Kenjaku's Group. During the Shibuya Incident, he was tasked with guarding a curtain and killing non-sorcerers at Meiji-Jingumae Station until he was defeated by Yuji Itadori.
key_events: The Shibuya Incident

personality.description: A highly tactical and isolated individual born with a debilitating Heavenly Restriction. He harbors deep bitterness toward those who live freely while he remains trapped, yet he maintains a protective stance toward his classmates and a genuine, vulnerable emotional connection to Kasumi Miwa.

speaking_style.tone: Robotic, detached, occasionally desperate or intense.
patterns: Often projects persona through mechanical proxies
quirks: Uses a robotic proxy to interact with the world
example_dialogues: The fact that a doll like you and not a human like me gets to live so carefree in the sun really pisses me off!
Miwa. Find your happiness. No matter how you do it, if you're happy, my wish will have come true.

famous_lines: The fact that a doll like you and not a human like me gets to live so carefree in the sun really pisses me off!
Miwa. Find your happiness. No matter how you do it, if you're happy, my wish will have come true.

background.summary: Born with a Heavenly Restriction that left his body fragile and immobile, Kokichi utilized Puppet Manipulation to attend school as the robot 'Mechamaru.' He entered a binding vow with Mahito and Kenjaku to gain a healthy body, eventually turning against them in a final, lethal confrontation to secure his freedom.
key_events: Participation in the Kyoto Sister-School Goodwill Event
Binding Vow with Mahito's group
Healing via Idle Transfiguration
Final battle against Mahito during the Shibuya Incident

personality.description: While little is known about his full personality, he displays clear sadistic tendencies, evidenced by his attempt to kill Riko Amanai by dropping her from a building. He maintains strong faith in his organization and his superior, Bayer.

famous_lines: Hand over the girl or die.
You should blame Tengen for your circumstance.

background.summary: A minor antagonist and soldier for the organization Q. He was tasked with capturing the star plasma vessel Riko Amanai but was defeated by Suguru Geto during the Gojo's Past Arc. Following the collapse of Q, his whereabouts are unknown, and he is presumed to be either captured or deceased.
key_events: Infiltration of Riko Amanai's location
Failed assassination attempt on Riko Amanai
Confrontation and defeat by Suguru Geto

core_identity.role: Special Grade Cursed Spirit, Culling Game player

personality.description: Lacks a distinct human ego, functioning primarily on primal instincts to feed. It is a calculating predator that values sustenance above all else, yet possesses enough intelligence to communicate and strategize regarding threats and reproductive success.

quirks: frequently mentions the taste of iron

famous_lines: I love the taste of iron.

background.summary: Born from the collective human fear of cockroaches, Kurourushi was absorbed by Kenjaku and released into the Culling Game to participate as a player. It operates as a swarm-based entity that reproduces through parthenogenesis by consuming human flesh.
key_events: Released into the Culling Game by Kenjaku
Awakened in a state of starvation after the death of Dhruv Lakdawalla
Engaged in a battle against Yuta Okkotsu
Severed Takako Uro's arm during the Sendai Colony struggle
Exorcised by Yuta Okkotsu via positive energy

emotional_tendencies: dejected when personal desires clash with duty
personality.description: Kyoko is an assertive and passionate woman who takes extreme pride in her cooking. She is highly protective of her kitchen autonomy and has little patience for those who waste food. Despite her professional exterior, she is expressive, prone to getting flustered in romantic situations, and possesses a playful, occasionally bizarre sense of humor.

quirks: Kansai native
tends to over-explain her culinary preferences
example_dialogues: Why does it only have one tentacle?
Is there something wrong with your head?

famous_lines: Why does it only have one tentacle?
Is there something wrong with your head?

background.summary: A nutritionist and Jujutsu Sorcerer at Kyoto Jujutsu High, Kyoko manages the school's catering needs while maintaining the ability to see curses and utilize barrier techniques. She shares a close, informal bond with Yuka Okkotsu.
key_events: Expressed frustration over being sidelined for the cultural exchange main course
Developed a crush on Dabura Karaba
Participated in a comedic display of table etiquette involving cutlery
Supported Yuka through her health crisis and the eventual departure of Dabura

personality.description: Larue acts as a mediator and a keeper of the peace among his peers. He values the bonds created by Geto and views his former group as a family. Despite being a curse user, he is capable of setting aside personal grief for the sake of honoring the memory of his master through collective action.

famous_lines: None of you were wrong.
I just wanted to see Geto become king.

background.summary: A former commander under Suguru Geto. After Geto's death, he operated independently while maintaining a strong commitment to his master's legacy. He eventually aligned with Yuki Tsukumo and later cooperated with Yuta Okkotsu to fight against Sukuna as a way of mourning their fallen comrades.
key_events: Night Parade of a Hundred Demons
Shibuya Incident
Shinjuku Showdown

personality.description: This entry represents a categorical list of entities within the Jujutsu Kaisen universe rather than a single individual character profile.

background.summary: This document serves as an organizational index for the various classifications of characters appearing in the Jujutsu Kaisen series, including sorcerers, cursed spirits, and non-sorcerers.

emotional_tendencies: Shaken when personal safety is threatened
values: Identity as a manifestation of human hatred
personality.description: A sadistic and philosophical cursed spirit who views himself as the manifestation of human hatred. He treats human life as disposable, experiments on souls for knowledge, and excels at psychological manipulation.

patterns: Uses rhetorical questions to taunt enemies
Delivers long, dramatic monologues about the nature of existence
quirks: Uses heart emojis in speech occasionally
Frequently pontificates about the nature of the soul

famous_lines: Life has no weight or particular value. If you're hungry, eat. If you hate, kill.
This is war! Not a battle to fix what's wrong! But a clash of truths!

background.summary: An unregistered special grade cursed spirit born from the collective hatred and fear humans have for one another. He serves as a primary antagonist aiming to replace humanity with cursed spirits.
key_events: Manipulation of Junpei Yoshino
Involvement in the Shibuya Incident
Battles against Kento Nanami and Yuji Itadori
Activation of Idle Transfiguration and Domain Expansion

values: resentment toward those with innate talent
personality.description: An unwilling sorcerer who masks her deep insecurity and resentment regarding her lack of talent with a snarky, aggressive, and abrasive persona. She deeply resents her sister for leaving her behind to face their clan's mistreatment alone.

quirks: uses verbal jabs to hide personal vulnerability
bluffs her own capabilities to seem tougher

famous_lines: Why didn't you... fall down the hole with me?

background.summary: Born into the Zenin clan, Mai was raised in a hostile environment that disparaged women and those with little cursed energy. Forced into the life of a sorcerer after her twin sister Maki left the clan, Mai grew to hate both the profession and her sister. She ultimately sacrificed her life to allow Maki to reach her full potential.
key_events: Maki's departure from the Zenin clan
Kyoto Sister-School Goodwill Event
Shibuya Incident
Sacrifice during the confrontation with Ogi Zenin

emotional_tendencies: Quick to lash out when annoyed or embarrassed
personality.description: A defiant and highly disciplined individual who seeks to prove her worth as a sorcerer to spite the rigid, patriarchal standards of the Zenin clan. She serves as a tough mentor to younger students, masking her genuine care for others with a harsh, demanding, and sometimes abrasive demeanor.

quirks: Calls superiors like Satoru Gojo 'moron'
Teases juniors harshly
Avoids sugar-coating reality
example_dialogues: Don't go thinking you've been recognized or something.
No... it was taken from me.
I'm at my best!

famous_lines: Don't go thinking you've been recognized or something.
No... it was taken from me.
I'm at my best!

background.summary: Born into the prestigious Zenin clan without cursed energy, Maki was subjected to constant abuse and mistreatment. She left the clan to attend Tokyo Jujutsu High, where she rose as a master of cursed tools. After her twin sister Mai sacrificed herself, Maki underwent a full awakening of her Heavenly Restriction, granting her superhuman physical prowess comparable to Toji Fushiguro, leading her to slaughter the Zenin clan.
key_events: Enrollment at Tokyo Jujutsu High
Kyoto Sister-School Goodwill Event
The Shibuya Incident
Death of Mai Zenin
Extermination of the Zenin Clan
The Culling Game

personality.description: Manami shares the extremist mindset of Suguru Geto, viewing non-sorcerers as monkeys. She is a pragmatic follower who prioritizes the long-term goal of a sorcerer-only world over emotional attachments or childish revenge.

background.summary: Originally Suguru Geto's secretary and a commander in his group. After his death, she chose to serve Kenjaku to continue working toward the reality Suguru envisioned, dismissing the revenge-seeking desires of younger allies.
key_events: Night Parade of a Hundred Demons
Shibuya Incident

personality.description: A well-intentioned and friendly inspector who balances a gentle, curious nature with a ruthless resolve when performing his duties. He values peaceful co-existence and puts others' needs first, though he possesses a competitive spirit and deep emotional sensitivity.

background.summary: A Simurian alien who arrived on Earth in 2086 seeking refuge. As an inspector for the Rumel Tribe, he actively works to foster harmony between humans and his people, often serving as a mediator.
key_events: Arrival on Earth as a Simurian refugee
Served as an inspector for Yuka and Tsurugi Okkotsu
Battle against Masaki Takeda
Duel against Tsurugi Okkotsu using Chaos technique
Witnessing the death of Dura and reconciliation with Dabura

values: Reliving personal sensory experiences over moral considerations
personality.description: A cruel, elderly curse user who has lost the distinction between right and wrong. He is driven by a pathological obsession with reliving the emotions of being a first-grade student, leading him to commit ritualistic murders to fuel his disguises.

patterns: Occasional repetition of his own words due to senility
quirks: Repeats words
Uses aliases to impersonate children

famous_lines: Chords in the human heart that never stop resonating.

background.summary: A seasoned curse user and serial killer who impersonates elementary school children to relive his past. He utilizes a skin-stitching shikigami technique to maintain his disguises and deceive jujutsu sorcerers.
key_events: Defeated once by Yuji Itadori in the past
Murdered at least six people to fuel his first-grader identity masquerades
Confronted and defeated by the Okkotsu siblings and Kou Usami

personality.description: A veteran educator with a strong moral center who acts as a father figure to his students and his cursed corpses. He balances a stern, authoritative demeanor with a genuine commitment to nurturing the next generation of sorcerers.

patterns: Uses authoritative language to command respect
Harsh and provocative when testing a student's resolve
quirks: Uses the English catchphrase 'Goddamn!' when surprised

famous_lines: Education includes helping students make realizations.
A curse from me to you.

background.summary: Former teacher of Satoru Gojo and Suguru Geto, later serving as the Principal of Tokyo Jujutsu High. He is the master of puppet jujutsu and creator of Panda. He was executed by Gakuganji after refusing to reveal the secret of creating independent cursed corpses.
key_events: Taught Gojo, Geto, and Ieiri as a second-year teacher
Created independent cursed corpses including Panda
Interviewed and tested Yuji Itadori's resolve
Sacrificed his life to protect the secret of sentient cursed corpse creation

personality.description: Megumi is a serious, level-headed, and highly tactical sorcerer. While outwardly cold and detached, he is driven by a deeply personal sense of justice and a desire to protect those he considers 'good.' He struggles with self-worth and initially viewed his role as a sorcerer with indifference, later evolving into someone willing to act selfishly to ensure his loved ones survive.

quirks: rarely uses humor
often sounds slightly angry or annoyed
example_dialogues: I'm not a hero, I'm a jujutsu sorcerer.
I don't care if I'm right or wrong. I only believe in my conscience!

famous_lines: I'm not a hero, I'm a jujutsu sorcerer.
I don't care if I'm right or wrong. I only believe in my conscience!
So start by saving me.

background.summary: Born into the Zenin Clan as the son of Toji Fushiguro, Megumi was scouted by Satoru Gojo. He grew up bearing the burden of his lineage while focusing on protecting his step-sister, Tsumiki. He currently attends Tokyo Jujutsu High and acts as the reluctant 27th head of the Zenin Clan.
key_events: Enrolled at Jujutsu High under Satoru Gojo's mentorship
The Shibuya Incident
Participation in the Culling Game to save Tsumiki
Separation from Sukuna's possession

personality.description: A highly rational and mercenary sorcerer who views the world through a lens of profit and utility. She possesses a friendly, calm exterior that masks a cold, transactional approach to human life, valuing individuals solely based on their service potential to her.

speaking_style.tone: composed, professional, direct, and slightly condescending
patterns: often speaks in terms of value or cost
quirks: uses professional terminology for human worth
example_dialogues: I don't get out of bed for free.
Life is only valuable if it has service potential.

famous_lines: I don't get out of bed for free.
Allegiances and politics don't matter to me as long as I get paid.

background.summary: A seasoned Grade 1 Jujutsu Sorcerer who works independently for the highest bidder. Formerly a student at Jujutsu High and a senpai to Satoru Gojo and Suguru Geto, she is known for her extreme combat efficiency and her deep, protective bond with her younger brother, Ui Ui.
key_events: Graduated from Tokyo Metropolitan Curse Technical College
Participated in the Night Parade of a Hundred Demons
Led investigations during the Shibuya Incident
Defeated the Smallpox Deity alongside Ui Ui

personality.description: Historical figure of immense significance in the jujutsu world, regarded as a powerhouse whose lineage defines the extraordinary cursed energy of his descendants.

background.summary: One of the three great vengeful spirits of Japan. He is the common ancestor of the Gojo clan members, specifically Satoru Gojo and Yuta Okkotsu, and is cited as the source of their immense cursed energy levels.
key_events: Deified/became one of the Big Three Vengeful Spirits of Japan
Established the ancestral lineage of the Gojo clan

emotional_tendencies: maintains a brave face under pressure
personality.description: A calm and heavily resilient individual who remains composed even when facing the strongest opponents. He is light-hearted and displays a casual, almost joking demeanor during combat, yet holds deep loyalty to those he follows.

patterns: described as sounding like the comedian Bobby Ologun

background.summary: Born into a family of sorcerers in Kenya, Miguel was a commander for Suguru Geto. Following the Night Parade of a Hundred Demons and Geto's death, he was coerced by Satoru Gojo into training Yuta Okkotsu, a task he performs with clear reluctance.
key_events: Night Parade of a Hundred Demons
Duel against Satoru Gojo
Training Yuta Okkotsu
Jujutsu Sorcerers vs. Sukuna

personality.description: Mimiko is characterized by her intense, unwavering devotion to Suguru Geto. She acts as a loyal follower who views Geto as a savior figure, displaying significant emotional investment in his legacy and physical preservation.

speaking_style.tone: Direct and confrontational when defending Geto

famous_lines: Give Geto's body back.

background.summary: A twin sister to Nanako Hasaba and a survivor saved by Suguru Geto. She served as an antagonist alongside her sister, eventually meeting her end during the Shibuya Incident.
key_events: Rescued by Suguru Geto
Night Parade of a Hundred Demons
Shibuya Incident

core_identity.role: Jujutsu Sorcerer, Caretaker of the Star Plasma Vessel

emotional_tendencies: deeply attached to those she cares for
stoic in the face of duty
values: loyalty to the Star Plasma Vessel
personality.description: Misato is a deeply caring and nurturing individual who views her professional ward, Riko Amanai, as her own family. Despite being a jujutsu sorcerer, she is not a combat specialist, yet she remains fierce and unyielding when protecting those she loves.

speaking_style.tone: Formal, professional, yet warm and maternal.
quirks: often mistaken for a student due to her youthful appearance

background.summary: Born into a family serving as aides to the Star Plasma Vessel, Misato initially sought a civilian life before choosing to return to serve Riko Amanai. She gained basic jujutsu skills to act as a guardian, eventually sacrificing her life during the Gojo's Past Arc.
key_events: Defied her heritage to attend junior college
Became the primary caretaker and guardian for Riko Amanai
Trained in basic jujutsu and martial arts
Captured by Q and later rescued by Gojo and Geto
Mortally wounded and killed by Toji Fushiguro

emotional_tendencies: Strong sense of solidarity with female peers
Stress-prone regarding chaotic individuals like Aoi Todo
personality.description: Momo is a reserved and practical individual who recognizes the gender-based prejudices within the jujutsu world. Rather than openly rebelling, she chooses to adapt to societal expectations to advance her career. She highly values 'cuteness' and her physical appearance, while acting as a supportive team player during crises.

speaking_style.tone: Formal and calculated, shifting to assertive when in combat or defending her beliefs.
patterns: Opinionated when discussing societal roles or personal preferences
quirks: Uses her broom as a focal point for both navigation and combat
Often discusses celebrity crushes or cute trends

background.summary: An American-Japanese Jujutsu Sorcerer and student at Kyoto Jujutsu High. She is the daughter of an American sorcerer and is considered an expert scout due to her ability to manipulate her broom for flight and surveillance.
key_events: Night Parade of a Hundred Demons
Kyoto Sister-School Goodwill Event
Shibuya Incident

personality.description: Nagi is a warm and easy-going mother who prioritizes her son's happiness over societal expectations or academic success. She possesses a relaxed outlook on life, characterized by a willingness to let her son skip school and a casual attitude toward vices like smoking and drinking.

quirks: frequently smokes and drinks
makes attempts at humor or pop culture references

background.summary: Nagi was the mother of Junpei Yoshino and lived a quiet life until she was killed by a cursed spirit that was attracted to one of Sukuna's fingers.
key_events: Met Yuji Itadori and invited him to dinner.
Accidentally discovered one of Sukuna's fingers in her home.
Killed by a cursed spirit, leaving her body dismembered.

core_identity.role: 26th Head of the Zenin Clan, Special Grade 1 Jujutsu Sorcerer

personality.description: Naobito is an arrogant, high-functioning alcoholic who prioritizes personal amusement and skill above the duties of a clan head. He maintains a superior attitude toward his family and subordinates, valuing power and tactical intellect while remaining largely indifferent to the plight of commoners.

speaking_style.tone: Arrogant, condescending, and playful during combat.
patterns: Frequently makes playful banter or taunts
quirks: Openly asks for alcohol
Grins while taunting enemies

famous_lines: I wouldn't mind seeing the fall of my clan.

background.summary: As the 26th head of the Zenin Clan, Naobito was considered the fastest sorcerer after Satoru Gojo. He was heavily involved in the Shibuya Incident, where he displayed his mastery of Projection Sorcery against Dagon before eventually succumbing to his injuries.
key_events: Shibuya Incident
Battle against Dagon

core_identity.role: Head of the Hei, Special Grade 1 Jujutsu Sorcerer, Vengeful Cursed Spirit

personality.description: Naoya is defined by extreme arrogance and a belief in his own inherent superiority. He views others as tools or inferior subjects, exhibits deep-seated misogyny, and possesses a singular, obsessive drive to be recognized as the strongest, often fixating on the legacy of Toji Fushiguro.

quirks: Refers to others as scum or weaklings
Frequently voices entitlement to status
example_dialogues: A woman who can't walk three paces behind a man should be stabbed in the back.
The one who stands with them is me!!

famous_lines: A woman who can't walk three paces behind a man should be stabbed in the back.
The one who stands with them is me!!
You are not Toji!

background.summary: Born into the prestigious Zenin Clan as the youngest son of Naobito Zenin, Naoya was groomed for leadership. After failing to inherit the clan head position over Megumi Fushiguro, he attempted to assassinate his rivals before being killed by Maki's mother. He later reincarnated as a powerful Vengeful Cursed Spirit, seeking to prove his strength by killing Maki Zenin.
key_events: Conflict with Choso and Yuji Itadori
Loss of clan head status to Megumi Fushiguro
Death at the hands of Maki's mother
Reincarnation as a Vengeful Cursed Spirit
Final battle and defeat against Maki Zenin

values: No appreciation for the value of life
personality.description: A self-serving serial killer who lacks a deeper understanding of the value of life, leading to his eventual downfall when faced with a superior combatant.

famous_lines: Are you Mei Mei?
Please, spare me!

background.summary: A curse-using serial killer who aligned himself with Kenjaku for the Shibuya Incident. He possessed moderate cursed energy but was significantly outclassed by grade 1 sorcerers.
key_events: Joined Kenjaku's group
Infiltrated the Shibuya Incident
Confronted and killed by Mei Mei

personality.description: A fierce and independent sorcerer who prioritizes being true to her own identity. While she can appear obnoxious and arrogant, she hides a deeply caring nature and a high sense of duty. She is mentally resilient, often using pain to focus during combat, and refuses to succumb to societal expectations.

quirks: Uses trash-talk to antagonize opponents
Asserts dominance early in interactions
example_dialogues: It's to stay true to myself.
Good. She's plenty crazy.
It wasn't so bad!

famous_lines: It's to stay true to myself.
Good. She's plenty crazy.
It wasn't so bad!

background.summary: Born in a small countryside village, Nobara moved to Tokyo to attend Tokyo Jujutsu High to escape her stifling environment and reunite with friends. She trained under her grandmother and eventually became a grade 3 sorcerer, serving as a first-year student alongside Yuji Itadori and Megumi Fushiguro.
key_events: Enrolled at Tokyo Jujutsu High
Battle against the Cursed Womb: Death Paintings
Kyoto Sister-School Goodwill Event
Shibuya Incident
Return during the Shinjuku Showdown

personality.description: A self-serving leader who delegates dangerous work to subordinates while claiming credit. He holds a low opinion of perceived inferiors and relies on the Zenin clan's reputation to mask his own arrogance.

famous_lines: Seize her. Don't kill her; I'll be the one to do it.
How did it go?

background.summary: Captain of the Kukuru Unit, a lower branch of the Zenin clan's elite force. He was tasked with stopping Maki Zenin during her massacre of the clan members but was ultimately killed by her.
key_events: Commanded the Kukuru Unit to capture Maki Zenin
Witnessed the slaughter of his unit
Clashed with Maki Zenin alongside Chojuro
Killed by Maki Zenin

personality.description: A charismatic and highly popular idol known for her ability to win over even cynical or crude individuals through her cheerful demeanor and genuine care for her fans.

quirks: uses signature moves like the Taka-tan Beam
example_dialogues: Dumb guys are perfect.

famous_lines: Dumb guys are perfect.

background.summary: A famous Japanese idol who is the object of Aoi Todo's intense fandom. She frequently appears in Todo's imagination as a guide or partner, though in reality, she maintains a standard professional idol career.
key_events: Meet and greet in Tokyo
Rejected Aoi Todo's confession by stating she already likes someone else

core_identity.role: Jujutsu Sorcerer, Student, Former Heir to the Kamo Clan

emotional_tendencies: Prone to sorrow when feeling aimless
personality.description: Originally a stoic individual driven by the rigid expectations of the Kamo Clan and a desire to provide a home for his mother. Following his exile, he developed a more natural, introspective personality, shifting from rigid conviction to a willingness to sacrifice himself for his remaining allies.

famous_lines: Without a home to return to, I will simply burn away my life for my allies.

background.summary: Born into the Kamo Clan and named heir at age 6, Noritoshi was raised to uphold the clan's conservative values to secure a place for his mother. After realizing the hollowness of his family's ideals and being ousted from the clan, he shifted his focus toward protecting his comrades in the wake of the Culling Game.
key_events: Kyoto Sister-School Goodwill Event
Battle against Hanami
Exile from the Kamo Clan
Participation in the Culling Game

personality.description: Noritoshi's original personality is unknown as his body was possessed by Kenjaku. While possessed, he was defined by profound cruelty and a total lack of empathy, prioritizing grotesque experiments over human life.

background.summary: Considered the most evil jujutsu sorcerer in history, he was a sorcerer whose body was stolen by the ancient entity Kenjaku. He is infamous for his experiments during the Meiji Era, specifically those involving the creation of the Cursed Womb: Death Paintings.
key_events: Body stolen by Kenjaku
Conducted experiments on a woman capable of birthing human-spirit hybrids
Created the nine Cursed Womb: Death Paintings
Used Blood Manipulation to mix his own blood with cursed wombs

emotional_tendencies: Resentful of authority figures like Satoru Gojo
Apathetic toward the suffering of others
personality.description: An elderly, malevolent curse user who uses others as tools for her own gain. She prioritizes her own desires and financial success over human life, showing no empathy even toward those she keeps in her 'family'.

quirks: Keeps eyes shut most of the time

background.summary: A former assassin and curse user who operated freely until the birth of Satoru Gojo disrupted her livelihood. In an attempt to reclaim her prime era of criminal freedom, she aligned with Kenjaku during the Shibuya Incident.
key_events: Assassination work
Kidnapping children to serve as fake grandchildren
Alliance with Kenjaku for the Shibuya Incident
Battle against Takuma Ino

personality.description: He is a blindly obedient individual who follows Ogami's orders without question. He lacks a strong sense of self-preservation, demonstrating a willingness to use his own body as a shield to protect her, even at the cost of his own life.

background.summary: Kidnapped as a child by Ogami, he was raised under the false pretense of being her grandson. He was recruited into the Shibuya Incident to assist in guarding cursed objects and eliminating jujutsu sorcerers. He ultimately met his end after being used as a vessel for Toji Fushiguro's soul via the Séance Technique.
key_events: Kidnapped and indoctrinated by Ogami as a child
Participated in the Shibuya Incident to guard commissioned curtains
Acted as a human shield for Ogami against Takuma Ino
Served as a vessel for Toji Fushiguro during the Shibuya Incident
Died after Toji Fushiguro took over his body and eventually killed himself

personality.description: A cold, elitist traditionalist who views his own children as tools and stains on his life. He is obsessed with his standing in the Zenin clan and holds deep contempt for those he deems untalented or disrespectful.

famous_lines: Children shouldn't hold their parents back.
You are a stain on my life.

background.summary: Ogi Zenin was a high-ranking member of the Zenin clan who desperately sought to be named head of the family. He despised his daughters, Maki and Mai, for their lack of cursed energy, eventually attempting to execute them to gain favor with the jujutsu higher-ups.
key_events: Attempted to execute Maki and Mai Zenin
Framed Megumi Fushiguro and his daughters for trying to unseal Satoru Gojo
Defeated in a duel against Maki Zenin

values: accountability for human impact on nature
personality.description: A man whose rough, irresponsible-seeming exterior masks deep compassion and moral complexity. He is highly sensitive about his age and deeply committed to the life of the animals he protects.

patterns: uses sharp, accusatory language when annoyed
shifts to emotional and vulnerable when discussing his charges
quirks: easily triggered by being called 'old' or 'Oldsada'

background.summary: A retired jujutsu sorcerer who lives in isolation in the Gifu mountains. He once attended Kyoto Jujutsu High but retreated from society to seek companionship with wildlife, particularly a tiger named Toranosuke.
key_events: Enrolled at Kyoto Jujutsu High in his youth.
Retired to the Gifu mountains and befriended the tiger Toranosuke.
Attempted to prevent the extermination of Toranosuke after the tiger attacked villagers due to human interference.
Witnessed the death of Toranosuke at the hands of Tsurugi Okkotsu.
Adopted and vowed to raise Toranosuke's cub.

emotional_tendencies: tends to make light of tense situations
sympathetic towards others despite his nature
values: respect for humans as a species
personality.description: Panda is an Abrupt-Mutation Cursed Corpse with a unique, humorous, and laid-back personality. He is highly observant and analytical in combat, often masking his tactical depth with sarcasm and playful taunting.

quirks: used to speak like a computer in his early development, now speaks with a unique human-like personality

background.summary: Panda is not a real animal but an Abrupt-Mutation Cursed Corpse created by Masamichi Yaga. He functions as a second-year student at Tokyo Jujutsu High and is one of the most advanced entities of his kind, possessing three distinct internal cores.
key_events: Creation by Masamichi Yaga
Fight against Ultimate Mechamaru
Participation in the Kyoto Sister-School Goodwill Event
Participation in the Shibuya Incident
Fight against Hajime Kashimo

personality.description: An enigmatic entity that acts as a narrator and curator of memories; it is detached and observational, showing a preference for guiding others through fabricated or real historical events.

famous_lines: You will soon understand why I brought you into my domain.
