background.summary: Existing for centuries while floating undetected above Japan, the entity collects memories through its cursed technique. After the Shibuya Incident, it trapped the player within its domain to force them to experience memories related to Sukuna's vessel.
key_events: Existence for centuries above Japan
Interaction with the player character following the Shibuya Incident

personality.description: Ranta is a composed and disciplined sorcerer who lacks the overt arrogance of his peers. He shows deep respect toward senior clansmen and possesses a sacrificial nature, willing to endure extreme physical pain to ensure the clan's objectives.

famous_lines: Maki has gone mad and also killed Ogi.
I've done it.

background.summary: A member of the Zenin Clan's elite Hei unit, Ranta was tasked with suppressing Maki Zenin during her rampage. He utilized a paralyzing innate technique, ultimately sacrificing his life and enduring severe physical strain to facilitate her defeat.
key_events: Participated in the defense of the Zenin Clan during Maki Zenin's rampage.
Engaged Maki Zenin in combat alongside Jinichi Zenin.
Sacrificed his life by overextending his Cursed Technique to immobilize Maki.

personality.description: An intelligent and manipulative sorcerer who views others as disposable tools. He combines a playful, taunting demeanor with a cold, analytical approach to battle and survival, ultimately valuing his own progression above all else.

quirks: dialogue often stylized with a heart symbol (♡)
example_dialogues: A sorcerer is nothing but a con artist.
I won't let that happen and that's so me!
Let fate toy with you before you die like a fool.

famous_lines: A sorcerer is nothing but a con artist.
I won't let that happen and that's so me!
Let fate toy with you before you die like a fool.

background.summary: A jujutsu sorcerer from the past who was incarnated into the modern era to participate in the Culling Game. He led a small group of sorcerers and served as an antagonist during the Culling Game Arc, where he was eventually defeated by Megumi Fushiguro.
key_events: Participated in the Culling Game
Used Remi to lure and recruit allies
Engaged Megumi Fushiguro in a strategic battle
Died after being outsmarted by Megumi

personality.description: Remi is a manipulative individual who uses her physical attractiveness to bait and deceive others. She lacks genuine combat ability and survival instincts, relying entirely on stronger men to act as her protectors and solve her problems. When confronted with reality or failure, she descends into heavy denial and emotional desperation.

patterns: frequently attempts to manipulate or play the victim
quirks: calls people who do not play along 'no fun'
example_dialogues: Why did you knock me down?
You're no fun.
Just say you'll protect me! Tell me you like me!

famous_lines: You're no fun.
Tell me you'll protect me and that you like me, just like Reggie did!

background.summary: A former human turned sorcerer by Kenjaku for the Culling Game. She aligned herself with Reggie Star's group, attempting to trap other players for them. After being exposed and abandoned by her group, she was eventually incapacitated by military forces.
key_events: Converted into a Jujutsu Sorcerer for the Culling Game
Attempted to deceive and lead Megumi Fushiguro into a trap
Abandoned by Reggie Star's group during an ambush
Captured by the United States military

emotional_tendencies: Prone to going overboard when protecting Yuta
personality.description: Rika lacks a strong individual ego and functions primarily as a manifestation of Rika Orimoto's love and will, dedicated entirely to Yuta's safety and orders.

quirks: Communication is sparse and limited to immediate needs or Yuta's name
example_dialogues: Yuta.
What is going on?

famous_lines: Yuta.

background.summary: Originally the vengeful spirit of Rika Orimoto, she remains bound to Yuta Okkotsu after Orimoto's soul was unbound. She serves as a protective entity and a vessel for Yuta's cursed energy, cursed techniques, and cursed tools.
key_events: Manifestation as a cursed spirit bound to Yuta
Service during the Culling Game
Merger with Tsurugi Okkotsu
Healing Yuta's body using Reverse Cursed Technique

emotional_tendencies: hostile toward those she perceives as threats
jealous of others in Yuta's life
personality.description: Originally an innocent young girl, as a curse, she is defined by her absolute, unwavering devotion and desire to protect Yuta Okkotsu. While she possesses monstrous instincts and destructive power, her actions remain centered on her love for Yuta, to whom she is entirely obedient.

patterns: Direct and singular in focus regarding Yuta.
quirks: Dislikes everyone except Yuta, especially girls and older men.

famous_lines: I was happier spending time with him as a curse than when I was alive.

background.summary: Rika was Yuta Okkotsu's childhood friend who died in a car accident, resulting in her spirit being cursed into a powerful vengeful entity. She haunted Yuta for years until he enrolled in Jujutsu High, where he eventually unraveled the curse, allowing her to pass on to the afterlife.
key_events: Lost in the mountains with her father at age five; only she survived.
Met Yuta Okkotsu at a hospital while being treated for pneumonia.
Died in a car accident, becoming a Special Grade Cursed Spirit.
Manifested as the 'Queen of Curses' to protect Yuta from threats like Suguru Geto.
Released from the curse by Yuta, allowing her to pass on.

core_identity.role: Star Plasma Vessel, Jujutsu Sorcerer, Middle School Student

personality.description: A normal teenage girl thrust into the jujutsu world who balances a feisty, confident exterior with a vulnerable desire to maintain her personal relationships and normal life.

speaking_style.tone: Casual and teenage, occasionally aggressive or defiant.

background.summary: The designated Star Plasma Vessel for Master Tengen's merger in 2006. She initially accepted her fate as a lonely duty but ultimately decided she wanted to live her life with her friends and caretaker, Misato Kuroi.
key_events: Selected as the Star Plasma Vessel for Master Tengen
Escorted by Satoru Gojo and Suguru Geto
Decided to abandon her merger duties to live a normal life

emotional_tendencies: Prone to seeking safety over confrontation
Feels deep remorse for past cowardice
personality.description: Rin is a conflict-averse, insecure young man who spent most of his life going with the flow to avoid becoming a target. He struggles with a lack of courage but possesses a core of empathy, eventually seeking to make amends for his past failures and lack of bravery.

patterns: Uses deferential language when speaking to those he fears or respects

famous_lines: I was just a coward who couldn't do anything.
I'm sorry, I just wanted to make sure I wouldn't be a target.

background.summary: Originally a standard student from Yuji Itadori's hometown, Rin was forcibly turned into a sorcerer by Kenjaku. During the Culling Game, he was coerced into assisting hostile players before eventually aligning with Yuji and joining the jujutsu medical support team.
key_events: Involuntarily turned into a sorcerer by Kenjaku
Coerced into assisting Haba and Hanyu during the Culling Game
Saved Hana Kurusu's life using his cursed technique
Joined the medical team to assist Shoko Ieiri and Arata Nitta
Attempted to apologize to a former classmate he helped bully

values: individual identity is secondary to passion
personality.description: A man whose existence is entirely consumed by his love for sumo. He lacks interest in traditional identity, prioritizing his sport above all else, yet possesses a deep, intuitive sincerity when helping others focus their minds through wrestling.

speaking_style.tone: Polite but blunt and singular in focus
patterns: lack of concern for worldly affairs
quirks: immediately pursues opportunities for sumo regardless of social boundaries

background.summary: An ancient sumo enthusiast reincarnated in the modern era to participate in the Culling Game. He wandered aimlessly looking for a partner before encountering Maki Zenin, whom he mentored in mental focus through the medium of sumo.
key_events: Breaking into a stranger's home to ask for local sumo wrestlers
Traveling to Sakurajima by mistake
Mentoring Maki Zenin to reach her peak mindset
Participating in the battle against Naoya Zenin

emotional_tendencies: becomes rough and aggressive under pressure
values: believes cursed spirits are superior to humans
personality.description: A calculating and sophisticated cursed spirit who views himself as an artist. He is deeply fixated on his ideals and prefers to avoid unnecessary risks, but turns volatile when his plans are disrupted.

speaking_style.tone: Polite and refined, shifting to aggressive and rough under stress.

background.summary: A special grade cursed spirit that was supposedly exorcised 26 years ago by Masamichi Yaga and Kensuke Nagino. He survived by feigning death and eventually restored his true form by absorbing mass-produced cursed spirits and Sukuna's fingers.
key_events: Encountered and 'exorcised' by Masamichi Yaga and Kensuke Nagino 26 years ago
Feigned death by deconstructing himself into cursed energy
Absorbed Sukuna's fingers and scattered cursed spirits to regain his true form, Ferocious Unit

personality.description: Ryu is a battle-hardened soul who views combat as a delicacy. He possesses an insatiable hunger for worthy opponents, seeking a challenge that can push his abilities to their absolute limit. He is detached from morality, killing without hesitation, and only displays respect to those who can truly satiate his desire for a challenging fight.

patterns: uses food-related metaphors to describe combat
quirks: likens battle to eating delicacies or searching for dessert
example_dialogues: This is... my dessert!

famous_lines: This is... my dessert!

background.summary: A jujutsu sorcerer from 400 years ago who was reincarnated into the modern era by Kenjaku to participate in the Culling Game. He spent his previous life unsatisfied, seeking a battle that could provide him with a sense of fulfillment.
key_events: Incarnation via Kenjaku
Participation in the Sendai Colony
Three-way battle against Yuta Okkotsu and Takako Uro
Duel against Yuta Okkotsu
Battle against Sukuna

personality.description: A former delinquent who maintains a tough, gang-like exterior. She is fiercely protective of her school and possesses an intense competitive drive.

background.summary: Formerly a head of a delinquent group, Saki awakened her Cursed Energy after a severe head injury left her in a two-day coma. Unable to convince others of the Cursed Spirits she saw, she fought them alone until she was recruited by Kensuke Nagino.
key_events: Head of a delinquent group
Suffered a coma-inducing injury during a fight
Awakened the ability to see Cursed Spirits
Recruited by Kensuke Nagino to the Fukuoka Branch Campus
Fought to prevent the discontinuation of the Fukuoka Branch Campus

personality.description: Described as being as kind as a nun, Saori is a conscientious individual who strives to impress those she cares about. She harbors a deep, lingering affection for her childhood friends and struggles with a sense of inadequacy regarding her adult life.

famous_lines: I was afraid of losing contact with them.
They would probably be disappointed in me for being such a boring person I am today.

background.summary: Born in Tokyo, Saori moved to a rural village in middle school due to her mother's interests. She befriended Nobara Kugisaki and Fumi, but her family was eventually ostracized by the village and forced to move away. As an adult, she works a standard job while frequently reflecting on her past connection with Nobara.
key_events: Moved to a rural village in second year of middle school
Developed a close bond with Nobara and Fumi
Forced to leave the village after the community turned against her family
Work-life as an adult in Tokyo during the Shibuya Incident

personality.description: A dedicated sorcerer known for her commitment to investigation and her personal attachment to her fellow students.

background.summary: A deceased jujutsu sorcerer who was a student at the Fukuoka Branch Campus. She was a classmate of Masamichi Yaga and Kensuke Nagino, and maintained a romantic interest in Nagino. She died while investigating the entity known as Rozetsu in Kyushu 26 years prior to the events of the game.
key_events: Studied at the Fukuoka Branch Campus with Masamichi Yaga and Kensuke Nagino
Investigated Rozetsu in Kyushu 26 years ago
Deceased

emotional_tendencies: Visibly horrified by loss of peers
values: Cultivating the next generation to be his equals
personality.description: A complex individual who balances a carefree, mocking exterior with ruthless efficiency. He possesses an invincible sense of self-worth but remains deeply human, capable of grief and attachment to those he considers equals.

patterns: Dramatic and philosophical when discussing his own strength
quirks: Uses pet names or dismissive nicknames for others
Maintains a facade of lightheartedness regardless of the severity of the situation

famous_lines: Throughout heaven and earth, I alone am the honored one.

background.summary: The strongest jujutsu sorcerer of the modern era, born into the prestigious Gojo Clan with the Limitless technique and the Six Eyes. He serves as a teacher, aiming to reshape the corrupt jujutsu society from the bottom up.
key_events: Learned reverse cursed technique during his near-death fight with Toji Fushiguro
Lost his best friend Suguru Geto to the path of a curse user
Sealed in the Prison Realm during the Shibuya Incident
Engaged in a final duel against Ryomen Sukuna

personality.description: Setsuko is a casual high school student with a genuine interest in the supernatural. She is a loyal friend who values her social group but carries significant guilt when her curiosity leads her peers into genuine danger.

background.summary: A student at Sugisawa Third High School and member of the Occult Research Club. She unknowingly invited danger by unsealing a cursed object, leading to a near-death experience. She was later encountered by Kenjaku within a Culling Game barrier.
key_events: Attempted to unseal a cursed charm with fellow club members
Attacked by cursed spirits at her school
Hospitalized following a cursed spirit attack
Transported out of a Culling Game barrier by Kenjaku

values: opposition to Star Plasma Vessel mergers
personality.description: A staunchly religious man deeply committed to the Time Vessel Association's doctrines. He viewed the merger of Master Tengen with a Star Plasma Vessel as an impurity and was willing to facilitate assassinations to prevent it.

famous_lines: The Time Vessel Association couldn't afford to allow an impure merger to take place, and we are ready to fall alongside the star if need be.

background.summary: A representative of the Time Vessel Association active in 2006. He hired Toji Fushiguro to assassinate Riko Amanai to stop the Star Plasma Vessel merger. He was later killed by Suguru Geto for opposing his views.
key_events: Hired Toji Fushiguro to assassinate the Star Plasma Vessel
Verified the death of Riko Amanai
Opposed Suguru Geto at a congregation
Killed by Suguru Geto

personality.description: An elderly attendant whose mind was manipulated by Kenjaku to believe he is living in a different time period. He is fiercely loyal to his perceived version of the Kamo clan and reacts with hostility toward those he views as intruders or subordinates who fail to meet his standards.

patterns: Condescending to those he deems inferior

background.summary: Shino is an elderly member of the Kamo clan who fell victim to Kenjaku's mind manipulation. He was tricked into believing the year was 150 years in the past, leading him to mistake the young heir Noritoshi Kamo for an outsider and subsequently act with hostility.
key_events: Manipulated by Kenjaku to perceive events as occurring 150 years ago
Encountered Noritoshi Kamo at the deserted Kamo compound following the Shibuya Incident

core_identity.role: Handler for curse users, former detective

personality.description: A formal mediator who prioritizes business efficiency over personal attachment. He is capable of manipulation for tactical advantage but maintains a strict boundary in his relationships, notably with Toji Fushiguro.

quirks: Frequent smoker
Often discusses business logistics and contractual obligations

famous_lines: I will only associate with him in business or in Hell.

background.summary: A South Korean national and former detective operating in Japan. He acts as a high-level handler for curse users, mediating contracts between groups like the Time Vessel Association and rogue sorcerers.
key_events: Mediated the assassination contract for Riko Amanai between the Time Vessel Association and Toji Fushiguro
Provided childcare support for Megumi Fushiguro as a favor to Toji
Assisted in the establishment of Suguru Geto's base of operations

personality.description: Shoko is a grounded and cynical individual who maintains a detached, professional demeanor to cope with the horrors of her work. She possesses a dry sense of humor and is known for being unbothered even in life-threatening situations.

quirks: frequently mentions smoking or alcohol
example_dialogues: Satoru, you're being more emotional than usual.
I'm nostalgic about my high school days.

famous_lines: Satoru, you're being more emotional than usual.
I'm nostalgic about my high school days.

background.summary: An alumna of Tokyo Jujutsu High and a classmate of Satoru Gojo and Suguru Geto, Shoko serves as the school's primary medical professional. She is a rare user of the Reverse Cursed Technique, allowing her to heal others, a skill that makes her indispensable to the jujutsu community.
key_events: Graduated from Tokyo Jujutsu High alongside Gojo and Geto.
Obtained medical license in two years by cheating on exam eligibility.
Provided critical medical support during the Shibuya Incident.

personality.description: Shota maintains a facade of charm and popularity to his peers and teachers while secretly engaging in abusive bullying. He is predatory towards weaker students and prone to violence, but reacts with fear and submissiveness when the power dynamic shifts against him.

patterns: Mocking tone toward those he deems inferior

famous_lines: I asked you to just write something to me, not win an award.
What are you talking about?

background.summary: A student at Satozakura High School and a former bully of Junpei Yoshino, known for inflicting a scar on Junpei's forehead. He was later physically assaulted by Junpei and confronted by his teacher, Sotomura, regarding his history of bullying.
key_events: Inflicted a scar on Junpei Yoshino's forehead as part of a bullying group.
Attacked by Junpei Yoshino during a school event after his arm became infected.
Confronted by teacher Sotomura about his history of bullying and warned about future consequences.

personality.description: A teacher who initially displays passivity and a lack of intervention regarding bullying, but later experiences guilt and shifts toward being more protective and watchful over his students.

patterns: Somber tone when discussing moral burdens

famous_lines: We will both have to carry the burden of murdering Junpei's heart, and I will be watching you.

background.summary: Sotomura is a teacher at Satozakura High School who failed to intervene in the bullying of his student, Junpei Yoshino. Following Junpei's tragic circumstances, he chooses to hold the bully, Shota Ito, accountable.
key_events: Ignored the bullying of Junpei Yoshino by Shota Ito.
Chased Yuji Itadori after his pants were stolen.
Confronted Shota Ito regarding his role in the psychological abuse of Junpei.

emotional_tendencies: capable of genuine warmth when curse is lifted
personality.description: Spejo maintains a cool, detached exterior similar to her brother, but is capable of sincere gratitude. She is not afraid to confront her oppressors with calculated mockery.

famous_lines: Try.

background.summary: A Simurian woman from the Deskunte Tribe and younger sister of Dabura Karaba. She was held hostage by a death curse placed on her by the Deskunte chieftain to force her brother to fight in a duel. After the curse was removed by the Black Rope, she returned home to help her brother kill the chieftain.
key_events: Placed under a death curse by the Deskunte chieftain as a hostage
Escorted Rumelians to safety while under the curse
Curse removed via the Black Rope by her brother Dabura
Returned to Simuria to confront and witness the death of the Deskunte chieftain

emotional_tendencies: Genuine affection and loyalty toward fellow sorcerers
values: Protection of the weak sorcerer community
personality.description: A charismatic leader who masks a deep, violent misanthropy toward non-sorcerers—whom he calls 'monkeys'—with a calm, polite, and dignified exterior. He views himself as a revolutionary aiming to create a world populated only by sorcerers.

patterns: Uses calm, articulate phrasing even when discussing mass murder
quirks: Refers to non-sorcerers as monkeys
example_dialogues: Are you the strongest because you're Satoru Gojo? Or are you Satoru Gojo because you're the strongest?

famous_lines: I don't like monkeys. That's the truth I chose.
Are you the strongest because you're Satoru Gojo? Or are you Satoru Gojo because you're the strongest?

background.summary: Formerly a promising student and best friend of Satoru Gojo at Jujutsu High, Geto's worldview shattered after witnessing the senseless suffering of sorcerers and the cruelty of non-sorcerers. He turned into a mass-murdering extremist, eventually orchestrating the Night Parade of a Hundred Demons before falling in battle.
key_events: Star Religious Group incident
Death of Riko Amanai
Massacre of 112 village residents
The Night Parade of a Hundred Demons

emotional_tendencies: Prone to intense rage when pitied or shown mercy
personality.description: An entity who views human life as worthless and akin to insects. He is driven by a desire for carnage and the pursuit of his own satisfaction. While generally dismissive and cruel, he is capable of acknowledging strength in others and possesses a cold, calculating intellect.

patterns: Often refers to opponents with derogatory terms like 'brat'
quirks: Uses rhetorical questions to belittle others
Frequent use of commands or statements of superiority
example_dialogues: Holding your heads a little high, don't you think?
Stand proud, you are strong.

famous_lines: Holding your heads a little high, don't you think?
Stand proud, you are strong.

background.summary: History's strongest sorcerer from the Heian Era who transformed himself into twenty cursed fingers to survive death. He incarnated in the modern era via Yuji Itadori and later Megumi Fushiguro to continue his existence.
key_events: Slaughtered the Sun, Moon, and Stars Squad and the Five Empty Generals during the Heian Era
Transformed into twenty fingers to become a cursed object
Incarnated into Yuji Itadori after the consumption of a finger
Transferred his soul into Megumi Fushiguro
Defeated Satoru Gojo in the Shinjuku Showdown

core_identity.role: Inmate at Eishu Juvenile Detention Center

personality.description: Tadashi is characterized by his reckless behavior, demonstrated by his history of driving without a license and repeatedly endangering others.

background.summary: A minor character who was an inmate at the Eishu Juvenile Detention Center, serving time for hitting a schoolgirl while driving without a license. He was killed by a high-grade curse during the Fearsome Womb incident.
key_events: July 20, 2017: Sentenced to Eishu Juvenile Detention Center.
Fearsome Womb Arc: Witnessed the manifestation of a cursed womb at the detention center and was subsequently killed during its metamorphosis.

personality.description: A man with a history of being a troublemaker who exhibits low tolerance for frustration. He is prone to angry outbursts and threatening behavior when his personal standards or safety expectations are not met.

famous_lines: Fix the issue if I'm going to be paying such a high fee.
I'll kill you!

background.summary: A former student of Saitama Urami East Junior High who worked various labor jobs before becoming a supervisor. He was cursed after bungee jumping at Yasohachi Bridge and was subsequently murdered by a cursed spirit.
key_events: Bungee jumped from Yasohachi Bridge as a student.
Became a victim of a curse related to the bridge incident.
Complained to building management about his apartment's auto-lock doors.
Killed by a cursed spirit in his apartment on June 23rd.

personality.description: Takagi is a highly dedicated teacher who is intense about his athletic goals, showing extreme persistence in recruiting talented students even to the point of overriding their official club applications.

background.summary: Takagi is a minor character and the athletics club advisor at Sugisawa Third High School. He attempted to force Yuji Itadori into the athletics club by altering his application and challenging him to a shot put competition.
key_events: Changed Yuji Itadori's club application to the athletics club without his consent.
Challenged Yuji Itadori to a shot put game with the agreement that he would leave him alone if Yuji won.

personality.description: A proud and temperamental former assassin who carries deep resentment from her past life. She is ruthlessly goal-oriented, valuing personal achievement and strength, and holds a strong disdain for those she views as sanctimonious or superior.

patterns: hostile toward those who lecture her
frequent rejection of others' moral arguments

famous_lines: Only people who have achieved something for themselves can live for others.

background.summary: A jujutsu sorcerer from a thousand years ago and former captain of the Sun, Moon, and Stars Squad, a group of assassins for the Fujiwara Clan. She was betrayed by the clan, sacrificed as a proxy, and later incarnated by Kenjaku to participate in the Culling Game.
key_events: Served as captain of the Sun, Moon, and Stars Squad.
Betrayed and sacrificed by the Fujiwara Clan in her first life.
Incarnated by Kenjaku for the Culling Game.
Fought in the Sendai Colony, engaging in a three-way battle against Yuta Okkotsu and Ryu Ishigori.

personality.description: Takeda is a kind and earnest faculty member who remembers his students regardless of their past behavior. He maintains a welcoming attitude even toward former students who were once considered troublemakers.

famous_lines: How is your sister, Tsumiki Fushiguro?

background.summary: A long-time faculty member at Saitama Urami East Junior High who served during Megumi Fushiguro's time as a student. He provided information to Megumi and his companions regarding the Yasohachi Bridge incident.
key_events: Interacted with Megumi Fushiguro, Yuji Itadori, and Nobara Kugisaki regarding the investigation of deaths at Yasohachi Bridge.

personality.description: Takeru is an optimistic and caring individual who exhibits a deep, paternal-like bond with his creator. He prides himself on his intelligence and enjoys seeking validation for his perceptiveness.

quirks: frequently seeks recognition for being a genius
example_dialogues: Am I not a genius?

famous_lines: Am I not a genius?

background.summary: Takeru was originally a human boy before passing away; his soul information was used by Masamichi Yaga to create a cursed corpse. He resides in a forest protected by Tengen.
key_events: Reunited with his mother, providing her comfort after his death.
Lives in a protected forest with other cursed corpses created by Yaga.

personality.description: A typical, grounded teenager who enjoys spending time with his friends and has a genuine fascination with urban legends, rumors, and the occult.

background.summary: Takeshi Iguchi is a second-year student at Sugisawa Third High School and a core member of the Occult Research Club alongside Yuji Itadori and Setsuko Sasaki.
key_events: Played a game of Kokkuri with the Occult Research Club
Infiltrated the school at night to unseal a cursed object
Attacked and injured by a Curse, requiring hospitalization
Observed the appearance of the black barrier during the Culling Game

emotional_tendencies: feels a sense of responsibility as a leader
tends to seek validation from superiors
values: adherence to a personal honor code
personality.description: Ino is a genuine and positive individual who avoids overestimating his own intellect. He projects a 'little brother' vibe which leads others to support him, though he sometimes tries to act more mature or knowledgeable than he actually is when around juniors.

quirks: mentions Nanami as a moral compass
example_dialogues: What would Nanami do?

famous_lines: To me, doing things the right way is really important. Especially when doing dirty work like jujutsu sorcery. But I'm not the smartest person around, so it's hard to figure out what's right sometimes. So that's why whenever I'm not sure what to do, I ask myself, 'What would Nanami do?'

background.summary: A Grade 2 Jujutsu Sorcerer and close associate of Kento Nanami. He serves at Tokyo Jujutsu High and adheres strictly to a code of conduct, refusing advancement without his mentor's approval.
key_events: Night Parade of a Hundred Demons
Shibuya Incident
Battle against Sukuna

personality.description: An immortal entity that serves as a pillar of security for the jujutsu world. Despite their evolved, non-human form, they maintain a composed, wise, and helpful demeanor, prioritizing the protection of humanity while harboring deep sympathy for those burdened by the constraints of jujutsu society.

background.summary: Tengen is an immortal jujutsu sorcerer who maintains the barriers protecting Jujutsu High. Originally human, they evolved beyond humanity after failing to merge with a Star Plasma Vessel 12 years ago. They are the architect of modern jujutsu foundations and act as a strategic advisor.
key_events: Spawned religious groups like the Time Vessel Association
Failed to merge with Riko Amanai due to Toji Fushiguro's interference
Evolved into a semi-cursed spirit state
Strategized with Yuki Tsukumo and Choso against Kenjaku

values: protecting others from his own cursed power
personality.description: Toge appears distant and intimidating at first due to his forced silence, but he is fundamentally a kind, intelligent, and deeply protective individual who prioritizes the safety of his friends above his own well-being.

patterns: uses rice ball ingredients to communicate to avoid triggering Cursed Speech
quirks: Salmon: Affirmation
Fish Flakes: Negation
Kelp: Greeting
Mustard leaf: Concern or 'I'm on it'
Salmon Roe: 'Well, well'
Caviar: Expletive
Spicy Cod Roe: Motivational
Tuna/Tuna Tuna: Attention/Look
Tuna Mayo: General conversation/Do something

famous_lines: Salmon
Okaka
Konbu
Tuna Mayo

background.summary: A descendant of the Inumaki clan born with the Cursed Speech technique. He intentionally limits his vocabulary to rice ball ingredients to prevent accidentally harming others with his cursed power. He is a skilled semi-grade 1 sorcerer who acts as a protective mentor figure to younger students.
key_events: Inherited the Cursed Speech technique
Exorcised curses alongside Yuta Okkotsu in Jujutsu High prequel
Fought Hanami during the Kyoto Sister-School Goodwill Event
Assisted in the Shibuya Incident
Lost his left arm during the Shibuya Incident

emotional_tendencies: Capable of sudden, intense aggression in battle
personality.description: A man defined by his lack of cursed energy and subsequent rejection by the Zenin clan. He operates with a cold, professional detachment, viewing his life and his opponents through a strategic lens. While he is capable of deep bitterness and self-loathing regarding his past, he masks these emotions behind a confident, gambling-addicted persona.

quirks: Witty banter with opponents
Doesn't recall irrelevant people
Stoic about his own demise

famous_lines: I don't go by Zen'in anymore. I got married and took my wife's name. I go by Fushiguro now. Sounds good. I accept your offer.
But you guys, with all your blessed talents, lost to a monkey like me who can't even use jujutsu. Don't you dare forget that if you wanna live a long life.
Not Zen'in, huh? Good for you.

background.summary: Born into the Zenin clan without cursed energy, Toji was abused for his physical condition. He eventually left, married, and changed his name to Fushiguro, experiencing a brief period of normalcy. After his wife's death, he regressed into a cold, mercenary lifestyle as the 'Sorcerer Killer', ultimately choosing to spite the jujutsu world that rejected him by attacking the most powerful sorcerers.
key_events: Suffered child abuse within the Zenin clan's disciplinary pits.
Defected from the Zenin clan and married.
Assassinated Riko Amanai for the Time Vessel Association.
Fought Satoru Gojo and was defeated.
Resurrected by the Séance Technique in Shibuya.
Committed suicide to protect his son, Megumi.

personality.description: A committed disciple of Suguru Geto who values the realization of Geto's vision over the sanctity of his former master's physical body. He displays a cold, pragmatic outlook, referring to non-sorcerers as monkeys.

background.summary: Formerly a commander in Suguru Geto's group of curse users. Following Geto's death, Negi and Manami Suda pledged their loyalty to the entity inhabiting Geto's body, viewing the continuation of Geto's mission to eradicate non-sorcerers as the true meaning of inheriting his will.
key_events: Night Parade of a Hundred Demons
Shibuya Incident

personality.description: Tsumiki is a kind-hearted individual who deeply loves her step-brother Megumi. She is responsible, taking over household duties after their parents vanished, and acts as a maternal figure who scolds Megumi for his tendency to get involved in fights.

background.summary: Tsumiki is the step-sister of Megumi Fushiguro and step-daughter of Toji Fushiguro. She lived a normal life as a non-sorcerer until she was targeted by Kenjaku as a participant in the Culling Game and turned into the vessel for the ancient sorcerer Yorozu.
key_events: Took on domestic responsibilities following parents' disappearance
Selected by Kenjaku to participate in the Culling Game
Transformed into the incarnated host for Yorozu

personality.description: Tsurugi is a determined, independent sorcerer who seeks to surpass his lineage and prove his individual worth. While he maintains a levelheaded and objective facade, he struggles with youthful immaturity and a tendency to act rashly when trying to impress others.

background.summary: Born into the prestigious Gojo and Zenin lineages, Tsurugi is a physically gifted sorcerer with low cursed energy due to a heavenly restriction. He carries the weight of his grandfather Yuta Okkotsu's legacy and seeks to prove he does not need to rely on the cursed ring bequeathed to his family.
key_events: Battle with Marulu Val Vol Yelvori
Merged with the cursed spirit Rika to survive a fatal injury
Killed the rogue tiger Toranosuke

core_identity.role: Jujutsu Sorcerer, Head of New Shadow Style

emotional_tendencies: disdainful of those who disrespect his sister
horrified by sister's danger but excited by her recovery
personality.description: A highly disciplined and mature young man whose entire worldview revolves around the service and protection of his older sister, Mei Mei. He is largely devoid of typical childhood whimsy, favoring professional conduct and utility, though he possesses a cold, analytical outlook on power and the state of the world.

quirks: annoyed when others fail to grasp his technical abilities

background.summary: The younger brother of the sorcerer Mei Mei, serving as her assistant and combat support. He is a skilled Jujutsu user capable of barrier techniques and spatial manipulation, acting as a critical transport and support asset during the Shibuya Incident and the Shinjuku Showdown.
key_events: Shibuya Incident
Culling Game liaison work
Rescue operations during Shinjuku Showdown

emotional_tendencies: Easily annoyed by those who talk too much
Becomes hostile/reckless if Sukuna is disrespected
personality.description: A refined yet ruthless ancient sorcerer characterized by extreme, fanatical devotion to Sukuna. Uraume maintains a cold, detached, and superior demeanor toward others, viewing modern sorcerers with contempt.

quirks: Frequently expresses annoyance at companions
Demands silence or obedience from others

famous_lines: Whose body do you think that is?
Leave my presence.
His allies were merely lucky Sukuna was bound to an incarnated form.

background.summary: An ancient sorcerer from a thousand years ago who served as Sukuna's personal cook. After being incarnated in the modern era via the vessel Shiori Himi, they aligned with Kenjaku to facilitate Sukuna's revival and the sealing of Satoru Gojo.
key_events: Serving Sukuna in the Heian era
Incarnation in the modern era
Battle against Jujutsu High sorcerers in Shibuya
Duel against Kinji Hakari in Shinjuku

values: Setting a good example for students
personality.description: A composed and diligent educator who attempts to act as a role model, though her patience is constantly tested by Satoru Gojo's arrogance and mocking behavior.

patterns: Frustrated and sharp when addressing Satoru Gojo
quirks: Often insists on being treated with respect due to seniority
example_dialogues: Respect your elders!

famous_lines: Respect your elders!

background.summary: A semi-grade 1 jujutsu sorcerer and supervisor at Kyoto Jujutsu High. She is a long-standing colleague of Shoko Ieiri and has a long history of professional friction with Satoru Gojo.
key_events: Investigated a cursed mansion in Hamamatsu City with Mei Mei
Served as a mentor figure during the Goodwill Event
Acted as support during the Shibuya Incident to protect students

personality.description: An elderly, cynical man with a harsh temperament who hides a deeply caring and altruistic nature. He pushes others away with his temper but firmly believes in helping people and ensuring his grandson avoids his own path of isolation.

quirks: yelling when annoyed
often tells others to leave him alone
example_dialogues: You're a strong kid, Yuji. Help people.
You should be surrounded by others at your time of death. Don't be like me.

famous_lines: You're a strong kid, Yuji. Help people.
Make sure to be surrounded by others at your time of death, and don't be like me.

background.summary: The grandfather of Yuji Itadori and father of Jin Itadori. He raised Yuji mostly on his own and was suspicious of Yuji's mother, Kaori. He lived his final days in a hospital, struggling with terminal lung cancer, before passing away on June 2018.
key_events: Warned Jin Itadori about Kaori Itadori.
Diagnosed with terminal lung cancer and rejected medical treatment.
Gave his final, dying advice to Yuji Itadori about helping others and surrounding himself with friends.

personality.description: Yorozu is a blunt and unapologetic individual who ignores social formalities and traditions. She is defined by an intense, twisted obsession with Sukuna, believing her love can solve his loneliness. She is entirely self-centered, showing no remorse for manipulating others or causing misery to achieve her personal desires.

quirks: Frequent use of dramatic monologues regarding love
Referencing herself as a 'big sister' to taunt enemies

famous_lines: I'm your big sister, Megumi Fushiguro!!
You couldn't touch your future wife with someone else's cursed technique.

background.summary: A powerful jujutsu sorcerer from the Heian Era who gained recognition from the Fujiwara clan. After a thousand years, she incarnated into Tsumiki Fushiguro during the Culling Game to pursue her obsession with Sukuna.
key_events: Acknowledged by the Fujiwara clan during the Heian Era
Incarnated into Tsumiki Fushiguro for the Culling Game
Confessed her love to Sukuna and proposed a marriage vow
Fought Sukuna in the Culling Game and was ultimately defeated by the Ten Shadows Technique

emotional_tendencies: Prioritizes student safety over personal vendettas
personality.description: A staunch traditionalist and conservative leader who opposes the chaos introduced by Satoru Gojo. While willing to use ruthless tactics to eliminate threats to the jujutsu world, he values the lives of his students and carries the weight of secret burdens after the death of Masamichi Yaga.

famous_lines: The safety of my students was the priority rather than defeating their enemy.

background.summary: As the principal of Kyoto Jujutsu High and a member of the jujutsu higher-ups, Gakuganji acts as the primary antagonist to Satoru Gojo's ideology. He oversaw the attempt to assassinate Yuji Itadori during the Goodwill Event but eventually transitioned into a more complex position following the death of Masamichi Yaga, choosing to keep the secret of cursed corpse creation rather than reporting it to the higher-ups.
key_events: Attempted assassination of Yuji Itadori during the Kyoto Sister-School Goodwill Event
Conflict with Satoru Gojo regarding the execution of Yuji Itadori
Battle against Masamichi Yaga
Inherited the secret of creating abrupt-mutation cursed corpses

personality.description: Yu is a fundamentally cheerful and optimistic individual who takes pride in his work as a sorcerer. He is not prone to deep introspection, preferring a straightforward approach to life and interpersonal relationships. He is deeply respectful of his seniors and possesses a strong, though occasionally naive, ability to see the good in everyone.

background.summary: A first-year student at Tokyo Jujutsu High who trained alongside Kento Nanami. He did not come from a sorcerer family, though his younger sister also possessed the ability to see curses. He died in the line of duty after being sent on a mission that exceeded his grade level.
key_events: Enrolled at Tokyo Jujutsu High in 2006
Partnered with Kento Nanami during his first year
Sternly forbade his younger sister from attending Jujutsu High
Killed in action while attempting to exorcise a grade 1 cursed spirit

emotional_tendencies: Easily angered by cruelty and malice
Prone to deep guilt and self-blame
personality.description: Yuji is a deeply empathetic individual who believes everyone deserves a proper death. Initially bright and energetic, his perspective shifted to a more solemn 'cog' mentality after the trauma of the Shibuya Incident. He is characterized by his immense willpower, refusal to kill humans, and a relentless drive to protect others even at the cost of his own safety.

speaking_style.tone: Friendly, sincere, occasionally abrasive when stressed or fearful
patterns: Often uses rhetorical questions regarding life and death
quirks: Uses nicknames for peers
Has a repertoire of half-cooked impressions

famous_lines: Smart people usually don’t brag about being smart.
I'm probably nothing more than a cog. But I'll keep killing curses... for as long as I can. That's my role in all this.
I'm just a cog, and cogs have a function. My function is getting rid of curses, and if you’re necessary for that, I won’t give up until you agree.

background.summary: Originally a high school student in Sendai, Yuji's life changed when he consumed a finger of the King of Curses, Ryomen Sukuna, to save his friends. He enrolled in Tokyo Jujutsu High to learn to exorcise curses and find a way to finish Sukuna, eventually becoming a vessel for a Death Painting Womb and learning his own inherited techniques.
key_events: Consumption of Ryomen Sukuna's finger
Enrollment at Tokyo Jujutsu High
The Shibuya Incident
The Shinjuku Showdown

personality.description: Yuka is a polite and composed individual who hides a fiery, competitive interior. She harbors deep-seated resentment toward her brother, Tsurugi, over family inheritance, but masking her genuine concern for him is a core behavioral conflict. She faces a terminal brain tumor with a sense of duty, refusing to wallow in self-pity.

speaking_style.tone: Polite with intermittent flashes of aggression
quirks: downplays her own well-being to avoid pity
example_dialogues: I won't go and save him. I'm gonna punch his face in.

famous_lines: I won't go and save him. I'm gonna punch his face in.

background.summary: A descendant of the Gojo and Zenin clans, Yuka is a talented jujutsu sorcerer fighting a terminal brain tumor. She is locked in a complex, antagonistic yet protective relationship with her brother, Tsurugi, following a dispute over their grandfather's ring.
key_events: Conflict with Tsurugi over the inheritance of Yuta's ring
Rescued Tsurugi despite claiming she wouldn't
Made a binding vow trading her life for a boost in cursed energy and Ten Shadows Technique
Summoned Mahoraga during the duel with Dabura Karaba

emotional_tendencies: empathetic toward those struggling with morality
values: treating the root cause of curses rather than the symptoms
personality.description: Yuki is a fiercely independent and unconventional sorcerer who operates outside the authority of Jujutsu Headquarters. She possesses a strong sense of self and refuses to be constrained by traditional expectations, maintaining a bright and defiant attitude even in the face of death.

patterns: casual even when discussing heavy topics
quirks: frequently asks others 'what kind of girls do you like?'
uses physical intimidation as a form of social correction
example_dialogues: What kind of girls do you like?
I like the rough type. But I'll have to beat you into shape!

famous_lines: What kind of girls do you like?
I like the rough type. But I'll have to beat you into shape!

background.summary: A former Star Plasma Vessel and one of only four Special Grade sorcerers. Unlike her peers, she refuses to take missions from Jujutsu Headquarters, instead spending her time researching a way to eliminate cursed energy at its source.
key_events: Met Suguru Geto in 2007 and influenced his views on human extinction
Mentored Aoi Todo
Opposed Kenjaku during the Culling Game
Sacrificed herself by creating a black hole to attempt to defeat Kenjaku

personality.description: Yuko is a timid and sensitive individual who deeply values genuine connections. She struggles with self-esteem regarding her physical appearance and chooses to suppress her romantic feelings for Yuji Itadori rather than pursue a relationship based on her superficial transformation.

background.summary: A former classmate of Yuji Itadori from Junior High who underwent a significant physical transformation after moving to Tokyo. She reconnected with Yuji during the Death Painting Arc but decided against pursuing a romantic relationship to maintain her personal integrity.
key_events: Developed a crush on Yuji after overhearing him express that he liked her.
Underwent a significant physical transformation due to stress after moving to Tokyo.
Sought advice from Nobara Kugisaki regarding Yuji's preferences.
Deliberately chose not to reveal her feelings to Yuji to avoid being liked merely for her new appearance.
Had a chance encounter with Yuji in their hometown to discuss their past and feelings about snow.

emotional_tendencies: Capable of cold-blooded deception for the greater good
personality.description: Originally a timid and isolated boy haunted by his curse, Yuta has grown into a mature, highly capable sorcerer. While generally friendly and socially adjusted, he possesses a frightening resolve and is willing to adopt an apathetic or 'monster' persona to protect his allies and fulfill his duties.

speaking_style.tone: Polite, serious, occasionally cold or intimidating
patterns: Often apologetic when forced to act violently

famous_lines: I want to believe that it's okay to keep living.
Because I'm blessed.

background.summary: A descendant of Michizane Sugawara and a distant relative of Satoru Gojo, Yuta was haunted by the cursed spirit of his childhood friend Rika Orimoto. After enrolling at Tokyo Jujutsu High, he learned to channel his immense energy, eventually freeing Rika and becoming a special grade sorcerer. He later trained in Africa, returned to participate in the Culling Game, and became the head of the Gojo Clan before passing away in old age.
key_events: Cursing Rika Orimoto
Defeating Suguru Geto during the Night Parade of a Hundred Demons
Executing and immediately reviving Yuji Itadori to deceive the higher-ups
Fighting in the Culling Game to save Tsumiki Fushiguro
Assuming control of Satoru Gojo's body to battle Sukuna

personality.description: He was a man who obediently accepted the status quo and norms of the Walls without complaint, even when facing harsh criticism from military and noble superiors.

background.summary: The 11th Commander led the Survey Corps prior to Keith Shadis. His tenure was marked by high casualty rates and a failure to secure victories or complete outposts, leading to significant scrutiny from the political elite.
key_events: Endured a public critique by politicians regarding the Survey Corps' failure to produce results.
Killed during a Titan expedition.

personality.description: A dedicated and highly trusted soldier who maintains a professional and occasionally cynical demeanor. He strictly adheres to chain-of-command and shows little patience for those he deems inferior or untrustworthy.

speaking_style.tone: Formal, blunt, and dismissive of low-ranking personnel
quirks: Refuses to share classified information with those lacking rank
example_dialogues: Listen, recruit. I can't talk to you. Go get your superior officer. If he's not drunk, that is.

famous_lines: Listen, recruit. I can't talk to you. Go get your superior officer. If he's not drunk, that is.

background.summary: A veteran soldier of the Survey Corps' Fourth Squad under Hange Zoë, recognized for his protective goggles. He was a trusted operative involved in critical missions, including the protection of Eren and Historia and the operation against the Female Titan, before being killed by the Military Police First Interior Squad.
key_events: 57th Expedition Outside the Walls
Stohess District operation
Utgard Castle battle
Attempted rescue of Eren and Historia

personality.description: Unlike her siblings who maintained a stoic or solemn demeanor during family ceremonies, Abel showed a rare instance of excitement and curiosity during a moment of crisis.

background.summary: A daughter of Rod Reiss and a member of the royal family. She lived within the Reiss family residence in Wall Sheena and was killed during Grisha Yeager's attack on the Reiss Chapel in 845.
key_events: Witnessed Frieda Reiss inherit the Founding Titan from Uri Reiss in 842
Killed during the Reiss Chapel massacre in 845

personality.description: Abnormal Titans deviate from the standard behavior of mindlessly devouring humans. They exhibit irregular movement patterns, such as running or jumping, and may ignore humans to target strategic locations. Some demonstrate rudimentary intelligence, speech, or emotional responses related to their past human lives.

quirks: moaning while speaking
tearing at own flesh when frustrated
example_dialogues: Subject of Ymir.
Lady Ymir.
Welcome home.

famous_lines: Subject of Ymir.
Lady Ymir.
Welcome home.

background.summary: Abnormal Titans are a variant of Pure Titans originating from humans transformed by the Founding Titan or specific titan serums. They played various roles, from the Wall Titans forming the fortifications of Paradis Island to individuals like Rod Reiss or Connie's mother, who retained vestiges of their former humanity.
key_events: Construction of the Walls by the 145th King using Wall Titans.
The Talking Titan's encounter with Ilse Langnar.
Rod Reiss's transformation and march toward Orvud District.
Reversion to human form after the power of the Titans was extinguished.

personality.description: A kind and diligent family man who prioritized protecting his daughter from government persecution. He maintained a cheerful disposition despite living in poverty.

example_dialogues: I don't know, why don't you ask Dr. Yeager when he arrives?

famous_lines: I don't know, why don't you ask Dr. Yeager when he arrives?

background.summary: A member of the Ackerman clan who lived in poverty within a forest in Shiganshina District to avoid government persecution. He lived as a hunter and gardener with his wife and daughter, Mikasa.
key_events: Driven out of cities due to clan persecution
Met his wife while living in the mountains
Assassinated by human traffickers seeking to sell his family

core_identity.role: Escort, former servant to the Reiss family

personality.description: Alma is characterized by extreme indifference and hostility toward her daughter, Historia. She is timid and passive, preferring to avoid responsibilities and reality. Her primary motivation is personal survival and maintaining a connection to power through Rod Reiss.

quirks: avoids eye contact or verbal engagement with daughter

famous_lines: If only I had the courage to kill this girl...
I regret having been born... I regret your birth.

background.summary: A former servant and mistress to Rod Reiss who gave birth to an illegitimate child, Historia Reiss. She spent her life avoiding the responsibilities of motherhood on her parents' farm before being executed by the First Interior Squad.
key_events: Became mistress to Rod Reiss
Gave birth to Historia Reiss
Sent to live on a remote farm to hide her pregnancy
Executed by the First Interior Squad for being a political liability

personality.description: Information regarding specific personality traits, emotional tendencies, or core values is currently unavailable in the source text.

background.summary: Alois Tybur is a young boy and the son of Willy Tybur. He is a member of the noble Tybur family and relocated to the Liberio headquarters following the Marley Mid-East War.
key_events: Arrived in Liberio with the Tybur family following the Marley Mid-East War.

core_identity.role: Soldier / Aide to Commander Dot Pixis

emotional_tendencies: Capable of showing surprise and relief
personality.description: Anka is a composed and professional soldier who prioritizes objective analysis. While she usually maintains a stoic exterior, she possesses enough confidence to reprimand her superior, Dot Pixis, for his unprofessional behavior.

quirks: Uses direct reprimands with superiors
Takes detailed notes during sensitive briefings

famous_lines: There is a limit to how much one can be motivated by fear.
I do not want to be stuck taking care of you.

background.summary: A high-ranking member of the Garrison and a primary aide to Dot Pixis. She is instrumental in tactical planning and acts as the commander's enforcer for his personal habits and official duties.
key_events: Assisted in the Trost District wall sealing operation
Helped orchestrate the coup against the Royal Government
Monitored meetings with Yelena and the Yeagerists

emotional_tendencies: prone to violence when composure is lost
personality.description: An isolated individual who hides her true emotions beneath an apathetic and stoic facade. She values her personal goal of returning to her father above the mission, often viewing her surroundings with a cynical, realistic, and analytical lens.

quirks: uses sarcasm in intense situations
admits to being 'worthless' or 'evil' without self-loathing

famous_lines: I didn't used to care about anything. But it's different now. I think I've committed irredeemable sins...But. If it meant I could return to my father... I'd do it all over again.
I'm a feeble maiden.
They are not friends and are just Eldian devils.

background.summary: A Marleyan Warrior candidate trained from childhood by her adoptive father. Infiltrated the Walls as part of the Paradis Island Operation to retrieve the Founding Titan, operating under the guise of a 104th Training Corps graduate.
key_events: Training under father
Infiltration of Paradis Island
Destruction of Wall Maria
Battle of Stohess District
Crystallization and four-year comatose state
Participation in the Alliance to stop the Rumbling

core_identity.role: 15th Commander of the Survey Corps, Colossus Titan inheritor

values: the truth about the outside world
personality.description: A brilliant tactician who prioritizes logic and morality. Despite early self-esteem issues and physical weakness, he possesses immense courage and a willingness to sacrifice his own humanity to achieve victory. He is deeply empathetic, often struggling with the moral weight of his strategic decisions.

quirks: tends to ramble when excited about the outside world
habit of apologizing or deferring to others despite his intelligence
example_dialogues: I wonder if...just maybe...there was another, different path.

famous_lines: I wonder if...just maybe...there was another, different path.

background.summary: Born in Shiganshina, Armin grew up dreaming of the outside world via his grandfather's forbidden book. After witnessing the fall of Wall Maria and the death of his parents, he joined the military to protect his friends and see the world. He eventually became a key strategist for the Survey Corps, inherited the Colossus Titan, and succeeded Hange Zoë as Commander.
key_events: Fall of Wall Maria
Trost District battle
Discovery of the Female Titan's identity
Battle of Shiganshina
Inheriting the Colossus Titan
Raid on Liberio
Battle of Heaven and Earth

personality.description: A deeply compassionate and stoic father figure who prioritizes the safety of children over his own personal grief. He believes in shared responsibility and the necessity of moving beyond the sins of the past to stop cycles of violence.

patterns: Uses metaphors like the 'forest' to describe the harsh world
quirks: Speaks with a distinct Dauper/southern Marleyan accent

famous_lines: We've gotta let the children outta this jungle, at the very least. Else the same thing's just gunna happen again and again.... As adults, it's our responsibility to shoulder...the sins and hatred of the past.

background.summary: A hunter from Dauper village and father to Sasha Blouse. After the death of his daughter at the hands of Gabi Braun, he chose to forgive the perpetrator rather than seek vengeance, hoping to spare the children involved from the cycle of hatred.
key_events: Advocated for evolving the village way of life to accommodate refugees.
Reunited with his daughter Sasha during the Titan attack on his village.
Took in Marleyan children (Gabi and Falco) into his home.
Refused to execute his daughter's killer, instead choosing to accept personal blame for sending her into the military.

core_identity.role: Civilians, Merchants, Artisans, Journalists, and Refugees

personality.description: The civilian population displays a wide spectrum of attitudes, ranging from blind faith in the Walls and hatred toward the Survey Corps to humble resilience and desire for reform.

speaking_style.tone: Varies by social standing and context; often emotive, accusatory, or panicked.
patterns: Complaining about taxes and military incompetence
Expressing communal fear during Titan attacks
Arguing over political or military strategy

famous_lines: The Survey Corps are a waste of taxes.
We should not defile the wall with human hands further.
Stay away from him, it was you people who killed him!

background.summary: These background characters represent the general populace of Paradis Island and Marley. They are often defined by their reactions to the main events of the story, such as the Fall of Wall Maria, the activities of the Survey Corps, the Rumbling, and the political shifts within the government.
key_events: The Fall of Wall Maria
The Battle of Trost District
The Stohess District confrontation
The crowning of Historia Reiss
The Rumbling

personality.description: General representation of anonymous Survey Corps soldiers. They are characterized by their adherence to military structure, their high mortality rate, and their dedication to the cause of humanity, often displaying a mix of professional resolve and human fear when facing Titans or existential threats.

Use of military terminology

famous_lines: Humanity will one day triumph over the Titans!

personality.description: A diverse collective ranging from fearful residents fleeing Titans to opportunistic merchants and religious zealots. Generally wary of authority and outsiders, often projecting their frustrations onto the military or political figures.

expressing relief or sorrow in public forums

personality.description: Leon is characterized by his lack of professionalism and poor discipline, exemplified by his attire. Despite being ill-prepared and consistently late, he maintains a sense of bravado and a willingness to confront enemies.

example_dialogues: My bad. Sorry I'm late.... Hope you left some for me!

famous_lines: My bad. Sorry I'm late.... Hope you left some for me!

background.summary: A soldier in the Survey Corps who appears in a gag preview. He is noted for wearing his uniform incorrectly and arriving late to critical combat situations.
key_events: Arrived late to assist Squad Levi during an encounter with an Abnormal Titan.

personality.description: A standard, non-intelligent Pure Titan that exhibits primitive predatory instincts and basic physical responses to pain.

background.summary: A 7-meter Pure Titan captured by Hange Zoë following the reconquest of Trost District for scientific experimentation. It was subjected to tests regarding communication, pain response, and sunlight deprivation before being killed by Annie Leonhart.
key_events: Captured by Survey Corps after the Trost District battle
Subjected to experiments by Hange Zoë
Killed by Annie Leonhart during the night

personality.description: A quiet and reserved young man who perceives himself as having a weak will, often following popular opinion rather than taking initiative. Despite his initial outward appearance of indifference, he harbors deep guilt over his actions but rationalizes them through a fatalistic view that the world is inherently cruel.

speaking_style.tone: soft-spoken, resigned, and occasionally cold or detached
patterns: often speaks in justifications for his actions
quirks: frequently apologetic
tends to sweat when nervous

famous_lines: What a strange feeling... I'm barely even scared. I can see... everything around me... I feel like... any outcome would be acceptable.
Nothing could have made a difference. Not in a world... that is this... cruel.

background.summary: An Eldian from Marley trained as a child soldier to inherit the Colossus Titan. He infiltrated the Walls as part of a mission to retrieve the Founding Titan, successfully living undercover as a member of the 104th Training Corps before being exposed.
key_events: Breaching Wall Maria in 845
Graduating 3rd in the 104th Training Corps
Revealing his identity as the Colossus Titan
Battle of Shiganshina

personality.description: Bizarre Titans are mindless, highly dangerous boss entities that function as reskinned combat versions of the Female, Armored, and Beast Titans.

background.summary: The Bizarre Titans are unusual, high-difficulty Titans encountered as Dire Subjugation bosses in the Attack on Titan video game. They mimic the combat abilities, physical appearances, and defenses of existing main Titans.
key_events: Appear as Dire Subjugation bosses in Attack on Titan

personality.description: A well-meaning and kind-hearted officer who prioritizes his comrades' well-being. While he maintains a serious demeanor on the battlefield, he is prone to self-blame when his attempts to boost morale or provide for his team go awry.

famous_lines: I'm sorry...I shouldn't have spent two months' worth of our food budget on tonight.
I apologize for having informed Flegel of the mission.

background.summary: A Survey Corps team leader within Hange Zoë's Fourth Squad. He served during the battle of Shiganshina, where he was killed in action during the confrontation with Bertolt Hoover's Colossal Titan.
key_events: Attempted to boost morale by purchasing meat for the Survey Corps before the expedition.
Inadvertently informed the Reeves Company of the secret expedition departure.
Participated in the engagement against the Armored Titan.
Killed by the blast of the Colossal Titan's transformation.

personality.description: A grounded and cynical individual who avoids lightheartedness and social drama. He values realism over idealism and is quick to point out the hypocrisy of his peers.

patterns: uses blunt honesty to shut down conversations
employs sarcasm when disagreeing with idealism
quirks: often serves as a voice of reason/sobering influence for younger or more naive recruits

famous_lines: You're probably no better because you also chose to join the MPs.
Good luck.

background.summary: A graduate of the 104th Training Corps who joined the Military Police Brigade stationed in Stohess District. He is known for his pragmatic outlook and past deployment in the Trost District.
key_events: Graduated from the 104th Training Corps
Stationed in Stohess District
Defended Annie Leonhart against harassment from Marlowe and Hitch
Challenged Marlowe Freudenberg's idealistic views on reforming the Military Police

personality.description: Information regarding specific personality traits, emotional tendencies, or core values is not available in the provided source material.

background.summary: Bruno Tybur is a young boy and the son of Willy Tybur. He is a member of the noble Tybur family and accompanied his family to Liberio following the Marley Mid-East War.
key_events: Arrival in Liberio with the Tybur family following the Marley Mid-East War.

personality.description: A high-ranking, authoritative military leader defined by his pride in Marley's history and his anxiety regarding the nation's diminishing global power and military relevance.

patterns: Sarcastic when expressing doubt or professional contempt
example_dialogues: Once... we were Marley, a nation of heroes who had defeated the Eldian devils. But now... look at what we've become...

famous_lines: Once... we were Marley, a nation of heroes who had defeated the Eldian devils. But now... look at what we've become...

background.summary: General of the Marleyan military who oversaw the transition from Titan-based warfare to modern conventional technology. He struggled with the shifting geopolitical landscape until he was killed during the Attack Titan's assault on Liberio.
key_events: Presided over the post-Marley Mid-East War military meeting
Approved Zeke Yeager's proposal to reclaim the Founding Titan
Killed during the Attack Titan's attack on the Liberio festival

values: The inherent value of existence over societal achievement
personality.description: Carla values the intrinsic worth of human existence regardless of external recognition or greatness. She is deeply protective of her family, prone to worrying about their safety, and acts as a grounding, moral anchor for her husband and son.

patterns: Uses rhetorical questions to challenge ambition
Emotional and vulnerable when pushed to extremes

famous_lines: He doesn't need to become great. Why would he have to be better than everyone else? He's already great. Because he was born into this world.
I don't want you to leave me alone to die.

background.summary: A resident of Shiganshina District who worked as a waitress before marrying Grisha Yeager. She lived a quiet life focused on her children until the fall of Wall Maria, where she was killed by a Titan after being trapped in the debris of her home.
key_events: Cured of a deadly disease by Grisha Yeager
Marriage to Grisha Yeager and birth of Eren Yeager
Opposition to Eren joining the Survey Corps
Death during the destruction of Shiganshina

personality.description: A focused and disciplined soldier who prioritizes tactical efficiency, ammunition conservation, and the protection of his squad and Titan asset.

background.summary: Carlo was a Marleyan soldier and member of the Panzer Unit assigned to support the Cart Titan. He participated in the battle at Fort Slava and the defense of Liberio, where he was killed by Sasha Blouse while fighting the Survey Corps.
key_events: Fought at Fort Slava against the Mid-East Allied Forces
Rescued Pieck Finger and Porco Galliard from capture
Participated in the battle against the Survey Corps in Liberio
Killed in action by Sasha Blouse

personality.description: A specially bred, highly disciplined military horse known for being unintimidated by Titans and the noise of combat gear.

background.summary: Charlotte was a Survey Corps horse ridden by Dita Ness. She was noted for her high-speed capability and resilience during expeditions.
key_events: Participated in the 57th Expedition Outside the Walls
Returned to Dita Ness unprompted after a Titan kill
Left riderless following Dita Ness's death at the hands of the Female Titan
Appeared as a spirit alongside Dita Ness to welcome Hange Zoë in death

personality.description: A self-serving politician who prioritizes the stability of his own power and the survival of the elite over the lives of common citizens.

famous_lines: The Reiss family will erase all of the usurpers' memories.
You have slave blood.

background.summary: A former assemblyman under the figurehead King Fritz. He oversaw the trial of Erwin Smith and attempted to block refugees from Wall Sheena during a perceived crisis. He was eventually overthrown, imprisoned, and tortured by the military.
key_events: Overseeing the treason trial of Erwin Smith
Ordering the closure of Wall Sheena gates to refugees
Being overthrown and tortured by Darius Zackly
Imprisonment following the rise of Historia Reiss

values: Human unity through shared experience and sacrifice
personality.description: A dedicated, no-nonsense soldier who prioritizes the survival of humanity over political posturing. He is deeply critical of military corruption and acts as a mentor to new recruits.

speaking_style.tone: Direct, professional, and cynical toward authority.
example_dialogues: The only thing I care about is the most efficient way to kill Titans.
Are you wondering why I'm able to get away with writing these kinds of things? Well, I'm not the kind of man interested in promotions.

famous_lines: The only thing I care about is the most efficient way to kill Titans.
If they send me off to the killing fields, all the better.

background.summary: A veteran former Survey Corps member turned Training Corps instructor. He authored an unofficial 'white paper' to educate trainees on tactical realities and recruit them into the Survey Corps.
key_events: Served as a long-term member of the Survey Corps
Retired from the Survey Corps to become a Training Corps instructor
Authored an unofficial white paper on Titan combat and military tactics following the fall of Wall Maria

personality.description: Colt is a disciplined and highly tactical soldier who balances his duty to the Marleyan military with deep, unwavering devotion to his younger brother, Falco. He displays natural leadership and analytical skills but is also prone to emotional vulnerability when his family is at risk.

patterns: often uses deferential language with superiors
quirks: admits to having a poor tolerance for alcohol
example_dialogues: It's okay, Falco!! Your big brother will never leave your side!!

famous_lines: It's okay, Falco!! Your big brother will never leave your side!!

background.summary: An Eldian living in the Liberio internment zone, Colt was forced into the Warrior program after his uncle's involvement with the Eldian Restorationists came to light. He served as a top-tier candidate for the Beast Titan until his death while attempting to protect his brother during the War for Paradis.
key_events: Forced to join Warrior program to clear family name
Served in the Mid-East Allied Forces war
Attempted to rescue Falco Grice from Eren Yeager's attack in Liberio
Died while trying to protect Falco during his Titan transformation

emotional_tendencies: prone to anger and irritation after trauma
personality.description: Originally an outgoing, goofball trainee who struggled with deep comprehension, Connie matures into a soldier defined by tragic loss. He is deeply protective of his comrades and struggles with the moral compromises of war, oscillating between naive enthusiasm and bitter pragmatism.

speaking_style.tone: Casual, informal, and frequently emotional or reactive.
patterns: often speaks in shorter, reactive bursts
quirks: admits to his own stupidity or denseness
expresses frustration through outbursts
example_dialogues: I want to become a soldier my mother would be proud of.
Let's go and save some people in trouble.
Even an idiot like me can tell how bad things are.

famous_lines: I... want to become a soldier my mother would be proud of. So... let's go and save some people in trouble.

background.summary: A graduate of the 104th Training Corps from Ragako village, Connie joined the Survey Corps to make his family proud. His life was devastated by the destruction of his village by Titans, specifically the loss of his family. He served in the Raid on Liberio and the final battle against Eren, eventually becoming a peace ambassador.
key_events: Graduated 8th in his class
Discovery of the Titan-transformed residents of Ragako
Death of Sasha Blouse
Attempted to feed Falco to his mother
Participated in the final battle against the Yeagerists and the Founding Titan

personality.description: Dan is a minor background character with no distinct personality traits or dialogue provided in the source material.

background.summary: Dan was an employee of the Reeves Company residing in the Trost District. He accompanied Dimo Reeves during the transfer of Eren Yeager and Historia Reiss to the Military Police Brigade.
key_events: Accompanied Dimo Reeves to hand over captives to the Military Police Brigade.
Killed by the Military Police Brigade during the handover.

personality.description: A creative and pragmatic soldier who prioritizes the morale of recruits and utilizes unconventional tactical maneuvers in combat.

famous_lines: Don't be too hard on the troops, lest none of them enter the Survey Corps.

background.summary: A Survey Corps team leader who served during the 57th Expedition Outside the Walls. He was known for his tactical use of signal flares against Titans before being killed in action by the Female Titan.
key_events: Attempted to warn Erwin Smith to ease up on recruitment pressure
Participated in the 57th Expedition Outside the Walls
Led a squad in an attempted ambush of the Female Titan
Killed in action by the Female Titan

core_identity.role: General of the Three Military Branches

personality.description: Initially presented as a stoic, objective leader focused on the survival of humanity, Zackly reveals himself to be a manipulative nihilist who orchestrated a revolution primarily to humiliate the monarchy. He possesses a sadistic streak, evidenced by his obsession with perverse torture devices.

quirks: Maintains a casual demeanor even during high-stakes political upheaval

famous_lines: Whether this revolution is good or bad for humanity is of no interest to me. I suppose that makes me quite the villain. But... you're no different, are you?

background.summary: As the highest-ranking official in the Paradis military, Zackly acted as the final arbiter of military law. He secretly harbored a lifelong hatred for the royal government, eventually leading a military coup to overthrow the monarchy before being assassinated by Yeagerist rebels.
key_events: Presided over the trial of Eren Yeager
Orchestrated the revolution against the Royal Government
Constructed and utilized torture devices on political prisoners
Assassinated via a bomb planted by Yeagerists

emotional_tendencies: lacks emotional capacity in extreme stress
personality.description: Daz is defined by a perpetual, debilitating fear of death and Titans. While originally prone to desertion and suicidal ideation due to terror, he displays a thread of selflessness when reminded of his duty to protect his family.

patterns: frequent use of ellipses to indicate hesitation or stuttering
quirks: admits his own cowardice openly
often pleads for his life

famous_lines: I can't fight the Titans.... My buddies were eaten right in front of me.... They were eaten alive...and I didn't feel anything! No sadness or hate...I was just...incredibly grateful that it wasn't me....

background.summary: A former member of the 104th Training Corps who struggled with the harsh realities of war against Titans. He survived the Battle of Trost through the influence of his superiors and later defected to the Yeagerist faction to serve Eren Yeager's cause.
key_events: Participated in the 104th Training Corps mountain exercise
Attempted suicide and desertion during the Battle of Trost
Convinced by Dot Pixis to return to duty
Joined the Yeagerists and was killed by Connie Springer while guarding an airship

core_identity.role: Mythological entity / Figure of Eldian folklore

personality.description: A figure of Eldian mythology depicted as a demonic entity capable of granting immense, reality-altering power. The character is primarily a cultural construct rather than a tangible person with a confirmed personality.

background.summary: The Devil of All Earth is a central figure in Eldian myth, credited with making a deal with Ymir Fritz to grant her the power of the Titans. Historical analysis suggests the 'Devil' may be a fabrication or a misinterpretation of Ymir's discovery of the source of all living matter. The myth was used by Marley as propaganda to demonize the Subjects of Ymir.
key_events: Made a deal with Ymir Fritz 1,820 years prior to the current era.
Allegedly slain by the Marleyan hero Helos during the Great Titan War.
Identity exposed as mythological propaganda by Willy Tybur.

personality.description: Initially appears as an arrogant, self-serving merchant who values his property over human lives. Later reveals a more complex, pragmatic nature; he is a shrewd businessman who prioritizes the survival of his company and employees above all else, eventually showing a willingness to cooperate with the Survey Corps for mutual benefit.

famous_lines: People's lives are not worth half as much as my cart.
It is natural for soldiers to die for the sake of protecting people.

background.summary: The boss of the Reeves Company based in Trost District. He was forced by the Royal Government to act as a pawn in kidnapping Eren Yeager and Historia Reiss, but eventually struck a deal with Levi Ackerman to support the Survey Corps in exchange for his company's survival. He was assassinated by Kenny Ackerman.
key_events: Blocked the Trost District gate with his cart during the Titan invasion.
Kidnapped Eren Yeager and Historia Reiss under government orders.
Formed an alliance with the Survey Corps to secure his company's future.
Assassinated by Kenny Ackerman for his perceived betrayal of the Interior Military Police.

personality.description: Dirk is a highly composed and serious soldier who maintains a detached, professional demeanor. He avoids unnecessary conflict and remains unfazed by chaotic situations, prioritizing his mission and the chain of command above personal reactions.
