famous_lines: Once we are past the mountain, we will have reached Shiganshina.
Only a few Titans are left, you should rest while we handle them.

background.summary: A dedicated Survey Corps team leader, Dirk played a supporting role in key operations including the reclaim of Wall Maria. He was a trusted advisor to Erwin Smith and was responsible for protecting the Corps' horses during the battle at Shiganshina, where he was ultimately killed by the Beast Titan.
key_events: Imprisoned during the Royal Government crisis
Participated in the meeting regarding Grisha Yeager's secrets
Assigned to protect horses during the Return to Shiganshina arc
Killed by a barrage of rocks from the Beast Titan

personality.description: Dirk was a reserved child who silently observed the intense and often traumatic events surrounding the Reiss family's dynastic rituals.

background.summary: Youngest son of Rod Reiss and member of the noble Reiss family. He witnessed the transfer of the Founding Titan power between his uncle Uri and sister Frieda in 842. He was killed in 845 during Grisha Yeager's attack on the Reiss family chapel.
key_events: Witnessed the Titan power transfer between Uri Reiss and Frieda Reiss in 842.
Killed during the 845 Grisha Yeager assault on the Reiss family residence.

personality.description: Ness is a dedicated and serious leader who takes his responsibilities toward new recruits seriously. He is not a fan of unnecessary combat, preferring avoidance, yet he is courageous and professional when forced to fight. Despite his stern duty, he maintains a warm, lighthearted side, particularly toward his horse, Charlotte.

background.summary: A Survey Corps Team Leader who specialized in instructing recruits on Erwin Smith's Long-Distance Enemy Scouting Formation. He participated in the 57th Expedition Outside the Walls and was killed in action by the Female Titan while attempting to protect his squad.
key_events: Instruction of new recruits regarding scouting formations
Participation in the 57th Expedition Outside the Walls
Death during the encounter with the Female Titan

core_identity.role: Soldier / Member of the First Interior Squad

emotional_tendencies: Capable of feeling deep guilt and remorse under extreme pressure
Devoted to the king to a fault
values: Maintenance of social order through violence
personality.description: A man defined by his rigid devotion to the royal government. He views torture and murder as necessary, moral, and justified actions for the greater good of humanity's peace. While initially arrogant and condescending toward the Survey Corps, he possesses a hidden capacity for regret once forced to confront the suffering he has caused.

patterns: Uses frequent pauses or ellipses when emotional
Formal address when speaking to those he deems below him

famous_lines: I believe in the security of the Walls...and the king...Our actions weren't misguided...or so I thought...
So this is how much it hurts...Just torture me to death...It's all...I ever did with my blood-stained life.

background.summary: A high-ranking member of the First Interior Squad tasked with suppressing threats to the royal government, including internal dissidents and citizens who knew too much about the history of the Walls.
key_events: Apprehended and killed Erwin Smith's father
Participated in the murder of the Arlert couple
Tortured Minister Nick to death
Kidnapped and tortured by Hange Zoë and Levi Ackerman
Betrayed the secret of the Reiss family under duress

core_identity.role: Chief Official of the Southern Territories / Commander

emotional_tendencies: willing to bear the burden of being a 'butcher'
personality.description: An eccentric and intelligent leader who remains calm under extreme pressure. He possesses the ability to make cold, calculated decisions for the greater good of humanity, even when those decisions involve heavy moral costs or personal sacrifice.

speaking_style.tone: Formal, commanding, yet philosophical and slightly playful.
patterns: often uses hypothetical scenarios to make a point
quirks: jokes about being eaten by beautiful female Titans
frequently drinks on duty

famous_lines: I would not mind being eaten by a Titan if it happened to be a stunning beauty.
To give humanity a chance to survive, I am willing to become a butcher.

background.summary: The highest-ranking commander of the Garrison in the Southern Territories. He played a critical role in the defense of Trost District, the political insurrection against the Royal Government, and the final conflicts involving Marley and the Yeagerists.
key_events: Authorized the use of Eren Yeager to seal the breach in Wall Rose
Orchestrated the bloodless coup d'état against the Royal Government
Acted as temporary Commander-in-chief after Darius Zackly's assassination
Transformed into a Pure Titan due to Zeke Yeager's spinal fluid and subsequently killed in battle

personality.description: A soldier within the elite interior forces who serves under Kenny Ackerman, displaying readiness for lethal engagement against specific targets.

background.summary: Duran was a member of the Military Police Brigade's First Interior Squad and the Anti-Personnel Control Squad stationed within Wall Sheena. He participated in the operation to eliminate Levi Ackerman and his squad.
key_events: Stationed on a rooftop during the ambush on Levi Ackerman's squad at a bar.
Killed by Levi Ackerman while attempting to intercept him.

core_identity.role: Soldier / Second-in-command of Special Operations Squad

personality.description: Eld is a disciplined, no-nonsense leader who values duty above all else. He is typically reserved and blunt, preferring direct communication. As a veteran, he maintains a level head under pressure, though he is capable of camaraderie and teasing those he trusts.

quirks: Uses sarcasm to break tension with subordinates

famous_lines: Eren...you don't know it yet, but you'll probably find out soon...why Erwin Smith leads the hope of humankind, the Survey Corps.

background.summary: An elite soldier hand-picked for Levi's Special Operations Squad, serving as the unit's second-in-command. He was responsible for protecting Eren Yeager and monitoring his titan experiments before being killed in action by the Female Titan.
key_events: Appointed as second-in-command of the Special Operations Squad
Participated in the monitoring of Eren Yeager's titan experiments
Symbolically bit his hand to show solidarity with Eren
Engaged the Female Titan in the Forest of Giant Trees
Killed in action by the Female Titan while attempting to protect his squad

personality.description: A young girl characterized by her reserved and innocent demeanor. She is notably more composed and quiet than her sibling.

background.summary: A child residing in the Karanes District who observed the return of the Survey Corps following the 57th Expedition Outside the Walls.
key_events: Witnessed the return of the Survey Corps from the 57th Expedition Outside the Walls.

emotional_tendencies: Feels deep, hidden remorse for atrocities committed
values: The necessity of sacrifice for a greater goal
personality.description: A deeply complex strategist who masked a passionate, revolutionary heart behind a cold, detached military exterior. He operated as a mole for years, committing horrific acts against his own people to maintain his cover and achieve a long-term goal of Eldian liberation.

patterns: Monotone even during moments of violence

famous_lines: There is no such thing as truth in this world. That is our reality. Anyone can become a god or a devil. All it takes is for someone to claim that to be the truth.

background.summary: Born into an Eldian revolutionary family, Kruger witnessed his parents being burned alive by Marleyan authorities. He infiltrated the Marleyan military as an officer and spent years as the 'Owl,' secret leader of the Eldian Restorationists, orchestrating a path to pass on the Attack Titan to Grisha Yeager.
key_events: Witnessed his parents' execution as a child
Infiltrated the Public Security Authorities
Inherited the Attack Titan
Transformed into a Titan to destroy a Marleyan naval vessel
Passed the Attack Titan to Grisha Yeager

core_identity.role: Soldier, Attack Titan, Founding Titan, War Hammer Titan

personality.description: Eren is characterized by his intense, unwavering pursuit of freedom. While initially fueled by a simplistic, black-and-white desire for revenge against Titans, he matures into a complex, stoic, and burdened individual who perceives the world's interconnectedness. He is fiercely protective of his friends but ultimately willing to sacrifice himself and others to achieve his personal mission.

speaking_style.tone: Aggressive, passionate, and blunt; later becomes cold, stoic, and enigmatic
quirks: Tendency to make grand declarations
Unintentional persuasion of others
example_dialogues: I will destroy them! Every last one of them!
My head's... Gotten all messed up... The Founder's power has made it so that there's no past or future... It all exists at once.

famous_lines: I'll wrap that scarf around you, now and forever, as many times as you want.
I don't want Mikasa to find another man. I want her to think about me for the rest of my life.
I'm going to destroy the world. I'm going to exterminate all life outside the island.

background.summary: Born in Shiganshina, Eren's life was shattered by the fall of Wall Maria and the death of his mother. After inheriting the Attack and Founding Titans from his father, he joined the Survey Corps to eradicate Titans. Upon discovering the truth about the world, Marley, and his own future, he transitioned from a soldier fighting for survival to a man orchestrating a global genocide for the sake of his people's freedom.
key_events: Witnessed mother's death during the fall of Shiganshina
Graduated 5th in the 104th Training Corps
Inherited the Attack and Founding Titans
Participated in the Raid on Liberio
Initiated the Rumbling

values: the meaning of fallen soldiers' lives
personality.description: A complex leader who balances ruthless pragmatism with deep remorse. While outwardly a master strategist willing to sacrifice anything for victory, he is secretly driven by a personal childhood dream to uncover the truth of the world.

quirks: Uses rhetoric to sway large groups
Maintains a calm front even in dire situations

famous_lines: Everything I have done, I did thinking that this day would come. That someday... I would be able to check my answers.
It is the duty of the living to give meaning to the dead, and that they must carry out their duty in a way that the living will give their own deaths meaning.

background.summary: The 13th Commander of the Survey Corps, Erwin was a brilliant strategist who modernized scouting formations. Driven by the death of his father, who was killed by the government for his theories on memory manipulation, Erwin sought the truth about the world's origins while leading humanity's fight against Titans.
key_events: Created the Long-Distance Enemy Scouting Formation
Led the coup d'état against the Royal Government
Orchestrated the operation to retake Wall Maria and Shiganshina
Sacrificed his life during a suicidal charge against the Beast Titan

personality.description: A man of high intellect who valued truth despite the dangerous political climate. He was protective of his son and students, exercising extreme caution by keeping his controversial theories private until he felt his son was mature enough to hear the truth.

background.summary: A teacher in a hometown within Wall Rose who suspected the official history of the Walls was fabricated. His refusal to accept the government's narrative led him to share his theories with his son, Erwin. This ultimately caused the Military Police to detain and torture him to death to silence his dissent.
key_events: Noted contradictions in state-distributed history books
Concluded that human memory had been altered to forget the history before the Walls
Shared his dangerous theory with his son, Erwin
Detained and tortured by Djel Sannes and the Military Police Brigade
Murdered and disposed of to make his death look like an accident

personality.description: Falco is a compassionate and empathetic youth who struggles with the brutality of war. Unlike his peers, he is not driven by nationalist fervor or bloodlust, but by a desire to protect those he cares about, particularly Gabi. He is a quick thinker capable of improvisation and remains humble even when praised for his achievements.

patterns: Refers to superiors by formal titles (e.g., Mr. Braun, Deputy Chief Braun)
quirks: Tends to avoid eye contact when uncomfortable
Earnest and straightforward
example_dialogues: I became a Warrior candidate because I didn't want you to inherit the Armored Titan. I wanted you to live a long life, so that we could get married and you could be happy forever.

famous_lines: I became a Warrior candidate because I didn't want you to inherit the Armored Titan. I wanted you to live a long life, so that we could get married and you could be happy forever.

background.summary: An Eldian Warrior candidate serving Marley who unintentionally inherited the Jaw Titan from Porco Galliard after being transformed into a Pure Titan by Zeke Yeager. He played a critical role in the final battle against Eren Yeager, discovering his ability to fly as the Jaw Titan.
key_events: Participation in the Marley Mid-East War
Inadvertent involvement in Eren Yeager's manipulation
Inheritance of the Jaw Titan
Infiltration of Paradis Island
Crucial participation in the battle at Fort Salta to stop the Rumbling

personality.description: Faye was a young, innocent girl who viewed the world with a sense of wonder and delight. She lacked worldly experience and heavily relied on her older brother, Grisha, for protection and guidance.

example_dialogues: It's so nice. I wonder if I'll be able to ride a blimp if I become rich some day.

famous_lines: It's so nice. I wonder if I'll be able to ride a blimp if I become rich some day.

background.summary: Born into the Eldian internment zone in Liberio, Faye was the younger sister of Grisha Yeager. She died a tragic death as a child after wandering outside the zone with her brother and being taken by Marleyan officers.
key_events: Exited the Liberio internment zone to watch a blimp
Harassed by Marleyan citizens for being an Eldian
Separated from her brother by Marleyan officers
Brutally murdered by Marleyan officers

personality.description: Fine is presented as a young girl of noble status. There is insufficient information in the provided source material to define specific behavioral traits, emotional tendencies, or personal values.

background.summary: Fine Tybur is the daughter of Willy Tybur and a member of the influential Tybur family. She accompanied her family to Liberio following the Marley Mid-East War.
key_events: Arrival in Liberio with the Tybur family to take up residence in the headquarters.

personality.description: A loving and devoted father who prioritizes his daughter's well-being over social status or political advantages. He holds a deep sense of reverence for his daughter's sacrifice, viewing symbols of his oppression as reminders of her love.

famous_lines: My daughter... sacrificed everything to earn the likes of me this armband.

background.summary: A Liberio-based Eldian and father of Pieck Finger. He suffered from a grave illness that was cured after his daughter volunteered for the Warrior Unit to inherit the Cart Titan. He survived the Rumbling and the events at Fort Salta.
key_events: Suffered from a life-threatening illness cured by his daughter's enlistment as a Warrior.
Survived the destruction of Liberio during the Rumbling.
Transformed into a Titan by the source of all living matter and later reverted to human.

emotional_tendencies: Defiant when backed into a corner
personality.description: Initially a petulant, cowardly, and arrogant young man, Flegel evolves into a courageous and cunning leader following his father's death. He possesses a strong sense of duty toward his father's memory and the citizens of Trost.

patterns: Speaks his mind regardless of social standing
Uses authoritative language when asserting leadership
quirks: Tendency to mock powerful figures behind their backs

famous_lines: Starting from today...I, Flegel Reeves, am the new boss.

background.summary: Son and successor of Dimo Reeves, Flegel inherited the Reeves Company after his father's assassination by the Military Police. He transitioned from a bystander to a key ally of the Survey Corps, using his position to expose corruption and protect the people of Trost.
key_events: Witnessed the murder of his father, Dimo Reeves, by Kenny Ackerman.
Forcibly recruited by Hange Zoë to expose the Military Police.
Acted as bait to trap corrupt Military Police members in Trost.
Publicly announced himself as the new CEO of the Reeves Company.

core_identity.role: Recruit, Soldier, De-facto leader of the Yeagerists

traits: Honest to the point of insensitivity
emotional_tendencies: Lack of empathy for perceived enemies
personality.description: Initially a self-admitted coward, Floch evolved into a radical, uncompromising nationalist. He prioritizes the survival of the Eldian Empire above all else, viewing violence and scorched-earth tactics as necessary evils. He values 'devotion' and 'dedication' to the cause and harbors deep contempt for those he perceives as traitors or impediments to Paradis's security.

quirks: Uses the phrase 'Devote your hearts!'
Openly insults others for being childish or emotional
example_dialogues: If Eren dies, Paradis will sink under a sea of blood!!
Devote your hearts!!

famous_lines: If Eren dies, Paradis will sink under a sea of blood!! The entire world will take vengeance on us!
Devote your hearts!!

background.summary: A recruit of the 104th Training Corps who joined the Survey Corps. He was the sole survivor (other than Hange and Levi's squad) of the suicide charge at the Battle of Shiganshina. Disillusioned by the choice to save Armin over Erwin Smith, he became the ideological spearhead of the Yeagerist faction, supporting Eren Yeager's plan for the Rumbling.
key_events: Participated in the suicide charge against the Beast Titan
Advocated for saving Erwin Smith over Armin Arlert
Formed the Yeagerists to support Eren Yeager
Led the assault on the Marleyan harbor
Attempted to prevent the pursuit of Eren by sabotaging the flying boat

emotional_tendencies: Prone to fear in high-stress situations
personality.description: Florian was a young, fearful girl who sought safety and comfort from her mother during moments of extreme danger.

background.summary: The youngest daughter of Rod Reiss and his wife, Florian lived within the Reiss family residence inside Wall Sheena. She was killed during the massacre at the Reiss Chapel in 845.
key_events: Breach of Wall Maria (845)
Invasion of the Reiss Chapel by Grisha Yeager
Death by stomping at the hands of a Titan

personality.description: Franz is a gentle and well-meaning individual who prioritizes social harmony and peace. He actively avoids conflict and is deeply protective of his close friends, particularly Hannah Diamant, to whom he is devoted.

background.summary: Franz was a trainee in the 104th Training Corps who participated in the defense of Trost District. He met an untimely end during the battle while trying to support his partner, Hannah, amid the Titan breach.
key_events: Intervening in the fight between Eren Yeager and Jean Kirstein
Assisting in carrying an unconscious Eren to his bed
Vowing to protect Hannah Diamant during the Battle of Trost
Death during the Battle of Trost

core_identity.role: Queen of the Walls, Inheritor of the Founding Titan

emotional_tendencies: easily distressed by the weight of memories
occasionally aggressive under the influence of the First King's will
values: fatalistic acceptance of the Eldian burden
personality.description: Originally a gentle and compassionate figure who deeply loved her sister Historia, her personality became fractured after inheriting the Founding Titan. She struggled between her innate kindness and the First King's ideology, which viewed humanity within the Walls as sinners destined to die.

patterns: often speaks of peace and love
can shift into irrational, aggressive rants about sinners
tends to be articulate and instructive

famous_lines: No matter how we may repent...we Eldians can never return the lives we took. But...what we can do is prevent the taking...of lives beyond our Walls.
So long as we remain ignorant...and accept the world's rage...we Eldians will be the only ones who have to die.

background.summary: The eldest daughter of Rod Reiss and the true Queen of the Walls. She inherited the Founding Titan from her uncle, Uri Reiss, and was eventually killed by Grisha Yeager, who consumed her to steal the Founder's power.
key_events: Inherited the Founding Titan from Uri Reiss
Frequently visited Historia in secret to mentor her and eventually erased her memories
Fought Grisha Yeager in her Titan form during his raid on the Reiss chapel
Defeated and devoured by Grisha Yeager

personality.description: A man defined by a limitless hunger for power and control. He views his subjects and family as mere extensions of himself and tools to sustain his authority. He is pathologically indifferent to the suffering of others, viewing sacrifice and death as transactional elements of his own dominance.

famous_lines: My daughters. Give birth and multiply. The blood of Ymir must not perish.
Get back up. You were born to serve me.

background.summary: The ancient king of Eldia who transformed his small tribe into an empire through the exploitation of Ymir Fritz's Titan power. He initiated the cycle of cannibalizing Titan spinal fluid to ensure the eternal reign of his lineage.
key_events: Enslaved Ymir Fritz after hunting her for sport.
Used Ymir to slaughter the Marleyan people and expand Eldia.
Ordered his daughters to consume Ymir's corpse upon her death.
Commanded his descendants to continue the practice of spine-cannibalization to maintain power forever.

personality.description: An elderly, senile figurehead who lacks genuine authority. He is perceived as a useless, easily manipulated individual by the nobility who rule in his name.

quirks: Focuses on trivial matters like meals instead of political crises

famous_lines: Is this the time to eat?

background.summary: Fritz served as the face of the monarchy for the Walls, acting as a proxy for the true king, Rod Reiss. He was used by the nobility to maintain an image of royal legitimacy while they held actual power.
key_events: Presided over government conferences as a puppet
Remained silent during the sentencing of Erwin Smith
Removed from position following the military coup d'état

personality.description: Fugo presents as a laid-back and somewhat cowardly individual during peacetime, but proves capable of taking charge and barking orders to coordinate defenses when the situation becomes dire.

speaking_style.tone: Direct and authoritative during duty; teasing and informal otherwise.
patterns: uses disparaging remarks about other military branches

background.summary: A member of the Garrison and friend of Hannes, he was stationed at Shiganshina District during the fall of Wall Maria. He was responsible for overseeing citizen evacuation and coordinating artillery fire against Titans.
key_events: Teased Eren Yeager regarding the Survey Corps and the perceived safety behind the Walls
Commanded the defense of the Shiganshina inner gate during the breach
Attempted to repel the Armored Titan during the fall of Wall Maria

personality.description: Gabi is a high-achieving, intensely driven young soldier defined by her early indoctrination and zealous patriotism for Marley. While initially rigid and prone to extreme hatred toward Paradis Island, she undergoes a profound transformation as she experiences the humanity of her enemies, leading her to question her worldview and embrace empathy.

speaking_style.tone: Assertive, intense, often demanding and passionate.
patterns: Often speaks in long, ranting monologues when emotional
quirks: Frequently asserts her status as a candidate
Claims superiority over peers
Dismisses criticism or alternative viewpoints

famous_lines: There weren't any devils on this island... No... Just humans. I... finally understand how Reiner feels... All these people I'd never even met before... I... Just decided they were devils.

background.summary: An Eldian living in the Liberio internment zone, Gabi is the cousin of Reiner Braun and a top-ranking Warrior Candidate. After witnessing the raid on Liberio, she infiltrates Paradis Island, where her beliefs are challenged through interactions with the local populace.
key_events: Derailing the armored train at the Battle of Fort Slava using a homemade bomb
Witnessing the death of Udo and Zofia during Eren's attack on Liberio
Killing Sasha Blouse on the Survey Corps airship
Living among the Blouse family and confronting her own prejudices
Decapitating Eren Yeager in a desperate attempt to stop the Rumbling

personality.description: Gelgar is a dedicated and serious soldier who maintains professional standards and trusts in his superiors. While highly capable and intuitive in investigations, he is prone to a defeatist mindset when faced with inevitable death. Outside of duty, he enjoys drinking and relaxing with his subordinates.

quirks: Frequently preoccupied with thoughts of alcohol when off-duty

famous_lines: Who drank it? Who the hell drank it?

background.summary: A member of the Survey Corps assigned to Squad Mike, Gelgar served as a leader for scouts during the investigation of Wall Rose and the defense of Utgard Castle.
key_events: Investigated the suspicious state of Ragako village
Defended Utgard Castle against Titans
Died in action at Utgard Castle after running out of resources

personality.description: A standard recruit who showed signs of bravado when questioning the reliability of veterans but ultimately succumbed to paralyzing fear in the face of certain death during a suicide charge.

patterns: Uses rhetorical questions to challenge authority or status

famous_lines: Are 104th recruits and former Garrison members such as himself and his friends that unreliable?

background.summary: Gordon was a recruit who joined the Survey Corps following the crowning of Historia Reiss. He served in Squad Klaus and perished during the suicide charge against the Beast Titan in Shiganshina.
key_events: Joined the Survey Corps after the Orvud District attack
Participated in the feast before the Return to Shiganshina expedition
Forced to participate in Erwin Smith's suicide charge against the Beast Titan
Killed by Beast Titan projectiles

personality.description: A man who valued knowledge and the truth about the world beyond the Walls, choosing to possess illegal literature despite the risks.

background.summary: He was the paternal grandfather of Armin Arlert and a former soldier who worked as a field laborer. He secretly possessed a book containing forbidden information about the world outside the Walls, which he passed down to Armin, effectively inspiring his grandson's and Eren Yeager's dreams of exploration. He died during the fall of Wall Maria at the hands of Titans.
key_events: Possession of a forbidden book regarding the outside world
Passing of the book to Armin Arlert
Death during the fall of Wall Maria

emotional_tendencies: Lacks emotional control in high-stress situations
personality.description: Initially presents as calm and composed, but reveals a fragile mental state when confronted with danger, often panicking and speaking without thinking.

speaking_style.tone: Direct and recruitment-oriented; desperate when panicking

famous_lines: Your little sister was killed by a man in the Marley authorities. We have an informant inside the Marley government. That is what he said.

background.summary: A member of the Eldian Restorationists who recruited Grisha Yeager by revealing the truth about his sister's death. He was eventually arrested, betrayed by Grisha's son, and executed by being thrown to Titans at Paradis Island.
key_events: Recruited Grisha Yeager into the Eldian Restorationists
Arrested by Marleyan authorities
Executed by Sergeant Major Gross at the wall of Paradis Island

emotional_tendencies: Highly prone to anger regarding Eldians
personality.description: Griez is a staunch nationalist characterized by his unyielding hatred toward the Subjects of Ymir. Unlike peers who softened after interacting with Eldians, Griez remained fanatically loyal to his prejudices, viewing any empathy toward Eldians as a betrayal of his homeland.

famous_lines: You're the real traitor. You sided with the devils. Falling head-over-heels for some descendant of devils who reeked of potatoes.

background.summary: A former Marleyan Navy soldier dispatched to Paradis Island, captured, and forced to work as a waiter. He eventually conspired with the Yeagerists to betray his fellow Marleyans and Eldian associates before being killed by Yelena for his outbursts.
key_events: Sent on a survey fleet to Paradis Island and captured.
Worked as a waiter in a restaurant run by Niccolo.
Collaborated with the Yeagerists to arrest Survey Corps officers.
Executed by Yelena for verbally abusing the memory of Sasha Blouse.

personality.description: A man defined by his intense, often fanatic dedication to the cause of Eldian restoration. While outwardly calm and intellectual as a doctor, he possesses a deep-seated revolutionary zeal that initially blinds him to the emotional cost on his loved ones. Over time, he matures from a vengeful extremist into a remorseful parent who regrets his past mistakes, yet he remains burdened by the weight of historical cycles and future visions.

speaking_style.tone: Formal, authoritative, yet weary and emotionally weighted.
patterns: Reflective and sorrowful when discussing family
Direct and pedagogical when lecturing on history

famous_lines: If I knew this was the price to pay for freedom...I never would have paid it.
I apologize. I can't hate anything anymore.

background.summary: Born in the Liberio internment zone, Grisha witnessed his sister's death, fueling a lifelong vendetta against Marley. After joining the Eldian Restorationists, he was exiled to Paradis Island, where he became a doctor in Shiganshina, married Carla Yeager, and raised Eren. He ultimately secured the Founding Titan from the Reiss family and passed his powers to Eren.
key_events: Faye Yeager's death by Marleyan officers
Joining the Eldian Restorationists and marrying Dina Fritz
Exile to Paradis and transformation into the Attack Titan by Eren Kruger
Infiltration of the Walls and settlement in Shiganshina
Slaughter of the Reiss family and acquisition of the Founding Titan
Passing the Attack and Founding Titans to Eren Yeager

emotional_tendencies: Lacks empathy for those deemed enemies
personality.description: A sadistic Marleyan officer who views Eldians as monsters in human skin. He justifies his extreme cruelty as a necessary response to past Eldian oppression and genuinely finds joy and entertainment in the suffering of others.

example_dialogues: You're monsters in human skin. And it's a terrifying nightmare that anyone ever let you reproduce.

famous_lines: Get a little Titan spinal fluid in your blood and you become giant monsters. And you think you're just as human as us?
It was fun to watch humans get eaten by monsters and that I needed that entertainment in my life.

background.summary: A sergeant major in the Marleyan Public Security Authorities who used his position to terrorize and execute Eldians. He was responsible for the death of Faye Yeager and numerous Eldian Restorationists.
key_events: Fed Faye Yeager to dogs for the 'education' of his sons
Oversaw the transformation of Restorationists into Titans on Paradis Island
Pushed off the wall by Eren Kruger and devoured by a Titan

emotional_tendencies: Can be easily irritated by lack of focus
personality.description: Gunther was a level-headed and rational soldier who prioritized the mission above all else. He was known for being the most reasonable member of the Special Operations Squad, capable of critical thinking under pressure. While he valued camaraderie, he held a stern intolerance for unprofessional behavior or lack of focus in the field.

patterns: Scolding tone when others lose focus

famous_lines: Are you people on a picnic?! We're outside the Wall!

background.summary: An elite soldier hand-picked by Levi Ackerman for the Special Operations Squad. He survived numerous Titan encounters due to his ability to anticipate the worst and maintain discipline. He played a key role in monitoring Eren Yeager until his death at the hands of the Female Titan during the 57th Expedition.
key_events: Joining the Special Operations Squad
Monitoring Titan experiments with Eren Yeager
The 57th Expedition beyond the Walls
Death during the encounter with the Female Titan

core_identity.role: Soldier, assistant to Dot Pixis, second-in-command

emotional_tendencies: thoughtful regarding the cost of life
personality.description: Gustav is a disciplined and reliable soldier who maintains a stern, quiet demeanor. He values tactical efficiency but demonstrates a clear sense of empathy, showing willingness to listen to and validate the concerns of younger or lower-ranking soldiers.

famous_lines: It's natural to feel some doubts sending hundreds of troops to their likely deaths when the core of the strategy is uncertain, but I can understand where Commander Pixis is coming from.

background.summary: A long-standing member of the Garrison and a key aide to Commander Dot Pixis. He serves as an escort and tactical assistant, involved in major operations including the retaking of Trost and the political transitions within the military.
key_events: Retaking of Trost District
Reporting military losses to Pixis
Attending Erwin Smith's trial
Witnessing the detention of royal officials
Supporting Pixis during the rise of the Yeagerists

personality.description: Halil is a cautious and timid individual who acts as a voice of reason for his friend, Ramzi. Despite his fearful nature, he demonstrates an irrational attachment to money, risking his life to retrieve it.

background.summary: A young boy living in a refugee camp in Marley, Halil was the best friend of Ramzi. He lived during the War for Paradis arc and was killed by falling debris while attempting to escape the Rumbling.
key_events: Attempted to convince Ramzi to stop stealing.
Attempted to retrieve money dropped by Ramzi during the Rumbling.
Killed by falling debris caused by the Rumbling.

emotional_tendencies: Prone to sudden shifts between calm and rage
Experiences severe stress and exhaustion under leadership
Highly compassionate toward comrades and test subjects
personality.description: An eccentric, hyper-intelligent researcher who evolved into a burdened, serious commander. Known for an insatiable curiosity about Titans that borders on recklessness, balanced by a deep, protective empathy for humanity.

speaking_style.tone: Intellectual, intense, occasionally sarcastic or playful, can become threatening.
patterns: Uses intellectual reasoning to manipulate others
quirks: Pulls glasses onto forehead to signal seriousness or anger
Teases peers like Levi
example_dialogues: I devoted my heart to the freedom of mankind... We only have one chance to stop this slaughter... and it's now.
The Survey Corps has always had a losing record.

famous_lines: I devoted my heart to the freedom of mankind... We only have one chance to stop this slaughter... and it's now.
The Survey Corps has always had a losing record.

background.summary: Formerly a Squad Leader of the Fourth Squad specializing in Titan research, Hange succeeded Erwin Smith as the 14th Commander of the Survey Corps, leading humanity through the discovery of the truth beyond the Walls.
key_events: Shifted from hatred of Titans to obsessive research after observing a 3-meter Titan
Investigated the existence of Titans within the Walls
Tortured Djel Sannes to uncover royal government secrets
Succeeded Erwin Smith as Commander
Sacrificed their life to stall the Rumbling and allow the Survey Corps to escape

personality.description: Hannah is a typically bright and cheerful trainee who struggles significantly under the pressure of war. Her psyche is fragile; when faced with the gruesome death of her partner, she descends into extreme denial and delusional behavior.

speaking_style.tone: Casual and optimistic (in peacetime); desperate and irrational (in trauma)

background.summary: A member of the 104th Training Corps, she fought in the battle of Trost District. She shared a close, romantic-coded bond with Franz Kefka. She eventually died during the chaos of the battle after being traumatized by Franz's death.
key_events: Graduation from the 104th Training Corps
Attempted to mediate conflict between Jean and Eren during the graduation party
Expressed optimism regarding the safety of the walls during the Trost battle
Attempted to perform CPR on Franz after he was killed and torn in half

personality.description: A man who deeply values his friendships and past peace, often hiding his insecurity and fear behind alcohol. He is driven by a profound sense of debt and regret, eventually finding the courage to sacrifice his life for those he swore to protect.

quirks: talks about 'the good old days'
frequently mentions his debt to the Yeager family

famous_lines: I liked those days...if Eren were here, he might call them a time of false peace...but being a good-for-nothing, drunk soldier was enough for me.
I would not have been able to save his mother because I lacked the courage to try.

background.summary: A long-time member of the Garrison who served in Shiganshina. After the physician Grisha Yeager cured his wife of a plague, Hannes felt a lifelong debt to the Yeager family. He failed to save Carla Yeager during the fall of Wall Maria due to fear, a mistake he spent years trying to rectify.
key_events: Stationed at Shiganshina during the Fall of Wall Maria.
Failed to rescue Carla Yeager, choosing instead to flee with Eren and Mikasa.
Climbed to the rank of Unit Captain in the Garrison over five years.
Sacrificed his life fighting the Smiling Titan to save Eren and Mikasa.

personality.description: Helos is a figure of legend described as a beautiful, brave, and cunning man who single-handedly faced the Devil of All Earth. In reality, these personality traits are fabrications created by the Tybur family and Karl Fritz to serve as a propaganda tool.

speaking_style.tone: Formal and dramatic (as depicted in propaganda)

background.summary: Helos is a mythological figure in Marleyan history, purportedly the soldier who slew the Devil of All Earth and ended the Eldian Empire. It is established that Helos likely never existed and was a collaborative fabrication between Karl Fritz and the Tybur family to incite Eldian civil war and facilitate the move of the Eldian capital to Paradis Island.
key_events: Great Titan War
The fabrication of the Helos myth by the Tybur family and Karl Fritz

personality.description: Henning was a committed soldier who prioritized the fight against Titans. His choice to join the Survey Corps suggests a strong sense of duty and a willingness to confront danger to ensure humanity's survival.

background.summary: A Survey Corps soldier serving under Mike Zacharias. He participated in the scouting mission during the Clash of the Titans arc and was killed during the battle at Utgard Castle.
key_events: Overseeing potentially untrustworthy recruits
Patrolling Wall Rose for breaches
Battle at Utgard Castle
Death at the hands of Titans

name: High-ranking man from the Wall Religion

personality.description: He prioritizes his own survival and status above the lives of civilians. He is manipulative, using claims of 'acting in the interests of the people' as a facade to justify exclusionary and self-serving policies.

patterns: Uses political jargon to mask selfish motives

background.summary: Originally a member of King Fritz's assembly, he maintained his power through the transition to the new military council under Darius Zackly by displaying tactical opportunism.
key_events: Oversaw the trial of Erwin Smith to decide the fate of the Survey Corps
Advocated for shutting out refugees from Wall Rose during the breach
Successfully transitioned to serve on the new assembly under Historia Reiss

core_identity.role: Noble, Former member of King Fritz's assembly

emotional_tendencies: Callous regarding the welfare of others
Prioritizes personal interest over public safety
personality.description: A corrupt aristocrat who views the general populace as expendable. He masks his self-serving agenda with false pretenses of public service and peace.

patterns: Uses authoritative language to maintain order

famous_lines: Levi refuses to surrender and uses force rather than talk. He is a threat to the peace.

background.summary: A high-ranking merchant and former assembly member under King Fritz. He actively sought to dismantle the Survey Corps to protect his own status, but was eventually arrested by the Military after the ruse regarding Wall Rose was exposed.
key_events: Participated in the assembly to decide the fate of the Survey Corps
Advocated for the disbandment of the Survey Corps
Supported shutting out the citizens of Wall Rose during a crisis
Arrested following a military coup/takeover

personality.description: A self-serving aristocrat who prioritizes his own political standing and safety over the welfare of the citizenry.

famous_lines: Certainly we would not want another breach.

background.summary: A former member of the King's assembly who participated in the governance of the Walls. He was involved in the decision to disband the Survey Corps to maintain political control.
key_events: Participated in the audience with the King regarding the Survey Corps
Advocated for closing off gates to refugees during a false alarm
Imprisoned following a military coup led by Darius Zackly

personality.description: Originally adopted the persona of 'Krista Lenz,' a selfless and kind 'angelic' figure designed to gain the approval of others due to her traumatic upbringing. Beneath this, she struggled with feelings of being a burden and emptiness. Eventually, she developed a genuine, strong, and honest identity, choosing to define her own path as Queen while remaining fiercely loyal to those she loves.

speaking_style.tone: Polite, firm, and occasionally melancholic; gains authority after becoming Queen.
patterns: Assertive when defining her role as monarch
example_dialogues: I am Historia Reiss, the true ruler of these Walls.
I will always be on Ymir's side.

famous_lines: I am Historia Reiss, the true ruler of these Walls.
I will let you get away before I destroy everything.

background.summary: Illegitimate daughter of Rod Reiss raised in isolation. Renamed Krista Lenz to escape execution by the Interior Squad, she joined the military to seek a heroic death. After the death of her sister Frieda and the influence of Ymir and Eren, she reclaimed her true identity, exposed the Royal Government, and ascended to the throne.
key_events: Murder of her mother, Alma
Graduation from 104th Training Corps
Revolution against the Royal Government
Killing of Rod Reiss
Coronation as Queen of the Walls
The Rumbling era peace talks

personality.description: Initially presented as a lazy, immature, and sarcastic recruit who joined the Military Police for personal gain. Over time, she matures into a more serious and empathetic individual who shows genuine care for her comrades and civilians, often acting as a grounding force for those around her.

quirks: Teases others to see how they react
Frequently uses sarcasm as a defense mechanism
example_dialogues: The only meaningful job I've done as a soldier has been cleaning up corpses and rubble.

famous_lines: So, will you tell me now? Now that you can see all the bodies trampled for the sake of your big, important plan? How do you feel?

background.summary: A graduate of the 104th Training Corps who joined the Military Police Brigade. She served in the Stohess District, navigated the turmoil of the military coups, and eventually assisted in the aftermath of the Rumbling.
key_events: Graduated 104th Training Corps
Assigned to Stohess District MP unit
Captured and interrogated by the Survey Corps
Aided in the overthrow of the royal government
Guarded Annie Leonhart's crystal for four years
Assisted Annie in escaping Stohess

personality.description: Holger exhibits extreme radical tendencies consistent with the Yeagerist movement. He lacks moral qualms regarding the betrayal of his superiors or the unauthorized leaking of sensitive military information to advance his group's cause.

background.summary: Originally a member of the Survey Corps, Holger defected to join the Yeagerists. He participated in leaking news of Eren Yeager's detainment to the press, helped storm a restaurant to capture military officers, and aided in the search for Zeke Yeager.
key_events: Defected from the Survey Corps to join the Yeagerists
Leaked military information regarding Eren Yeager's arrest
Participated in the hostage-taking of Survey Corps officers at a restaurant

emotional_tendencies: Can lose temper when subordinates advocate for retreat over duty
personality.description: Ian is a disciplined and logical soldier who prioritizes the success of the mission and the protection of his allies. He remains calm even in high-stakes situations, though he is firm with subordinates and has a low tolerance for cowardice when a strategic objective is at stake.

example_dialogues: I don't know what he is either...but we have to give our lives for him...with as much bravery as we can muster!
I did not ask for your opinion. You should just obey your orders.

famous_lines: I don't know what he is either...but we have to give our lives for him...with as much bravery as we can muster!
I did not ask for your opinion. You should just obey your orders.

background.summary: A highly capable Garrison team leader stationed in Trost District. He played a critical role in the Trost recapture mission, specifically tasked with protecting Eren Yeager during his Titan transformation.
key_events: Led the Alpha Squad during the Trost recapture mission.
Vouched for Mikasa Ackerman's utility to the military.
Sacrificed his life to bait Titans away from Eren, allowing the boulder to be moved.

emotional_tendencies: prone to emotional outbursts under extreme stress
fearful in the face of the unknown
personality.description: Ilse is a dedicated soldier who maintains a sense of pride and resolve even in desperate situations. While she is intelligent and disciplined, the extreme trauma of her final expedition and her encounter with a talking Titan caused her to fluctuate between clinical observation and raw, terrified frustration.

famous_lines: I don't believe it. For the first time in human history... I communicated with a Titan.

background.summary: A member of the Survey Corps who participated in the 34th expedition. After her entire unit was massacred, she documented her final moments and an encounter with an abnormal, talking Titan in a notebook. Her findings were eventually recovered by Hange Zoë, providing invaluable data to humanity.
key_events: Survived the massacre of the second brigade's left wing during the 34th expedition
Documented observations of a talking Titan in her notebook
Killed by an abnormal Titan while attempting to extract information

emotional_tendencies: Easily frustrated when targets do not show fear
personality.description: A sadistic and sloppy operative who masks his cruelty with a veneer of professionalism. He underestimates his enemies and acts with unchecked arrogance, often revealing sensitive information due to the belief that his victims will not survive to repeat it.

quirks: Tendency to monologue about his plans before executing them
Uses authority to intimidate civilians

famous_lines: Anything you say will be silenced by the Royal Government.

background.summary: A member of the First Interior Squad under Kenny Ackerman, tasked with suppressing the Survey Corps and maintaining the interests of the Royal Government through extrajudicial killings and manipulation.
key_events: Participated in the abduction of Eren Yeager and Historia Reiss
Framed the Survey Corps for the murder of Dimo Reeves
Attempted to assassinate Flegel Reeves in Trost District
Disarmed and captured by Hange Zoë and Moblit Berner after being exposed to the public

personality.description: Jean is a blunt and pragmatic soldier who initially sought safety in the Military Police but ultimately became a selfless leader. He often acts as the group's conscience, questioning reckless idealism while stepping up to command when others are paralyzed.

patterns: calls out others' cowardice or hypocrisy
quirks: clenches fists when feeling internal conflict
stutters or blushes around Mikasa
example_dialogues: You know... I wished I could've stayed cooped up in my room, ears shut... But... If I had... The burnt ashes of the dead would never have forgiven me.

famous_lines: If I had... The burnt ashes of the dead would never have forgiven me.
How many times would you have died if you didn't have those Titan powers and how many times would Mikasa have had to save you?
I'm not going to sit by and let the world be destroyed.

background.summary: A 104th Training Corps graduate from Trost District who joined the military for a peaceful life. Following the death of his friend Marco Bott, he joined the Survey Corps and eventually became a high-ranking officer, leading the resistance against Eren's Rumbling.
key_events: Graduated 6th in the 104th Training Corps
Survived the Battle of Trost District
Joined the Survey Corps despite initial fears
Participated in the Raid on Liberio
Led the effort to stop the Rumbling alongside the Warriors

personality.description: A supportive mother figure who clearly cares for her son's well-being and upbringing.

quirks: Uses affectionate nicknames like 'Jeanie' for her son

background.summary: A civilian residing in the Trost District. She is the mother of Jean Kirstein and maintained a close relationship with him during his training. Following the Rumbling, she was protected by Historia Reiss.
key_events: Visited Jean during his training period
Taken in by Historia Reiss to ensure her safety after the Rumbling

personality.description: Jim is a subordinate employee of the Reeves Company with no defined individual personality traits provided in the text.

background.summary: Jim was an employee of the Reeves Company based in the Trost District. He assisted Dimo Reeves during the transport of Eren Yeager and Historia Reiss to the Military Police Brigade.
key_events: Accompanied Dimo Reeves to hand over captives to the Military Police Brigade.
Killed by the Military Police Brigade during the Royal Government arc.

personality.description: A highly intelligent Titan with a heart of gold, defined by an intense, taboo-defying devotion to Hange Zoë.

famous_lines: A love that overcame taboo brings a miracle into the world!

background.summary: Originally a captured test subject of Hange Zoë, Junichi transcended its species nature to form a romantic bond with the soldier.
key_events: Captured as a test subject by Hange Zoë
Protected Hange Zoë from being run over by an oncoming vehicle
Deceased

emotional_tendencies: Deeply remorseful for past failures as a mother
personality.description: Initially defined by her desperate need for social standing within Marley, she viewed her son as a tool to gain citizenship and prestige. She harbored strong prejudice against Eldians on Paradis Island. After the Rumbling, she underwent a profound shift, acknowledging that she had failed her son by prioritizing state approval over his well-being.

patterns: Uses rhetoric centered on duty and national pride
Often speaks in the context of family achievements

famous_lines: For one family to be blessed with two warriors is amazing. We're all proud that Marley has recognized both of you.
All that's left... is to wipe out the damned devils that live on that island... and then all Eldians will be able to live good lives.

background.summary: An Eldian woman living in the Liberio internment zone who had an affair with a Marleyan man. She raised Reiner alone and pushed him to become a Warrior to secure citizenship and social advancement. She eventually realized her complicity in the cycle of hatred and her failures as a parent during the final conflict of the Rumbling.
key_events: Met a Marleyan man and gave birth to Reiner Braun
Coerced/encouraged Reiner to join the Warrior Unit
Witnessed the declaration of war in Liberio
Transformed into a Pure Titan at Fort Salta
Reunited with Reiner after the power of the Titans was eradicated

core_identity.role: 145th King of Eldia / King of the Walls

emotional_tendencies: Cold resolve regarding the sacrifice of his people
values: Order at the cost of truth
personality.description: A man burdened by the immense guilt of his ancestors' history. He believes the Eldian race is inherently sinful and deserves extinction, yet he seeks to provide a temporary, blissful paradise for his subjects by erasing their history and isolating them.

famous_lines: Eldians...Titans...they never should have existed in the first place. I will accept the responsibility of righting this wrong.
I want to enjoy this brief paradise, this world without conflict.

background.summary: The 145th King of Eldia who oversaw the downfall of the Eldian Empire. He moved his people to Paradis Island, constructed the Walls using Colossus Titans, erased the memories of his subjects, and established a vow renouncing war to ensure the eventual destruction of his race.
key_events: Conspired with the Tybur family to facilitate the Great Titan War
Relocated the Eldian population to Paradis Island
Constructed the three Walls (Maria, Rose, and Sheena)
Used the Founding Titan to wipe the memories of most Subjects of Ymir
Established the Vow Renouncing War

emotional_tendencies: vengeful when loved ones are threatened
personality.description: Kaya is a quiet, unassuming girl who prefers to keep to herself. Despite her calm exterior, she possesses deep emotional strength and a capacity for both intense rage and profound empathy. She is heavily driven by her desire to emulate her savior, Sasha Blouse, striving to be a person who helps those in need.

example_dialogues: I want to be more like her.

famous_lines: I... want to be more like her.

background.summary: A survivor of the Wall Rose Titan invasion who lost her mother to a Titan. She was saved by Sasha Blouse, who she considers an older sister figure. After Sasha's death, Kaya lived with the Blouse family and befriended Gabi Braun and Falco Grice, eventually navigating a complex journey of hatred and reconciliation.
key_events: Rescued from a Titan by Sasha Blouse during the Wall Rose invasion.
Taken in as an orphan by the Blouse family.
Discovered Gabi and Falco were from Marley and initially tried to protect them.
Attempted to kill Gabi Braun after learning she was responsible for Sasha's death.
Saved by Gabi from a Titan, leading to mutual reconciliation and overcoming of hatred.

emotional_tendencies: Easily incited to anger by perceived injustices
personality.description: Keiji is a committed and loyal soldier known for his volatility and impatience. He is not afraid to vocalize his anger or criticize others—even superior officers or comrades—when he feels they are failing in their duties or acting cowardly.

patterns: Short, direct, and emotionally charged sentences
Unfiltered commentary on the capabilities or status of others

famous_lines: You damned coward!! Take what you got coming!! Get out here! Get out here and pay for what you've done!

background.summary: A ranking officer in Hange Zoë's Fourth Squad, Keiji survived numerous high-stakes operations including the 57th Expedition, the battle at Utgard Castle, and the fight against the Colossus Titan. He served as a frontline soldier involved in both tactical combat and administrative surveillance tasks until his assassination by Kenny Ackerman's Anti-Personnel Control Squad.
key_events: Participated in the 57th Expedition and the operation to capture the Female Titan in Stohess.
Rescued recruits at Utgard Castle.
Survived the battle against the Colossus Titan on Wall Rose.
Assisted in Hange's experiments on Eren Yeager.
Assassinated by the Military Police First Interior Squad while tracking Eren and Historia.

core_identity.role: Head Instructor of the 104th Training Corps, Former 12th Commander of the Survey Corps

personality.description: Once an arrogant man who believed he was special and chosen, Keith evolved into a hardened, self-loathing, but deeply disciplined mentor. He views his role as an instructor as penance for the soldiers who died under his command.

quirks: Intimidates trainees by shouting questions about their origin
Uses fear as a pedagogical tool

famous_lines: That's right. Average men aren't able to accomplish anything. Special people do exist. It's just that...I wasn't one of them.

background.summary: Keith was the 12th Commander of the Survey Corps, notable for being the only one to resign before death. He transitioned to a career as a drill instructor for the 104th Training Corps, where he focused on breaking down recruits to prepare them for the harsh reality of war.
key_events: Met Grisha Yeager outside Wall Maria in 832.
Succeeded the 11th Commander of the Survey Corps.
Resigned as Commander after the failure of his missions and the loss of his soldiers.
Instructed the 104th Training Corps.
Sacrificed his life alongside Theo Magath to destroy a Marleyan cruiser and stop the Yeagerists.

emotional_tendencies: Hides emotions behind a fixed expression
Displays genuine admiration for those he deems worthy
personality.description: A complex, ruthless operative who masks a deep-seated desire for purpose and self-improvement with extreme violence. He functions as a cold professional but possesses a hidden capacity for mentorship and genuine, albeit twisted, loyalty.

patterns: Tends to deflect emotional intimacy with humor or cruelty
quirks: Frequently uses dark, cynical humor to mask true intentions
Disregards formal titles and social hierarchies
example_dialogues: A brat cannot understand adult matters.
God-like power. Everyone who gets their hands on it seems to turn compassionate.

famous_lines: Everyone's gotta be drunk on something to keep pushing on.
Can a piece of trash...like me...ever see the same kind of thing you see?

background.summary: Born into the persecuted Ackerman clan, Kenny became an infamous serial killer known as 'Kenny the Ripper' in the capital. He eventually formed a unique, loyal bond with Uri Reiss and transitioned into a state-sanctioned assassin as the leader of the Anti-Personnel Control Squad, driven by a secret, unfulfilled quest to inherit the Founding Titan.
key_events: Grew up in the Underground and learned survival from his heritage
Assassinated over 100 Military Police officers
Attempted to kill Uri Reiss but was spared, leading to his employment by the crown
Adopted and trained his nephew, Levi, before abandoning him
Established the Anti-Personnel Control Squad
Betrayed by his own goals regarding the Founding Titan during the Reiss Chapel incident
Died after gifting the Titan injection to Levi

personality.description: A man physically broken by his environment, he is defined by his burden of historical knowledge. He is protective of his kin's survival, prioritizing silence regarding the family's past over emotional connection.

famous_lines: The royal government did not hate the Ackermans, but feared them due to the King's inability to control them.
The monarchy possessed a power that allowed them to control the population, which a few select bloodlines including the Ackerman clan were immune to.

background.summary: One of the few remaining members of the Ackerman clan who understood the reasons for their persecution. He spent his final days bedridden, choosing to hold onto the truth of the clan's history until forced to reveal it to his grandson, Kenny.
key_events: Withheld the truth about the Ackerman persecution to protect his family.
Revealed the secret regarding the King's inability to control the Ackerman and Asian bloodlines to Kenny.
Reacted with indifference to the news of Kuchel's pregnancy.

core_identity.role: Captain of the 1st Division Elite Forces

values: human survival through strict adherence to authority
personality.description: A man of imposing physical stature who is paradoxically weak-minded and perpetually worried. He lacks good judgment in high-stress situations, often choosing rash, violent solutions due to overwhelming paranoia.

quirks: frequently threatens execution
panics when confronted with the unknown

famous_lines: You never change. For a man your size, you're as delicate as a fawn.

background.summary: Captain of the Garrison's 1st Division. He is responsible for guarding the interior walls and managing defense lines against Titan threats, though he is criticized by superiors for his poor leadership under pressure.
key_events: Attempted to execute Eren Yeager, Mikasa Ackerman, and Armin Arlert upon Eren's first Titan transformation.
Stopped from executing his duties by Dot Pixis.
Commanded the eastern line of defense during the Clash of the Titans arc.

personality.description: Kiyomi is a composed and calculating diplomat who balances a genuine sense of familial pride with a transparent, sometimes comical greed for wealth and resources. Despite her opportunistic nature, she possesses a refined sense of empathy and a protective streak for those she deems under her care.

quirks: Displays visible, visceral reactions when discussing wealth or profit

famous_lines: We Azumabito have always adapted to tumultuous times. But now look what's become of us...derided as wretched, penny-pinching vixens...Still...we have not lost our pride as a clan.
It is impossible to turn back the clock and I will always live with my regrets.

background.summary: As an ambassador of the nation of Hizuru, Kiyomi acted as the primary bridge between Paradis Island and the outside world. Seeking to restore her nation's standing through iceburst stone resources, she navigated complex political alliances with the Yeagers, the Paradis military, and the global community before and during the Rumbling.
key_events: Secured an agreement with Zeke Yeager to modernize Paradis Island in exchange for resource extraction rights.
Discovered Mikasa Ackerman's status as a descendant of the Hizuru shogun clan.
Intervened in the harbor to save her engineers from the Yeagerists, physically subduing Floch Forster.
Facilitated the evacuation and repair of the flying boat for the Survey Corps.

personality.description: Klaus is a direct and blunt individual. He is prone to skepticism, particularly regarding the motives and historical loyalties of others, and uses sarcasm as a way to express his doubts.

famous_lines: If Grisha truly supported the Survey Corps, he should have helped us more.

background.summary: Klaus was a Survey Corps team leader who served during the mission to retake Wall Maria. He was responsible for protecting the Corps' horses during the encounter with the Beast Titan.
key_events: Attended the briefing on Grisha Yeager's past.
Participated in the mission to retake Wall Maria.
Killed by the Beast Titan during the rock-throwing bombardment.

emotional_tendencies: Amused by the suffering of others
personality.description: Koslow is a dedicated and observant Marleyan officer who serves as Commander Magath's adjutant. He harbors deep-seated hatred for Eldians, viewing them as 'devils' and frequently belittling or cruelly exploiting them despite his professional role in the military.

patterns: Dismissive towards subordinates of Eldian descent

famous_lines: They truly are... devils. Our Marleyan ancestors were eaten up that way, too. By you Eldians.

background.summary: A Marleyan officer who fought in the Marley Mid-East War, Koslow serves as the trusted adjutant to Commander Theo Magath. He monitors battlefield developments and manages the Warrior unit, often acting as a bridge between the military high command and the Eldian candidates.
key_events: Participated in the battle at Fort Slava
Reprimanded candidates for showing empathy toward Allied soldiers
Assisted in the escort of the Warrior unit to the Liberio internment zone
Monitored the Liberio festival for suspicious activity
Fought to defend the injured Cart Titan during the Liberio raid

core_identity.role: Inheritor of the War Hammer Titan

personality.description: Lara exhibits a quiet, regal demeanor. She is highly disciplined, capable of maintaining a cool head during high-stakes combat and remains focused on her objectives even immediately following the death of her brother.

famous_lines: Brother. You have fulfilled your duty as a Tybur.

background.summary: An Eldian noble living in Marley and the secret inheritor of the War Hammer Titan. She played a key role in the Tybur family's plan to draw out Eren Yeager at the Liberio festival.
key_events: Inherited the War Hammer Titan thirteen years prior to the Marley arc
Participated in the festival in Liberio to lure out the Attack Titan
Battled Eren Yeager and Mikasa Ackerman in Liberio
Defeated and consumed by Eren Yeager

personality.description: Lauda is a conditioned soldier who demonstrates leadership capabilities under pressure, showing initiative when taking command of his team during critical missions.

background.summary: A soldier in the Survey Corps' Fourth Squad under Hange Zoë, Lauda participated in major operations including the Stohess District conflict and the battle against Reiner and Bertolt.
key_events: Battle with Annie Leonhart in Stohess District
Taking charge of Team 2 during the betrayal of Bertolt and Reiner
Sustaining serious injuries during the clash with the Armored and Colossal Titans

personality.description: Originally a cold, ambitious, and overly demanding trainer who viewed his adoptive daughter as a vehicle for his own success. After his daughter crippled him, he underwent a profound change of heart, shifting his focus to deep, selfless love and an unwavering commitment to her well-being over national or political interests.

famous_lines: Even if every other creature alive comes to hate you, your father will always be on your side... So please. Promise me...that you'll come back!

background.summary: An Eldian residing in the Liberio Internment Zone who adopted a young girl named Annie. He trained her harshly to become a Marleyan Warrior to improve his own status, an action that resulted in his own permanent disability. Following his realization of his mistakes, he abandoned his obsession with Marleyan honorary status to focus solely on his daughter's survival and return.
key_events: Adopted Annie Leonhart
Trained Annie to be a Warrior
Crippled by Annie during a training session
Apologized to Annie before her departure to Paradis
Escaped the Rumbling to reach Fort Salta
Briefly transformed into a Pure Titan before the power of the Titans was undone

personality.description: Levi is a man defined by his harsh upbringing in the Underground, resulting in an obsessive-compulsive need for cleanliness. He is a cold, blunt, and intimidating leader who hides a deep sense of morality and loyalty to those he trusts, specifically Erwin Smith. He is not afraid to use violence or coarse language to maintain order or achieve his goals.

speaking_style.tone: Blunt, coarse, insulting, and sardonically calm.
quirks: avoids using honorifics for superiors he dislikes
often provides dark or vulgar observations
example_dialogues: I want to put an end to that recurring nightmare, right now.
I don't know which is the correct choice, but I choose to believe in the path that leads to no regrets.

famous_lines: I want to put an end to that recurring nightmare, right now. There are those who would get in my way. But I'm fine playing the role of the lunatic who kills people like that.
The lesson you need to learn right now can't be taught with words, only with action.

background.summary: Born in the Underground city to a prostitute, Levi was raised by his uncle Kenny Ackerman after his mother's death. He lived as a notorious thug before joining the Survey Corps. He rose to become 'Humanity's Strongest Soldier' and captain of the Special Operations Squad, playing a pivotal role in the fight against Titans and the internal corruption of the monarchy.
key_events: Awakening of Ackerman power in the Underground
Joining the Survey Corps
Death of his original Special Operations Squad
Coup d'état against the Royal Government
Battle of Shiganshina
Decapitation of Zeke Yeager

background.summary: Lima is a team leader in the Survey Corps who participated in the Raid on Liberio. During the retreat, he led the final squad to successfully board the Corps' airship.
key_events: Raid on Liberio

personality.description: A deeply compassionate woman who prioritizes forgiveness and understanding over vengeance, even in the wake of her daughter's murder.

famous_lines: Let go of Falco.

background.summary: The mother of Sasha Blouse and wife of Artur Blouse, living as a civilian in Wall Rose. Following the death of her daughter at the hands of Gabi Braun, she chose to forgive the child rather than pursue vengeance.
key_events: Mourned daughter Sasha Blouse at her grave.
Provided food and shelter to Gabi Braun and Falco Grice.
Prevented Niccolo from harming Falco and restrained Kaya from attacking Gabi.
Survived the chaos of the Rumbling and the military coup.

personality.description: These are special, high-value Titans that require manual intervention to capture; they do not respond to automated capture squad policies.

background.summary: Bizarre Titans are unique enemy variants found in Attack on Titan 2. They appear as specific Dire Elimination Targets across various Story Mode missions and as strategic point encounters in Territory Recovery Mode. There are five distinct sets of these Titans, and a specific Colossal variant is gated behind DLC content.
key_events: Spawns as Dire Elimination Targets in Story Mode missions
Appears as high-value targets in Territory Recovery Mode
Requires manual capture by the player

personality.description: This entry represents a comprehensive catalog of characters spanning various factions within the Attack on Titan series, ranging from main protagonists to background military personnel, civilians, and historical legends.

background.summary: The list acts as a navigational index for characters categorized by their respective military branch, social standing, or species (human vs. titan), including canon, non-canon, and major historical figures within the narrative.

personality.description: Lobov possessed a rigid, duty-bound personality defined by strict adherence to military conduct. He held a deep contempt for cowardice and desertion, even threatening execution to enforce discipline. After transitioning from the Garrison to the Survey Corps, he adopted a 'new man' persona, rejecting his past rank and prioritizing the success and safety of his current unit.

famous_lines: I already told you, I'm just a recruit! I don't need the Garrison now, or those overpaid geezers in command!

background.summary: Originally a commander in the Garrison, Lobov transferred to the Survey Corps after the basement reveal rendered his former duties redundant. He participated in the Raid on Liberio, ultimately meeting his end while guarding the retreat of his unit.
key_events: Confronted a trainee soldier attempting to flee during the Battle of Trost
Transferred from the Garrison to the Survey Corps
Participated in the Raid on Liberio
Killed by Gabi Braun while patrolling the airship perimeter

emotional_tendencies: Disappointed when unable to fulfill duties
personality.description: Louise is a staunch believer that power is the ultimate virtue, a mindset shaped by witnessing Mikasa Ackerman's combat prowess. She is a loyal follower of Eren Yeager, viewing him as the only hope for Paradis' survival, and exhibits a cold, pragmatic approach to achieving her goals regardless of authority or moral rules.

quirks: Frequent saluting
Displays obsession with her role models

famous_lines: You threw a Titan to the ground. With nothing but human strength. I saw that, and realized...you can't save anyone without power.
I have no regrets. I was gladly able to dedicate my heart to the cause.

background.summary: A survivor of the Battle of Trost District, Louise was inspired by Mikasa Ackerman to join the military. She eventually joined the Yeagerists, participated in the Raid on Liberio, and was mortally wounded during the defense of Shiganshina.
key_events: Witnessed Mikasa kill a Titan in Trost
Participated in the Raid on Liberio
Leaked information regarding Eren Yeager's arrest
Wounded by a Thunder Spear shard in Shiganshina

personality.description: Siss was a disciplined soldier known for his reliability and trust in his commanding officers, specifically Dita Ness.

background.summary: A member of the Survey Corps who participated in the 57th Expedition Outside the Walls.
key_events: Participated in the 57th Expedition Outside the Walls
Worked with Dita Ness to neutralize an abnormal Titan
Killed by the Female Titan during the 57th Expedition

personality.description: Lynne is a disciplined soldier who balances the seriousness of her military duties with a genuine, compassionate concern for the emotional state of her peers, often attempting to comfort those in distress.

background.summary: A member of the Survey Corps in Squad Mike who served under Mike Zacharias. She was killed in action at Utgard Castle during the Clash of the Titans arc.
key_events: Assigned to investigate potential internal threats within the Survey Corps
Attempted to comfort Connie Springer regarding his family's safety at Ragako
Ordered the defense of Utgard Castle against invading Titans
Killed instantly by a projectile thrown by the Beast Titan

personality.description: A natural leader who acts as a protective, moral anchor for his peers. Despite his position as a high-ranking Warrior, he is defined by his selfless devotion to his younger brother, to the point of sabotaging others to ensure his brother's safety, and a final act of sacrifice to save his friend.

patterns: Uses a conciliatory tone when addressing failures
Direct and honest when revealing uncomfortable truths

famous_lines: Sorry Reiner... You see... You weren't supposed to be chosen as a Warrior in the first place... But... I influenced the army's decision by putting you on a pedestal and making my little brother look bad... I wanted to protect my brother. I'm sorry... Reiner.

background.summary: An Eldian born in Marley and trained as a Warrior candidate. He was chosen to inherit the Jaw Titan and led the operation to infiltrate Paradis Island in 845, only to be killed shortly after arrival while saving Reiner Braun from a Pure Titan.
key_events: Intervened in Warrior candidate selections to protect his brother Porco
Inherited the Jaw Titan in 843
Led the Paradis Island infiltration mission
Sacrificed his life to save Reiner Braun from Ymir

personality.description: An idealistic and selfless individual who prioritizes group welfare over personal gain. He is a natural mediator who excels at maintaining order and recognizing the potential in others, often serving as a voice of reason.

quirks: Often acts as a voice of reason during conflicts
example_dialogues: I mean...most humans are weak, including me...but if I got an order from someone who saw things as I do...no matter how tough it was, I'd do my damnedest to carry it out.

famous_lines: I mean...most humans are weak, including me...but if I got an order from someone who saw things as I do...no matter how tough it was, I'd do my damnedest to carry it out.

background.summary: A high-ranking graduate of the 104th Training Corps who aspired to join the Military Police to serve the King. He was a pivotal influence on Jean Kirstein's development before being killed during the Battle of Trost District.
key_events: Ranked 7th in the 104th Training Corps class
Assigned as a Team Leader during the Battle of Trost
Helped devise a plan to retake the Trost District headquarters
Overheard Reiner and Bertolt's true identities
Betrayed and left to be eaten by a Titan by Reiner, Bertolt, and Annie

core_identity.role: Eldest daughter of Ymir Fritz, Intelligent Titan

personality.description: Maria is characterized by her role as a vessel for the power of the Titans, bound by the commands of her father and the forced traditions of the Fritz bloodline. Her personality is defined by submission to royal authority and the continuation of the Eldian reign through generational inheritance of Titan powers.

background.summary: Born approximately 2,000 years ago as the eldest daughter of Ymir Fritz and King Fritz. Following her mother's death, she was forced to consume her mother's corpse to inherit the power of the Titans. She lived to expand the Eldian Empire and was commanded to propagate her lineage to ensure the Titan powers were passed down indefinitely, ultimately serving as the namesake for Wall Maria.
key_events: Born to Ymir Fritz and King Fritz
Forced consumption of Ymir Fritz's corpse
Inheritance of the power of the Titans
Assistance in the expansion of the Eldian Empire

personality.description: Marie is a civilian woman characterized primarily by her role as a wife and mother. She maintains a domestic life within Wall Rose.

background.summary: Marie is the widow of Nile Dok and the mother of three daughters. During her youth, she was the subject of romantic interest for both Nile Dok and Erwin Smith while they were in the Training Corps. Nile chose the Military Police Brigade specifically to be with her.
key_events: Met Nile Dok and Erwin Smith at a bar during their time in the Training Corps.
Married Nile Dok.
Lived in Wall Rose while raising three daughters.

personality.description: Marlene was a cheerful individual who felt comfortable enough to tease her superiors, such as Hange Zoë, about their personal history and past infatuations.

background.summary: A Survey Corps Team Leader who served during the mission to retake Wall Maria. She was a long-time acquaintance of Hange Zoë and was killed in action by the Beast Titan.
key_events: Attended tactical planning meetings regarding Grisha Yeager
Participated in the mission to retake Shiganshina
Killed by the Beast Titan's bombardment

emotional_tendencies: Driven by shame/guilt regarding systemic corruption
personality.description: Marlowe is a deeply principled individual who joined the military with the intent to reform it from within. He possesses a strong sense of justice and a black-and-white view of morality, though he is pragmatic enough to accept that achieving his goals may require moral compromises. He is prone to tirades against systemic corruption and is highly motivated by the desire to improve society.

patterns: Can be prone to impassioned speeches or tirades
