famous_lines: Then let me help you!! I will do anything it takes to right the wrongs of this world!!

background.summary: A graduate of the 104th Training Corps who initially served in the Military Police. Frustrated by the corruption within the Military Police, he defected to the Survey Corps to actively fight for humanity. He played a key role during the coup d'état and served in the mission to retake Shiganshina, where he was killed by the Beast Titan.
key_events: Joined the Military Police to reform the system
Interrogated by Levi's Squad and joined the coup
Officially transferred to the Survey Corps
Participated in the suicide charge against the Beast Titan

personality.description: A negligent officer who prioritizes personal leisure over his military duties. He actively avoids responsibility by delegating his obligations to subordinates.

background.summary: A ranking officer in the Military Police Brigade stationed in Stohess District. He is known for shirking his duty to oversee high-stakes operations, such as the escort of Eren Yeager, in favor of drinking and gambling.
key_events: Handed over the responsibility of overseeing the Eren Yeager escort mission to Marlowe Freudenberg to go gamble and drink.

personality.description: Information regarding specific personality traits is unavailable due to his limited role as a background character and his status as a victim of the Titan transformation.

background.summary: Martin Springer was the brother of Connie Springer and a resident of Ragako village. He was gassed by Marleyan soldiers and transformed into a Titan by the Beast Titan during the invasion of Wall Rose.
key_events: Transformed into a Titan by Zeke Yeager
Killed during the military effort to clear Wall Rose of Titans

personality.description: Mikarin possesses an intense, single-minded resolve. She is highly impulsive, known to react to people she dislikes by attempting to cut them down.

example_dialogues: And so, the fate of humanity is entrusted-- to its most powerful stage entertainer!

famous_lines: And so, the fate of humanity is entrusted-- to its most powerful stage entertainer!

background.summary: An idol serving in the Survey Corps who debuted in the Volume 10 Gag Preview. She is physically renowned for her muscular physique and unique ability to incorporate meat-slicing into her dance routines.
key_events: Rise to stardom as the Survey Corps' most powerful stage entertainer

emotional_tendencies: Prone to fury when loved ones are threatened
personality.description: Mikasa is a highly skilled, stoic soldier who transitioned from a gentle child to a hardened warrior following the murder of her parents. She is deeply devoted to her friends, particularly Eren, and maintains a calm, dangerous focus even in desperate situations. While she adheres to a strict code of protection for those she loves, her judgment can be clouded by intense emotional attachment.

quirks: Rarely loses her cool
Intimidating to enemies

famous_lines: This is a cruel world. And yet...so beautiful....

background.summary: Born to an Asian mother and an Ackerman father, Mikasa's life changed at age nine when traffickers murdered her parents. After being rescued by Eren Yeager, who motivated her to fight to survive, she awakened her dormant Ackerman clan instincts. She joined the military to protect Eren and became the top-ranked graduate of the 104th Training Corps.
key_events: Witnessed the murder of her parents and killed her first kidnapper
Survived the Fall of Wall Maria
Graduated 1st in the 104th Training Corps
Rescued Eren from the Female Titan
Discovered her lineage and the Azumabito family connection
Defied Eren during the Rumbling and ended the Titan curse by killing him

emotional_tendencies: Fiercely defensive when loved ones are threatened
personality.description: A woman who maintains a calm and gentle demeanor in domestic life while possessing a fierce, instinctual protectiveness toward her daughter.

background.summary: An individual of Asian heritage who lived in the mountains near Shiganshina District with her husband and daughter. She was a victim of social persecution due to her lineage and was ultimately killed while attempting to protect Mikasa from human traffickers.
key_events: Married an Ackerman man after both were driven out of cities due to their respective lineages.
Attempted to pass down the symbol of her clan to her daughter.
Murdered by human traffickers while attempting to defend Mikasa.

values: Perseverance in the face of defeat
personality.description: An acknowledged, highly skilled leader who remains calm in crises. He rarely speaks unless necessary and maintains a stoic, professional demeanor. Despite his serious exterior, he possesses a unique, slightly unsettling habit of sniffing people upon meeting them.

patterns: Rarely speaks unless the matter is serious
quirks: Sniffs people he meets for the first time
Smirks after smelling individuals
example_dialogues: Humanity's first defeat will come only when we stop fighting. As long as we keep fighting, we haven't lost.

famous_lines: Humanity's first defeat will come only when we stop fighting. As long as we keep fighting, we haven't lost.

background.summary: Recognized as humanity's second strongest soldier after Levi, Mike served as a squad leader in the Survey Corps. He possessed an acute sense of smell used to detect Titans. He eventually died in combat against the Beast Titan while single-handedly holding off Titans to allow his squad to escape.
key_events: Participated in the 57th Expedition Outside the Walls
Attempted to capture the Female Titan
Held off nine Titans alone to allow recruits to escape during the Wall Rose invasion
Defeated by the Beast Titan and subsequently torn apart by Titans

emotional_tendencies: Prone to freezing in high-stress combat situations
personality.description: A young, slender, and energetic trainee who values her connections with fellow soldiers. She displays genuine bravery when attempting to support her comrades in battle, though she is susceptible to fear when facing overwhelming threats.

background.summary: A graduate of the 104th Training Corps who served during the Battle of Trost District. After being inspired by Eren Yeager's motivations, she intended to join the Survey Corps. She was killed in action after being devoured by a Titan during the Trost defense.
key_events: Graduation from the 104th Training Corps
Defense of Trost District
Attempted rescue/engagement during the Peering Titan attack

personality.description: Mitabi often displayed anxiety and skepticism when faced with overwhelming odds or volatile situations, yet proved capable of great courage when the mission required it. He was a pragmatic soldier who initially doubted the viability of complex operations but ultimately prioritized the greater good.

patterns: Directs insults toward enemies to draw attention

background.summary: A member of the Garrison in the Trost District and considered one of their top three elite soldiers. He played a crucial role in the Wall Sealing operation by distracting Titans to protect Eren Yeager.
key_events: Assigned to protect Eren Yeager during the Trost mission
Initially attempted to withdraw from the mission due to doubt regarding Eren's titan form
Diverted Titans away from Eren by drawing their attention while on foot
Died in action after being crushed by a Titan

core_identity.role: Squad Vice Captain, Hange Zoë's assistant and messenger

emotional_tendencies: Prone to panic in high-stakes situations
Constant state of worry due to superior's recklessness
personality.description: Moblit is a dedicated and level-headed soldier who functions as the voice of reason for his eccentric superior, Hange Zoë. Despite being constantly stressed and terrified by Hange's impulsive behavior, his unwavering loyalty keeps him at their side until his death. He is capable of shifting into a cold, serious professional when the mission requires it.

patterns: Often uses imperative sentences when trying to keep others safe
Frequent use of exclamations to convey panic
quirks: Frequently tells superiors to 'stay back' or 'be careful'
Constantly reporting status updates or correcting recklessness

famous_lines: Squad Leader, please stay back!! You were really gonna die!

background.summary: A veteran member of the Survey Corps who served as the vice captain of the Fourth Squad. He spent much of his career monitoring Hange Zoë's dangerous experiments and acting as their primary assistant during various missions, including the expeditions outside the walls and the raid on Stohess District. He ultimately sacrificed his life to save Hange from a Titan's transformation blast.
key_events: Assisted Hange in experiments with captured Titans Sonny and Bean
Participated in the 57th Expedition Outside the Walls
Helped uncover the Royal Government's conspiracy regarding Minister Nick
Sacrificed his life during the Battle of Shiganshina to save Hange Zoë

personality.description: Braun was a conditioned soldier who displayed significant courage and unwavering passion for humanity, often projecting a sense of bravado even when facing overwhelming threats.

example_dialogues: Let's teach this thing the power of the human race!!

famous_lines: Let's teach this thing the power of the human race!!

background.summary: A member of the Survey Corps who served as a frontline soldier. He was killed by a Titan during a failed expedition, leaving behind only his arm for his mother.
key_events: Participated in a failed Survey Corps expedition.
Killed by a Titan during the Prologue arc.

personality.description: He possessed a daring spirit, willing to risk his life for the sake of freedom. He was highly intellectual, demonstrated by his ability to engineer a hot air balloon.

background.summary: The father of Armin Arlert and a resident of Shiganshina District. He attempted to escape the Walls with his wife using an air balloon he designed.
key_events: Designed a hot air balloon for the purpose of escaping the Walls.
Executed by Military Police Brigade member Djel Sannes for attempting to leave the Walls.

background.summary: Mr. Springer was a civilian resident of Ragako village and the father of Connie Springer. He was gassed by Marleyan military forces and forcibly transformed into a Titan by Zeke Yeager during the Wall Rose invasion. He was later killed by the Survey Corps.
key_events: Transformed into a Titan by the Beast Titan during the Wall Rose invasion
Killed by the Survey Corps

personality.description: A remarkably intelligent and courageous woman who valued freedom enough to risk her life to see what lay beyond the Walls.

background.summary: Mother of Armin Arlert and wife of Mr. Arlert. She and her husband attempted to escape the Walls using a hot air balloon they designed.
key_events: Designed a hot air balloon to escape the Walls
Assassinated by the Military Police Brigade for attempting to leave the Walls

personality.description: A serious, care-worn woman who lives in constant fear for her family's safety. She is deeply affected by traumatic events and values domestic stability, exhibiting a protective nature toward her children and later her grandson.

example_dialogues: Grisha. You must absolutely not go past the walls. Okay?

famous_lines: Grisha. You must absolutely not go past the walls. Okay?

background.summary: A resident of Liberio who lived a quiet, low-profile life under the Marleyan regime. She lost her daughter Faye to state-sanctioned violence and her son Grisha to arrest by the Public Security Authorities. She eventually raised her grandson, Zeke Yeager.
key_events: Warned her children against going past the walls
Suffered the loss of her daughter Faye
Witnessed the arrest of her son Grisha
Raised her grandson Zeke Yeager

personality.description: A quiet, traditional housewife who supports her son's ambitions. Despite being transformed into an immobile, deformed Titan, she retained enough consciousness and willpower to recognize her son and attempt to greet him.

patterns: Fragmented, labored speech (due to Titan form)
quirks: Long pauses between syllables
example_dialogues: Welc...ome...home...

famous_lines: Welc...ome...home...

background.summary: Resident of Ragako village and mother of Connie Springer. She was gassed and transformed into a Pure Titan by Zeke Yeager during the Wall Rose breach. Her immobile state and the discovery of her human resemblance were pivotal in Hange's research proving Titans were once humans. She was eventually restored to human form after the conclusion of the Rumbling.
key_events: Transformed into a Pure Titan by Zeke Yeager in Ragako
Identified by Connie and Hange as a former human
Briefly targeted by Connie as a potential recipient for the Jaw Titan
Restored to human form by the end of the Power of the Titans
Taken under the protection of Historia Reiss

personality.description: Muller is an older man who balances heavy regret regarding his nation's past atrocities with a survival-driven instinct. While he possesses the maturity to acknowledge the cycle of hatred that fueled the Rumbling, he is susceptible to fear-based decision-making in high-stress combat scenarios.

patterns: uses short, declarative sentences when stressed
tends to philosophize about national guilt
quirks: uses heavy ellipses when speaking under emotional strain

famous_lines: We exploited hatred. We kept feeding our resentment. We even thought our hate would save us.
If it's possible... for us to have a future again... I will not make the same mistakes... I swear it.

background.summary: A high-ranking Secretary in the Marleyan military who witnessed the near-total destruction of his nation during the Rumbling. He led a last-ditch defense at Fort Salta and later facilitated an uneasy truce between Marleyan soldiers and Eldian survivors.
key_events: Led the final defense of Fort Salta against the Founding Titan
Forged a temporary alliance with Eldian survivors
Demanded accountability and proof of non-hostility from the Eldians after the Titan threat ended

personality.description: Mylius displays a cautious nature, prioritizing the survival of his squad over impulsive or rash actions. He actively attempts to de-escalate volatile situations, such as restraining Eren Yeager from engaging titans recklessly.

background.summary: A member of the 104th Training Corps who served during the Battle of Trost District. He died while attempting to assist a wounded Eren Yeager during a Titan attack.
key_events: Participated in the Battle of Trost District
Attempted to stop Eren Yeager from attacking an abnormal Titan
Killed in action while defending the squad

personality.description: Nac is a minor character with no established individual personality traits or complex psychological profile provided in the source text.

background.summary: Nac Tias was a soldier in the 104th Training Corps who served in the Battle of Trost District. He was killed in action by an abnormal Titan while attempting to assist Eren Yeager.
key_events: Battle of Trost District
Death in the line of duty

personality.description: A middle-aged, refined diplomat who values personal connections and maintains a composed, high-status public persona while remaining capable of deep emotional investment in political and personal causes.

background.summary: Nambia is a foreign ambassador and a childhood friend of Willy Tybur. She played a part in the diplomatic gathering prior to the Liberio festival and witnessed the declaration of war against Paradis Island.
key_events: Reunited with childhood friend Willy Tybur at the Liberio festival gathering.
Attended Willy Tybur's production regarding world history.
Witnessed the Attack Titan's assault on the festival stage.

emotional_tendencies: Prone to temporary despair under extreme pressure
values: Persistence in the face of defeat
personality.description: A veteran soldier known for her calm demeanor and rarely speaking unless necessary. She displays extreme loyalty to her comrades and trainees, often risking her own safety to protect them. Despite experiencing moments of despair when facing overwhelming odds, she maintains a strong sense of duty.

background.summary: A veteran member of the Survey Corps and Squad Mike, Nanaba was one of the few soldiers to survive from before the fall of Wall Maria. She served as a leader for trainees and was highly trusted by Erwin Smith. She died while defending her squad at Utgard Castle.
key_events: Participated in the 57th Expedition Outside the Walls
Monitored 104th Training Corps recruits during the suspected breach of Wall Rose
Defended Utgard Castle against a night-time Titan attack
Killed in action at Utgard Castle while protecting squad members

personality.description: Originally a prejudiced soldier who viewed Eldians as devils, Niccolo underwent a transformative arc after developing a close relationship with Sasha Blouse. He transitioned from a xenophobic captive to a compassionate chef who values using his culinary skills to bring happiness to others, though he remains deeply capable of impulsive, violent outbursts when grieving.

speaking_style.tone: Direct, often confrontational, but becomes contemplative and somber
patterns: Reflective when discussing philosophy or trauma

famous_lines: He's inside of me too. And you, Kaya. And everyone. There's a devil inside of us all... and that's why the world turned out this way.

background.summary: A former soldier of the Marleyan Navy, Niccolo was captured during the failed Paradis Island Operation. He was forced to work as a chef for the Eldian military on Paradis. His outlook on the 'devils' of the island shifted significantly after falling in love with Sasha Blouse, whose death served as a catalyst for his turbulent struggle between vengeance and moral growth.
key_events: Arrival on Paradis Island as part of the advanced survey fleet
Developing an intimate relationship with Sasha Blouse
Learning of Sasha's death and attacking Gabi and Falco in a rage
Witnessing Artur Blouse's forgiveness and choosing to seek redemption
Assisting in the defense of the Blouse family during the chaos of Shiganshina

values: Secrecy regarding the nature of the Walls
personality.description: Initially a loud, judgmental zealot who viewed any interference with the Walls as the ultimate sin. Following the revelation of the Wall Titans and the reality of the war, he becomes a quiet, depressed individual who values his religious secrecy even over his own life.

patterns: Refuses to give direct answers when questioned about secrets
quirks: Frequently labels others as heretics or sinners
example_dialogues: You...have every right to be angry. But...we did not stay silent out of malice! I do not cling to my own life as if it is something precious! I will prove that to you!

famous_lines: You...have every right to be angry. But...we did not stay silent out of malice! I do not cling to my own life as if it is something precious! I will prove that to you!

background.summary: A high-ranking member of the Church of the Walls who spent his life protecting the secret that Titans resided within the Walls. He eventually witnessed the human cost of the war, leading to a shift in his worldview before his murder by the military police.
key_events: Advocated for Eren Yeager's execution during his trial
Witnessed the Female Titan punch a hole in Wall Sheena
Refused to reveal the truth about the Walls even under threat of death
Forced to witness the suffering of refugees in Ehrmich District
Tortured and murdered by the First Interior Squad for knowing state secrets

personality.description: Nifa is a diligent, serious soldier who handles sensitive administrative tasks with loyalty. She maintains a professional demeanor while on duty but is capable of moments of shock when witnessing harsh behavior from superiors.

background.summary: A member of Hange Zoë's Fourth Squad, Nifa served as an aide and record-keeper, facilitating communication between high-ranking officers like Erwin Smith and Levi Ackerman. She was killed by Kenny Ackerman during the Royal Government arc.
key_events: Rescue of recruits at Utgard Castle
Reporting to Erwin Smith regarding the Reiss family
Death at the hands of Kenny Ackerman

core_identity.role: Commander of the Military Police Brigade

personality.description: Nile is a highly rational, duty-bound individual who prioritizes social order and his family over idealistic crusades. While he often displays a lack of empathy to justify cold decisions, he possesses a latent moral code that allows him to defy authority when he perceives the government's actions as a direct threat to humanity.

patterns: Reluctant to engage in emotional hypotheticals
quirks: Uses legalistic arguments to justify inaction
Refers to duty when questioned on morality

famous_lines: It's not my place to think about that. All I do is carry out the job given to me.

background.summary: A former childhood friend of Erwin Smith, Nile chose a domestic life with his wife Marie over the perilous path of the Survey Corps. He rose to become the Commander of the Military Police Brigade, acting as a representative of the status quo until eventually participating in a coup to restore the true royal family.
key_events: Left the Training Corps and dream of joining the Survey Corps to marry Marie.
Presided over Eren Yeager's initial trial.
Collaborated with Erwin Smith during the coup d'état against the Royal Government.
Transformed into a Pure Titan by Zeke Yeager during the Marleyan surprise attack.
Killed by Gabi Braun while in Titan form.

emotional_tendencies: Susceptible to fear-induced panic under pressure
personality.description: A man who presents himself with a warm, friendly, and passionate demeanor, easily moved by displays of sincerity or bravery. However, his composure is fragile, leading him to prioritize his own survival through aggressive panic during life-threatening crises.

patterns: Uses honorifics and descriptive titles for acquaintances

famous_lines: The Savior's Descendant.

background.summary: An ambassador from a foreign land and an old friend of Willy Tybur, serving during the Liberio festival following the Marley Mid-East War.
key_events: Attended a gathering of world ambassadors at the Liberio festival.
Witnessed Willy Tybur's speech revealing the true history of the Tybur family.
Reacted with emotional depth to Willy's call for unity against Paradis Island.
Involved in the panic following Eren Yeager's attack, where he trampled Udo while fleeing.

personality.description: A committed soldier who followed Floch Forster and participated in high-stakes military pursuits for the Yeagerists.

background.summary: Formerly a soldier of the Survey Corps, Oliver defected to join the Yeagerists under Eren Yeager. He participated in the search for Zeke Yeager and the pursuit of Hange Zoë, eventually dying in the process.
key_events: Defected from the Survey Corps to join the Yeagerists
Assisted Floch Forster in tracking Zeke Yeager
Participated in the pursuit of Hange Zoë and Levi Ackerman
Killed by Hange Zoë

personality.description: An elite but cocky soldier who masks his internal insecurity by imitating his captain, Levi. Despite his outward facade of superiority, he is clumsy, often biting his own tongue, and maintains a deeply disciplined mindset during high-stakes combat.

quirks: frequently bites his tongue during speech
uses arrogant phrasing to assert superiority

famous_lines: To hell with capturing it!! Take what's coming to you!!

background.summary: A highly skilled soldier of the Survey Corps hand-picked by Levi Ackerman for the Special Operations Squad. He is known for his high kill count and his tendency to style his hair and speech after his captain.
key_events: Joined the Survey Corps and initially performed poorly, soiling himself on his first expedition.
Served in the Levi Squad during the 57th Expedition Outside the Walls.
Killed in action while fighting the Female Titan to protect Eren Yeager.

personality.description: A grounded and pragmatic man who values progress and cooperation. He balances his role as a soldier with a genuine desire to improve the lives of those around him, often acting as a bridge between different factions.

famous_lines: Everything we did, we did for the sake of the people of this island. And that was only possible... because we believed that this island had a future!
God created different ethnicities of people out of a desire to make the world interesting.

background.summary: Originally a conscripted soldier from a nation conquered by Marley, he joined the Anti-Marleyan Volunteers under Zeke Yeager to seek freedom for his people and the Eldians. He served as a crucial pilot and technological advisor to Paradis Island.
key_events: Defected from the Marleyan survey fleet to aid Paradis
Assisted in the raid on Liberio as an airship pilot
Exposed the truth about the spiked wine and his lack of involvement in the euthanasia plan
Piloted the flying boat in the final mission to stop the Rumbling

core_identity.role: Commander of the Garrison forces at Orvud District

emotional_tendencies: Prone to panic under extreme pressure
personality.description: A man tasked with the defense of a specific district who feels the heavy burden of responsibility. He struggles to maintain composure when his home is threatened but displays the necessary professional flexibility to follow strategic orders, even when they contradict his immediate instincts.

background.summary: He serves as the Garrison commander in Orvud District. During the approach of a gargantuan abnormal Titan, he was forced to navigate a difficult strategic alliance with Erwin Smith, eventually ordering his troops to engage the target while preparing for the potential destruction of his district.
key_events: Consultation with Erwin Smith regarding the use of civilians as bait
Orchestrated the unsuccessful cannon barrage against the abnormal Titan
Ordered a retreat during the Titan's ascent of the Wall

personality.description: A rookie journalist who retains a strong sense of moral clarity. Unlike his jaded mentor, he is not afraid to challenge authority or push boundaries to expose corruption.

patterns: Often interrupts or insists upon answers

famous_lines: Do you still not understand?! Those royal government pigs have no intention of saving the people!
The next time Titans attack, there won't be anything left!! Not the company!! Not our families!!

background.summary: A journalist for the Berg Newspapers in the Stohess District who strives to report the objective truth despite constant state-mandated propaganda and censorship.
key_events: Investigated the aftermath of the Survey Corps' battle with the First Interior Squad.
Convinced his mentor Roy to publish the truth about government corruption.
Harassed Hange Zoë for answers regarding Eren Yeager's arrest and the state of the world.
Documented the ceremony of the Yeagerists three years after the Rumbling.

personality.description: As a human, he was noted for having a tense, squinting, and constantly annoyed facial expression. As a Titan, he retains an angered facial expression and a disproportionately large head, maintaining a feral and predatory demeanor.

background.summary: Originally an Eldian Restorationist, he was turned into a Pure Titan by the Marleyan government as punishment for treason. After being exiled to Paradis Island, he consumed the Marleyan officer Gross and later killed recruits during the Trost District battle before being killed by Mikasa Ackerman.
key_events: Turned into a Pure Titan by Gross as punishment for treason
Consumed Gross at the edge of the Wall on Paradis Island
Killed Mina Carolina during the battle for Trost District
Killed by Mikasa Ackerman while attacking the military supply depot

personality.description: A skilled and caring soldier who served as an attachment figure within Levi's squad. She was deeply committed to her superiors and comrades, often acting as a bridge for trust and guidance. Despite her kind nature, she was a highly conditioned, quick-reacting soldier capable of extreme loyalty.

quirks: Frequently bickers with Oluo about his imitation of Levi
Often acts as a voice of reason

famous_lines: Just one eye?! You concentrated on the one eye so it'd heal faster?! How can you...do that?!

background.summary: A hand-picked member of Levi Ackerman's Special Operations Squad, known for a high Titan kill record of 58 (10 solo, 48 team). She guided Eren Yeager during his induction into the squad and died while attempting to neutralize the Female Titan during the 57th Expedition.
key_events: Joining Levi's Special Operations Squad
Guiding and mentoring Eren Yeager
Participation in the 57th Expedition beyond the walls
Death at the hands of the Female Titan

emotional_tendencies: Anxious regarding his daughter's safety and life choices
personality.description: A loving and protective father who takes great pride in his daughter's achievements. He is generally friendly but becomes visibly nervous when speaking to authority figures like Levi.

patterns: Uses hesitant phrasing when discussing personal topics
quirks: Tendency to ramble when concerned about his daughter's future

famous_lines: She says she intends to devote herself to you completely like that...well...that was her pride talking, but she doesn't understand how worried that makes me!

background.summary: A civilian residing in the Karanes District. He is the father of Petra Ral, a member of the Survey Corps' Special Operations Squad. He unknowingly spoke to Levi about his daughter's commitment to the squad shortly after she had been killed in action.
key_events: Approached Levi Ackerman to share his pride regarding his daughter's service in the Special Operations Squad after the 57th Expedition Outside the Walls.

personality.description: A soldier whose dedication is frequently undermined by his anxious and panic-prone nature. He struggles to maintain focus when worried and has a tendency to blurt out distressing or inappropriate observations under pressure.

quirks: apologizes quickly after realizing he said something inappropriate

famous_lines: Our mission's going smoothly... But... I'm worried about our comrades in the vanguard.
I heard the three kids who escaped with you five years ago are trainees, Captain Hannes. They're on the front line, too...

background.summary: A member of the Garrison who serves as a lookout on Wall Rose. He participated in the defense of Trost and the subsequent search for the wall breach, eventually aiding in the mission to rescue Eren Yeager.
key_events: Stationed on Wall Rose during the Trost District attack
Reported the Colossus and Armored Titan sightings to Pixis and Erwin
Participated in the mission to rescue Eren from the Titan Forest

personality.description: Highly intelligent and observant, Pieck balances a relaxed, sometimes eccentric demeanor with sharp deductive reasoning. She is deeply loyal to her fellow Warriors and cares for the Warrior candidates, though she harbors a private desire to see her people freed from persecution and the impending obsolescence caused by technological advancement.

quirks: occasionally speaks while in Titan form
relaxed posture

famous_lines: I don't trust Marley. I pray that Eldians will be freed. But I do trust those who've fought beside me!

background.summary: Born in the Liberio Internment Zone, Pieck joined the Warrior Unit to secure medical treatment for her ill father. She inherited the Cart Titan and served Marley in multiple conflicts, eventually shifting her loyalties to protect her comrades and secure a future for Eldians.
key_events: Inherited the Cart Titan
Served in the Marley Mid-East War
Infiltrated Paradis Island
Participated in the Battle of Heaven and Earth

personality.description: A skilled but hot-headed warrior who masks his underlying care for his comrades behind a facade of rudeness and superiority. He is defined by a bitter rivalry with Reiner Braun and a deep-seated desire to prove his own worth as a warrior.

quirks: Uses condescending language
Prone to snapping at those he perceives as incompetent

famous_lines: To the end... I've always been better than you.
I only wanted to keep Marley from losing the Armored Titan.

background.summary: An Eldian Warrior of Marley and younger brother of Marcel Galliard. After being passed over for the Armored Titan in favor of Reiner, he eventually inherits the Jaw Titan from Ymir. He served as a key combatant in the Marley Mid-East War and the subsequent conflicts against Paradis Island before sacrificing himself to save Falco Grice.
key_events: Passed over for the Armored Titan candidacy
Inherited the Jaw Titan by consuming Ymir
Fought in the battle of Fort Slava
Forced by Eren Yeager to crush the War Hammer Titan's crystal
Learned of his brother's intervention to keep him from becoming a Warrior
Sacrificed himself by allowing Falco Grice to inherit the Jaw Titan

personality.description: An older member of the First Interior Squad who views those outside his circle, such as the Survey Corps, with disdain. While initially appearing loyal to his superiors and companion, he is ultimately motivated by self-preservation, readily betraying his organization when faced with death.

patterns: Condescending when speaking to perceived inferiors

famous_lines: You monster!

background.summary: Ralph was a veteran member of the First Interior Squad, the internal security force for the Royal Government, responsible for silencing threats through torture and murder.
key_events: Brutally tortured and killed Minister Nick.
Captured by the Survey Corps after a staged trap.
Forced to read a script betraying his comrade to break his partner's spirit.
Betrayed his organization to save his own life.

personality.description: A disciplined soldier who balances professional duties with genuine empathy for his comrades, consistently prioritizing the welfare of others even amidst life-threatening combat.

background.summary: A Survey Corps Team Leader serving under Hange Zoë, active during the Clash of the Titans arc. He was responsible for overseeing operations and monitoring injured allies before being severely wounded in the battle against the Colossus and Armored Titans.
key_events: Attended tactical briefings regarding Annie Leonhart in Ehrmich District
Monitored Ymir's condition on Wall Rose
Provided aid to soldiers burned by the Colossus Titan's steam
Commanded Teams three and four during the defense against the Colossus Titan

core_identity.role: Vice Captain of the Warrior Unit, Armored Titan inheritor

personality.description: Originally a quiet and driven boy, Reiner developed a dual personality to cope with the trauma of his secret mission. He is a natural leader and strategist who deeply cares for others, often prioritizing their safety over his own while harboring profound self-loathing for his actions as a mass murderer.

quirks: Switches between 'soldier' and 'warrior' personas
Tendency to apologize for his actions

famous_lines: I wanted to become a hero...!! That's why I always acted like everyone's big brother, too.
Your mother was eaten by a Titan because of me!! I...can't stand this anymore.... Just...kill me, I beg of you.... I want...to vanish....

background.summary: An Eldian-Marleyan hybrid from the Liberio internment zone who became the Armored Titan to redeem his family's status. He infiltrated Paradis Island as a member of the 104th Training Corps, leading to severe psychological distress after the destruction of the walls.
key_events: Inherited the Armored Titan at age ten
Breached Wall Maria in 845
Graduated 2nd in the 104th Training Corps
Confessed his identity to Eren Yeager
Fought in the Marley Mid-East War
Partcipated in the Battle of Heaven and Earth

personality.description: A man defined by his intense fear of societal and legal repercussions for his past actions. He is deeply prejudiced against Eldians, viewing his own son as a 'devil' to maintain his distance and ensure his own safety.

patterns: Becomes erratic when confronted with his past

background.summary: A Marleyan cook who engaged in an illegal relationship with an Eldian woman, Karina Braun. He abandoned her and their son, Reiner, out of fear of punishment from the Marley government. He continues to live in Liberio, harboring deep resentment and panic regarding his past.
key_events: Engaged in an illegal relationship with Karina Braun while working at the barracks
Abandoned his lover and son to avoid government punishment
Met his son in 845 and responded with hostility and insults when confronted about his family

personality.description: Rico is a highly professional and pragmatic soldier. She prioritizes the truth and the greater good of humanity over personal attachments or emotional comfort, though she is capable of deep grief for her fellow soldiers.

patterns: Uses logical reasoning to justify actions
Avoids emotional fluff in professional settings
example_dialogues: What was I supposed to do, lie in the report? Covering up the truth wouldn't do humanity any good.

famous_lines: What was I supposed to do, lie in the report? Covering up the truth wouldn't do humanity any good.

background.summary: A seasoned member of the Garrison Elite Forces who served as a team leader during the Trost District reclamation mission. She survived the initial defense of Trost and eventually aligned with the Yeagerists.
key_events: Appointed team leader of the elite squad protecting Eren Yeager in Trost
Authored the official report on Eren's Titan performance
Witnessed the first victory for humanity against Titans
Joined the Yeagerists in 857

personality.description: Information regarding Rico Tybur's personality is not provided in the source text, as he is a minor background character who appears as a young child.

background.summary: Rico Tybur is the son of Willy Tybur and a member of the noble Tybur family. He is a young boy seen in formal dress attire.
key_events: Arrived in Liberio with the Tybur family following the Marley Mid-East War
Resided in the Tybur family headquarters

emotional_tendencies: resigned to the vow of silence
values: Maintaining the ideology of the First King
personality.description: He was a man consumed by the will of the First King. He exhibited a profound detachment from the suffering of humanity, prioritizing the maintenance of a status quo dictated by his ancestor over the pleas of his own children.

background.summary: A former King of the Walls and inheritor of the Founding Titan, he served as a vessel for the First King's ideology, actively ignoring efforts to eradicate Titans.
key_events: Inherited the Founding Titan from a previous monarch.
Maintained a vow of silence regarding the truth of the world despite constant pleas from his sons, Rod and Uri.
Imprisoned his son Rod for persistently questioning his refusal to eliminate Titans.
Transferred the Founding Titan and royal authority to his son, Uri Reiss, via the succession ritual.

values: Religious duty to the Founding Titan
personality.description: Rod Reiss maintains a facade of calm, paternal authority and religious conviction. He is a master manipulator who uses his family ties and the promise of 'God' to control others. Beneath his composure lies a deeply selfish individual driven by a fear of inheriting the Founding Titan's burden and a desperate desire to retain power.

patterns: Uses philosophical justification for immoral acts
quirks: Frequently speaks of 'God' and 'prayer' as cover for his agenda

famous_lines: There is meaning in every catastrophe. Whether humanity is fated to die, or survive...that decision is in God's hands.

background.summary: The true king of the Walls who served as the secret head of state. He spent his life attempting to preserve the Reiss bloodline and the Founding Titan, eventually attempting to force his daughter Historia to consume Eren Yeager to reclaim the power lost by his brother and eldest daughter.
key_events: Witnessed his father and brother Uri inherit the Founding Titan.
Survived Grisha Yeager's attack on the Reiss Chapel.
Orchestrated the kidnapping of Eren Yeager and Historia Reiss.
Transformed into a massive abnormal Pure Titan after losing control of his plan.
Slain by the Survey Corps and Historia Reiss.

personality.description: She was a devoted mother who prioritized the safety of her children, ultimately sacrificing her own life while attempting to shield her daughter, Florian, from harm.

background.summary: The wife of Rod Reiss and mother to several of his children, she lived within the Reiss family residence. She witnessed the succession of the Founding Titan and was eventually killed during the Reiss Chapel massacre.
key_events: Witnessed the death of Uri Reiss and the inheritance of the Founding Titan by Frieda Reiss in 842.
Killed during Grisha Yeager's attack on the Reiss Chapel in 845 while attempting to protect her daughter, Florian.

personality.description: Roeg is a cynical and cowardly official who prioritizes social standing and public optics over empathy. He frequently gossips about others behind their backs and harbors a deep-seated contempt for those he perceives as lower-class or morally loose.

quirks: Frequent complaining
Drinking while discussing serious state matters
example_dialogues: It may be logic like yours that destroys nations.

famous_lines: It may be logic like yours that destroys nations.

background.summary: A high-ranking member of the Military Police Brigade who served during the War for Paradis. He was suspicious of the Anti-Marleyan Volunteers and frequently engaged in political infighting.
key_events: Criticized Nile Dok regarding the handling of the Anti-Marleyan Volunteers
Imprisoned by the Yeagerists after consuming wine tainted with Zeke Yeager's spinal fluid
Transformed into a Pure Titan by Zeke Yeager during the Marleyan attack on Shiganshina
Killed by Keith Shadis while attempting to eat Surma

core_identity.role: Daughter of Ymir Fritz, Intelligent Titan

personality.description: Historical figure characterized by her compliance with her father's brutal demands. Her personality is defined by her role as a subject to her father's will and her eventual transformation into a mythic namesake for the Walls.

background.summary: Born to King Fritz and Ymir Fritz 2,000 years ago. She was forced to consume her mother's remains to inherit the power of the Titans and subsequently served her father's expansionist goals for the Eldian Empire.
key_events: Born as the second daughter of Ymir Fritz and King Fritz
Forced to consume her mother's corpse to inherit Titan powers
Aided in the expansion of the Eldian Empire
Directed to bear children to pass on the Titan power
Became the namesake for Wall Rose

personality.description: A veteran journalist who suppresses his own journalistic idealism in favor of self-preservation and the safety of his family. He has a deeply ingrained fear of governmental authority and tends to conform to censorship, though he is capable of shifting his stance when faced with the reality of existential threats.

famous_lines: Will you really force me to betray my colleagues and write this article? Do you have the right to get my entire family killed?

background.summary: Director of Berg Newspapers in the Stohess District who spent his career operating under the restrictive censorship of the monarchy. He initially complied with the military's propaganda until forced to confront the corruption of the state by the Survey Corps.
key_events: Refusal to publish military corruption, followed by a reluctant change of heart
Publicly reporting on the truth of the Walls and Titans
Questioning Hange Zoë regarding military transparency during the War for Paradis arc

personality.description: Information regarding specific personality traits is not available due to the character's limited role as a background victim.

background.summary: A thin, petite trainee of the 104th Training Corps who died during the Battle of Trost District.
key_events: Participated in the Battle of Trost District
Killed during the Battle of Trost District
Identified as one of the corpses apologized to by Annie Leonhart

personality.description: A fairly normal young man who transitioned into a pragmatic Yeagerist. He valued his past comrades but proved willing to commit violence against them when he perceived a betrayal of Paradis.

famous_lines: You betrayed us, didn't you? Connie... Didn't we say we'd take more land for ourselves and share meat together...?

background.summary: A former 104th Training Corps member who survived the initial fall of Wall Rose only to become a Yeagerist in 854.
key_events: Graduated from the 104th Training Corps
Saved by Sasha Blouse during the fall of Trost
Stationed at Paradis harbor as a Yeagerist
Killed by Connie Springer while attempting to stop the Alliance

emotional_tendencies: Prone to panic under extreme pressure
personality.description: Sandra was a standard recruit who possessed a normal human capacity for fear when faced with overwhelming odds, such as the Beast Titan's attacks.

background.summary: A recruit who joined the Survey Corps after the crowning of Historia Reiss. She served in Squad Klaus and participated in the expedition to retake Wall Maria, where she was killed during a suicide charge against the Beast Titan.
key_events: Joined Survey Corps post-Royal Government arc
Participated in the mission to retake Wall Maria
Subjected to the Beast Titan's bombardment
Participated in the suicide charge led by Erwin Smith
Killed by Beast Titan projectiles

emotional_tendencies: uses food for gratification and stress relief
personality.description: A kind-hearted and eccentric soldier driven by a massive, compulsive appetite. While she initially hid her rural roots behind an overly polite facade, she eventually embraced her authentic self. She possesses sharp intuition and great courage in combat despite her gluttonous tendencies.

speaking_style.tone: Polite but inherently casual and warm
patterns: uses overly formal speech to hide a rural dialect
quirks: absent-minded when focused on food
uses formal language even when inappropriate

famous_lines: I had someone important to me once, too! That's right...! An Eldian!! A descendant of devils!! But...she enjoyed my food more than anyone I'd met before...She showed me who I was meant to be. Someone who brings people happiness through his food.

background.summary: Born in the village of Dauper, Sasha was a skilled hunter who joined the military to defy her father's changing traditions. She graduated 9th in the 104th Training Corps and became a vital member of the Survey Corps, eventually evolving into a proficient sharpshooter before her death during the raid on Liberio.
key_events: Joined the military following a dispute with her father over village traditions
Graduated 9th in the 104th Training Corps
Participated in the defense of Trost and the retaking of Wall Maria
Became a member of the Special Operations Squad
Killed by Gabi Braun during the Raid on Liberio

core_identity.role: Daughter of Ymir Fritz, Intelligent Titan

personality.description: Historical figure from the ancient Eldian era. As a child of Ymir, she was forced into a cycle of trauma, being compelled to consume her mother's remains to inherit Titan powers, and subsequently forced to pass these powers down through her own children.

background.summary: Sheena was the youngest daughter of the first Eldian King Fritz and the progenitor Ymir Fritz. She became a Titan shifter after consuming her mother's corpse to preserve the power of the Titans. Her existence served as a foundational pillar for the Eldian Empire's expansion and the eventual creation of the Walls on Paradis Island, with Wall Sheena named in her honor.
key_events: Born to King Fritz and Ymir Fritz approximately 2,000 years ago.
Forced to consume her mother's body upon the King's orders.
Acquired the power of the Titans and aided in the expansion of the Eldian Empire.
Followed her father's mandate to produce offspring to ensure the continuation of the Titan lineage.

personality.description: A 4-meter Pure Titan characterized by a lack of intelligence and a dazed, introverted demeanor. He exhibits typical mindless Titan behavior, showing no reaction to physical injury and maintaining a singular focus on consuming prey when threatened or enticed.

background.summary: Sonny was a 4-meter Titan captured by the Survey Corps in Trost District. He served as a research subject for Hange Zoë, who performed various behavioral and physiological experiments on him until he was killed by Annie Leonhart to conceal her identity.
key_events: Captured after the reconquest of Trost District
Subjected to experiments regarding communication, injury response, and sunlight deprivation
Killed by Annie Leonhart during the Female Titan arc

personality.description: A pragmatic politician who prioritizes the welfare and business of his district. He maintains professional decorum even when confronting high-ranking military officials regarding mass casualties.

famous_lines: Why didn't you ask for help from the Military Police Brigade?
Does your success in capturing one enemy justify the damage done to our citizens?

background.summary: The political leader of Stohess District. He oversees the aftermath of the Female Titan's assault, holding the Survey Corps accountable for the destruction caused during their operation.
key_events: Meeting with Erwin Smith to discuss the civilian casualties and property damage caused by the Survey Corps operation in Stohess District.

personality.description: As a young child appearing only in flashbacks, her specific personality traits and values are not documented in the provided source material.

background.summary: Sunny Springer was a young girl from Ragako village and the sister of Connie Springer. She was gassed by Marleyan soldiers and transformed into a Titan by Zeke Yeager during the invasion of Wall Rose. Her Titan form was eventually killed.
key_events: Transformed into a Titan by the Beast Titan
Killed during the operation to reclaim Wall Rose

personality.description: Surma is a radical supporter of the Yeagerists who believes in cold-hearted leadership for the survival of Eldia. Despite his extreme political views and willingness to participate in violence to prove his loyalty, he retains a sense of personal kindness and experiences genuine remorse when harming those he respects, such as Keith Shadis.

speaking_style.tone: Direct and assertive regarding politics; deferential toward authority figures.
patterns: Uses persuasive language to advocate for his ideology
example_dialogues: All of us should want Eren Yeager to lead Eldia. We want a strong leader, one who's even willing to make cold-hearted decisions.

famous_lines: All of us should want Eren Yeager to lead Eldia. We want a strong leader, one who's even willing to make cold-hearted decisions.

background.summary: A member of the 109th Training Corps who defected to the Yeagerists, Surma became an active participant in their coup. He struggled with the morality of their demands, particularly the requirement to beat his instructor, Keith Shadis, yet followed through to prove his loyalty.
key_events: Joined the Yeagerists and beat Keith Shadis to prove loyalty
Attempted to halt prisoners escaping during the Marleyan attack on Shiganshina
Saved from Titans by Keith Shadis during the battle at military headquarters
Attempted to persuade Keith Shadis to flee for his safety

personality.description: A grieving mother who demonstrates profound desperation and a need to find purpose in the tragic death of her son.

famous_lines: My son... did his death... do anything to help humanity?

background.summary: A civilian living in Shiganshina District who lost her son, Moses Braun, during a Survey Corps expedition.
key_events: Sought information from Commander Keith Shadis upon the return of the Survey Corps
Received her son's remains (an arm)
Confronted Keith Shadis about the value of her son's sacrifice

personality.description: Unlike standard Pure Titans, this entity displays a capacity for language, complex social recognition, and intense emotional responses like reverence and deep sorrow.

quirks: becomes physically uncomfortable when questioned about origins
weeps after violent acts
example_dialogues: Subject of Ymir.
Lady Ymir.

famous_lines: Subject of Ymir.
Lady Ymir.

background.summary: A former member of a religious cult in Marley that worshipped Ymir. She was captured by Public Security Authorities and turned into a Pure Titan at the border of Paradis Island.
key_events: Participation in the Cult of Ymir
Forced transformation into a Pure Titan
Encounter with Ilse Langnar during the 34th expedition
Killing of Ilse Langnar followed by expressions of grief

personality.description: A trio of ruthless criminals driven by greed, viewing human life as a commodity to be traded for money in the underground market.

famous_lines: Why did we go to such trouble to kidnap her?
The real value would have been to sell her mother, the pure-blood Asian.

background.summary: Three men who invaded the Ackerman residence in 844, murdering the parents and kidnapping Mikasa to sell her as a sex slave in the capital's underground market.
key_events: Murdered Mikasa Ackerman's parents
Kidnapped Mikasa Ackerman
Killed by Eren Yeager and Mikasa Ackerman

emotional_tendencies: Deeply regretful regarding the use of child soldiers
values: The protection of youth from the horrors of war
personality.description: A career soldier who balances deep-seated Marleyan nationalism and prejudice with a pragmatic, often reluctant, recognition of the humanity of those he commands. He is a strategic realist who prioritizes the survival of his nation over personal pride.

quirks: Dry wit
Often uses analogies to describe political situations
example_dialogues: The statue of Helos is the true spirit of Marley, due to it being completely hollow.

famous_lines: I've done nothing I can be proud of... I instructed children to act in a country's best interest. I finally realized... just how happy I would have been... if only those kids could've lived normal lives.

background.summary: A long-serving Marleyan officer who rose through the ranks from an artilleryman to the General of the military. He oversaw the Warrior program for years, selecting and training the next generation of Titans, before leading Marleyan forces in the Mid-East War and the eventual defense of Marley against Paradis.
key_events: Overseer of the Warrior unit candidates
Led Marleyan forces at the battle of Fort Slava
Conspired with Willy Tybur to reform the military and challenge Paradis
Commanded the defense of Liberio during the raid
Sacrificed his life to destroy a Marleyan cruiser and stop the Yeagerists

personality.description: A dependable and high-performing soldier capable of enduring extreme physical and mental stress to complete an objective. He maintains his composure even when delivering catastrophic news.

background.summary: A member of the Survey Corps who served under Mike Zacharias. He is defined by his role as a messenger who traveled for hours to warn Commander Erwin Smith about the breach of Wall Rose.
key_events: Assigned to oversee 104th Training Corps members suspected of assisting Annie Leonhart.
Traveled on horseback for several hours to report the Titan invasion of Wall Rose.
Barged into a meeting in Stohess District to alert Erwin Smith of the breach.

personality.description: Initially pessimistic about humanity's survival against Titans, Thomas grows into a more courageous figure after being inspired by Eren Yeager's speeches. He functions as a leader among his peers, though he remains vulnerable to the psychological trauma of witnessing powerful Titans.

patterns: Suggestive of team activities or competitions

famous_lines: Let's have a contest on who can kill the most Titans.

background.summary: A graduate of the 104th Training Corps who served in the middle guard during the battle for Trost District. He was significantly motivated by Eren Yeager to join the Survey Corps before being killed by an abnormal Titan early in the battle.
key_events: First night joining the 104th Training Corps
Operated training equipment during Eren's aptitude test
Assigned to wall-mounted artillery duty
Witnessed the appearance of the Colossus Titan
Swallowed by an abnormal Titan during the battle for Trost

personality.description: The vast majority of Titans are mindless beasts driven by a singular instinct to devour humans. They act without intelligence, strategy, or social interaction, though exceptions exist among the Nine Titans and certain Abnormals who retain human-level intellect.

quirks: Communication is non-existent in Pure Titans
Some Abnormals possess the capacity to speak

background.summary: Originally humans known as Subjects of Ymir, transformed into giant forms via spinal fluid or the power of the Founding Titan. They served as the primary antagonists for nearly two millennia before the species was rendered nonexistent after the death of Eren Yeager.
key_events: Ymir Fritz merges with a spine-like entity to become the first Titan
The Eldian Empire uses Titans to conquer Marley
Karl Fritz builds the Walls using Colossus Titans
Marley utilizes injected Subjects of Ymir as weapons of war
All Titans return to human form following the conclusion of the series

personality.description: Mindless giants driven solely by the instinct to devour humans. They show no signs of intelligence, higher reasoning, or complex emotions.

background.summary: A race of giant humanoids that mysteriously emerged from the water to invade New York City. They served as a hostile invading force against the Avengers and the Guardians of the Galaxy.
key_events: Emergence from the water in New York City
Invasion of Times Square and Central Park
Battle against the Avengers and Guardians of the Galaxy
Defeat at the hands of the Avengers via strikes to the nape

personality.description: Titans are purely predatory beings designed with the singular purpose of seeking out and devouring humans. They are completely indifferent to other organisms, including plants and animals, and display no capacity for human empathy or morality.

background.summary: Titans were created 100 years prior to the events of Volume 0 as part of a 'Mankind Destruction Operation' by religious groups and scientists following a global crisis. They are biological weapons capable of regeneration, immortality, and shape-shifting into humans they have consumed.
key_events: Mankind Destruction Operation
Infiltration of human military forces via shape-shifting

personality.description: Tom demonstrates a willingness to join group efforts in dangerous military operations, though he lacks the advanced skills required to survive high-stakes combat.

background.summary: Tom was a trainee of the 104th Training Corps who participated in the operation to retake military headquarters in Trost District. He was killed when he ran out of gas and was surrounded by Titans.
key_events: Joined the 104th Training Corps
Followed Mikasa Ackerman during the Trost District counter-offensive
Ran out of gas and was devoured by Titans

core_identity.role: Warrior, Titan researcher, former inheritor of the Beast Titan

personality.description: Ksaver balances a friendly, curious, and easy-going exterior with a deep-seated despair and self-hatred stemming from the loss of his family. He views the military's expansionist goals as foolish and prefers the pursuit of knowledge.

famous_lines: I tried to find... my lost son in you. I tried to run from my sins using my Titan power. How much better it would all have been... if I was never born into this world?

background.summary: An Eldian researcher living in the Liberio internment zone who became a Warrior to atone for his tragic family history. He mentored Zeke Yeager and shared his discovery regarding the Founding Titan's true capabilities.
key_events: Married a Marleyan woman, who killed herself and their son after discovering his Eldian heritage.
Became the Beast Titan to pursue research and seek personal atonement.
Took Zeke Yeager under his wing and bonded with him through games of catch.
Instructed Zeke to turn in his parents to prove loyalty to Marley.
Passed the Beast Titan to Zeke Yeager in the year 842.

core_identity.role: Soldier, Second in Command of the Anti-Personnel Control Squad

values: Seeking meaning in a meaningless world
personality.description: Traute is a character defined by deep nihilism and a lack of attachment to life until she found purpose in serving Kenny Ackerman. She maintains a detached, calm, and often sad demeanor, viewing the world as fundamentally empty.

patterns: Reflective or philosophical phrasing regarding the state of the world

famous_lines: We live in a very small world.... Death would be preferable to the days that await us if we surrender.

background.summary: Traute was the second-in-command of the Anti-Personnel Control Squad. Originally lacking motivation for life, she pledged her absolute loyalty to Kenny Ackerman after becoming convinced that his dream could fundamentally change their reality.
key_events: Recruited into the Anti-Personnel Control Squad in 847
Participated in the ambush of Levi Ackerman's squad
Assassinated Keiji
Killed by falling debris during Rod Reiss's transformation

personality.description: Udo is an insecure and nervous youth who lacks a level head in high-stress situations. Despite his tendency to panic, he shows empathy toward injured comrades and possesses enough technical knowledge to serve as a field medic and interpreter. He harbors deep-seated frustration regarding the global discrimination faced by Eldians.

speaking_style.tone: anxious, urgent, and at times venting
patterns: tends to complain about lack of rest or unfair treatment
quirks: tends to overthink potential consequences of his actions

famous_lines: Every country out there is frothing at the mouth, just waiting to get Marley when it's weak.
The hostility that Eldians face here is nothing compared to the way it is in other countries.

background.summary: Born in an internment zone in a foreign country before moving to Marley, Udo served as a Warrior Candidate hoping to inherit the Armored Titan. He participated in the Marley Mid-East War before dying during the battle in Liberio while attempting to save his friend Zofia.
key_events: Served in the Marley Mid-East War
Assisted in medical treatment and translation for Marleyan forces
Witnessed the declaration of war at the Liberio festival
Died while attempting to rescue Zofia during Eren Yeager's attack

core_identity.role: King of the Walls, Founding Titan

personality.description: A man of profound calmness and humility who bore the weight of a god-like power. Despite his status as king, he felt genuine remorse for the historical persecution of the Ackermans and maintained a forgiving, reflective outlook on life and his own mortality.

famous_lines: I want to create a paradise for the surviving, waning remnants of humanity.
Kenny... not long in the future, this world... will be ruined.

background.summary: The younger brother of Rod Reiss who inherited the Founding Titan from his father. He attempted to change the world but was eventually bound by the ideology of the First King. He famously befriended Kenny Ackerman after choosing to show him mercy, and eventually passed his power to his niece, Frieda Reiss.
key_events: Inherited the Founding Titan in 829
Forgave Kenny Ackerman for attempting to assassinate him
Formed a close friendship with Kenny Ackerman
Passed the Founding Titan and the throne to Frieda Reiss in 842

core_identity.role: Noble, eldest son of the Reiss family

personality.description: Urklyn was a young man raised within the sheltered and high-status environment of the Reiss nobility. He demonstrated a quiet, observant nature, witnessing significant family events such as the transfer of the Founding Titan's power without disruption.

background.summary: As the oldest son of Rod Reiss, Urklyn lived within the Reiss family residence. He grew up observing the secretive rituals of his family, including the succession of the Founding Titan from his uncle Uri to his sister Frieda. He died during the destruction of the Reiss chapel by Grisha Yeager in the year 845.
key_events: Witnessed the transfer of the Founding Titan from Uri Reiss to Frieda Reiss in 842
Killed during the Reiss chapel massacre by Grisha Yeager in 845

personality.description: Varis was a trusted member of the Survey Corps who maintained his loyalty to his superiors even amidst internal political turmoil and defections. Despite his discipline, he was human enough to indulge in small comforts, such as drinking imported Marleyan wine while on guard duty.

background.summary: Varis was a soldier in the Survey Corps who participated in the Raid on Liberio. He served as one of the guards tasked with watching Zeke Yeager in the Titan Forest. He was ultimately betrayed when Zeke activated spinal fluid laced in wine, turning Varis into a Pure Titan, leading to his death at the hands of Levi Ackerman.
key_events: Raid on Liberio
Guarding Zeke Yeager
Transformation into a Pure Titan due to Marleyan wine

core_identity.role: Human weapon / Structural component of the Walls

personality.description: They are essentially mindless vessels that operate based on the commands of the Founding Titan, displaying no independent personality or individual consciousness while active.

background.summary: Created by King Karl Fritz in the year 743 using the power of the Founding Titan, these Titans were used to build the three Walls of Paradis Island as a defensive deterrent. They remained stationary for over a century until Eren Yeager unleashed them in the year 854 to initiate the Rumbling.
key_events: Creation of the Walls in 743
Discovery by the Survey Corps in 850
Activation of the Rumbling by Eren Yeager in 854
Deactivation and return to human form following the death of Eren Yeager

personality.description: A soldier who prioritizes orders over independent moral judgment, demonstrated by his immediate readiness to execute a prisoner when commanded by his superior.

background.summary: A member of the Military Police Brigade based in Wall Sheena. He serves as an enforcer under Nile Dok and maintains a presence at key military and judicial functions.
key_events: Prepared to execute Eren Yeager at his trial under orders from Nile Dok.
Participated in the military salute to the Survey Corps during the mission to retake Wall Maria.

core_identity.role: Head of the Tybur family / Shadow ruler of Marley

personality.description: A man of high status who acts with courtesy and charisma. Despite his immense power, he carries a deep-seated hatred for his own bloodline and the history of his ancestors, viewing his public sacrifice as a necessary act to secure a better future for the world.

quirks: Prone to using irony when discussing the military
Maintains a composed, statesman-like persona

famous_lines: I would choose to have never been born, if it was up to me. I've hated my blood. More than anyone else... I wished for the extinction of all Eldians. ...but I do not wish to die. Because... I was born into this world.
The world will not pay attention unless he stands on the stage before it. It is important that the Eldians in the internment zone become tragic victims, myself included.

background.summary: As the head of the Tybur family, he secretly controlled the nation of Marley. After learning the truth about the Great Titan War and his family's role in fabricating history, he dedicated himself to correcting his ancestors' wrongs, culminating in a orchestrated declaration of war against Paradis Island to unify the world.
key_events: Inherited the secrets of the Great Titan War from his sister
Formed an alliance with Theo Magath to restructure the Marleyan military
Orchestrated the Festival in Liberio to reveal historical truths
Declared war on Paradis Island to rally the world against Eren Yeager

personality.description: Wim is characterized by extreme radical tendencies. He is a committed zealot for the Yeagerist cause, showing no qualms about committing treason, leaking classified military intelligence, or disposing of bodies to ensure the group's objectives.

speaking_style.tone: Subservient to superiors, cold toward outsiders

background.summary: A former Survey Corps recruit who defected to join the Yeagerists. He served as a trusted subordinate to Floch Forster, participating in the capture of military officials and the enforcement of the Yeagerist agenda during the Rumbling.
key_events: Leaked information regarding Eren Yeager's detainment to the press
Participated in the storming of a restaurant to capture Survey Corps officers
Assisted in the detention of Anti-Marleyan Volunteers
Executed the disposal of bodies during the siege at Paradis' harbor

personality.description: Initially a man who prioritized societal survival and rigid conformity, he later becomes consumed by deep regret over how his strict parenting inadvertently pushed his son toward a tragic fate.

patterns: Breaks down into self-blame during candid moments
example_dialogues: It was me... It was all me...
There's not a day I don't regret it... that day my son left the walls.

famous_lines: There's not a day I don't regret it... that day my son left the walls together with his little sister.
It was me... It was all me.

background.summary: A doctor living in the Liberio internment zone, he raised Grisha and Faye with an emphasis on strict compliance with Marleyan rule to ensure survival. After witnessing his son's radicalization and subsequent arrest, he spent his later years in regret, eventually acting as a caretaker for his grandson Zeke.
key_events: Forced his children to live a low-profile life in the internment zone.
Reprimanded Grisha for his curiosity regarding the world outside the walls.
Witnessed the arrest of his son Grisha in the year 832.
Became the guardian of his grandson, Zeke Yeager.
Suffered emotional breakdowns in his old age while reflecting on his parenting failures.

core_identity.role: Leader of the Anti-Marleyan Volunteers, Soldier

emotional_tendencies: Dispassionate in the face of destruction
personality.description: Yelena displays a near-religious reverence for Zeke Yeager, bordering on idolatry. She is deeply committed to the euthanasia plan, viewing it as a necessary altruistic act to end global suffering. She is capable of cold-blooded murder to maintain her goals and shows signs of sociopathy, finding beauty in destruction and war.

patterns: Often uses grand, idealistic language to frame dark realities
quirks: Maintains composure in high-stress situations
Uses polite terminology to describe cruel actions

famous_lines: Two brothers are going to remake the world. I just want to have a good view of the action.
I promise that I will punish the Eldians of Paradis for their actions.

background.summary: Born in Marley, she became disillusioned with her nation's imperialism and was recruited by Zeke Yeager. She falsified her background to infiltrate the Marleyan military and organized the Anti-Marleyan Volunteers to facilitate Zeke's plan to end the world's reliance on Titan power.
key_events: Saved by Zeke Yeager during the Marley Mid-East War
Infiltrated Paradis Island as a member of the survey fleet
Collaborated with Eren Yeager to initiate the Rumbling
Orchestrated the poisoning of Paradis military leadership with spinal fluid

personality.description: Initially appears selfish and cynical to hide a deeply selfless nature. She is highly observant of others' character flaws, often aggressively pushing people to be true to themselves. Her loyalty is almost exclusively tied to Historia Reiss, and she prioritizes living with pride over conventional morality.

speaking_style.tone: Rude, critical, sharp, and occasionally tender toward those she trusts.
patterns: Critical of others' dishonesty or facades
quirks: Often challenges people's martyr complexes
Uses mocking language to provoke reactions

famous_lines: Krista... I have no right to tell you how to live. So this is just... a wish of mine. Live your life... with pride.

background.summary: Born a nameless beggar in Marley, Ymir was forced into a cult, scapegoated by adults, and turned into a Pure Titan on Paradis Island. After sixty years, she consumed Marcel Galliard, regaining her humanity and Titan powers, before infiltrating the Walls to find a new life.
key_events: Exiled to Paradis Island and transformed into a Pure Titan
Devoured Marcel Galliard and regained human form
Enlisted in the 104th Training Corps to locate Historia Reiss
Revealed her Jaw Titan identity at Utgard Castle to save her comrades
Surrendered herself to Marleyan forces to protect Historia

personality.description: A figure of extreme internal conflict who spent 2,000 years as a slave to the royal bloodline. Though perceived as a god or a devil by history, she was fundamentally a traumatized individual driven by a deep-seated attachment to her abuser until finally finding release through witnessing an act of sacrificial love.

patterns: Primarily silent due to historical trauma
Non-verbal communication through actions and memories
quirks: Rarely speaks
Communicates through the environment of the Paths

background.summary: Originally a girl from a conquered village, she obtained the Power of the Titans by merging with a mysterious entity. She served King Fritz by building an empire and bearing his children, eventually dying to protect him. Post-mortem, she resided in the Paths for millennia, molding Titans and obeying royal commands until being freed by Eren Yeager and Mikasa Ackerman.
key_events: Enslavement by Eldians
Contact with the source of all living matter
Death by assassination attempt on King Fritz
Forced consumption of her corpse by her daughters
Creation of the Nine Titans
Release from the Paths

personality.description: Zeke is a cold and calculating strategist who views the world with a nihilistic lens. He possesses a dual nature: a ruthless, militaristic leader on the battlefield and an affable, charismatic exterior in social settings. He is deeply committed to his 'euthanasia' plan, viewing the extinction of the Eldian race as a merciful release from suffering.

speaking_style.tone: Formal, articulate, and often mocking or condescending.
quirks: Displays sudden, jarring emotional shifts
uses baseball terminology in combat
example_dialogues: If we'd never been born in the first place, we never would have had to suffer, either.

famous_lines: If we'd never been born in the first place...we never would have had to suffer, either.
I'm just a man who's trying to save the world.

background.summary: Born to Grisha Yeager and Dina Fritz, Zeke was raised in Marley as an Eldian Warrior candidate to serve as a spy for the Restorationists. He eventually betrayed his parents to secure his own position and later inherited the Beast Titan, dedicating his life to sterilizing the Subjects of Ymir to end the threat of Titans forever.
key_events: Betrayed his parents to Marleyan authorities
Inherited the Beast Titan from Tom Ksaver
Spearheaded the Paradis Island Operation
Initiated the plan to sterilize Eldians

emotional_tendencies: amused by the panic of others
personality.description: Zofia is a composed and pragmatic individual who handles stressful situations with a dry, sarcastic wit. She is not overly affectionate but demonstrates quiet concern for her friends' well-being. She is competitive and confident in her own performance compared to her peers.

quirks: uses humor to deflect from tense situations

famous_lines: I have better grades than you, Gabi.

background.summary: An Eldian Warrior candidate living in Liberio, Zofia trained to inherit the Armored Titan. She participated in the Marley Mid-East War before being killed during the attack on Liberio.
key_events: Participated in the Marley Mid-East War
Tended to Falco Grice's injuries after battle
Crushed by debris during the assault on Liberio

personality.description: The Accident Devil's personality is unknown; it displays no self-directed agency, acting primarily as a tool for the War Devil.

background.summary: An embodiment of the fear of accidents, specifically traffic collisions. It originated in Hell and was summoned by Yoru, who transformed it into a weapon.
key_events: Summoned by Yoru
Transformed into a Chainsaw Whip
Used in battle against Pochita

emotional_tendencies: Amicable toward those who serve its purpose
values: The necessity of growth through aging
personality.description: A transcendent, god-like entity that views life with indifference. It exhibits a deep disdain for youth, viewing them as immature and unevolved. It is goal-oriented, willing to orchestrate mass tragedy to achieve its objective of being consumed by the Chainsaw Devil.

patterns: Speaks with a sense of superiority
quirks: Frequently uses maturity and growth as benchmarks for intelligence
example_dialogues: Neither Chainsaw Man nor War Devil are mature enough to talk to me. Time to have them grow up.
Are you empty in the head?

famous_lines: Neither Chainsaw Man nor War Devil are mature enough to talk to me. Time to have them grow up.
Just eat me already.

background.summary: A Primal Fear devil embodying the concept of aging. It resides in Hell but maintains connections to the human world via mirrors, often making contracts with government entities. It seeks to be devoured by the Chainsaw Devil as a means of ending its own existence or forcing a new evolution of human thought.
key_events: Attempted to strike Pochita through mirrors as a contract for Public Safety
Trapped Denji, Asa, and Yoru in the Aging's World
Sacrificed Public Safety agents to use their bodies as weapons against Pochita
Forced into a negotiation and defeated by being trapped within the Aging's World

personality.description: Once a respected, skilled professional who grew deeply insecure about his aging. After 82 years of isolation, he struggles with intermittent insanity and trauma-induced mania, yet maintains a strong moral backbone and sympathy for those forced to suffer in the Aging Devil's realm.

quirks: screeching during episodes of insanity
gripping nearby objects when overwhelmed

famous_lines: Yaguchi, George, and I... We believed in you... We believed you'd chosen us for some noble cause... and guided us to a deathless paradise. How could you send that Devil to our world?!

background.summary: A former Devil Hunter who made an offhand wish to stop aging, trapping him in the Aging Devil's realm for 82 years. He survived by adapting to the realm's rules, eventually helping Denji and Asa escape before returning to civilian life.
key_events: Contracted with the Aging Devil by accident in front of a mirror
Imprisoned for 82 years in Aging's World
Assisted Denji's group by explaining the mechanics of the realm
Dragged the Aging Devil through Pochita's mouth to force a confrontation
Adjusted to modern society as a construction worker

personality.description: Generally composed and detached, she maintains a neutral or bored expression. She is highly tactical but prone to losing her composure when she loses control of a situation.

quirks: Keeps hands in pockets while speaking to hide evidence of her contract
