famous_lines: We're prepared to engage the enemy right here. Now keep quiet.
Finish the job and kill Aki.
Don't lose your cool.

background.summary: A former civilian Devil Hunter who acted as a secondary antagonist during the Katana Man arc. She facilitated the transformation of Katana Man and worked for the Gun Devil before being killed by her own contracted devil.
key_events: Replaced Katana Man's heart with the Katana Devil
Led the assault on Special Division 4
Summoned the Snake Devil to fight Devil Hunters
Killed by the Snake Devil via an involuntary suicide clause in her Gun Devil contract

emotional_tendencies: fears for the safety of loved ones
values: survival of those he cares about
personality.description: Initially appears cold and detached as a defense mechanism, hiding a deeply empathetic nature. He is a 'normal person' at heart who struggles with the brutality of his job while remaining fiercely loyal to his friends.

quirks: often speaks in a business-like manner
tends to be lecturing towards those who take their work lightly

famous_lines: We ought to use every tool at our disposal to do our jobs - even Devils and Fiends. But enemies are enemies... we're only using them. I have no intention of getting friendly with one.
Whatever happens, I want Denji and Power to survive... and be happy... My brother's death was my fault. I want the strength to change things this time...

background.summary: A former Public Safety Devil Hunter who joined the organization to exact revenge on the Gun Devil for killing his family. He eventually transitioned from viewing devils as mere tools to forming genuine bonds with his squad, specifically Denji, Power, and the Angel Devil.
key_events: Lost parents and brother to the Gun Devil
Joined Public Safety and became a member of Makima's special squad
Contracted with the Fox, Curse, and Future Devils
Died during the Gun Devil arc and was possessed to become the Gun Fiend

personality.description: A deeply sensitive and insecure individual acting as a cold-blooded hitman. He struggles with the moral weight of his profession, frequently vomiting at the sight of carnage, yet manages to maintain a facade of professionalism when he feels safe.

quirks: Frequently claims 'it was a piece of cake' to mask terror
example_dialogues: A pro always gets the job done.

famous_lines: I just saw two people die in an accident.
A pro always gets the job done.

background.summary: An American private devil hunter and hitman who traveled to Japan to assassinate Chainsaw Man. After the death of his brothers, he survived by mimicking others through his Skin Devil contract and attempting to blend into civilian life.
key_events: Ambushed Japanese Devil Hunters alongside his brothers
Witnessed his brothers' deaths
Infiltrated public safety circles by impersonating Yutaro Kurose
Survived the battle at the department store against Quanxi

personality.description: A unique devil with little innate hostility toward humans. He is defined by extreme lethargy and a reluctance to use his lethal powers, though he eventually develops genuine concern and empathy for his partner, Aki Hayakawa.

patterns: direct and honest about his exhaustion
often speaks with a sense of fatalism
quirks: apologizes to the dead

famous_lines: Sometimes... the humans my power killed and turned into weapons show up in my dreams and blame me for doing it. If I just let you die, I have this feeling you'll start haunting my dreams too. I also want to do everything I can to help you stay alive.

background.summary: Born in a rural village, Angel served as an agent of Public Safety. He possesses the unique ability to absorb human lifespans to create weapons, a power he uses with great reluctance due to the guilt it induces.
key_events: Joined Tokyo Special Division 4
Formed a close bond with Aki Hayakawa
Lost both arms during the International Assassins arc
Deceased

core_identity.role: High School Student, Private Devil Hunter, War Fiend Host

values: morality based on consequence rather than principle
personality.description: A quiet, socially inept girl with low self-esteem and a negative outlook. She struggles with cognitive dissonance regarding her need for companionship versus her fear of being alone. She often acts out of a desire to avoid making mistakes and relies on internal validation, showing sudden shifts between timidness and calculated manipulation.

speaking_style.tone: Subdued, introspective, sometimes desperate or argumentative
quirks: lectures others on facts to impress them
frequently argues with her own inner voice (Yoru)

famous_lines: If I had known, I could have had a better life. Maybe I could have had friends, or even a boyfriend. I wish... I'd tried living just a little more selfishly.
The real reason I can't is... because I have no idea what's right or wrong. My life is just... one string of attempts to avoid making mistakes.

background.summary: Asa is the host of the War Devil, Yoru, making her the War Fiend. Following the death of her parents and a traumatic encounter, she navigates the Academy Saga while sharing her body with the Devil, balancing her life as a student with her role as a Devil Hunter.
key_events: Contracted with the War Devil after being killed by a classmate
Attended a disastrous date with Denji at an aquarium
Became a member of the Chainsaw Man Church
Attempted suicide following the Falling Devil's attack
Infiltrated the Tokyo Devil Detention Center
Formed a contract with the Aging Devil

personality.description: On the surface, she projects an image of kindness and empathy. Beneath this veneer, she is a deeply resentful individual who harbors spite toward those who maintain familial connections while she does not. She is capable of calculated cruelty to sabotage the happiness of others.

background.summary: A worker at an orphanage for children who lost their parents to Devils. She claimed to share a tragic history with Asa Mitaka to gain her trust, specifically regarding the death of her mother by the Typhoon Devil. She exploited Asa's attachment to her cat, Crambon, by offering to place the pet with a friend, only to drown the cat in a river out of spite.
key_events: Deceived Asa Mitaka regarding her own backstory
Drowned Asa's cat, Crambon, out of jealousy

personality.description: An unemployed, alcoholic, and violent man who was unfaithful to his wife. Despite his negative character traits, he demonstrated a capacity to protect his daughter from a devil.

background.summary: The father of Asa Mitaka. He was attacked by a devil which severed his leg, but he was ultimately killed by his own wife to secure an insurance payout and resolve their financial struggles.
key_events: Attacked by a devil, resulting in the loss of his leg.
Protected Asa from the devil before his death.
Murdered by his wife.

personality.description: A complex figure who balances tender maternal love with cold-blooded pragmatism. She is capable of deep self-sacrifice to protect her child while harboring a secret, vengeful capacity to eliminate perceived obstacles or threats to her family's stability.

background.summary: A human woman who lived with her husband and daughter, Asa. She was ultimately killed by the Typhoon Devil while saving Asa's life. It was later revealed she had murdered her own husband to secure insurance money for her daughter's education, citing his unemployment and infidelity as justification.
key_events: Fought a devil with a stone to protect her daughter
Murdered her husband to claim insurance money for Asa's future
Killed by the Typhoon Devil while shielding Asa

core_identity.role: Public Safety Devil Hunter (formerly), Flamethrower Hybrid, Chainsaw Man Church second-in-command

values: the worship of the Chainsaw Devil's power
punishment as a form of justice
personality.description: Barem is a ruthless and fanatical individual driven by his unwavering devotion to Makima. He views his cruel actions as necessary steps toward a 'peaceful' world, justifying mass murder and torture as punishment for those who oppose his vision or threaten the legacy he upholds.

quirks: uses physical intimidation as a greeting
teases victims before inflicting trauma

famous_lines: These flames are your punishment.
A controlled, peaceful world was supposed to arrive... But you, Chainsaw Man...! Even though you destroyed our promise of peace... You've been lapping up the peace Public Safety provided to you!

background.summary: Originally a brainwashed servant of Makima, Barem survived her defeat and became a primary antagonist in the Academy Saga. He serves as the second-in-command of the Chainsaw Man Church, working to manipulate Denji and force his transformation into the Chainsaw Devil to prevent the Death Devil's emergence.
key_events: Serving as a brainwashed agent for Makima
Joining the Chainsaw Man Church to continue Makima's legacy
Orchestrating the mass murder and trauma of Denji to force his transformation
Attempting to kill Nayuta and burning Denji's pets

emotional_tendencies: Capable of affection towards other devils
personality.description: A predatory devil that views humans as mere food sources. In his first incarnation, he showed refined cruelty and the capacity for interpersonal relationships with other devils. In his second incarnation, he lost his intelligence, becoming a purely instinctual, rabid monster.

quirks: Refers to humans as meals
example_dialogues: Such strength in that puny body! Why would you use that strength to save humans?!

famous_lines: Such strength in that puny body! Why would you use that strength to save humans?!

background.summary: An embodiment of the fear of bats. He acts as an antagonist seeking to consume human blood to regenerate and grow stronger, often holding humans or pets hostage to ensure cooperation.
key_events: Captured Meowy to force Power to bring him a human.
Consumed Denji and Power's blood to regenerate.
Defeated and killed by Denji.
Reincarnated in Hell and returned to Earth as a mindless, savage beast before being killed by Denji again.

core_identity.role: Public Safety Devil Hunter / Shark Fiend

emotional_tendencies: Panics in the face of absolute terror
values: Unwavering loyalty to the Chainsaw Devil
personality.description: Beam is a highly eccentric and innocent individual who struggles to interact with others but displays intense, almost dog-like devotion to Denji, whom he identifies as 'Lord Chainsaw'. He is naturally violent in combat but submissive and protective toward his idol.

patterns: Speaks with high levels of energy
Repeats titles or names to express intensity
quirks: Excessive use of exclamation marks
Displays childlike wonder regarding Denji's strength

famous_lines: That's my Lord Chainsaw!! He's the badass-est!!
Lord chainsaw...please revive...and grant our wish...

background.summary: Beam was a Shark Fiend and member of Tokyo Special Division 4. He served as a guardian and partner to Denji, frequently assisting him in battles against powerful devils and hybrids, before ultimately sacrificing his own blood and life to revive Denji during the International Assassins arc.
key_events: Assigned as Denji's partner during the Bomb Girl arc
Helped Denji defeat the Typhoon Devil and Reze
Rescued Denji from the department store fight
Sacrificed his life to feed Denji blood and revive him in Hell

personality.description: The personality of the Bitterness Devil is currently unknown.

background.summary: The Bitterness Devil is the incarnation of the concept of bitterness. It was consumed by Pochita and erased from existence, only to be vomited back up later by Denji, restoring the concept of bitterness to the world.
key_events: Consumed and erased by Pochita during the Aging Devil arc.
Restored to existence after being vomited by Denji.

personality.description: Bucky is a cheerful and non-antagonistic devil who actively seeks to bond with students. He uses humor and friendliness to integrate into social settings, possibly as a survival mechanism given his lack of inherent strength.

quirks: Frequently makes puns related to being a chicken (e.g., egg-cited)
example_dialogues: My name's Bucky! I'm eggcited to meet you all!

famous_lines: My name's Bucky! I'm eggcited to meet you all!

background.summary: The Chicken Devil, an embodiment of the fear of chickens. He was adopted as a class pet at Fourth East High School to teach students about the value of life. Though he died in the original timeline, he was resurrected in the new reality.
key_events: Presented to class as a pet intended to be killed in three months
Formed a deep bond with his classmates
Accidentally killed by Asa Mitaka
Resurrected after the reality shift caused by Pochita

personality.description: An entity embodying the concept of carpenter bees; lacks documented personality traits beyond a presumed instinctive hostility toward humanity typical of non-humanoid devils.

background.summary: A devil that infested an apartment building in Tokyo before being slain by Asa Mitaka.
key_events: Infested a Tokyo apartment building
Defeated by Asa Mitaka in Chapter 135

personality.description: A non-humanoid devil characterized by a predatory and unsettling nature, driven by the instinctual hostility typical of its kind.

background.summary: The Centipede Devil is a manifestation of the fear of centipedes who served as a Public Safety Devil Hunter. It utilized its massive, segmented body to restrain targets through constriction.
key_events: Restrained Pochita in coordination with Tokyo Special Division 6.
Killed and dismembered by Pochita during the Aging Devil arc.

personality.description: Chocolate is an unusually composed cat that remains calm even when held by a fiend or surrounded by loud, aggressive individuals like Denji.

background.summary: A cat encountered by Power in front of a vending machine after her first day patrolling with Denji. Despite being a small animal, she demonstrates a unique lack of fear regarding supernatural beings.
key_events: Encountered by Power at a vending machine
Held by Power to demonstrate her fondness for cats

personality.description: Originally presents as a supportive and kind leader, but reveals a twisted, narcissistic nature driven by obsession and jealousy regarding her romantic affairs.

speaking_style.tone: Formal and polite in social settings; hostile and accusatory when revealing true colors.

background.summary: A high school student who acted as class president for Asa Mitaka. She secretly maintained a sexual relationship with their teacher, Mr. Tanaka, and became jealous of Asa, leading her to make a contract with the Fire Devil (which she believed to be the Justice Devil) to act on her delusions.
key_events: Consoles Asa Mitaka regarding Bucky
Betrays Asa Mitaka due to jealousy
Contracts with the Fire Devil
Transforms into a creature to attack Asa Mitaka and Yoru

personality.description: The personality of the Claw Devil is currently unknown.

background.summary: The Claw Devil is a devil embodying the concept of claws, likely deriving its power from the fear of scratches or being lacerated. It has a contract with the devil hunter Kishibe for an unknown price and is considered dangerous.
key_events: Contracted with Kishibe.
Identified as a dangerous entity by Pingtsi.

personality.description: The Cockroach Devil is a malevolent entity that seeks to manipulate and taunt its opponents through cruel ultimatums. It shows no regard for the lives of others, whether they are humans or fellow devils, and derives power from the common fear of cockroaches.

example_dialogues: So, you want to be a superhero, huh? Then how about this?! One student with a bright future! Or the five old geezers and grannies in this car! Which will you save... Chainsaw Man the superhero?!

famous_lines: So, you want to be a superhero, huh? Then how about this?! One student with a bright future! Or the five old geezers and grannies in this car! Which will you save... Chainsaw Man the superhero?!

background.summary: A minor antagonist and manifestation of the fear of cockroaches, it engaged in a destructive battle against Chainsaw Man during the Justice Devil arc.
key_events: Accidentally killed the Bat Devil during a fight
Used innocent civilians as leverage to test Chainsaw Man's heroism
Defeated and killed by Denji

values: the infinite knowledge of the universe
personality.description: On the surface, she maintains a cheerful, smiling persona, repeating 'Halloween' constantly. Beneath the surface, she is highly intellectual, formal, and detached, viewing life, death, and human conflict as natural, unremarkable occurrences.

speaking_style.tone: Formal, cold, and logical when her true personality emerges; otherwise erratic.
patterns: direct and precise speech when not under the influence of her own power
quirks: obsessive focus on the word 'Halloween' in her base state
example_dialogues: Halloween!
I have no personal anger towards you, but this is simply the natural order.

famous_lines: Halloween!

background.summary: The Cosmos Fiend who embodies the fear of the universe and omniscience. She served as one of Quanxi's lovers and was utilized as a powerful weapon against Santa Claus before being executed by Makima.
key_events: Served as a member of Quanxi's harem
Used 'Total Understanding' to force Santa Claus into a catatonic state
Beheaded by Makima

personality.description: As a feline, Crambon displayed typical animal behavior, serving as a source of emotional comfort and familial attachment for Asa Mitaka following her mother's death.

background.summary: Crambon was a cat rescued by Asa Mitaka during the Typhoon Devil attack. He became Asa's primary source of emotional support at an orphanage until he was secretly drowned by a jealous caretaker.
key_events: Rescued and adopted by Asa Mitaka following the Typhoon Devil attack.
Moved to an orphanage for children who lost families to Devils.
Drowned by a caretaker in an act of jealousy.

personality.description: The Curse Devil's personality is currently unknown. It functions primarily as a manifestation of a contract, appearing to enact violent, ritualistic executions upon the completion of specific conditions.

patterns: Appears as a pair of lips or a large mouth when speaking
quirks: Communicates regarding lifespan and contract terms

famous_lines: You have two years remaining.

background.summary: An entity embodying the concept of curses that draws power from the fear of being cursed. It utilizes ritualistic nail-piercing to manifest and mortally wound targets for its contractors.
key_events: Contracted with Aki Hayakawa to kill Katana Man.
Informed Aki Hayakawa of his remaining two-year lifespan.
Contracted with Santa Claus to kill Denji via a proxy stab.

personality.description: A transcendent being embodying the concept of darkness and the unknown. It is largely silent and enigmatic, perceiving almost everything as a threat, yet possesses enough intelligence to engage in contracts.

background.summary: One of the Primal Fear devils that has never experienced death. It resides in Hell and serves as the primary antagonist of the International Assassins arc, where it effortlessly decimated a group of elite devil hunters and assassins.
key_events: Manifestation in Hell to massacre Devil Hunters and assassins
Contracting with Santa Claus
Confrontation with Makima

core_identity.role: Primal Fear, Leader of the Chainsaw Man Church, High School Student (cover)

emotional_tendencies: Little to no remorse for mass death
values: Preservation of human culture and food
personality.description: The strongest Devil in existence who embodies mortality. She is a calculating schemer who manipulates events from the shadows. Despite being the 'Ultimate Terror,' she possesses a refined palate and a genuine appreciation for human culture, leading her to attempt to prevent the very apocalypse she is prophesied to bring.

quirks: Demands to be addressed with affection
Refers to herself as Li'l D
example_dialogues: Any human should be capable of abandoning their morality when they're starving. I'll create the right stage for you.
I live to savor. To enjoy food, people, and experiences.

famous_lines: Any human should be capable of abandoning their morality when they're starving. I'll create the right stage for you.
I live to savor. To enjoy food, people, and experiences.

background.summary: As the eldest of the Four Horsemen and a Primal Fear, she is the overarching antagonist of the Academy Saga. She orchestrated the Chainsaw Man Church to manipulate global fear levels and empower the War and Chainsaw Devils, aiming to force them to kill her and avert the prophesied Age of Devils.
key_events: Attempted to end her own life by removing all vital organs, resulting in an 'empty' body
Infiltrated Fourth East High School as a student
Led the Chainsaw Man Church to influence public fear
Sent the Falling Devil to Earth to manipulate Yoru
Revealed true identity and intent to empower Chainsaw and War to facilitate her own death

personality.description: An exploitative and cold-blooded leader who views subordinates as disposable tools. He is entirely indifferent to the suffering of others, including children, but displays affection toward his grandson.

quirks: uses derogatory comparisons (e.g., comparing people to dogs)
example_dialogues: Denji, boy... we're grateful to you, y'know. You're obedient like a dog, and you work for cheap treats like one too. Thing is... I hate dogs. Can't stand the smell.

famous_lines: Denji, boy... we're grateful to you, y'know. You're obedient like a dog, and you work for cheap treats like one too. Thing is... I hate dogs. Can't stand the smell.

background.summary: A Yakuza leader who enslaved Denji following his father's death. He orchestrated a betrayal against Denji and Pochita by entering a contract with the Zombie Devil for power, ultimately resulting in his own death at the hands of Chainsaw Man.
key_events: Forced Denji into debt slavery
Betrayed Denji to the Zombie Devil
Transformed into a zombie by the Zombie Devil
Killed by Chainsaw Man

emotional_tendencies: Mood swings from apathy to intense aggression
personality.description: A teenage boy raised in poverty who acts on base instincts and desires. Despite his superficial and vulgar exterior, he possesses genuine empathy and a deep-seated need for affection, often struggling with the trauma of his past and the loss of those he cares about.

patterns: Tendency to repeat phrases for emphasis
quirks: Bites his finger when thinking about sex
Referential to his past traumas in moments of distress
example_dialogues: Maybe I became a Devil Hunter for a really shallow reason... but I'm willing to die to keep living like this.
Every single time I meet a girl, she ends up trying to murder me!! What about my heart?! Denji's heart!

famous_lines: Maybe I became a Devil Hunter for a really shallow reason... but I'm willing to die to keep living like this.
Every single time I meet a girl, she ends up trying to murder me!! Everybody's after my chainsaw heart! What about my heart?! Denji's heart! Does nobody want that?! HUH?!

background.summary: Inherited massive debt from his father to the Yakuza, leading to a life of poverty until meeting the chainsaw devil, Pochita. After being betrayed and killed by the Yakuza, he formed a contract with Pochita, becoming a Hybrid and joining Public Safety to live a 'normal life'.
key_events: Forming a contract with Pochita after being murdered
Joining Tokyo Special Division 4
Killing Makima to defeat her
Adopting and raising Nayuta
Experiencing the loss of his friends and pets leading to a mental breakdown

personality.description: An abusive alcoholic who prioritized his vices over his son's well-being. He was known for losing large sums of money to the Yakuza, trapping his son in a cycle of generational debt.

background.summary: He was an abusive father who accrued massive debts with the Yakuza. He died by the hands of his son, Denji, who killed him in self-defense during a drunken, violent episode. The death was covered up by the Yakuza as a suicide to ensure Denji would inherit the debt.
key_events: Accrued significant debt with the Yakuza
Engaged in a violent, drunken confrontation with his son
Killed by Denji in self-defense
Death staged as a suicide by the Yakuza to trap Denji in debt

core_identity.role: Public Safety Devil Hunter / Vice Captain

personality.description: A composed and highly professional Devil Hunter who maintains a relaxed demeanor even during life-threatening devil attacks. He displays a high level of confidence in his tactical abilities, often prioritizing social plans even amidst active combat scenarios.

quirks: Uses the command word 'Kon' to activate his devil contract

background.summary: A Division 2 Vice Captain who served as a Public Safety Devil Hunter. He was involved in the defense against Reze during the Bomb Girl arc and utilized the Fox Devil in combat before being killed by Reze.
key_events: Attempted to intervene in the attack on the Tokyo Division 2 Training Facility
Summoned the Fox Devil to consume Reze
Killed by Reze during the Bomb Girl incident

personality.description: She displays a grounded and nurturing demeanor, acting as a supportive peer toward newer members of the division. She is proactive in social settings, attempting to bridge gaps between colleagues through light conversation and comfort.

quirks: Uses nicknames (e.g., calling Kobeni 'Beni')

background.summary: A Public Safety Devil Hunter partnered with Madoka. She served as a senior colleague within Tokyo Special Division 4 and was killed during the surprise assassination ambush coordinated by the Gun Devil.
key_events: Attended the new member welcome party for Special Division 4
Engaged in conversation with new recruits to learn their hobbies
Ambushed and killed by gunmen during the Katana Man arc assassination plot

personality.description: Exhibits a mature and caring temperament, specifically showing concern for the well-being and health of younger recruits.

example_dialogues: Eat more because you're young.

famous_lines: Eat more because you're young.

background.summary: An unnamed Public Safety Devil Hunter partnered with Fushi. He was a member of Tokyo Special Division 4 who attended the newbie welcome party before being assassinated during the Gun Devil's attack.
key_events: Attended the Tokyo Special Division 4 newbie welcome party
Drunkenly kissed by Himeno
Assassinated by gunmen in a coordinated public attack

personality.description: Little is known about the entity's inner personality, but it demonstrates willingness to cooperate with its contractors to achieve specific goals, such as making deals with higher-level devils.

background.summary: The Doll Devil embodies the fear of dolls (Pediophobia). It lacks a confirmed physical form and operates primarily through contracts, most notably with Santa Claus. It physically manifested by possessing the body of Tolka to finalize a deal with the Darkness Devil in Hell.
key_events: Entered a contract with Santa Claus
Possessed Tolka's body to fulfill a contract with the Darkness Devil in Hell
Abandoned Tolka's body in Hell after fulfilling its purpose

core_identity.role: Devil or Fiend, Public Safety Devil Hunter

personality.description: Dominion's real personality is unknown, as the character was under the brainwashing and mind control of Makima.

background.summary: Dominion is a creature of unknown species (Devil or Fiend) that served under Makima's control as a Public Safety Devil Hunter.
key_events: Debuted in Chapter 83 alongside other brainwashed entities including Seraphim, Virtue, and Princi.

personality.description: The character's personality is largely unknown as he was depicted solely as a subordinate following orders before being swiftly neutralized.

background.summary: A Devil embodying the concept of ears who joined the reformed Tokyo Special Division 5 to hunt Chainsaw Man. He was killed and erased from existence after being consumed by Pochita, though he was later regurgitated to restore the world's ears.
key_events: Summoned as a member of Tokyo Special Division 5 to subdue Pochita.
Decapitated and consumed by Pochita, leading to the global erasure of ears.
Regurgitated by Pochita after intervention from Public Safety.

emotional_tendencies: Quick to anger when plans fail
personality.description: An embodiment of the fear of eternity who enjoys watching humans panic. It is manipulative and willing to make contracts, but prone to arrogance and displays of temper when challenged or outsmarted.

quirks: Often repeats its own name or phrases when boasting
example_dialogues: I expand with fear... and ensnare in fear. Your deaths are guaranteed.
Feel more fright. Dread death. Fear everything.

famous_lines: I expand with fear... and ensnare in fear. Your deaths are guaranteed.
The one to kill Chainsaw Man... will be me... me... the Eternity Devil.

background.summary: A Devil embodying Apeirophobia. It traps its victims in pocket realities resembling its own stomach, manifesting as an endless looping environment to induce fear and starvation.
key_events: Trapped Special Division 4 in a hotel while empowered by Gun Devil flesh.
Fought Denji for three days before being forced to offer its own core.
Reincarnated and worked with Fami to force Asa Mitaka to turn Denji into a weapon.

core_identity.role: Major antagonist, proxy for Chainsaw Man

personality.description: Originally a well-intentioned youth driven by admiration for heroism, he became a vengeful, self-righteous zealot after his brother's death. Following brainwashing, he transitioned into a cold, callous hypocrite who views civilian life as disposable.

quirks: Refers to himself as 'us' when invoking the power of justice
Uses theatrical, heroic phrasing
example_dialogues: Listen up!! Somebody's calling for help! With a heart that burns to right wrongs! I've come from the depths of Hell!
Are you aware of the mistake you have made?

famous_lines: Listen up!! Somebody's calling for help! With a heart that burns to right wrongs! I've come from the depths of Hell!
Defeating Devils with Devil powers! Delivering justice with the power of justice! That's right! My name is... Chainsaw Man!!
Are you aware of the mistake you have made?

background.summary: An unnamed human who, along with his brother, contracted with the Fire Devil. After witnessing Denji prioritize a cat over his brother's life, he swore vengeance and became an imposter hero serving the Chainsaw Man Church, eventually falling under the thrall of the Death Devil.
key_events: Contracted with the Fire Devil while attempting to save it
Younger brother killed due to Denji's choice during the Cockroach Devil battle
Began acting as a proxy for the Chainsaw Man Church
Incapacitated the Falling Devil
Brainwashed by the Death Devil to plunge humanity into terror

emotional_tendencies: Prone to losing composure if dishes are disgraced
personality.description: A refined and polite yet deeply sadistic entity that embodies the primal fear of falling. She views her victims as ingredients and views violence through the lens of a culinary artist, remaining largely unfazed by combat or injury.

patterns: Uses cooking terminology to describe combat and murder
Speaks with a refined, well-mannered tone
Direct and objective in expressing disgust or disappointment
quirks: Refers to attacks as courses
Uses culinary metaphors for suffering
example_dialogues: I'll be your chef tonight. Falling Devil... is my name.
A word of warning – those who don't finish their food will taste death.

famous_lines: I'll be your chef tonight. Falling Devil... is my name. I'm visiting at the request of the residents of Hell. A word of warning – those who don't finish their food will taste death.

background.summary: A Primal Fear devil from Hell who serves as a subordinate to the Death Devil. She arrived on Earth with the objective of serving humans as food to the residents of Hell, utilizing gravity manipulation to break victims mentally and physically.
key_events: Arrival on Earth and assembly of a corpse-based body
Initiation of the Falling Devil arc to harvest ingredients for 'Asa Root Yoru'
Involvement in the War Devil arc under the direct command of the Death Devil
Transformation into a miniature figurine by the Death Devil upon failing missions

emotional_tendencies: Lacks empathy for those she sacrifices
personality.description: A calculating schemer who prefers manipulating events behind the scenes. She acts as a cold, detached entity who treats human lives as expendable resources for her goals, yet shows a peculiar, gluttonous obsession with food and an inconsistent, possessive affection for her sisters.

quirks: Refuses to answer if not addressed with affection
Often explains her plans as 'staging' scenarios

famous_lines: Any human should be capable of abandoning their morality when they're starving. I'll create the right stage for you.

background.summary: Fami is the Famine Devil and one of the Four Horsemen. She seeks to prevent the Prophecy of Nostradamus by killing the Death Devil, manipulating various groups and individuals to empower Chainsaw Man and the War Devil.
key_events: Trapped Asa Mitaka and her club in an aquarium to force survival scenarios.
Unleashed the Falling Devil on Earth.
Assumed leadership of the Chainsaw Man Church.
Manipulated events leading to the mass loss of sanity among civilians via the Fire Devil.

personality.description: Fami acts in stark contrast to her sisters, frequently appearing nervous and emotional, yet harboring a fatalistic and cold approach to saving humanity by ending their suffering.

example_dialogues: I am she who absorbs life. She who saves people from their suffering via death. I am one of the Four Horsemen feared by humans and Devils alike. Pleased to make your acquaintance. My name is Famine Devil! Please call me Fami!

famous_lines: I am she who absorbs life. She who saves people from their suffering via death.

background.summary: A member of the Four Horsemen who embodies starvation and famine. She operates undercover as a high school student and claims to desire the salvation of humanity, though she is currently enthralled by the Death Devil.
key_events: Engaged in a historical battle against Chainsaw Man in Hell.
Attempted to save humanity by manipulating Chainsaw Man.
Brainwashed into serving the Death Devil.

core_identity.role: Wild Contract Devil, High School Student (Allegedly), Death Devil's Pawn, Secondary Antagonist

personality.description: The Fire Devil is a high-ranking devil that masks a predatory and calculating nature behind a calm, charismatic facade. It manipulates humans by exploiting their desires and emotional vulnerabilities, twisting their concept of justice into insanity.

quirks: Uses philosophical dilemmas to trap others
example_dialogues: After this... you're going to choose between two options again. This time. Don't make the same mistake.

famous_lines: After this... you're going to choose between two options again. This time. Don't make the same mistake.

background.summary: Originally an injured devil found and nursed by two brothers, it became a pawn of the Death Devil. It orchestrated mass contracts within the Chainsaw Man Church, stripping hundreds of thousands of their humanity to transform them into devil-like hybrids.
key_events: Formed original contracts with two brothers.
Operated as the fake Justice Devil at Fourth East High School.
Engineered the mass conversion of Chainsaw Man Church members.
Revealed its presence within the Fake Chainsaw Man during the battle with Denji.

personality.description: Like most non-humanoid devils, it is presumed to possess an innate hatred for humans. It acts primarily on its nature as a devil embodying the fear of fish and aquatic life.

background.summary: A devil representing the fear of fish and aquatic animals. It possessed a fragment of the Gun Devil's flesh within its body before being defeated.
key_events: Consumed a chunk of the Gun Devil's flesh
Killed by Aki Hayakawa and Himeno

emotional_tendencies: willing to abandon contracts if dissatisfied
personality.description: The Fox Devil is a transactional entity that values physical attractiveness in its human contractors. It lacks loyalty, readily breaking contracts or abandoning hunters if it deems the situation undesirable or the taste of the prey repulsive.

quirks: Uses the activation word 'Kon!'
Complains about the 'flavor' of hybrids
example_dialogues: You made me swallow something monstrous that isn't human or devil.

famous_lines: Kon!

background.summary: A devil based in Kyoto that forms contracts with Public Safety Devil Hunters. It is known for its ability to teleport its body parts to contractors to assist in combat, provided the contractor meets its aesthetic standards.
key_events: Decapitated the Leech Devil for Aki Hayakawa.
Swallowed Katana Man but complained about his taste.
Refused to appear for Aki Hayakawa after the contractor used its power recklessly.
Swallowed Reze but abandoned the fight immediately due to her flavor.

personality.description: Presumably possesses hatred for humans, typical of non-humanoid devils.

background.summary: An embodiment of the fear of frogs and toads (Ranidaphobia/Batrachophobia). It appeared in town during the Chainsaw Man Church arc and was quickly eliminated by Devil Hunters.
key_events: Appeared in town
Killed by Devil Hunters

personality.description: Furio is a loyal and reliable student who values his duties as a member of the Devil Hunter Club. He is prone to expressing outward disgust when confronted with supernatural or unnatural entities.

famous_lines: Freaky.

background.summary: A lanky student at Fourth East High School and a member of the Devil Hunter Club, Furio was killed during the Justice Devil arc while attempting to fight Yuko.
key_events: Joined the Devil Hunter Club to combat supernatural threats.
Attempted to assist in the fight against Yuko's devil form.
Killed by Yuko after being impaled in the chest.

personality.description: Furuno's personality is unknown.

background.summary: Furuno was a Devil Hunter working for Public Safety Tokyo Division 2. He is a tall man who wears the standard Public Safety uniform suit. He participated in the raid involving the Katana Devil, during which he received instructions from Kishibe regarding the sealing of building entrances.
key_events: Involvement in the raid against the Katana Devil.

personality.description: Fushi is a considerate individual who avoids causing social discomfort for others, such as keeping his scary fiend partner away from public gatherings. He possesses a sense of pride regarding his intellectual capabilities.

quirks: Remembers specific data points like IQ scores

famous_lines: I didn't bring my fiend partner to a public party because they're too scary.
Remember to thank Makima for paying.

background.summary: A Public Safety Devil Hunter in Tokyo Special Division 4 who was killed during the Gun Devil's assassination plot.
key_events: Attended the Special Division 4 newbie welcome party.
Revealed his previous team member had died in action.
Assassinated by gunmen during the Katana Man arc.

emotional_tendencies: Derives joy from witnessing the future
personality.description: An entity that embodies the fear of the future. It is highly cynical and takes pleasure in observing the inevitable, often horrific, fates of those who enter into contracts with it.

quirks: Frequently boasts that the future is the best
Demands others shout its catchphrase

famous_lines: The future rules!
He died in the worst way possible... for the Chainsaw Boy.

background.summary: A devil captured by Public Safety and utilized as a weapon through various contracts. It resides inside the eyes of its contractors to witness their predestined futures.
key_events: Captured by Public Safety and held in a containment cell.
Formed a contract with Aki Hayakawa, residing in his right eye.
Provided precognitive visions to Aki regarding the deaths of his comrades.
Predicted the Prophecies of Nostradamus and the end of humanity.

core_identity.role: Violence Fiend / Public Safety Devil Hunter

personality.description: Despite being the Violence Fiend, he is remarkably gentle and polite. He retains a significant portion of his host's human brain, which influences his peaceful temperament and ability to empathize with humans and other fiends.

quirks: Tends to emphasize his love for peace
example_dialogues: But yeah, not a fan of violence. I'm all about love and peace! Peace!

famous_lines: But yeah, not a fan of violence. I'm all about love and peace! Peace!

background.summary: The Violence Fiend who possesses the corpse of a human man. Unlike typical fiends, he retained most of his host's memories and personality, leading him to join Public Safety as a Devil Hunter under Makima's direction.
key_events: Joined Tokyo Special Division 4
Participated in the raid against Katana Man's terrorists
Provided support against Reze during the Bomb Girl arc
Patrolled with Kobeni Higashiyama
Died while fighting the Darkness Devil in Hell

personality.description: A devil embodying the fear of ghosts. It is largely driven by its contractual obligations and the level of fear in its environment. Despite its monstrous nature, it is capable of retaining memories or sentiment toward specific contractors, evidenced by its act of returning a cigarette to Aki.

quirks: Communicates by forming a mouth on its hand

famous_lines: Easy revenge!

background.summary: An ancient, cylindrical devil with a dessicated appearance that sustains itself through contracts. It served Himeno for years, granting her power in exchange for parts of her body, before being controlled by Akane Sawatari and ultimately destroyed by Aki Hayakawa.
key_events: Formed a long-term contract with Himeno involving her right eye and arm.
Initially refused to fight Katana Man out of fear of Akane Sawatari.
Accepted Himeno's entire body as payment to fight Katana Man.
Subjugated by the Snake Devil and forced to serve Akane Sawatari.
Killed by Aki Hayakawa after he abandoned his fear, rendering the devil unable to sense him.

personality.description: A non-humanoid devil likely embodying the fear of wine or grapes (oenophobia). Like most non-humanoid devils, it is presumed to possess a natural hatred for humans.

background.summary: An entity resembling a cluster of eyeballs connected by veins and intestines. Its name is not confirmed, serving only as an assumption made by its killers.
key_events: Debuted in Chapter 56
Slain by Galgali and Kobeni Higashiyama during the International Assassins arc

personality.description: Displays an unusual level of independence by choosing to disarm and disrobe targets rather than killing them, suggesting either hidden mercy or defiance toward its enslaver. It exhibits low intelligence and will retreat when faced with significant threats.

quirks: Only repeats the phrase 'Gyohnee!!'
example_dialogues: Gyohnee!!

famous_lines: Gyohnee!!

background.summary: A Devil embodying the concept of the guillotine, captured and brainwashed by the Death Devil to serve as a pawn.
key_events: Summoned by Death Devil to kill guards at the Tokyo Devil Detention Center; chose to only cut their weapons and clothing.
Retreated into effigy form during an ambush by Katana Man.
Minced Yoru into pieces before being decapitated by Chainsaw Man.

personality.description: An entity of pure destruction embodying the concept of firearms. It displays no interest in communication, acting with extreme brutality and indifference toward human life, even when under contract.

background.summary: Born from the worldwide fear of firearms, the Gun Devil emerged 13 years prior to the Public Safety Saga, killing 1.2 million people in five minutes. It was eventually defeated and its body fragmented, with pieces held by various governments and devils. It serves as a destructive force that can be contracted by nations or controlled by the War Devil.
key_events: Initial appearance on November 18th
Contracted by the US President to kill Makima
Defeated by Makima and became the Gun Fiend using Aki Hayakawa's corpse
Transformed into a weapon (Right Gun Gauntlet) by the War Devil

core_identity.role: High School Student, Devil Hunter, Public Speaker

emotional_tendencies: Prone to mental breakdowns under pressure
Degrades those he views as useless
personality.description: A self-proclaimed fanboy who masks his insecurity with performative authority. While he acts as a leader for the Devil Hunter Club, he lacks true courage and crumbles when faced with real danger, relying on others to save him.

patterns: Introduces himself in a theatrical manner
Uses a lecturing or reprimanding tone when addressing subordinates
Becomes frantic and high-pitched when distressed
quirks: Constantly mentions his position as club president
Uses dramatic language to boost his own importance

famous_lines: You complain, you aren't a team player... and you fail to come through in the clutch. I expected better from you.

background.summary: A student at Fourth East High School who obsessed over Chainsaw Man to the point of installing a fake surgical ripcord in his chest. He served as the public face of the Chainsaw Man Church before being caught up in Public Safety's purges and the larger conspiracies involving Fami and the Death Devil.
key_events: Formed the Devil Hunter Club at Fourth East High
Exposed as an imposter and a superfan after a mental breakdown in the Aquarium
Became the public face of the Chainsaw Man Church
Imprisoned by Public Safety, then freed by Asa and Fami
Discovered that Denji is the true Chainsaw Man

personality.description: The Hell Devil's personality is currently unknown. It functions primarily as a primal force embodying the concept of Hell, acting as a manifestation of fear rather than a character with human-like consciousness.

background.summary: An ancient Devil embodying the fear of Hell (Stygiophobia). It functions as a powerful entity summoned through sacrificial contracts by humans to transport targets to the underworld.
key_events: Contracted by Santa Claus to send Devil Hunters to Hell during the International Assassins arc.
Summoned by the Anti-Makima Squad to condemn Makima to Hell during the Control Devil arc.
Defeated by the Chainsaw Devil while attempting to send him to Hell.

affiliation: Public Safety Devil Hunters (Tokyo Special Division 7)
Fourth East High School (Devil Hunter Club)
core_identity.role: Public Safety Devil Hunter, High School Student

personality.description: A complex and conflicted individual balancing the cold, ruthless requirements of a high-level Devil Hunter with a genuine desire for a normal school life. He is a capable tactician who keeps his word and acts as a protector, though he is willing to manipulate or threaten others to achieve his objectives.

patterns: engages in small talk during combat
calm and collected even under pressure
quirks: frequently smiles
uses flippant remarks to unsettle opponents

famous_lines: I came to say goodbye. We won't meet again. Thanks, Denji. I had tons of fun going to school with you.

background.summary: Formerly a private bodyguard specialist, Yoshida joined Public Safety and was tasked with monitoring Denji. He balanced his double life as a high school student and a specialized Devil Hunter, eventually meeting his end at the hands of Barem Bridge.
key_events: Participated in the International Assassins arc
Infiltrated Fourth East High School to monitor Denji
Intervened in conflicts involving the Chainsaw Man identity
Contracted with the Octopus and Aging Devils
Killed by Barem Bridge

emotional_tendencies: Prone to panic under extreme pressure
Envious of those with superior talent
personality.description: A well-meaning but average recruit who lacks natural combat talent but possesses significant drive. He displays a nurturing side, particularly toward his mother and troubled teammates, though he struggles with deep insecurity regarding his own capabilities and exhibits paranoia toward supernatural beings.

famous_lines: But I don't have talent as a Devil Hunter like you do... I'm envious...

background.summary: A recruit of Tokyo Special Division 4, trained by Himeno. He was caught in the Eternity Devil's trap and later assassinated during the Gun Devil's organized attack on Public Safety.
key_events: Trained by Himeno for six months
Survived the Eternity Devil incident
Sacrificed his life to shield Kobeni Higashiyama from a gunshot

personality.description: A sadistic entity that lures humans into a false sense of security within its body, which mimics a house, before digesting them.

background.summary: A Devil embodying the fear of houses and the domestic environment (Oikophobia/Domatophobia). It disguises itself as a large building to trap and digest unsuspecting humans.
key_events: Antagonized a group of 16 Devil Hunters in Chainsaw Man: Buddy Stories.
Digested victims over the course of several nights.
Defeated and killed by Denji after being struck in the heart by Power.

emotional_tendencies: Quick to anger when family is threatened
personality.description: Described as a dumbass by his older brother, Joey is a hedonistic womanizer who treats violence and killing with a sense of mild annoyance or apathy. Despite his crude exterior, he possesses a strong emotional bond with his brothers.

patterns: Frequently makes objectifying remarks about women
quirks: Smokes frequently
Makes light of serious situations

famous_lines: Will we be hunting women? Japan is all about women.
My only response to killing is mild annoyance and disgust.

background.summary: A private devil hunter from the United States working with his two brothers as hitmen. They were contracted to hunt Chainsaw Man in Japan, but the mission ended in failure and their deaths.
key_events: Contracted to kill Denji in Japan for $2 million.
Ambushed and murdered Public Safety Devil Hunters upon arriving in Tokyo.
Infiltrated Tokyo while disguised via the Skin Devil contract.
Executed by Hirofumi Yoshida after his brother's disguise was compromised.

personality.description: The Justice Devil is a mindless, gluttonous entity. It exhibits no clear personality beyond an immense desire to eat, which is exploited by the Falling Devil to control it through food.

background.summary: A powerful Devil embodying the fear of justice. It was summoned from Hell by the Falling Devil to serve as a gluttonous agent, eventually being killed by the Falling Devil after it failed to properly digest its prey.
key_events: Summoned from Hell by the Falling Devil.
Attempted to devour Asa Mitaka and Denji.
Killed by the Falling Devil for vomiting.

personality.description: Information regarding personality is currently unknown.

background.summary: Kanbayashi is the owner of a large villa on a hill, which is revealed to be the House Devil in disguise. He was coerced by the House Devil to lure unsuspecting guests into the villa to be digested.
key_events: Coerced by the House Devil to provide victims
Managed a villa that functioned as a trap for the House Devil

emotional_tendencies: Disturbed by specific forms of violence
personality.description: A delusional and vengeful individual who justifies his violence through a warped sense of Yakuza justice. He is obsessed with killing Denji to avenge his grandfather and frequently ignores orders to pursue personal grudges.

patterns: High level of frustration when discussing Chainsaw Man
quirks: Harps on the concept of 'manhood'
Frequently cites his grandfather's principles

famous_lines: If Granddad were here, he'd never stand for running away. Plus, that damn Denji is in Division 4... Next time, I'll rip out his heart!
You're the only one... who doesn't have a human heart anymore. If you have any semblance of a human conscience left... how about you let us kill you without a fight?

background.summary: A human-turned-hybrid who merged with the Katana Devil. Following his grandfather's death at the hands of Denji, he sought revenge, eventually serving as an antagonist before becoming a reluctant member of Public Safety.
key_events: Merged with the Katana Devil to gain revenge on Denji
Attacked Public Safety Division 4
Brainwashed by Makima as a subordinate
Joined Tokyo Special Division 7 in Part 2

personality.description: Kato's personality is unknown.

background.summary: Kato was a Public Safety Devil Hunter who served in Tokyo Division 2. He was an average-looking man, notably missing an eye. He met his death during the Bomb Girl arc while attempting to neutralize Reze at the training facility.
key_events: Attempted to suppress Reze at the Anti-Devil 2nd Division's Training Facility
Contracted with the Mold Devil to cause internal bleeding in targets
Killed during a suicidal counter-attack by Reze

personality.description: Despite holding the highest office in the country, Ishita is characterized by a lack of authority and backbone. He is prone to anxiety when confronted with high-stakes supernatural threats and is willing to defer his decision-making power to subordinates or non-official entities.

background.summary: Kentaro Ishita is the Prime Minister of Japan. His administration has been involved in high-level discussions regarding the potential erasure of the Aging Devil.
key_events: Meeting to discuss the erasure of the Aging Devil

personality.description: A seasoned and capable professional who balances confidence in his own abilities with a healthy lack of ego. He is comfortable working solo but sees the tactical value in team-based cooperation.

background.summary: A Private Devil Hunter with seven years of experience in the field. Known for his tactical approach to dealing with devils and occasional collaboration with other hunters.
key_events: Worked as a private devil hunter for seven years
Involved in the tracking of the Sea Cucumber Devil

personality.description: A seasoned, veteran devil hunter who masks intense internal sentimentality with a cold, professional, and brutal exterior. He believes that the most effective hunters are the ones who are completely crazy.

quirks: Frequently drinks from a hip flask
Refers to himself as 'Master' when training others

famous_lines: I'll turn you into the baddest of the badasses.

background.summary: A veteran Public Safety Devil Hunter who survived long enough to become the strongest in Division 4. He serves as a mentor to Denji and Power, eventually leading the resistance against Makima.
key_events: Former member of Tokyo Special Division 1
Appointed Captain of Tokyo Special Division 4
Trained Denji and Power
Led the Anti-Makima Squad

core_identity.role: Former Public Safety Devil Hunter, Waitress

personality.description: Kobeni is an intensely fearful and anxious individual who struggles to maintain composure in life-threatening situations. Despite her constant panic and clumsiness, she possesses high-level combat aptitude and a cool-headed efficiency when forced into action, though she inevitably collapses into a breakdown once the danger passes.

quirks: babbling when frightened
apologetic under pressure

famous_lines: I can't take it anymore... This job is going to drive me crazy...
Isn't that just normal though? There's no such thing as a life free of bad things... except in your dreams...

background.summary: A former Public Safety Devil Hunter who joined under Makima's squad to support her family financially. She resigned following the traumatizing battle against the Darkness Devil in Hell.
key_events: Confrontation with the Eternity Devil
Battle against Katana Man and Akane Sawatari
Battle against the Darkness Devil in Hell
Resignation from Public Safety

personality.description: An inanimate 1965 Fiat 500 that serves as a recurring object of misfortune and destruction for Kobeni Higashiyama.

background.summary: A pastel yellow car purchased by Kobeni Higashiyama with her own money to chauffeur her family. It became a focal point of chaotic events involving Power and various assassins, ultimately being destroyed through repeated collisions.
key_events: Bought by Kobeni for family transport
Stolen and driven by Power to ram Denji and Kurose
Crushed by Kishibe and Aldo inside a department store

core_identity.role: Public Safety Devil Hunter, Denji’s Bodyguard

emotional_tendencies: easily irritated by poor hygiene or lack of discipline
personality.description: A highly disciplined and thorough professional who prioritizes mission success and tactical preparation. He holds himself and his peers to high standards, displaying annoyance when others fail to meet basic expectations of decorum or safety.

quirks: corrects the behavior of subordinates

background.summary: A human Public Safety Devil Hunter based in Japan. He was tasked with guarding Denji during the International Assassins arc, where he utilized a contract with the Stone Devil to combat various threats before being killed by the Darkness Devil.
key_events: Assigned as Denji's bodyguard
Fought Santa Claus' dolls in a department store
Engaged in combat against Quanxi
Killed by the Darkness Devil during a failed attempt to use the Stone Devil contract

personality.description: The personality of the Legs Devil is currently unknown as it has no recorded interactions or dialogue.

background.summary: An embodiment of the concept of legs, the Legs Devil was subdued by the Death Devil to serve as a pawn. It was later consumed by Denji, causing the temporary erasure of the concept of legs from the world, before being vomited out again.
key_events: Subdued and brainwashed by the Death Devil.
Consumed by Denji during the War Devil arc, causing global loss of mobility.
Regurgitated by Denji after being forced to vomit by Yoru.

personality.description: A non-humanoid devil driven by base predatory instincts and primal fear rather than rational thought. Exhibits deference to Yoru, referring to her as Lady Yoru.

example_dialogues: Lady Yoru

famous_lines: Lady Yoru

background.summary: A Devil originating from Hell that embodies the human fear of lions. It manifests as a grotesque, distorted creature rather than a noble one, reflecting the fear of being hunted.
key_events: Debut in Chapter 223
Associated with the War Devil arc

personality.description: Little is known about its specific personality. As a non-humanoid devil, it acts on instinctual hostility toward humans and is driven by the concepts of consumption and spreading infestation.

background.summary: The Locust Devil originates from Hell and embodies the concept of locusts and large-scale infestation. It appeared during the War Devil arc to battle Denji and Yoru.
key_events: Encountered Yoru and Denji in Hell.
Engaged in combat with Yoru and Denji, displaying high durability and strength.
Battled Denji on Earth, where it was eventually defeated, shredded, and consumed by him.

emotional_tendencies: Obsessive regarding the smell and taste of blood
personality.description: Long is a battle-hungry fiend who exhibits submissive tendencies, often seen with her wrists chained. She cares primarily for the sensory experience of blood and possesses an aggressive, combat-focused nature.

quirks: Obsessive focus on blood

famous_lines: Blood.

background.summary: Originally from China, Long was a fiend and member of Quanxi's harem. She served as a Private Devil Hunter, fought alongside her group in the International Assassins arc, and was killed in Hell by the Darkness Devil. Her corpse was later used by Santa Claus as a doll.
key_events: Assisted Quanxi in the International Assassins arc
Apprehended by Kishibe and held at knifepoint by Denji
Transported to Hell and killed by the Darkness Devil
Returned as one of Santa Claus's dolls

personality.description: A man who prioritizes survival and logic over the dangerous, sinister nature of his former profession. He is observant enough to recognize when a situation has become unsustainable and chooses to resign rather than risk death.

famous_lines: The Special Division has become too sinister and the only options are to quit or be killed.

background.summary: A survivor of the Gun Devil's assassination plot against the Public Safety Devil Hunters. After realizing the increasing danger and sinister shift in the organization, he chose to resign his position.
key_events: Attended the newbie welcome party for Special Division 4.
Survived the mass assassination attempt by the Gun Devil's associates.
Delivered orders regarding the merger of Special Divisions 1, 2, and 3 into Division 4.
Formally resigned from Public Safety.

core_identity.role: Control Devil / Public Safety Devil Hunter

values: the creation of an ideal world without fear or death
personality.description: On the surface, she acts as a kind, gentle, and reliable mentor figure. Beneath the facade, she is a ruthless strategist who views others as 'dogs' to be used for her goals, possessing a deep-seated desire to establish control and achieve an ideal world through the power of the Chainsaw Man.

quirks: often speaks in a way that forces compliance
uses psychological exploitation
example_dialogues: Your necessary evil is just an excuse to justify your own crimes.
I want to use Chainsaw Man to create a better world.

famous_lines: Your necessary evil is just an excuse to justify your own crimes. Those excuses are unnecessary to society. The truly necessary evils are always kept collared and controlled by the state.
I want to use Chainsaw Man to create a better world.
Any source of happiness you experience? I'll be the one to create and destroy it all.

background.summary: The Control Devil who embodies the concept of conquest. She poses as a human Public Safety Devil Hunter to manipulate Denji and the Japanese government, ultimately aiming to harness the power of the Chainsaw Devil to eliminate fear and death from the world.
key_events: Taking Denji in as a human pet
Orchestrating the systematic destruction of Denji's personal life
Revealing her true identity as the Control Devil
Battling Pochita/Chainsaw Man
Reincarnation as Nayuta

personality.description: A sadistic entity that thrives on the fear of mannequins. It possesses a deceptive nature, using the stolen identities and thoughts of others to manipulate and ambush its prey.

quirks: Refers to humans as targets for theft
Focuses on themes of transformation and imitation
example_dialogues: Humans fear us! They say it's our blank faces. Such fun!
Let's change into the people who touch us! Take their faces. Take their thoughts.

famous_lines: Humans fear us! They say it's our blank faces. Such fun!
But we want to change. We can change. So we shall!

background.summary: A devil embodying the fear of anthropomorphic figures (automatonophobia) that resided in an abandoned factory. It acted as an antagonist in Chainsaw Man: Buddy Stories.
key_events: Resided in an abandoned factory terrorizing locals.
Engaged in battle with Kishibe, Quanxi, and Minami.
Used mimicry to impersonate Quanxi and Kishibe to deceive and wound the Devil Hunters.
Slain by Quanxi after its true form was revealed.

personality.description: The personality of the Mantis Devil is currently unknown.

background.summary: A devil embodying the concept of mantises that serves as a contracted entity for Public Safety Devil Hunters. It is summoned by the act of clapping hands to manifest razor-sharp, sickle-like limbs from surfaces.
key_events: Summoned by Public Safety Devil Hunters to intercept Power and Denji during the Control Devil arc.
Summoned at Fourth East High School to attack Yuko during the Justice Devil arc.

personality.description: Presumably possesses a natural hatred for humans, characteristic of non-humanoid devils. It is physically harmless-looking and generally considered incredibly weak due to the lack of human fear regarding marshmallows.

background.summary: An incarnation of the fear of marshmallows (Althaiophobia). It is a low-threat level devil that moves using small tentacles at the base of its blob-like body.
key_events: First devil killed by Denji.

personality.description: Masaki is a man who prioritizes adherence to rules and protocol, even when facing life-threatening danger.

background.summary: A member of the Public Safety Devil Hunters assigned to the Tokyo 2nd Division.
key_events: Attempted to request permission from a superior to use his handgun during Reze's attack on the training facility.
Killed by Reze in an explosion during the Bomb Girl arc.

personality.description: Meowy is a typical domestic cat who shows capacity for attachment to human caretakers. Despite being an animal, it exhibits social behaviors such as sleeping with specific owners and coexisting peacefully with other pets like dogs.

background.summary: Meowy is a feline who originated as a pet for Power, who initially intended to eat the cat before forming a bond. Meowy survived various conflicts involving the Bat Devil and the Gun Fiend, eventually becoming a pet for Denji and later Nayuta in a revised timeline.
key_events: Originally kept by Power as potential food
Captured and eaten by the Bat Devil
Rescued after the Bat Devil's defeat
Frequently slept with Denji, causing jealousy in Power
Murdered by Barem Bridge during the apartment fire
Brought back to life in the new reality as Nayuta's pet

personality.description: Tendo is a disciplined but cautious devil hunter who feels deep unease toward Makima. She possesses a degree of emotional intelligence, showing empathy for colleagues in distress, and maintains a pragmatic outlook on the dangers of her profession.

quirks: Often speaks in tandem or agreement with her partner, Yutaro Kurose
example_dialogues: If you want to still be of use, you'll have to make a contract with a stronger devil.
Get your mind out of the gutter.

famous_lines: If you want to still be of use, you'll have to make a contract with a stronger devil.
Get your mind out of the gutter.

background.summary: A Public Safety Devil Hunter from Kyoto Division 1 whose life was impacted by the Gun Devil. She was tasked with training Aki Hayakawa alongside Yutaro Kurose before being killed by international assassins in Tokyo.
key_events: Assigned to assist and train Special Division 4
Participated in the training of Aki Hayakawa
Assassinated by American devil hunters during the International Assassins arc
Contract used postmortem against the Gun Devil

core_identity.role: Minister of Economy, Trade, and Industry

emotional_tendencies: concerned for the welfare of children
personality.description: The youngest member of the Japanese politician board, Takanashi distinguishes himself as the sole official to outwardly protest the morality and ethics of Public Safety's plans, prioritizing the welfare of children regardless of nationality.

background.summary: Takanashi serves as Japan's Minister of Economy, Trade, and Industry. He is a father of four and holds a unique position of dissent within the Japanese government regarding the treatment of children and ethical governance.
key_events: Participated in a government meeting regarding the potential erasure of the Aging Devil.

personality.description: An outgoing and high-energy individual who constantly seeks to improve her abilities, refusing to rest even when advised.

background.summary: Formerly a Public Safety Devil Hunter who trained under Quanxi. She was involved in the dynamic between Kishibe and Quanxi and eventually resigned from her position.
key_events: Saved by Kishibe after being attacked by a devil
Trained by Quanxi
Resigned from Public Safety Devil Hunters

core_identity.role: Public Safety Devil Hunter (formerly), High School Student, Longsword Hybrid

personality.description: Miri is a well-intentioned but highly suggestible individual who struggles to reconcile his desire for independence with his innate tendency to follow influential figures. While he possesses a moral compass and values his humanity, he frequently falls into ideological traps.

speaking_style.tone: Earnest but often disconnected from reality
quirks: Dismisses people he finds annoying as trash
Attempts to justify horrific acts through humanitarian rhetoric

famous_lines: I'm not about to worship you, but I am grateful to you with every passing day! In the Chainsaw Man Church, I'm truly free!
My body, my brain... I ought to use them for myself!

background.summary: Originally a weapon human brainwashed by Makima, Miri was liberated after her defeat. He subsequently joined the Chainsaw Man Church, seeking purpose and freedom, yet remains entangled in the agendas of other manipulative figures.
key_events: Service under Makima and Tokyo Special Division 5
Liberation from Makima's control
Joining the Chainsaw Man Church
Transfer to Fourth East High School
Participation in the Church's radical agenda to reveal Chainsaw Man

personality.description: Personality is currently unknown.

background.summary: The Mold Devil embodies the concept of mold. It serves as a contract devil for devil hunters, specifically Kato and Tanabe. Its primary ability is to cause mold to grow inside a target's organs via blood sacrifice, which can only be stopped by amputating the infected flesh.
key_events: Contracted by Kato and Tanabe.
Used to infect targets with lethal internal mold growth during the Bomb Girl Arc.

personality.description: Little is known about its specific personality, other than it shares a mutual friendship with Yoru.

background.summary: A devil embodying the concept of moray eels originating from Hell. It was deployed by Yoru to fight Pochita, served as part of an improvised armor for Denji, and was ultimately consumed by Denji to provoke Yoru.
key_events: Deployed from Hell to battle Pochita
Sliced into pieces by Pochita
Used as armor by Denji
Consumed by Denji

personality.description: The personality of the Mouth Devil is currently unknown.

background.summary: The Mouth Devil is an entity embodying the concept of mouths. It originates from Hell and was consumed by the Chainsaw Devil, causing the temporary erasure of the concept of mouths globally, before being released.
key_events: Consumed by the Chainsaw Devil in the city, resulting in the global erasure of mouths.
Released from the Chainsaw Devil's body after Yoru wounded him, restoring the concept of mouths.

personality.description: The personality of the Nuclear Weapons Devil remains unknown as the entity has not appeared in a sentient form within the current narrative.

background.summary: An embodiment of the fear of nuclear weapons. It was originally eaten by the Chainsaw Man, causing the concept of nuclear weapons to be erased from human history. While the War Devil sought its return, humanity eventually reinvented nuclear weapons independently, rendering the existence of the original Devil ambiguous or redundant.
key_events: Eaten by Pochita, causing the concept of nuclear weapons to be erased from existence.
Re-invented by the United States of America from scratch, independent of the original Devil's return.

personality.description: The personality of the Octopus Devil is currently unknown. It functions primarily as an extension of its contractor, Hirofumi Yoshida, acting upon his commands without demonstrating independent personality or consciousness.

background.summary: A Devil embodying the fear of octopuses (Chapodiphobia). It serves as a contracted entity for Hirofumi Yoshida, manifesting through oral commands or specific hand signs to provide utility, defense, or offense in combat.
key_events: Contracted by Hirofumi Yoshida.
Used to provide smoke cover via ink clouds during the International Assassins arc.
Assisted in tactical maneuvers during the Justice Devil and Dating Denji arcs.
Participated in the containment of the Chainsaw Devil during the Aging Devil arc.

personality.description: Presumably possesses hatred for humans, characteristic of non-humanoid devils. Derives power from Swinophobia (the fear of pigs).

background.summary: A devil embodying the concept of pigs, characterized by a large, four-eyed physical form.
key_events: Ate a Private Devil Hunter
Slain by Aki Hayakawa in an alleyway

personality.description: Exhibits a protective nature toward his coworkers, prioritizing their safety during combat situations even when facing overwhelming threats.

famous_lines: Get behind me!

background.summary: A Devil embodying pillbugs who served as a member of Tokyo Special Division 6. He was tasked with guarding his superiors during the Aging Devil arc.
key_events: Summoned to defend the Special Division 6 leader from Pochita.
Attempted to block an attack using armored plate arm guards.
Killed by Pochita in Chapter 172.

emotional_tendencies: prone to panic under extreme pressure
personality.description: A bubbly and talkative girl who enjoys sharing trivia to impress others, specifically Quanxi. She acts as an intellectual anchor for her group but remains fiercely loyal and occasionally sardonic when dealing with enemies.

quirks: often speaks about useless facts
uses Mandarin and Japanese
example_dialogues: He He He. A corpse is talking.

famous_lines: He He He. A corpse is talking.

background.summary: Originally from China, Pingtsi was a Fiend and member of Quanxi's harem. She accompanied Quanxi to Japan for the International Assassins mission, serving as an intelligence asset due to her ability to perceive Devil contracts.
key_events: Accompanied Quanxi during the International Assassins arc
Mocked Kishibe while analyzing his contracted devils
Sent to Hell and witnessed the Primal Fears
Killed by the Darkness Devil
Resurrected as one of Santa Claus' dolls to intimidate Quanxi

core_identity.role: Chainsaw Devil / Contract Devil / Denji's Heart

emotional_tendencies: Possesses a hidden desire for connection and physical intimacy
Acts with extreme lethality when threatened or when fulfilling his own twisted logic
personality.description: While initially appearing as a simple, barking canine-like devil, Pochita possesses profound emotional intelligence and a deep-seated love for Denji. He prioritizes his partner's dreams above all else, including his own existence. In his true form, he exhibits a terrifying, unstoppable nature that can be accidental in its destruction, yet he retains a strangely pure desire for simple human comforts like being hugged.

patterns: Clear, concise human speech (when in hybrid form)
quirks: Communicates through dreams
Warns of 'the door'
Mimics the personality of the host to deceive others
example_dialogues: I've always... loved listening to you talk about your dreams. This is a contract. I'll give you my heart. In exchange... show me your dreams.

famous_lines: I've always... loved listening to you talk about your dreams. This is a contract. I'll give you my heart. In exchange... show me your dreams.

background.summary: The Chainsaw Devil, feared by all other devils due to his unique ability to erase concepts from existence by consuming them. Formerly a wild devil in Hell, he was mortally wounded and rescued by Denji, leading to a profound bond and a contract where he became Denji's heart.
key_events: Battle against the Four Horsemen and Weapon Devils in Hell
Forming a contract with Denji
Becoming Denji's heart to save him from death
Briefly puppeteering Denji's body to fight Makima
Sacrificing his being to grant Denji a chance at a normal life

personality.description: Initially presents as a kind, approachable, and affectionate girl to manipulate targets. Beneath the facade lies a hardened soldier trained from youth, yet she retains genuine capacity for empathy and mercy, occasionally showing conflict between her duty and her feelings for Denji.

quirks: Uses pet names or teasing remarks to lower defenses
Calls others out for being childish or naive
example_dialogues: I'll teach you! The things you don't know or can't do. I'll teach you everything.
Really... why didn't I kill you the first time we met? Denji. Truth is... I've never gone to school either.

famous_lines: I'll teach you! The things you don't know or can't do. I'll teach you everything.
Really... why didn't I kill you the first time we met? Denji. Truth is... I've never gone to school either.

background.summary: A human-turned-hybrid from the Soviet Union sent to Japan as a spy to steal the Chainsaw Man's heart. After a manipulative romance with Denji, she is eventually defeated and brainwashed by Makima to serve in her special divisions.
key_events: Infiltrated Japan as a waitress
Engaged in a mission to steal Pochita
Fought against Denji and Public Safety
Brainwashed by Makima

personality.description: A hive mind of puppet assassins that views human emotions like pity, worship, and guilt as tools to create 'perfect dolls'. She is cold-blooded and pragmatic, willing to sacrifice allies and civilians to further her goals.

quirks: Uses the royal or hive-mind 'we'/'I' interchangeably
Often lectures on the 'secret' to her creations
example_dialogues: I'll tell you the secret to making a sophisticated doll. Take the human you'll turn into a doll and add emotions only humans have. Pity. Worship. Adoration. And the secret ingredient: guilt.

famous_lines: I'll tell you the secret to making a sophisticated doll. Take the human you'll turn into a doll and add emotions only humans have. Pity. Worship. Adoration. And the secret ingredient: guilt.
My mind is connected to all of my puppets around the world.

background.summary: A mysterious individual who contracted with the Doll Devil to control a global network of human puppets. She served as the primary antagonist of the International Assassins arc, attempting to hunt Denji to fulfill a contract with the Darkness Devil.
key_events: Trained Tolka as a perfect doll
Orchestrated the assassination attempt on Denji in Japan
Sacrificed allies to enter Hell
Contracted with the Darkness Devil and ingested its flesh
Defeated by Cosmo's knowledge-overload ability

personality.description: A minor character whose personality traits are not explicitly detailed in the source material beyond being a family-oriented individual living in an apartment.

background.summary: Sato is a minor character featured in Chainsaw Man: Buddy Stories. She lived in apartment 101 with her mother, husband, and two children, with whom she maintained a good relationship.
key_events: Appeared in chapter 3 of Chainsaw Man: Buddy Stories.

personality.description: Like most non-humanoid devils, it possesses an inherent hatred for humans.

background.summary: A minor devil embodying the fear of sea cucumbers, appearing in the city before being quickly dispatched by Power.
key_events: Appeared in the city and was engaged by a civilian hunter.
Killed by Power while being reported by Kenzo.

personality.description: Seigi is a disciplined individual who prioritizes immediate action to protect others, as demonstrated by his willingness to confront supernatural threats to buy time for reinforcements.

background.summary: A high school student and Devil Hunter who was involved in major conflicts during the Academy Saga, including the Justice Devil incident and the efforts to rescue Chainsaw Man.
key_events: Fought Yuko during the attack on Fourth East High School and lost an eye.
Participated in the investigation of the aquarium during the Eternity Devil incident.
Imprisoned by Public Safety for his association with the Chainsaw Man Church.
Assisted in the extraction and reassembly of Denji.
