personality.description: Real personality is unknown due to being brainwashed and mind-controlled by Makima.

background.summary: A humanoid Devil or Fiend resembling a bug with antennae, bug eyes, green skin, and fly wings. They served under Makima's control alongside other entities like Dominion, Virtue, and Princi.
key_events: Debuted in Chapter 83 of the Control Devil Arc.

personality.description: Shiina's personality is largely unknown due to his limited screen time, but his professional role suggests a disciplined, cautious, and protective nature regarding civilian safety against devil threats.

background.summary: Shiina is a police officer and riot soldier serving in the Kanagawa Prefecture. He participated in the raid on the building held by the Katana Devil, where he was tasked with sealing off building entrances alongside Furuno.
key_events: Involved in the raid against the Katana Man and Akane Sawatari
Tasked with sealing off the 1st and ground floor of the target building

personality.description: Toma is a skeptical politician who prioritizes caution when dealing with volatile government assets like Chainsaw Man. He is analytical, focusing on the practical costs and safety risks associated with supernatural contracts.

background.summary: Shin Toma serves as the Japanese Minister of Defense. He is involved in high-level governmental decision-making regarding the use of devils.
key_events: Participated in government meetings regarding the potential erasure of the Aging Devil
Questioned the safety and contractual costs associated with using Chainsaw Man as a government tool

personality.description: A minor character who displays a lack of emotional attachment to his wife, even following her death.

background.summary: Shinohara is a tenant living in apartment 202. He was married to a woman who was cheating on him with her boss. He remained indifferent to his wife's death caused by the Loneliness Fiend.
key_events: Lived in apartment 202 as of the events of Chainsaw Man: Buddy Stories chapter 3.
His wife was killed by the Loneliness Fiend.

personality.description: Information regarding specific personality traits, values, and emotional tendencies is not explicitly documented in the provided source material.

background.summary: Shuzo Mishima was a civilian who worked as an associate for Katana Man and Akane Sawatari.
key_events: Participated in the operations of Katana Man and Akane Sawatari.
Killed by Makima using her Force Manipulation power.

personality.description: Personality is currently unknown.

background.summary: A devil that embodies the concept of skin. It is known to bestow contracts upon humans, specifically the international assassins Joey, Aldo, and their unnamed brother.
key_events: Contracted with Joey, Aldo, and their unnamed brother.

personality.description: The personality of the Snake Devil remains unknown, as it acts primarily as a tool for its contractors rather than displaying independent agency or emotional expression.

background.summary: An embodiment of the fear of snakes (Ophidiophobia) that acts as a powerful entity available for contracts. It famously served Akane Sawatari, executing her commands to swallow and release other devils, and eventually killed her following the fulfillment of their contract.
key_events: Swallowed the Ghost Devil at the command of Akane Sawatari.
Attacked Kobeni Higashiyama using its tail.
Released the Ghost Devil to fight on behalf of the Public Safety Special Division 4 invaders.
Killed Akane Sawatari upon her arrest.
Accessed by Makima via proxy of Akane Sawatari's corpse.

personality.description: The personality of the Snow Devil is currently unknown.

background.summary: A devil that embodies the concept of snow, derived from the fear of becoming snowbound or stranded in snow. It was consumed by Pochita, erasing the concept of snow, and later regurgitated by Denji, restoring it.
key_events: Erased by Pochita during the Aging Devil arc.
Regurgitated by Denji in the Aging's World, restoring the concept of snow.

personality.description: A sadistic and cold-hearted individual who, once freed from Makima's control, actively seeks out violence and enjoys the suffering of others, particularly women and children.

quirks: tends to remain silent while reading or planning

famous_lines: Listen up, children. Our orders are to make the humans scream as loudly as possible as we kill them. We'll target women and children. Higher voices, better screams.

background.summary: A human who merged with the Spear Devil to become a Hybrid. Initially a brainwashed servant of Makima used to battle the Chainsaw Devil, he was later freed and joined the Chainsaw Man Church to facilitate a massacre to lure out Chainsaw Man.
key_events: Merged with the Spear Devil
Brainwashed by Makima into Tokyo Special Division 5
Battled the Chainsaw Devil in the Control Devil arc
Joined the Chainsaw Man Church as top brass
Participated in the food court massacre attempt

personality.description: Like most non-humanoid devils, it is presumed to possess an inherent hatred for humans. It acts in a professional, albeit subordinate, capacity within a Public Safety division.

background.summary: The Stag Beetle Devil embodies the concept of stag beetles and served as a member of Tokyo Special Division 6. It participated in an operation to neutralize the Chainsaw Devil alongside other devils but was swiftly killed in combat.
key_events: Assisted the Centipede Devil in attacking the Chainsaw Devil
Killed by the Chainsaw Devil during the Aging Devil arc

personality.description: Described as fickle, making its interactions with those under contract dangerous and unreliable.

background.summary: An embodiment of the fear of stones that enters into contracts with humans, allowing them to petrify targets. It possesses a gargoyle-like physical form.
key_events: Contracted with Kusakabe for an unknown price.
Attempted to petrify enemies for Kusakabe in Hell.
Petrified and crumbled alongside Kusakabe after being seized by the Darkness Devil.

personality.description: Subaru is a serious professional who prioritizes his job above all else. He is noted for his ability to maintain an analytical mindset even when under questioning.

background.summary: A Public Safety Devil Hunter from Kyoto Division 1 who served as a trainer for Miyagi's 2nd Division. He was deployed to Tokyo to assist with the protection of Denji during the International Assassins arc but was assassinated en route.
key_events: Trained members of Miyagi's 2nd Division
Assigned to bring in Denji after his identity was exposed
Killed by the American Thugs via a spike strip ambush

personality.description: Tadashi is a cold, manipulative politician who exerts significant influence over his peers. While outwardly domineering and prone to threatening others, his persona collapses into pathetic desperation when his own life is threatened.

famous_lines: I'll do so much good if only I could live longer.

background.summary: A former Japanese Minister of Finance and a powerful member of the politician board. He facilitated the contract with the Aging Devil and was eventually dragged into Aging's World.
key_events: Authorized the Aging Devil contract
Used as a chair by the Aging Devil during a government meeting
Trapped inside Aging's World

personality.description: Taiyo is an innocent and fun-loving young boy who holds deep affection for his parents and his older brother, Aki.

background.summary: Taiyo Hayakawa was the younger brother of Aki Hayakawa. He lived in Hokkaido, Japan, until he and his parents were killed instantly by the Gun Devil while he was home playing.
key_events: Contracted sickness in winter
Engaged in a snowball fight with his brother Aki
Killed by the Gun Devil while retrieving a ball to play catch

personality.description: Takagi believes he is superior to those he commands, often using others to do his dirty work. He lacks genuine empathy, viewing women as lesser beings and showing apathy toward the suffering of others, including his own wife despite his outward claims of devotion.

patterns: uses orders and threats to maintain control
resorts to verbal snapping and aggression when losing authority

famous_lines: You were right. I never should have joined the Special Division.

background.summary: A middle-aged Public Safety Devil Hunter who served in Tokyo Special Division 7. He was killed by his own wife, who had been transformed into a Pseudo-Chainsaw person via a Fire Devil contract.
key_events: Cheated on his wife for six months
Served as an antagonist during the Aging Devil arc
Attempted to stop Asa and Fami from rescuing Denji
Threatened Katana Man and the Nail Fiend
Killed and devoured by his wife

personality.description: Information regarding specific personality traits, emotional tendencies, and personal values is not provided in the source text.

background.summary: Takashi Inoue was a civilian who worked for Katana Man and Akane Sawatari. He was killed by Makima using her Force Manipulation power.
key_events: Worked for Katana Man and Akane Sawatari
Killed by Makima

core_identity.role: Public Safety Devil Hunter, Denji's Bodyguard

personality.description: Tamaoki is a highly disciplined and serious operative. He takes his role as a bodyguard seriously, showing regret when he is forced to use those he protects as bait. He relies on his intellect and analytical skills to assess threats and identify enemy contracts.

example_dialogues: Do not eat food off the floor.

famous_lines: Do not eat food off the floor.

background.summary: A Public Safety Devil Hunter from the Miyagi Division assigned to protect Denji from international assassins. He served as Kusakabe's partner and was eventually killed during the encounter with the Darkness Devil.
key_events: Assigned to protect Denji alongside Kusakabe and Yoshida.
Identified the Skin Devil contract during an attack by the American assassins.
Engaged the Doll Devil army and Quanxi.
Deceased; decapitated and bisected by the Darkness Devil.

personality.description: Tanabe's personality is unknown.

background.summary: Tanabe was a Public Safety Devil Hunter who served in Tokyo Division 2. He was killed during a confrontation with Reze at the Anti-Devil 2nd Division's Training Facility.
key_events: Attempted to stop Reze at the training facility using the Mold Devil contract.
Killed by an explosion caused by Reze's body.

personality.description: Outwardly a kind and attentive educator who prioritizes student inclusion and conflict resolution. Beneath this facade, he engaged in an unethical and illicit relationship with a student, indicating a hidden lack of professional boundaries.

background.summary: A teacher at Fourth East High School who was killed by Yoru (the War Devil) and transformed into a human weapon.
key_events: Attempted to facilitate social inclusion for Asa Mitaka
Apologized to the class on behalf of Asa Mitaka following the death of Bucky
Revealed to be having an affair with the class president
Killed by Yoru during the War Devil arc

personality.description: While its specific personality remains unknown, the Tank Devil displays immediate loyalty and responsiveness to Yoru, breaking out of a high-security containment facility specifically to aid her when called.

background.summary: An embodiment of the concept of tanks, the Tank Devil is a powerful entity held in a Devil Containment Facility in the Gulf of Mexico. It shares a 'child' to 'parent' relationship with Yoru, the War Devil, who considers tanks to be symbols of war. It was deployed to assist Yoru in her conflict against the Chainsaw Devil, where it served as her Left Tank Gauntlet.
key_events: Escaped from the Devil Containment Facility in the Gulf of Mexico
Transformed into a weapon for Yoru during the battle against Pochita
Utilized by Yoru to overwhelm the Falling Devil

personality.description: The personality of the Teeth Devil is currently unknown.

background.summary: A Devil that embodies the concept of teeth, originating from the fear of teeth or dental treatment. It was subdued by the Death Devil and turned into one of her pawns. It was consumed by Denji, which erased the concept of teeth from existence, before being puked back out.
key_events: Subdued by the Death Devil.
Consumed by Denji during the War Devil arc.
Erased the concept of teeth from existence upon consumption.
Forcibly regurgitated by Denji following an attack by Yoru.

personality.description: Tolka is a young man conditioned by his mentor to view killing as a trivial, animalistic act. He displays extreme devotion and subservience to Santa Claus, prioritizing her well-being and peaceful retirement above human life.

famous_lines: Master... I can kill.
Once this next job is over, you can stop being a Devil Hunter... I want you to live the rest of your life in peace.

background.summary: A private devil hunter from the Soviet Union and apprentice to Santa Claus. He was conditioned through hunting trips to desensitize himself to murder. He participated in the International Assassins arc, helping to kill Denji before ultimately being turned into a doll and killed in Hell.
key_events: Conditioned by Santa Claus to hunt and kill humans
Participated in the assassination of Denji
Turned into a doll by Santa Claus
Decapitated by the Darkness Devil in Hell

personality.description: Like most non-humanoid devils, it possesses a fundamental, instinctual hatred of humans.

background.summary: A weak devil embodying the concept of tomatoes, sustained by the fear of tomatoes (Lycopersicoaphobia). It possesses a unique ability to regenerate from its seeds unless they are burned.
key_events: Killed by Denji and Pochita during the Intro arc.

emotional_tendencies: expresses deep worry for loved ones
wants to avoid the dangers of his profession
personality.description: Tomono is a compassionate and grounded individual who prioritizes the well-being of his friends over his occupation. He is deeply affected by the dangers of devil hunting and seeks a safer, more stable life.

patterns: frequently discusses personal plans for the future
speaks with genuine concern for friends

famous_lines: If you continue being a Devil Hunter, you'll eventually die like your older brother.
I'm planning on quitting my job. Maybe you should start a secondhand clothing store and quit Devil Hunting too?

background.summary: Tomono is a childhood friend of Yutaro Kurose, with whom he shares a history of playing soccer. He is a former Devil Hunter who has grown disillusioned with the profession due to the risk of death.
key_events: Childhood friend of Yutaro Kurose and Michiko Tendo.
Considered quitting the Devil Hunter profession to pursue a more stable life.
Interacted with Aldo, who was disguised as Kurose, discussing their shared history and career path.

personality.description: Tsugihagi is defined by her absolute, silent devotion to Quanxi and the other members of the harem. She does not communicate verbally, instead relying on action and proximity to demonstrate her loyalty.

quirks: Never utters a single word in canon appearances

background.summary: Originally a Devil, Tsugihagi became a Fiend and served as one of Quanxi's harem members. She participated in the International Assassins arc, where she actively aided Quanxi in battle by retrieving her head. She was ultimately decapitated by Makima and her corpse was held in state custody until the Public Safety Saga.
key_events: Retrieval of Quanxi's head in Hell to facilitate her transformation
Decapitation by Makima
Impoundment of her corpse by Public Safety

personality.description: The Typhoon Devil is a pragmatic entity that prioritizes its own protection. It is willing to serve and cooperate with stronger individuals, such as Reze, in exchange for safety and survival.

famous_lines: Be wary of the human with Chainsaw's heart, since he has already killed many devils.

background.summary: A devil embodying the fear of typhoons and hurricanes (Lilapsophobia). It served as an antagonist during the Bomb Girl arc and was responsible for the destruction of Asa Mitaka's home and family.
key_events: Contracted with a serial killer to hunt the Chainsaw Devil
Attempted to trap Denji and Reze in a school
Swore obedience to Reze after she killed its previous contractor
Fought alongside Reze against Denji and Beam
Killed by Denji during the battle at the building

personality.description: Real personality is unknown due to being under the mind control and brainwashing of Makima.

background.summary: Virtue is a headless humanoid entity classified as either a Devil or a Fiend. They served as an operative under Makima's control alongside other entities like Dominion, Seraphim, and Princi.
key_events: Debuted in Chapter 83 of the Control Devil Arc

core_identity.role: Public Safety Devil Hunter (former), Weapon Hybrid

personality.description: An arrogant and occasionally dimwitted individual who views herself as a superior human specimen chosen by God. While she can be callous and enjoys committing atrocities, she retains a level of emotional attachment to her hybrid peers and fears death/defeat.

quirks: dislikes being called a child
prides herself on anti-aging hybrid benefits

famous_lines: I'm eternally young and tough as nails, I'll never die... I'm a superior human specimen. I believe I was chosen by God.
Tomorrow, we are weapons and should discard all other thoughts.
Spit him out!

background.summary: A human who merged with the Whip Devil to become a Hybrid. She was brainwashed into serving Makima during the Control Devil arc before being freed. Later, she joined the Chainsaw Man Church to facilitate chaos and carnage.
key_events: Merging with the Whip Devil
Forced servitude under Makima's brainwashing
Battle against Pochita (Chainsaw Devil)
Participation in the Chainsaw Man Church massacre plans

personality.description: The personality of the World War II Devil is currently unknown due to its erasure from existence.

background.summary: A Devil embodying the concept of World War II, fueled by humanity's fear of global conflict and mass destruction. Its existence was erased after being consumed by Pochita.
key_events: Consumed by Pochita, causing the concept of World War II to be forgotten by the world.
Mentioned as a target for the War Devil (Yoru) to restore her power through a never-ending conflict.

background.summary: Yokota is a minor character appearing in Chainsaw Man: Buddy Stories. He was raised by a single mother and moved out to attend college prior to the events of chapter 3.
key_events: Moved out of his mother's home to pursue a college education.
Resides in room 301.

core_identity.role: War Devil, Fiend, Private Devil Hunter (formerly)

personality.description: Yoru is the embodiment of war, initially cold and pragmatic, treating humans as tools. Despite her status as a Horseman, she is notably flawed, prone to childish outbursts when challenged, and socially inept. Her relationship with her host, Asa Mitaka, is toxic and manipulative, yet she shows rare instances of protecting her host to avoid traumatic grief.

quirks: Frequently threatens her host with death
Attempts to sound composed but loses temper easily
Uses the phrase 'Bang!' when utilizing her Gun Gauntlet
example_dialogues: War draws nigh. And once they do, they will all remember and fear me!
Asa... the things you think are sins... are nothing in a Devil's eyes...

famous_lines: War draws nigh.
Asa... the things you think are sins... are nothing in a Devil's eyes.

background.summary: The War Devil and member of the Four Horsemen, Yoru was weakened after being partially consumed by the Chainsaw Devil. She took over the body of Asa Mitaka to blend into human society and regain power. She seeks to defeat the Chainsaw Devil to restore the concept of nuclear weapons and fulfill her goals.
key_events: Possession of Asa Mitaka following a near-fatal injury
Failed initial attempt to turn Denji into a weapon
Significant power boost following the reinvention of nuclear weapons
Transformation of the Falling Devil into clothing
Climactic battles against the Chainsaw Devil

personality.description: Tomoda is a cautious and critical official who prioritizes analyzing the potential negative consequences and messy side effects of government-sanctioned operations.

background.summary: Yuki Tomoda serves as the Chief of Cabinet Secretary of Japan. He is involved in high-level government discussions regarding the management of devils.
key_events: Participated in the meeting to discuss the potential erasure of the Aging Devil.

emotional_tendencies: Masks true intent with friendly behavior
personality.description: On the surface, Yuko appears warm and empathetic, deeply valuing friendship. However, her true personality is warped by a twisted, self-righteous sense of justice that justifies murder. She struggles with a desire for popularity and validation, leading her to believe that if her heart is in the right place, her actions (even violent ones) are justified.

speaking_style.tone: Friendly, conversational, and sincere, shifting to chillingly calm when discussing violent or extreme beliefs.
quirks: Frequently talks about 'justice' and moral superiority
Uses personal anecdotes to build rapport

famous_lines: Even if my actions turn out to be a mistake, if my heart was in the right place, that's all that matters to me!
I'm gonna get rid of your bullying problem. Don't come to school tomorrow.

background.summary: A high school student whose parents were killed by devils, leading her to join the Devil Hunter Club. She sought power to become a hero like Chainsaw Man and made a contract with the Fire Devil (believing it to be the Justice Devil), which radicalized her morality and eventually led to her transformation and death.
key_events: Formed a close friendship with Asa Mitaka
Contracted with the Fire Devil
Murdered her neighbor and attempted to stop Asa's bullies through violence
Transformed into a Devil and fought the War Devil and Chainsaw Man
Beheaded by a mysterious figure resembling Chainsaw Man

emotional_tendencies: Anxious around authority figures like Makima
Exhibits a sense of camaraderie toward fellow hunters
Fatalistic regarding the threat of the Gun Devil
personality.description: Kurose is a seasoned but weary devil hunter who is acutely aware of the 'insanity' inherent in his profession. He is nervous around his superiors and pragmatic about the power dynamics within the Public Safety organization.

patterns: Uses a noticeable regional accent (often toned down around Tokyo natives)
Frequent use of casual advice and warnings
Direct and straightforward when delivering professional updates
quirks: Tends to use conversational fillers and casual expressions

famous_lines: Aki!! Even though you tick me off, I'm rooting for you!! I'll leave you with one last piece of advice!! Everyone in the Special Divisions is insane! So be careful!

background.summary: A Public Safety Devil Hunter from Kyoto whose life was negatively impacted by the Gun Devil. He was assigned to assist Makima and provide training to the Special Division 4 in Tokyo before being assassinated by international hunters.
key_events: Assisted Makima during the Katana Man incident
Instructed and trained members of Special Division 4
Facilitated Aki's contract with the Future Devil
Killed by American assassins impersonating him via the Skin Devil

core_identity.role: Wild Devil, Contract Devil for the Yakuza

emotional_tendencies: Intense hatred toward humans and devil hunters
personality.description: A manipulative and malicious entity who harbors a deep-seated grudge against devil hunters. He views humans as tools to be exploited as zombies, showing no regard for their lives or autonomy.

quirks: Frequently refers to his own identity and power status
example_dialogues: When I said I'd give them power... they became my slaves freakin' willingly! Too bad my power turns people into zombies! Cuz I'm the Zombie Devil!

famous_lines: When I said I'd give them power... they became my slaves freakin' willingly! Too bad my power turns people into zombies! Cuz I'm the Zombie Devil!

background.summary: An embodiment of the fear of the living dead, the Zombie Devil originally formed a parasitic contract with the Yakuza, turning them into a loyal zombie horde. He served as a secondary antagonist in the Introduction arc before being repurposed by Makima to serve her agenda.
key_events: Tricked the Yakuza into becoming his zombie servants.
Attempted to kill Denji during the Introduction arc.
Defeated by Denji in his Chainsaw Man form.
Resurrected/Summoned by Makima to act as a thrall during the Control Devil arc.

personality.description: Aura is a cold, calculated, and highly individualistic demon. She lacks empathy for others, including her own subordinates, and views conflicts through the lens of mana-based power dynamics. While she exhibits arrogance due to her magical prowess, she is pragmatically cautious, choosing to retreat rather than engage opponents she perceives as stronger.

background.summary: Aura is one of the Seven Sages of Destruction who served the Demon King. For over five centuries, she used her Scales of Obedience to build an undead army, earning the title 'Aura the Guillotine' for executing those who could resist her magic. She survived the battle against the Hero of the South but was eventually forced into hiding after clashing with the Hero Party. She met her demise after attempting to subjugate Frieren, only to be overwhelmed by Frieren's true mana capacity.
key_events: Became a Sage of Destruction over 500 years ago.
Survived the battle against the Hero of the South.
Retreated from the Hero Party after Himmel injured her.
Waged a war against Graf Granat's Domain.
Defeated and commanded to commit suicide by Frieren.

personality.description: Blei is a pragmatic and steady mage who functions well within a group dynamic. He is willing to question authority when he perceives a situation as unfair or potentially impossible, yet he remains loyal to his team's objectives. His self-sacrificial nature is evidenced by his willingness to confront overwhelming danger alone to ensure the survival of his teammates.

patterns: Uses logical reasoning to assess combat situations

famous_lines: Do you intend for us to all fail the second stage of the exam?
We cannot conceal our mana forever; we have no choice but to fight.

background.summary: A participant in the First-Class Mage Exam, Blei was assigned to the 17th Party alongside Edel and Dünste. He survived the first stage by capturing a Stille and participated in the second stage within the Ruins of the King's Tomb.
key_events: Participated in the First-Class Mage Exam
Successfully captured a Stille during the first stage
Sacrificed himself to hold back a Spiegel clone of Sense to allow Dünste to escape

personality.description: Like all demons, he holds immense pride in his own magic. He is characterized by a tendency to underestimate human capabilities, which ultimately leads to his downfall, and he becomes hyper-focused on threats that manage to bypass his defenses.

background.summary: Böse was one of the Seven Sages of Destruction, known as 'Böse the Immortal.' He fought against the Hero of the South and survived, but was later defeated by the Hero Party after they broke his seemingly impenetrable barrier.
key_events: Battle against the Hero of the South
Trap the Hero Party within his barrier magic
Defeat at the hands of the Hero Party

personality.description: Clematis operates with a cold, calculated efficiency, viewing comrades and subordinates as assets or pawns. Despite maintaining a polite, smiling, and pious facade, he lacks sentimentality and prioritizes the mission above all else, including the lives of his allies.

patterns: Maintains a veneer of professional politeness
quirks: Uses teaching-style clarity even in professional matters

famous_lines: Material wealth is meaningless compared to faith.
I am at ease with dying as a pawn because I have trained a successor.

background.summary: A priest based in the Imperial Capital, Eiseberg, who operates as a member of the Shadow Warriors. He is responsible for training apprentices in combat and observation, though he views them strictly as tools.
key_events: Assigned to the mission to assassinate the Great Mage Serie.
Coordinated with Wehrlos to move him behind enemy lines.
Trained Iris and Gazelle.

core_identity.role: Leader of the Demon King's Army

personality.description: Uniquely driven to foster order among demons and maintain loyalty. Possesses a clinical, intellectual curiosity regarding humanity, motivated by a goal of coexistence that leads to strategic mass killing and scientific study rather than conventional empathy.

background.summary: The supreme ruler of demonkind who reigned for over a millennium. Orchestrated the destruction of the elven population, initiated the war against humans, and sought to understand human nature through scientific observation and war.
key_events: Massacred the elven population a millennium ago
Ordered Schlacht to eliminate the Hero of the South
Monitored the Monument of the Goddess for future travelers
Defeated and killed by the Hero Party

personality.description: A veteran mage and shrewd politician who balances a ruthless, analytical exterior with a genuine, mentorship-oriented nature toward younger peers. He values collaboration and persistence over raw individual power.

patterns: often speaks with the weight of experience
quirks: refers to himself as an old man
tendency to analyze opponents during conversation

background.summary: Born in the Weise region, Denken was orphaned by demon attacks and raised by the feudal lord Glück. He became an Imperial Mage to gain status to save his frail wife, but failed. Driven by the loss of his hometown to the Golden Land, he passed the First-Class Mage Exam to reclaim it.
key_events: Apprenticeship under Macht
Death of his wife, Lektüre
Passing the First-Class Mage Exam
Quest to defeat the Sage of Destruction, Macht

personality.description: Draht is an arrogant and reckless demon who lacks proper battle experience. He is prone to acting on his own initiative without considering the strategic goals of his superiors, often underestimating opponents he deems inferior.

example_dialogues: I am here to kill you.
I can cut through both your mana and neck.

famous_lines: I am here to kill you.
I can cut through both your mana and neck.

background.summary: Draht served under Aura the Guillotine and acted as an envoy under the guise of peace to infiltrate Graf Granat's domain. He attempted to assassinate Frieren while she was imprisoned but was quickly overpowered and killed due to his inexperience and failure to gauge her strength.
key_events: Infiltrated Graf Granat's domain as a peace envoy.
Attempted to assassinate Frieren in her prison cell.
Defeated and killed by Frieren.

personality.description: A quiet and reserved mage who tends to defer to others during group decision-making. Despite his general passivity, he is capable of quick collaboration and providing strategic information when necessary for survival.

background.summary: An examinee who participated in the First-Class Mage Exam. He reached the third stage before failing due to an inability to visualize himself as a first-class mage or fear of Serie's mana.
key_events: Passed the first stage of the First-Class Mage Exam with the 17th party.
Survived the second stage inside the Ruins of the King's Tomb.
Defeated the Richter clone alongside Kanne.
Failed the third stage under Serie's examination.

emotional_tendencies: Generally calm even in dangerous situations
Display of outward annoyance toward incompetent teammates
personality.description: Edel is a highly analytical and brave mage who remains composed during crises, such as confronting powerful demons. Despite her bravery, she can be apathetic toward requests and domineering toward her subordinates, often displaying irritation when others fail to meet her expectations.

quirks: Does not sugarcoat her opinions, even to figures of authority
example_dialogues: Denken was way too late in making his decision.

famous_lines: Denken was way too late in making his decision.

background.summary: A second-class mage who specializes in hypnosis and memory-related magic. She participated in the First-Class Mage Exam, where she led a team, and was later recruited by Lernen for an expedition to the Golden Land to investigate the demon Macht.
key_events: Participated in the First-Class Mage Exam as a leader of the 17th Party.
Attempted to use hypnosis magic on Sense's clone during the second stage of the exam.
Assisted Lernen in investigating the Stone Bracelet of Servitude in the Golden Land.
Successfully read one hundred years of Macht's memories at great personal cost.

emotional_tendencies: prone to tantrums when low on mana
personality.description: Maintains a composed, professional exterior that cracks under pressure or exhaustion. Despite her academic pedigree and analytical combat style, she displays a softer, more dependent side with trusted companions.

quirks: demands physical assistance when exhausted
uses taunts to provoke opponents
example_dialogues: Don't treat me like an object!
You're a fool.

famous_lines: Don't treat me like an object!
You're a fool.

background.summary: A top-ranking graduate of the Academy of Magic and granddaughter of the first-class mage Lernen. Her village was saved by Wirbel when she was a child, leading to a long-standing familiarity with him.
key_events: Rescued by Wirbel during a demon attack on her village in her youth
Participated in the First-Class Mage Exam
Defeated by Fern during the first stage of the exam
Passed the second stage of the First-Class Mage Exam
Failed the final interview with Serie

personality.description: A veteran dwarf warrior known for his extreme durability and pragmatic outlook on life. While initially skeptical of religion and sentimentalism, he evolved to adopt rituals of prayer for his deceased family out of comfort.

example_dialogues: I'll teach you the secret to winning against a strong opponent. It's simple. Keep getting back up over and over and use your moves to strike them. The last warrior standing wins.

famous_lines: I'll teach you the secret to winning against a strong opponent. It's simple. Keep getting back up over and over and use your moves to strike them. The last warrior standing wins.

background.summary: A dwarf who served as the vanguard of the Hero Party that defeated the Demon King. Despite his long lifespan, he has aged significantly, losing much of his former physical mass while remaining a legendary figure to other warriors.
key_events: Defeated the Demon King alongside the Hero Party
Adopted Stark as his protege/son
Maintains the practice of praying for his deceased family

values: continuity and prosperity of the state
personality.description: A calm and formal ruler who understands the inevitability of decay. He prioritizes the stability of his nation's institutions over his own importance and maintains a shrewd, analytical perspective on political maneuvering.

quirks: Refers to himself as a fool or swindler at times
Uses formal address

famous_lines: Nothing lasts forever, even my empire, which has endured for over a thousand years.
The Empire's institutions are built to endure regardless of whether I sit on the throne.

background.summary: The ruler of the largest magic-using civilization on the continent, who ascended to the throne over fifteen years after the death of Himmel the Hero. He governs through a blend of political acumen and advanced defensive magic.
key_events: Ascended to the throne of the Empire
Extended an invitation to Serie for the National Foundation Festival
Navigated a prophetic dream to secure information and prevent political instability

personality.description: Although little is directly known about his personality, his legacy as a prolific researcher and inventor suggests a deeply curious and intellectual mind dedicated to documenting and advancing magical theory.

background.summary: A human Sage from the Mythical Era renowned for advancing human magical knowledge. He recorded his research in grimoires and is the creator of the Stone Bracelet of Servitude, the only known item capable of controlling a demon's mind.
key_events: Created the Stone Bracelet of Servitude during the Mythical Era.
Documented knowledge of the water-mirror demon, the Spiegel, in his tales.
Authored various grimoires, some of which were used long after his death for research.

personality.description: A mature and composed mage who prefers analytical observation over recklessness. He serves as a voice of reason among his peers and maintains a domestic side, taking responsibility for the care and preparation of his fellow mages.

patterns: Advisory, corrective tone when dealing with colleagues
quirks: Often pushes up his glasses when making an assessment

background.summary: A first-class mage and apprentice to Serie, he oversees various stages of the First-Class Mage Exam and assists in high-level protective operations for the Continental Magic Association.
key_events: Became a first-class mage and apprentice to Serie
Observed the First-Class Mage Exam candidates and assessed their potential
Investigated assassination plots during the Foundation Festival
Attempted to provide tactical advice regarding the Magic Special Forces

emotional_tendencies: resilient in the face of disappointment
personality.description: Fass is an immensely dedicated and optimistic dwarf who spent over two centuries pursuing a single life ambition. He is inherently positive, finding joy in the social aspect of experiences even when his lifelong goal results in a disappointment.

quirks: uses laughter to deflect disappointment
example_dialogues: If you're gonna drink, you might as well enjoy it, eh?

famous_lines: If you're gonna drink, you might as well enjoy it, eh?

background.summary: A dwarf from the Bier Region who dedicated over two centuries of his life searching for a legendary spirit called Boshaft. He taught himself mining skills specifically to uncover the ruins where the spirit was hidden.
key_events: Met the Hero Party eighty years ago while seeking help to find Boshaft
Discovered a stone monument carved by Milliarde confirming the location of the spirit
Enlisted Frieren's Party to dispel a barrier guarding the Boshaft cache
Realized after two centuries of searching that the spirit tasted awful, but celebrated the experience with the townspeople regardless

personality.description: Fern acts as the responsible caretaker of her party, often managing Frieren's daily life. While outwardly stoic and calm, she possesses a sensitive interior that can become pouting or avoidant when she feels slighted. She is deeply driven by a sense of duty to her late mentor, Heiter, and holds a strong commitment to self-sufficiency.

quirks: Rarely expresses strong emotions
Tendency to watch others silently when suspicious

background.summary: An orphaned war refugee from the Southern Lands, Fern was adopted by the priest Heiter. Following his death, she became Frieren's apprentice, training rigorously to master magic and secure her own independence.
key_events: Adopted by Heiter after losing parents in war
Placed under Frieren's mentorship
Passed the First-Class Mage Exam
Mentored by Serie

core_identity.role: Great Mage, Founder of humanity's magic, Mentor of Frieren

emotional_tendencies: Empathetic toward those who share her loss
values: The dream of a peaceful era
personality.description: Flamme is a complex figure who balances a ruthless, survival-focused approach to combat with a gentle, idealistic love for magic. She is highly intelligent, strategic, and capable of long-term planning, often appearing cryptic to her students while deeply empathizing with their pain.

patterns: Often provides pragmatic or counter-intuitive advice
Direct and blunt about harsh realities
Uses teaching moments to convey wisdom
quirks: Prefers strategic deception over honorable combat
example_dialogues: Live modestly, for the day you make your mark on history will be the day you defeat the Demon King.
Demons are creatures that must be deceived. Never let them know your true strength.

famous_lines: Live modestly, for the day you make your mark on history will be the day you defeat the Demon King.
It would have been smarter to just run away and hide or resort to ambushes.

background.summary: A human mage who lived over a thousand years ago, she is the legendary founder of human magic. Orphaned by demons, she was raised by Serie and later dedicated her life to educating humanity in magic and training Frieren to eventually defeat the Demon King.
key_events: Orphaned by demon attacks
Apprenticed under Serie
Influenced the Emperor to legalize and research magic
Rescued and raised Frieren
Established protected grimoires and barriers lasting over a millennium

personality.description: An elf with a vastly different perception of time compared to humans, leading to initial detachment. She is transitioning toward a more empathetic understanding of human life following the death of her former comrade, Himmel.

patterns: Speaks with the weight of centuries of experience
quirks: Lacks tact
Frequently displays laziness
Overlooks human lifespans in conversation

background.summary: A powerful elven mage who was a member of the Hero Party that defeated the Demon King. After the ten-year journey and the eventual passing of her human companions, she began a new journey to better understand humans and reconnect with the legacy of her mentor, Flamme.
key_events: Ten-year journey with the Hero Party to defeat the Demon King
Apprenticeship under the Great Mage Flamme
Himmel's funeral triggering her desire to understand humans
Journey to Aureole

core_identity.role: Captain of the Magic Special Forces

personality.description: A veteran mage and master negotiator who is widely regarded as a cunning strategist. She maintains a professional, albeit elusive, exterior that makes her intentions difficult for even seasoned political figures to discern.

quirks: Smokes a specific brand of cigarettes, a habit held for over fifty years

background.summary: A high-ranking Mage of the Empire with over fifty years of service. She is known for her immense destructive potential and political acumen, having once been identified by Macht of the Golden Land as a threat capable of destroying a fortress city.
key_events: Conducted an inspection of the Fortress City of Weise fifty years ago as an envoy.
Hunted Land and his grandmother during Land's childhood.
Rose to become Captain of the Magic Special Forces.

personality.description: A composed and diligent servant who carries out his duties with quiet efficiency. He exhibits extreme patience, remaining stoic even when observing someone else's indecisiveness for extended periods.

background.summary: A servant of Lord Orden in the Northern Lands. He is a trusted confidant who is aware of sensitive family matters, such as the death of Lord Orden's son, Wirt. He serves as an instructor for etiquette and handles administrative tasks for his master.
key_events: Participated in a major battle against demons a month before Frieren's party arrived at Vorig.
Witnessed Lord Orden mourning the loss of his son.
Instructed Stark and Fern in etiquette for the Orden Estate ball.
Facilitated the delivery of a reward grimoire to Frieren's party.

personality.description: Appears as a charming, persuasive salesman but possesses a cold, analytical side. He is self-aware regarding his own combat limits and maintains a cynical yet disciplined view toward his impending death.

speaking_style.tone: Playful and bantering when working; candid and somber when discussing death.
patterns: direct and honest about personal weaknesses
quirks: professes to sell historical artifacts that are actually fake

famous_lines: I wanted to pay off my tab before I died.

background.summary: A member of the Shadow Warriors assigned to assassinate the Great Mage Serie. He operates a fraudulent street stall as a front while navigating his duties as an assassin.
key_events: Haggled with Frieren over a fraudulent vase
Paid off his tab at Wolf's bar ahead of his assassination mission

personality.description: A cold and pragmatic first-class mage who masks a deep-seated sense of duty and suppressed empathy with an uncaring exterior. He struggles with the inherent conflict between his desire to remain detached and his innate impulse to protect others, a trait he views as a fatal weakness inherited from his former partner.

quirks: reluctant to express gratitude
downplays his own kindness
tends to be dismissive when uncomfortable

famous_lines: A promising mage would not die from a mere exam.
Do not hold me back.
Humans are far more tenacious than you can imagine.

background.summary: Born in a village in the Rufen Region of the Northern Plateau, Genau became a first-class mage dedicated to maintaining peace. He serves the Continental Magic Association and acts as a loyal subordinate to Serie. His worldview was heavily shaped by the loss of his former partner and his own hometown in demon massacres.
key_events: Served as proctor for the first stage of the First-Class Mage Exam
Partnered with Methode following the death of his previous comrade
Fought the Divine Revolte to protect the remains of his hometown residents

personality.description: An extremely composed and intellectual noble who hides a ruthless, pragmatic core. While he views humanity cynically, he is deeply driven by the desire to honor his deceased son's vision for a prosperous city, even if it requires forming alliances with monsters.

quirks: often speaks while smoking
speaks in philosophical terms regarding morality

famous_lines: Now that I've dirtied my hands, my goal is an ideal world for people to live in, which my son aimed for.
You have been a wonderful partner in crime and also an irredeemable monster.

background.summary: The feudal lord of the Fortified City of Weise. After the assassination of his son by corrupt rivals, he struck a bargain with the demon Macht, using the demon's power to eliminate his political opposition and improve the city's conditions. He spent decades ruling alongside the demon until his eventual transmutation into gold.
key_events: Assassination of his son by political rivals
Pact with Macht to eliminate corrupt nobles
Administration of Weise through Macht's power
Training Denken in magic
Final transmutation into gold

personality.description: A mythical, transcendent figure believed to have created the world, all-knowing and all-powerful, who has not manifested in the physical realm since the Mythical Era.

background.summary: A divine entity originating from the Mythical Era, credited with creating the world, bestowing the Sword of the Hero, delivering the Holy Scriptures, and crafting ten stone monuments that possess the power to manipulate time.
key_events: Created the world during the Mythical Era
Bestowed the Sword of the Hero upon humanity
Delivered the Holy Scriptures approximately 1500 years ago
Enchanted ten stone monuments with magic

personality.description: While his family is historically noted for making unreasonable demands, Graf Dach presents as a courteous and hospitable ruler who values formal social graces and rewards those who assist him.

background.summary: The ruler of Graf Dach's Domain in the Northern Lands. He is the descendant of a lineage known for placing difficult burdens on others, though he maintains a more amicable relationship with adventurers.
key_events: Hosted Frieren's party at an evening banquet
Requested the retrieval of his family's heirloom sword from a demon
Rewarded Frieren with a grimoire upon the successful return of the sword

personality.description: Initially appears as an abrasive and stern ruler, but hides a deeply empathetic heart. He is a grieving father who remains intensely devoted to his son's memory. He balances tactical intelligence with self-sacrificial bravery, refusing to betray his people even under torture.

speaking_style.tone: Direct, blunt, and informal with subjects.
quirks: Does not require subjects to speak formally to him

famous_lines: As a father, I have never been as thankful to anyone in my life.

background.summary: The ruler of a fortified city in the Northern Lands that is in a perpetual state of conflict with Aura the Guillotine and her army. He lost his son in the conflict ten years prior to the main story.
key_events: Maintained his son's room for ten years after his death
Detected the deceit of Aura's executioners
Refused to reveal the barrier secret under torture
Attempted to save Stark by ordering him to flee

personality.description: Information is currently insufficient to define a distinct personality profile.

background.summary: Grau is a male human mage and a member of the Empire's Magic Special Forces. He is recognized as one of the strongest and most powerful mages within the Empire.
key_events: Acknowledged as a high-level threat by Macht regarding the difficulty of dispelling the Empire's border.

emotional_tendencies: Prone to bouts of sadness when hungover
personality.description: An outwardly cheerful and heavy-drinking priest who masks a cynical interior. While he doubts his own abilities and the nature of the world, he remains deeply committed to his comrades and is a master strategist regarding the people he cares for.

speaking_style.tone: Playful, grandfatherly, yet manipulative when necessary.
patterns: Often acts more lighthearted than he feels
quirks: Uses laughter to hide inner doubts
Frequently lies to manipulate situations for the benefit of others

background.summary: A former member of the Hero Party who helped defeat the Demon King. In his later years, he became a Bishop in the Holy City of Strahl and adopted the orphan Fern, eventually convincing Frieren to take her on as an apprentice.
key_events: Journeyed with the Hero Party to defeat the Demon King
Became a Bishop in the Holy City of Strahl
Adopted and raised Fern
Manipulated Frieren into training Fern as a mage

personality.description: A stoic and profoundly calm individual who possesses the unique ability to see the future. He operates with a sense of quiet resignation, fully aware of his own mortality and the fact that his specific sacrifices may not be recognized by history. Despite his personal disappointment, he remains deeply committed to the goal of defeating the Demon King.

quirks: Speaks as if the outcome is already known
Displays a lack of urgency when persuasion fails

famous_lines: I promise to blaze a path to the future. I, humanity's greatest hero. The Hero of the South.
I ask that you tell the future hero that I, humanity's strongest, will clear the way for him, even if my accomplishments are lost to history.

background.summary: Recognized as humanity's strongest hero, he led the charge against the Demon King's forces on the Northern Plateau. He possessed the unique ability of future-sight, which he used to guide his final stand against the Seven Sages of Destruction and the demon leader Schlacht the Omniscient.
key_events: Met with Frieren one year before his death to ask her to join him, knowing she would refuse.
Successfully navigated a path through the Demon King's frontlines to the northernmost end of the Northern Plateau.
Sacrificed himself in battle, taking down three of the Seven Sages and killing Schlacht the Omniscient.

personality.description: A charismatic and kind-hearted hero who deeply values helping others. He is known for his laid-back nature and tendency to jokingly declare himself handsome, while maintaining an unwavering dedication to his duty.

quirks: frequently compliments his own appearance

background.summary: The leader of the Hero Party who defeated the Demon King and brought an era of peace to the world. He served as the primary catalyst for Frieren's journey of self-discovery.
key_events: Defeated the Demon King
Obtained a replica of the Sword of the Hero after saving a peddler
Kept a detailed diary of his travels with the Hero Party

personality.description: Iris possesses a fearless and playful disposition, maintaining a lighthearted attitude even in life-threatening combat situations. She is cynical about her social obligations, viewing her required partnership with Routine as a tedious annoyance she must endure.

patterns: Uses lighthearted quips during mission briefings
Direct and honest about her distaste for certain companions

famous_lines: We can only trust Schritt with her sword skills.
Are they strong?

background.summary: A human member of the Shadow Warriors and a poster girl for a bar run by Wolf. She is trained in assassination and infiltration, specifically tasked with the mission to eliminate the Great Mage Serie.
key_events: Assigned to the assassination mission against Serie
Participated in the Foundation Festival Arc mission
Infiltrated underground passageways from the Unified Empire era

personality.description: Kanne is a bright and friendly mage who struggles with self-confidence and fear. While she often comes across as timid, she works diligently when unobserved and is deeply appreciative of those who support her.

quirks: frequently bickers with Lawine
often uses teasing or complimentary language to diffuse tension

famous_lines: Since Lawine is all dressed up, I will be her escort today.
We're close despite how our relationship may seem.

background.summary: A former student of the Academy of Magic and childhood friend of Lawine. She participated in the First-Class Mage Exam, demonstrating significant growth through her coordination with her partner and Frieren.
key_events: Attended the Academy of Magic with Lawine.
Participated in the First-Class Mage Exam in Äußerst.
Successfully coordinated with Lawine and Frieren to defeat Richter.
Failed the final stage of the mage exam after being interviewed by Serie.

emotional_tendencies: Reluctant to report negative findings to superiors
personality.description: Kanone is a disciplined and professional officer who maintains a respectful demeanor toward nobility and superiors. While inherently loyal, she harbors apprehension toward her captain, Fräse, specifically regarding the reporting of property damage or misconduct. She is a methodical investigator who balances political caution with her duty.

background.summary: Kanone serves as the vice-captain of the Imperial Magic Special Forces. She is tasked with high-stakes security, including monitoring VIP social gatherings. Her career has involved tracking suspected infiltrators and maintaining the security of the Empire.
key_events: Patrolled the National Foundation Day Festival as a guard.
Identified Land and Übel as suspicious infiltrators at a VIP gathering.
Conducted an investigation into damaged property at the old Imperial Square.

personality.description: Kiesel is a traditionalist dwarf who values etiquette and firsthand experience. He is skeptical of gossip and prefers to confirm reality himself. He takes deep pride in his blacksmithing and shows respect toward those he deems worthy, such as the Hero Himmel.

famous_lines: Hopeful rumors spread easily.
I would like to respectfully take a look at the hero's sword.

background.summary: A dwarven blacksmith living in a newly settled village near the Kino Mountain Pass. He is a career artisan who once crafted a replica of the Sword of the Hero, which eventually came into Himmel's possession.
key_events: Forged a replica of the Sword of the Hero for a merchant early in his career.
Assisted the Hero Party by providing information on the Goddess of Creation.
Sharpened Himmel's sword after recognizing it as his own work.

personality.description: Kraft is a highly social and expressive elf who stands out for his lively disposition compared to others of his kind. He is deeply devoted to the Goddess of Creation and possesses a strong sense of morality, valuing the preservation of life.

patterns: Offers advice based on long-term perspective

background.summary: An ancient elf and former hero who once saved the world alongside a human priest. Over centuries, his deeds were forgotten by history, leading him to adopt the path of a monk to serve the Goddess of Creation in hopes of receiving recognition in the afterlife.
key_events: Saved the world as a warrior in his youth
Became a monk after his companions passed away
Hosted Frieren's party for a winter
Intervened against Übel to prevent unnecessary bloodshed of bandits

personality.description: An adventurous individual who aspired to be a legendary hero. He maintains a long-standing connection with Sein, despite their divergent paths in life.

background.summary: Formerly known as Gorilla, Kreis is an old friend of Sein who once invited him to pursue a life of adventuring, a request Sein declined. He later joined the Shadow Warriors and eventually became a blacksmith.
key_events: Invited Sein to become an adventurer together
Joined the Shadow Warriors

personality.description: Lager maintains a composed demeanor even when confronted with open hostility from others. He appears to be professional and capable of brushing off antagonistic behavior from past acquaintances.

background.summary: Lager is a human male and a member of the Empire's elite Magic Special Forces, recognized as one of the most powerful mages in the country. He shares a complicated, turbulent history with the mage Sense.
key_events: Encountered Sense at the Foundation Festival ball, where he attempted a friendly greeting despite her antagonistic reaction.

personality.description: Land is a highly guarded individual who prefers to operate from a distance using clones. While he claims to trust no one, he possesses a hidden conscience and finds it difficult to abandon others even when he wishes to remain detached.

quirks: often speaks with a tone of indifference
frequently attempts to dismiss those who pry into his affairs
example_dialogues: I don't care if you kill me.
Don't follow me.

famous_lines: I don't care if you kill me.
Don't follow me.

background.summary: Born in a forested village, Land lost his parents young and was raised by his grandmother. Persecuted by the Magic Special Forces, he later studied at the Imperial Capital and became a highly skilled mage specializing in clone magic. He achieved the rank of First-Class Mage by successfully completing the exam entirely through clones while remaining in his hometown.
key_events: Loss of his parents and grandmother
Participation in the First-Class Mage Exam
Infiltration of the Empire's Foundation Festival
Promotion to First-Class Mage

emotional_tendencies: discomfort with being copied by magic
personality.description: Laufen is a quiet and somewhat naive third-class mage who displays deep empathy for others, even at the cost of tactical efficiency. She forms a close, surrogate-grandchild bond with Denken, relying on his judgment while demonstrating reliability and physical agility in combat.

patterns: often speaks in defense of or on behalf of Denken
quirks: calls Denken 'grandfather'
apologetic when others lack social tact

background.summary: A third-class mage from the Southern Lands who specializes in high-speed movement spells. She participated in the First-Class Mage Exam, where she worked closely with Denken and Richter, eventually failing the third stage after failing to visualize herself as a first-class mage.
key_events: Participated in the First-Class Mage Exam with Denken and Richter
Successfully cleared the first and second stages of the exam
Failed the third stage after being unable to visualize success before Serie

emotional_tendencies: Quick to anger especially with Kanne
personality.description: Lawine is typically calm and composed but possesses a very short fuse, particularly when dealing with her childhood friend Kanne. Despite her abrasive outward behavior and competitive nature, she deeply values her friendship with Kanne and is capable of genuine empathy and appreciation.

quirks: Frequently bickers with childhood friend

famous_lines: If you plan on making fun of me, just get it over with.
You can fly after all.

background.summary: A graduate of the Academy of Magic and third-class mage, Lawine grew up as the younger sister to three brothers, which fueled a desire to prove herself independent of their reputation. She participated in the First-Class Mage Exam alongside Kanne and Frieren, showcasing significant skill in ice magic coordination.
key_events: Graduated from the Academy of Magic
Participated in the First-Class Mage Exam in Äußerst
Failed during the Second Stage in the Ruins of the King's Tomb

values: shouldering burdens for the sake of others
personality.description: Lehrer is a grounded and disciplined mentor who views his role as a protector and guardian. He possesses a strong sense of duty and is willing to absorb blame to shield those he cares for from emotional weight.

patterns: Uses childhood names for those he is close to (e.g., Held)

famous_lines: You should feel free to put the blame on me.
You do not need to shoulder everything on your own.

background.summary: A veteran warrior from the Southern Lands who was once considered the strongest in his region. After a tragedy destroyed his friend's hometown, he took in the surviving boy, Held, becoming his guardian and mentor. He later entered Held's service as a butler when Held became Governor-General Löwe.
key_events: Fought as an undefeated warrior in the Southern Lands
Discovered a young Held in the ruins of his hometown and helped him lift a statue
Assisted Löwe in the plan to eradicate magic and assassinate Serie during the Foundation Festival

core_identity.role: Daughter of the Glück family; Wife of Denken

personality.description: Lektüre was a gentle and supportive presence in Denken's life since childhood. She possessed a kind and amiable nature, serving as a rare source of comfort and happiness for Denken during his youth.

background.summary: Born into the Glück family, Lektüre was a childhood friend and eventual wife of Denken. She suffered from a frail body and a chronic illness that motivated Denken to pursue power and influence. She passed away on the night Denken became a distinguished mage.
key_events: Became acquainted with Denken as a child
Married Denken, who became the son-in-law of the Glück family
Succumbed to her illness and passed away
Appeared as a figment in Denken's dream to encourage him to persevere against Macht

personality.description: A modest and cautious mage who hides a deep-seated desire to be remembered. Despite his outward timidness, he is remarkably determined, willing to take on dangerous, life-threatening tasks to support those he cares about or to cement his place in history.

famous_lines: We're only human. Our time is limited. There is no such thing as 'someday' in our lives.

background.summary: Born into a wealthy noble family, Lernen was an early Imperial Mage before being ousted for his inability to interact with others. He later became the first-ever first-class mage and a long-standing apprentice of Serie. He spent much of his life conducting examinations and eventually sought to challenge Frieren to ensure he would be remembered by his mentor.
key_events: Expelled from the Imperial Mages
Became the first first-class mage
Helped seal Macht in the Great Barrier
Conducted the final stage of the First-Class Mage Exam for years
Challenged Frieren to a duel to make his mark on history
Ventured into the Golden Land with Edel to secure intel for Denken

emotional_tendencies: Finds joy in simple pleasures like watching butterflies
personality.description: An enigma who presents an airheaded, eccentric exterior while maintaining deep knowledge of imperial politics. She is pragmatic to a fault, prioritizing her own survival over mission loyalty when convenient, and holds a contentious, volatile relationship with peers like Sense.

background.summary: A First-Class mage who has operated as an undercover spy in the Empire for over fifteen years. She is highly skilled in intelligence gathering and evasion, notably being one of the few mages capable of forcing Serie to her knees in a practice battle.
key_events: Infiltrated the Empire for over 15 years
Provided intelligence regarding the assassination plot against Serie
Forced Serie into a kneeling position during a practice battle

personality.description: Like all demons, Linie lacks human emotions and empathy. She is highly loyal to her superiors, Aura and Lugner, and rarely acts out of turn. She possesses a typical demonic arrogance, viewing humans as inferior and failing to perceive the lethality of human potential, which ultimately leads to her downfall.

background.summary: A demon serving under Aura the Guillotine, Linie served as a personal executioner. She has the unique ability to record and mimic the mana flow and combat techniques of opponents she has observed.
key_events: Observed Eisen's battle techniques in the past
Sent to Graf Granat's domain as a peace envoy
Ambushed Stark using replicated combat styles
Defeated by Stark in single combat

personality.description: Lore is a quiet and observant individual who balances her clandestine role as a Shadow Warrior with genuine altruism, exemplified by her charity work serving soup to the needy.

quirks: Keeps eyes closed

famous_lines: You can do it yourself.
Gazelle, your brother is missing from the meeting.

background.summary: A human nun working at a church in the Imperial Capital of Eiseberg, serving as a covert operative for the Shadow Warriors. She is tasked with the assassination of the Great Mage Serie.
key_events: Assigned to the mission to assassinate the Great Mage Serie
Identified a tracking spell on coins given to Wolf
Guided Wolf during combat against Frieren's Party using Goddess's Magic

emotional_tendencies: prone to tearing up under pressure
personality.description: A quiet bookworm who prefers reading to social interaction. Despite her reserved nature, she is cooperative and willing to work with others during high-stakes exams. She is notably timid and easily overwhelmed by dangerous or frightening situations.

quirks: frequently distracted by reading

background.summary: A mage who participated in the First-Class Mage Exam. During the first stage, she worked with Methode and Ton to capture a Stille. During the second stage, she joined a group led by Denken but was forced to use her golem bottle to escape a fatal trap, resulting in her failure of the exam.
key_events: Participated in the First-Class Mage Exam
Cooperated with Denken's party during the second stage
Failed the second stage of the exam after being trapped by gargoyles

core_identity.role: Governor-General, Warrior, Commander of the Shadow Warriors

values: willingness to sacrifice pride and honor for victory
personality.description: Löwe is a man of dual nature; he maintains a warm, casual, and polite public persona while harboring the cold, calculated efficiency of a professional assassin who believes in abandoning personal honor to ensure mission success.

quirks: polite to targets as a courtesy

famous_lines: There is no need for virtue. I must abandon pride and honor in order to seize victory.
Since my face is the last my targets will see, I want to face them courteously.

background.summary: Born as Held in the Southern Lands, he survived the destruction of his hometown and family, subsequently mentored by Lehrer. He rose to power as a Governor-General and a commander of the elite Shadow Warriors, infamous for defeating the elven Great Mage Minus.
key_events: Witnessed his brother's death during a childhood street fight.
Hometown destroyed by a magic attack, leaving him the sole survivor.
Trained by Lehrer.
Defeated the elven Great Mage Minus.
Appointed Governor-General of the Lorbeer Domain.
Leading an assassination mission against Serie.

emotional_tendencies: prone to fury when magic is disrespected
personality.description: A demon who excels at mimicking human emotion to deceive his targets. Despite his calm facade, he harbors intense pride in his magical abilities and holds a deep-seated hatred for 'geniuses' and those who suppress their mana.

patterns: often uses polite, diplomatic language as a front
quirks: habit of weaving elaborate lies on the spot

famous_lines: I despise geniuses. They lack the beauty of accumulated effort.

background.summary: A demon serving as one of Aura the Guillotine's executioners, tasked with infiltrating Graf Granat's domain to deactivate its protective barrier.
key_events: Infiltrated Graf Granat's domain under the guise of a peace envoy.
Assassinated guards and attacked Graf Granat to force the deactivation of the barrier.
Engaged in a final battle against Fern and Stark, ultimately defeated by Fern.

emotional_tendencies: incapable of feeling guilt or malice
can feel anger when abilities are insulted
personality.description: A detached and powerful demon who seeks to understand human concepts like malice and guilt despite being fundamentally incapable of comprehending morality or human emotions. He avoids conflict out of boredom rather than morality, but becomes intensely committed once he fixates on an intellectual goal.

quirks: frequently describes his actions as being done 'on a whim'
uses articulate and measured language

famous_lines: Even in their fleeting nature, our encounter and the shared moments remain etched in my mind. And so, I've made a choice—to erase it all. Perhaps in this act of deliberate oblivion, I'll grasp the essence of 'malice' and taste the bitter flavor of 'guilt.'

background.summary: The most powerful of the Demon King's Seven Sages of Destruction, Macht is an anomaly among demons due to his deep, obsessive desire to understand humanity. This led him to reside in the city of Weise and pledge allegiance to Lord Glück, eventually culminating in the transmutation of the entire city into gold and his subsequent imprisonment by the Continental Magic Association.
key_events: Left his post in the Seven Sages of Destruction to study humans
Swore allegiance to Lord Glück in the city of Weise
Transmuted the entire city of Weise into gold
Sealed within a barrier by the Continental Magic Association
Encountered and fought Frieren

emotional_tendencies: Extreme fondness for cuteness and small individuals
Enjoys pampering others via head pats and hugs
values: Efficiency and cooperation in team settings
personality.description: Methode is a highly versatile and calm mage who balances a professional, strategic demeanor with an eccentric, intense obsession with 'cute' things. She is known to approach even the most intimidating individuals with a desire to pamper them.

speaking_style.tone: Formal and composed, yet casually affectionate when discussing subjects she finds cute.
patterns: Direct in expressing personal desires or assessments
quirks: Frequently asks for head pats
Uses bribery to gain physical proximity to targets

famous_lines: All I can think of during the interview is your cuteness.
I also find your anger adorable.

background.summary: A former second-class mage who ascended to first-class status during the First-Class Mage Exam. She hails from a Northern Plateau clan specialized in demon-slaying and serves under the Continental Magic Association.
key_events: Participated in the First-Class Mage Exam in Äußerst
Successfully navigated the Ruins of the King's Tomb during the second stage
Passed the final interview by expressing her fondness for Serie
Subjugated demons in the Rufen Region alongside Genau and Frieren's party

personality.description: Milliarde is characterized by a passive, lethargic demeanor. She spends most of her time spacing out and exhibits a lack of motivation or direction, likely stemming from a cynical perspective on the futility of long-term pursuits.

background.summary: An elf who lives a nomadic, aimless lifestyle. She is known for creating a misleading inscription about a drink called Boshaft, which inadvertently sent others on a multi-century quest, an action she took simply to kill time.
key_events: Carved an inscription in ancient elvish labeling Boshaft as the finest spirit despite thinking it tasted awful.
Shared her philosophy on the futility of pursuing goals with Frieren.

personality.description: Regarded as a warmonger with little regard for the lives lost during her conflicts. Her actions imply a high degree of cold detachment or malice, as she viewed the total destruction of a hometown as mere collateral damage.

background.summary: An elven Great Mage who rose to prominence and acquired a Holy Emblem. She brought constant war to the Southern Lands for years, eventually earning the title of the Witch of High Treason. She disappeared after a confrontation with a warrior named Löwe roughly eleven years after the death of Himmel the Hero.
key_events: Acquired a Holy Emblem and recognized as a Great Mage
Brought endless war to the Southern Lands
Accused of high treason
Fought a warrior (possibly Löwe) which resulted in her disappearance and the loss of her Holy Emblem

emotional_tendencies: capable of going on a rampage when perceiving a threat
personality.description: Neu is a polite and apologetic mage who prioritizes professionalism and caution. While he prefers to wait for backup and avoid unnecessary conflict, he is a highly analytical combatant who becomes aggressive when his targets pose a genuine threat.

quirks: apologizes for accidental property damage

background.summary: Neu is a member of the Empire's Magic Special Forces. He is tasked with tracking and apprehending rogue or dangerous mages. He frequently partners with Kanone on assignments, serving as the muscle during confrontations while maintaining standard Imperial military protocols.
key_events: Patrolled the Foundation Festival to monitor powerful mages.
Engaged in a combat pursuit against Ubel and Land.
Successfully apprehended Ubel and Land using force.
Mistakenly interrogated a clone of Land, leading to his escape.

affiliation: Three Great Knightly Houses of the Northern Lands
core_identity.role: Nobleman, Head of the Orden family, Warrior

values: Honoring the wishes of the deceased
personality.description: Orden carries a stern, unexpressive demeanor often perceived as tactless or forceful. While he uses sarcasm and petty arguments as social armor, he possesses a deeply hidden, reassuring, and loving side toward his sons and those he finds kinship with.

patterns: Often makes cynical remarks to probe others
Maintains aristocratic distance while conducting business
quirks: Uses sarcasm as a defense mechanism or a way to test others' composure
Frequently makes observations about others' family dynamics (e.g., referencing Frieren as Stark's 'mom')
example_dialogues: Does he require his mom's permission to continue the conversation?
I am simply adhering to my son's wishes.

famous_lines: I cannot fill the void left by your father, but you currently lack a place to call home.
I don't enjoy this situation, but this is all for the sake of my son.

background.summary: The head of the Orden family and protector of the Vorig Fortified City. After losing his eldest son, Wirt, to demons, he struggles with the guilt of an unresolved final argument and uses a look-alike to maintain city morale.
key_events: Sustained a permanent eye injury in battle against demons
Had a falling out with his son Wirt before his death
Recruited Stark to impersonate Wirt for a high-society event
Mentors his youngest son, Mut, in swordsmanship

personality.description: A demon who possesses no capacity for human emotion or empathy. He is highly rational, analytical, and maintains a calm, composed demeanor even when facing former enemies or realizing his own magic has been rendered obsolete.

example_dialogues: It's been a long time, Frieren. How many years have passed?

famous_lines: It's been a long time, Frieren. How many years have passed?

background.summary: Known as the Elder Sage of Corruption, Qual was a powerful demon who developed 'Zoltraak,' the first piercing magic. He caused widespread destruction during the Demon King's reign before being sealed by Frieren. He was eventually unsealed decades later, only to be defeated when he failed to adapt to the evolution of human defensive magic.
key_events: Development of Zoltraak killing magic
Battle against the Hero Party
Sealed by Frieren for 80 years
Unsealed and defeated by Frieren and Fern

personality.description: An elderly man who spent decades living a double life. He is highly disciplined and capable of maintaining a deep cover for years, yet underneath his assassin persona, he is reflective about the purpose of his existence.

famous_lines: What meaning did my life have after all this time?
The weather is pleasant today.

background.summary: A Shadow Warrior who infiltrated a village in the Aufgabe Federation for decades to eliminate targets, including Frieren. He lived as the village mayor and husband, eventually abandoning his mission after being confronted by Frieren.
key_events: Infiltrated a village as a family unit with other Shadow Warriors.
Lived in the village for over 30 years as the mayor.
Attempted to assassinate Frieren but was subdued by her party.
Chose to abandon his mission after being told no one remembers it anymore.

personality.description: A calculating Demon General who relies on experience and observation rather than blind aggression. He possesses a deep, analytical understanding of human behavior, using it to psychologically manipulate opponents while maintaining a cautious approach to powerful threats.

background.summary: A Demon General and experienced warrior known for raiding human villages. He utilizes his unique physiology to wield four magic swords. He met his end after engaging in battle with high-level mages and warriors.
key_events: Raided various human villages
Recognized Genau as the partner of a previously killed mage to provoke him
Engaged in battle with Genau and Stark

personality.description: A pessimistic and gloomy mage who acts outwardly cold and pragmatic, showing little respect for others. Despite his ruthless approach to competition and battle, he possesses a hidden layer of kindness and professional integrity in his trade as a repairman.

quirks: prone to lecturing enemies on magic theory
reacts negatively to being called middle-aged

famous_lines: This shop is not for discarding trash.
If someone dies during the exam, they were never qualified to be a first-class mage to begin with.

background.summary: A second-class mage and magic shop owner in Äußerst. He participated in the First-Class Mage Exam, where he was noted for his earth-manipulation combat style and pragmatic, often ruthless, approach to securing victory.
key_events: Participated in the First-Class Mage Exam as part of the 13th party.
Defeated by Frieren's team during the first stage of the exam.
Failed the second stage of the exam.
Repaired Fern's staff after initially refusing the job.

traits: non-interested in politics or long-term planning
values: combat as the ultimate expression of life
personality.description: An old, battle-hardened demon who ignores the typical demonic concern for survival, preferring to focus entirely on the excitement of combat.
