He is surprisingly respectful toward powerful human or dwarven warriors, often mirroring their weapon choices to show mutual esteem.

famous_lines: There is no secret to a long life; one simply needs to fight with all their might.
I have not had such an enjoyable fight in a long time.

background.summary: A Greater Demon and veteran of the Demon King's army. He served as a vanguard during the Goddess's Monument incident and later destroyed Stark's village. He is known for his immense physical strength and proficiency with mana-generated weaponry.
key_events: Battle against Eisen at the Monument of the Goddess
Clash with the Hero of the Far North, Rasen
Attack on Stark's hometown in the Klee Region

personality.description: Routine maintains a composed and polite facade suitable for her role as a librarian, but possesses a hidden, fierce, and thrill-seeking nature. She is highly attentive to her surroundings and maintains strict discipline in following orders.

patterns: Uses apologetic language when unintentionally overstepping boundaries
quirks: Inadvertently reveals information she has deduced

famous_lines: I expected an ordinary day, but was proven wrong by the recent unexpected events.

background.summary: Born in the Lorbeer Domain, Routine works as a librarian in the Imperial Capital while serving as a Shadow Warrior. She is a veteran of the war up north, where she was known for going on a rampage.
key_events: Participated in the war up north
Assigned to the mission to assassinate the Great Mage Serie
Patrolled the underground passage in the Imperial Capital

personality.description: Scharf is a reserved individual who prefers to defer leadership to his partner, Wirbel. Despite his stoic appearance, he is prone to emotional fragility and crying when physically incapacitated or facing defeat.

quirks: tends to beg to be carried or helped when vulnerable

famous_lines: Please, don't leave me behind.

background.summary: A self-taught Third-Class mage who partnered with Wirbel and Ehre during the First-Class Mage Exam. He utilizes specialized flower petal magic and continues to travel with his party after the exams conclude.
key_events: Ambushed Fern's party during the First-Class Mage Exam First Stage
Fought against Land and Denken's clone
Failed the final stage of the First-Class Mage Exam by Serie
Travelled to the northern lands with Wirbel and Ehre

emotional_tendencies: Concerned for the long-term future of his species
Willing to use force when diplomacy fails
personality.description: Schlacht is a highly composed and pragmatic leader who deviates from typical individualistic demon behavior by prioritizing the long-term survival of his species. He uses his future-sight to manipulate events and subordinates, preferring diplomatic persuasion but remaining fully prepared to use coercion or force to ensure his plans reach fruition.

patterns: Uses subtle persuasion over blunt commands
quirks: Avoids unnecessary hostility
Uses threats only as a final mechanism for compliance
example_dialogues: Fear is the only way to govern creatures as individualistic as demons.
I would not know my fate unless I tried.

famous_lines: Fear is the only way to govern creatures as individualistic as demons.
I would not know my fate unless I tried.

background.summary: Schlacht served as the Demon King's primary advisor and commander of the Seven Sages of Destruction. Gifted with the ability to see a thousand years into the future, he orchestrated long-term plans for demon survival, ultimately sacrificing himself in a battle against the Hero of the South.
key_events: Commanding the Seven Sages of Destruction during the Demon King's reign
Negotiating with Macht to ensure future memory manipulation involving Frieren
Engaging the Hero of the South in a battle spanning uncountable future variations
Death in combat against the Hero of the South

emotional_tendencies: Prone to intoxication to the point of incapacitation
personality.description: Schritt is a highly capable warrior who relies on alcohol to steady her nerves and hands for combat. Despite being one of the Empire's top five swordfighters, her addiction often leaves her physically impaired or incapable of participating in combat when she is drunk.

quirks: Frequently seen with a bottle
Slumped over in bars

background.summary: A human mercenary and member of the Shadow Warriors. She serves as a recruiter and messenger for the group's operations. She was tasked by Löwe with the mission to assassinate the Great Mage Serie and was entrusted with the Holy Emblem of Minus.
key_events: Assigned by Löwe to recruit and notify Shadow Warriors for the Serie assassination mission
Presented the Holy Emblem of Minus to the Shadow Warriors
Incapacitated by drunkenness during the skirmish with Frieren's Party
Attended the Foundation Festival ball

emotional_tendencies: Rarely speaks when things do not work out for her
Values talent and unique perspectives in others
personality.description: Sense is a solemn, soft-spoken first-class mage who balances a pacifistic nature with a reputation for proctoring exceptionally grueling exams. She is deeply curious about the motivations and visualization techniques of mages she deems to have high potential.

patterns: Reserved; stays silent when frustrated or disappointed
quirks: Uses hair as a medium for both combat and interaction
Mentions her hair smells sweet when challenged about the scent of blood
example_dialogues: I'm sure you can have fun even in this cruel dungeon.

famous_lines: I'm sure you can have fun even in this cruel dungeon.

background.summary: A seasoned first-class mage and recurring exam proctor for the Continental Magic Association. Known for her unique hair-manipulation magic and history of observing exceptional, if dangerous, mages like Übel.
key_events: Proctored four failed First-Class Mage Exams
Observed Übel killing the proctor Burg during a second-class exam
Proctored the second stage of the First-Class Mage Exam at the Ruins of the King's Tomb
Served as a bodyguard for Serie during the Foundation Festival
